SP_Dim_Customer_20240104:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Customer_20240104] AS
BEGIN


/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table Dim_Customer
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
2020-02-23     Boris         Add column  CashoutFeeGroupID + IsCreditReportValidCB
2020-02-15     Boris		 Change case for IsCreditReportValidCB + IsValidCustomer from 2020.03.15
2020-12-16     Boris         Add script Update for 2FA
2021-05-09     Boris         Add POBCountryID
2022-12-12	   Eyal			 Add CIDs to IsCreditReportValidCB logic
2023-01-08	   InbalBML		 Add PhoneVerificationDetails columns
2023-03-14	   Inbal BML     Add WeekendFeePrecentage to Dim_Customer
2023-03-26	   Merav Hu      Replace Ext_Dim_Customer_History_Credit with Ext_etoro_Billing_vDeposit
2023-04-03     Nir H		 replace isnull on column RiskClassificationID  from 0 to 200
2023-11-23     Inbal BML	 Add TanganyID and TanganyStatusID cloumns to Dim_Customer
2023-11-27     Inbal BML	 Remove the update of WorldCheckID and WorldCheckResultsUpdated cloumns

*********************************************************************************************/

DECLARE @end DATE = DATEADD(DAY, DATEDIFF(DAY, 0, GETDATE()),0)

declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),GETDATE(),112))

EXEC DWH_dbo.SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Customer', 'INSERT New AND Updated',@dateID , 1, 0,null,null,null


	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#customer') IS NOT NULL
			  DROP TABLE  #customer

	CREATE TABLE #customer  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
			SELECT	cc.GCID
				, cc.CID 
				, cc.OriginalCID
				, cc.UserName
				, cc.FirstName 
				, cc.LastName
				, cc.MiddleName
				, cc.Gender
				, cc.BirthDate
				, cc.ReferralID
				, cc.CountryID
				, cc.IP
				, cc.Phone
				, cc.Zip
				, cc.Address
				, cc.BuildingNumber
				, cc.City
				, cc.SerialID AS AffiliateID
				, cc.CampaignID
				, cc.LabelID
				, cc.LanguageID
				, cc.Email
				, cc.PlayerStatusID
				, cc.PlayerLevelID
				, cc.FunnelID
				, cc.DownloadID
				, cc.Registered
				, cc.FunnelFromID
				, cc.CommunicationLanguageID
				, cc.BannerID
				, cc.AccountStatusID
				, cc.ID
				, cc.ExternalID
				, cc.PlayerStatusReasonID
				, cc.PendingClosureStatusID
				, cc.CountryIDByIP
				, cc.SubSerialID
				, bc.VerificationLevelID
				, bc.RiskStatusID
				, bc.RiskClassificationID
				, bc.isEmployeeAccount AS EmployeeAccount
				, bc.GuruStatusID
				, bc.AccountTypeID
				, bc.RegulationID
				, bc.ManagerID AS AccountManagerID
				, bc.EvMatchStatus
				, bc.DocumentStatusID
				, bc.RegulationChangeDate
				, bc.IsCopyBlocked
				--, bc.WorldCheckID
				, bc.IsEDD
				, bc.MifidCategorizationID
				, bc.SuitabilityTestStatusID
				, cc.IsEmailVerified
				, bc.DesignatedRegulationID
				, cc.RegionByIP_ID
				, cc.RegionID
				, isnull(bc.HasWallet,0) as HasWallet
				, isnull(bc.PhoneVerifiedID,0) as PhoneVerifiedID
				, CitizenshipCountryID
				, PlayerStatusSubReasonID
				, PrivacyPolicyID
				, CashoutFeeGroupID
				, case when PlayerLevelID <> 4 
							And LabelID NOT IN (30, 26) 
							And CountryID <> 250 
							then 1 else 0 end  as IsValidCustomer
				--, case when PlayerLevelID <> 4 
				--			And LabelID <> 30 
				--			And CountryID <> 250 
				--			and AccountTypeID <> 9 
				--		   then 1 else 0 end as IsValidCustomer
				, case when (NOT (PlayerLevelID = 4 AND AccountTypeID <> 2) 
							AND LabelID NOT IN ( 26,30) 
							AND NOT (CountryID = 250 and cc.CID NOT IN (3400616,10526243,10842855,11464063,21547142))) 
							then 1 else 0 end as IsCreditReportValidCB  -- from 2020.03.15  - change case
				--, case when (NOT (PlayerLevelID = 4 AND AccountTypeID <> 2) 
				--			AND LabelID NOT IN ( 26,30) ) 
				--			then 1 else 0 end as IsCreditReportValidCB
				, bc.SalesForceAccountID
				, cc.POBCountryID
				, cc.WeekendFeePrecentage
FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_Dim_Customer_Customer cc
		JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_Dim_Customer_BOCustomer bc
		ON cc.CID=bc.CID

		
 CREATE  CLUSTERED INDEX #ix_customer ON  #customer (CID)


 	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#new') IS NOT NULL
			  DROP TABLE  #new

CREATE TABLE #new  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS

SELECT CID 

FROM #customer a 
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT NULL FROM DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer WHERE RealCID = a.CID)

CREATE  CLUSTERED INDEX #ix_new ON  #new (CID)


    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#update') IS NOT NULL
			  DROP TABLE #update

	CREATE TABLE #update  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS


 SELECT a.CID
 FROM DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer dc
 JOIN #customer a on a.CID=dc.RealCID
 WHERE 	ISNULL(dc.UserName,0) <> ISNULL(a.UserName,0)  COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN                                                               
		OR ISNULL(dc.FirstName,0) <> ISNULL(a.FirstName,0) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN
		OR ISNULL(dc.LastName,0) <> ISNULL(a.LastName,0) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN
		OR ISNULL(dc.MiddleName,0) <> ISNULL(a.MiddleName,0) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN
		OR ISNULL(dc.Gender,0) <> ISNULL(a.Gender,0) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN
		OR ISNULL(dc.BirthDate,0) <> ISNULL(a.BirthDate,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.ReferralID,0) <> ISNULL(a.ReferralID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.CountryID,0) <> ISNULL(a.CountryID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.Phone,0) <> ISNULL(a.Phone,0) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN
		OR ISNULL(dc.Zip,0) <> ISNULL(a.Zip,0) 
		OR ISNULL(dc.Address,0) <> ISNULL(a.Address,0) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN
		OR ISNULL(dc.BuildingNumber,0) <> ISNULL(a.BuildingNumber,0) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN
		OR ISNULL(dc.City,0) <> ISNULL(a.City,0) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN
		OR ISNULL(dc.AffiliateID,0) <> ISNULL(a.AffiliateID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.CampaignID,0) <> ISNULL(a.CampaignID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.LabelID,0) <> ISNULL(a.LabelID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.LanguageID,0) <> ISNULL(a.LanguageID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.Email,0) <> ISNULL(a.Email,0) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN
		OR ISNULL(dc.PlayerStatusID,0) <> ISNULL(a.PlayerStatusID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.PlayerLevelID,0) <> ISNULL(a.PlayerLevelID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.FunnelID,0) <> ISNULL(a.FunnelID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.DownloadID,0) <> ISNULL(a.DownloadID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.RegisteredReal,0) <> ISNULL(a.Registered,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.FunnelFromID,0) <> ISNULL(a.FunnelFromID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.CommunicationLanguageID,0) <> ISNULL(a.CommunicationLanguageID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.BannerID,0) <> ISNULL(a.BannerID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.AccountStatusID,0) <> ISNULL(a.AccountStatusID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.PlayerStatusReasonID,0) <> ISNULL(a.PlayerStatusReasonID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.PendingClosureStatusID,0) <> ISNULL(a.PendingClosureStatusID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.CountryIDByIP,0) <> ISNULL(a.CountryIDByIP,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.SubSerialID,0) <> ISNULL(a.SubSerialID,0) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN
		OR ISNULL(dc.VerificationLevelID,0) <> ISNULL(a.VerificationLevelID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.RiskStatusID,0) <> ISNULL(a.RiskStatusID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.RiskClassificationID,200) <> ISNULL(a.RiskClassificationID,200)
		OR ISNULL(dc.EmployeeAccount,0) <> ISNULL(a.EmployeeAccount,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.GuruStatusID,0) <> ISNULL(a.GuruStatusID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.AccountTypeID,0) <> ISNULL(a.AccountTypeID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.RegulationID,0) <> ISNULL(a.RegulationID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.AccountManagerID,0) <> ISNULL(a.AccountManagerID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.EvMatchStatus,0) <> ISNULL(a.EvMatchStatus,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.DocumentStatusID,0) <> ISNULL(a.DocumentStatusID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.RegulationChangeDate,0) <> ISNULL(a.RegulationChangeDate,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.IsCopyBlocked,0) <> ISNULL(a.IsCopyBlocked,0)
		--OR ISNULL(dc.WorldCheckID,0) <> ISNULL(a.WorldCheckID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.IsEDD,0) <> ISNULL(a.IsEDD,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.SuitabilityTestStatusID,0) <> ISNULL(a.SuitabilityTestStatusID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.MifidCategorizationID,0) <> ISNULL(a.MifidCategorizationID,0)					
		OR ISNULL(dc.IsEmailVerified,0) <> ISNULL(a.IsEmailVerified,0)	
		OR ISNULL(dc.DesignatedRegulationID,0) <> ISNULL(a.DesignatedRegulationID,0)	
		OR ISNULL(dc.RegionByIP_ID,0) <> ISNULL(a.RegionByIP_ID,0)	
		OR ISNULL(dc.RegionID,0) <> ISNULL(a.RegionID,0)	
		OR ISNULL(dc.HasWallet,0) <> ISNULL(a.HasWallet,0)	
		OR ISNULL(dc.PhoneVerifiedID,0) <> ISNULL(a.PhoneVerifiedID,0)	
		OR ISNULL(dc.CitizenshipCountryID,0) <> ISNULL(a.CitizenshipCountryID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.PlayerStatusSubReasonID,0) <> ISNULL(a.PlayerStatusSubReasonID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.PrivacyPolicyID,0) <> ISNULL(a.PrivacyPolicyID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.CashoutFeeGroupID,0) <> ISNULL(a.CashoutFeeGroupID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.IsValidCustomer,0) <> ISNULL(a.IsValidCustomer,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.IsCreditReportValidCB,0) <> ISNULL(a.IsCreditReportValidCB,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.SalesForceAccountID,0) <> ISNULL(a.SalesForceAccountID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.POBCountryID,0) <> ISNULL(a.POBCountryID,0)
		OR ISNULL(dc.WeekendFeePrecentage,0) <> ISNULL(a.WeekendFeePrecentage,0)
CREATE  CLUSTERED INDEX #ix_update ON  #update (CID)



 IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#full_list') IS NOT NULL
	DROP TABLE #full_list

		CREATE TABLE #full_list  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS


SELECT 
	    a.GCID
      , a.CID
      , a.OriginalCID
      , a.UserName
      , a.FirstName
      , a.LastName
	  , a.MiddleName
      , a.Gender
      , a.BirthDate
      , a.ReferralID
      , a.CountryID
      , a.IP
      , a.AffiliateID
      , a.CampaignID
      , a.LabelID
      , a.LanguageID
      , a.Email
      , a.Phone
      , a.Zip
      , a.City
      , a.Address
	  , a.BuildingNumber
      , a.VerificationLevelID
      , a.PlayerStatusID
      , a.FunnelID
      , a.DownloadID
      , a.Registered
      , a.FunnelFromID
      , a.RiskStatusID
      , a.RiskClassificationID
      , a.EmployeeAccount
      , a.CommunicationLanguageID
      , a.BannerID
      , a.GuruStatusID
      , a.AccountTypeID
      , a.RegulationID
      , a.PlayerLevelID
      , a.AccountStatusID
      , a.AccountManagerID
      , a.ID
      , a.ExternalID
      , a.PlayerStatusReasonID
      , a.PendingClosureStatusID
      , a.CountryIDByIP
      , a.SubSerialID
      , a.EvMatchStatus
      , a.DocumentStatusID
      , a.RegulationChangeDate
      , a.IsCopyBlocked
     -- , WorldCheckID
      , a.IsEDD
	  , a.SuitabilityTestStatusID
	  , a.MifidCategorizationID
	  , a.IsEmailVerified
	  , a.IsValidCustomer
	  --, ISNULL(FA.[2FA],0) as [2FA]      -- 17.4.23 Eitan   before
	  , ISNULL(FA.[2FA],d.[2FA]) as [2FA]  --17.4.23 Eitan  - after
	  , a.DesignatedRegulationID
	  , a.RegionByIP_ID
	  , a.RegionID
	  , isnull(a.HasWallet,0) as HasWallet
	  , a.PhoneVerifiedID
	  , a.CitizenshipCountryID
	  , a.PlayerStatusSubReasonID
	  , a.PrivacyPolicyID
	  , a.CashoutFeeGroupID
	  , a.IsCreditReportValidCB
	  , a.SalesForceAccountID
	  , a.POBCountryID
	  , a.WeekendFeePrecentage
FROM #customer a
	LEFT JOIN #new b
		ON a.CID = b.CID
	LEFT JOIN #update c
		ON a.CID = c.CID 
	left join DWH_dbo.Ext_Dim_Customer_2FA FA
	    on a.GCID = FA.GCID
LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer d ON a.GCID=d.GCID  -- --17.4.23 Eitan  join to get last value of 2FA
WHERE b.CID IS NOT NULL OR c.CID IS NOT NULL 

CREATE  CLUSTERED INDEX #ix_full_list on #full_list (CID)

/************************  BEGIN INSERT TRANSACTION ***************************/

	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#CustomerInitalIndicaton') IS NOT NULL
	DROP TABLE #CustomerInitalIndicaton

	
	Select 
	RealCID,
	FirstDepositAmount,
	FirstDepositDate,
	HasAvatar,
	IsDepositor,
	ScreeningStatusID,
	SalesForceAccountID,
	IsAddressProof,
	IsAddressProofExpiryDate,
	IsIDProof,
	IsIDProofExpiryDate,
	WorldCheckID,
	WorldCheckResultsUpdated
	INTO #CustomerInitalIndicaton
	FROM 
	DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT NULL FROM #full_list WHERE CID=Dim_Customer.RealCID)


BEGIN TRY 

	BEGIN TRANSACTION

	DELETE FROM DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT NULL FROM #full_list WHERE CID=Dim_Customer.RealCID)

	INSERT INTO DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer (GCID
		  ,RealCID
		  ,OriginalCID
		  ,UserName
		  ,FirstName
		  ,LastName
		  ,MiddleName
		  ,Gender
		  ,BirthDate
		  ,ReferralID
		  ,CountryID
		  ,IP
		  ,AffiliateID
		  ,CampaignID
		  ,LabelID
		  ,LanguageID
		  ,Email
		  ,Phone
		  ,Zip
		  ,City
		  ,Address
		  ,BuildingNumber
		  ,VerificationLevelID
		  ,PlayerStatusID
		  ,FunnelID
		  ,DownloadID
		  ,RegisteredReal
		  ,FunnelFromID
		  ,RiskStatusID
		  ,RiskClassificationID
		  ,EmployeeAccount
		  ,CommunicationLanguageID
		  ,BannerID
		  ,GuruStatusID
		  ,AccountTypeID
		  ,RegulationID
		  ,PlayerLevelID
		  ,AccountStatusID
		  ,AccountManagerID
		  ,ID
		  ,ExternalID
		  ,PlayerStatusReasonID
		  ,PendingClosureStatusID
		  ,CountryIDByIP
		  ,SubSerialID
		  ,EvMatchStatus
		  ,DocumentStatusID
		  ,RegulationChangeDate
		  ,IsCopyBlocked
		 -- ,WorldCheckID
		  ,IsEDD
		  ,SuitabilityTestStatusID

	FROM #full_list a

	on a.CID = b.RealCID

 EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Log_Full] 'Dim_Customer', 'INSERT New AND Updated',@dateID , 10, @rnum,null,null,null





 COMMIT TRANSACTION
 END TRY

			THROW;

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#deposit') IS NOT NULL
  DROP TABLE #deposit


CREATE TABLE #deposit  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS

SELECT distinct a.CID, a.FTD, 1 AS IsDepositor, a.FTDAmount
FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_etoro_Billing_vDeposit a
	JOIN DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer b
		ON a.CID = b.RealCID
WHERE 
a.FTD < @end


CREATE  CLUSTERED INDEX #ix_deposit ON #deposit (CID)


UPDATE A
SET  HasAvatar = avatar.HasAvatar
,UpdateDate = GETDATE()
FROM DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer A
	JOIN #avatar avatar
	ON A.RealCID = avatar.RealCID
Where ISNULL(A.HasAvatar,99) <> ISNULL(avatar.HasAvatar,99)
-- 2022-01-18 Boris  + Daniel + Reem - Change condition for update only relevant columns

UPDATE A
SET IsDepositor = isnull(deposit.IsDepositor, 0)
--,FirstDepositDate = isnull(deposit.Occurred, '1900-01-01 00:00:00.000')
--,FirstDepositAmount = deposit.Payment
,FirstDepositDate = isnull(deposit.FTD, '1900-01-01 00:00:00.000')
,FirstDepositAmount = deposit.FTDAmount
,UpdateDate = GETDATE()
FROM DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer A
	JOIN #deposit deposit
	ON A.RealCID=deposit.CID
WHERE A.IsDepositor =0 OR A.FirstDepositDate ='1900-01-01 00:00:00.000' OR A.FirstDepositAmount IS NULL

SP_Dim_Customer_DL_To_Synapse:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Customer_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN
/*
-- =============================================
-- Author:      <Re'em Cohen>
-- Create Date: <2021-09-13>
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Customer_DL_To_Synapse] '20260216'

**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
2022-04-11     Boris S       Disable Ext_Dim_Customer_PEPStatusID not in using
2022-11-22     Adi Ferber	 update subchannel script semandad by Eti Rozilio
2023-01-08	   Inbal BML	 Add PhoneVerificationDetails extract table with PhoneNumber, IsPhoneVerified and PhoneVerificationDate columns 
2023-02-15     Adi Ferber    reffer script to use subchannel unifycode
2023-03-14	   Inbal BML     Add WeekendFeePrecentage to Ext_Dim_Customer_Customer
2023-03-21	   Eyal Boas	 Change Ext_Dim_Customer_2FA
2023-03-26	   Merav Hu      Replace Ext_Dim_Customer_History_Credit with Ext_etoro_Billing_vDeposit
2023-11-23	   Inbal BML	 Add Ext_Dim_Customer_CustomerIdentification table
2023-11-27	   Inbal BML	 Delete Ext_Dim_Customer_WorldCheck
2024-05-23	   Inbal BML	 Add Ext_Dim_Customer_StocksLending table
2024-05-27	   Inbal BML	 Add DLT fields (DltID and DltStatusID) to Ext_Dim_Customer_CustomerIdentification table
2025-03-18     Adi Ferber    Replace Ext_Dim_Customer_PhoneVerificationDetails with Ext_Dim_Customer_PhoneCustomer - new DB and new table with all the phone details 
2025-06-03     Daniel Kaplan Replace Ext_etoro_Billing_vDeposit with Ext_CustomerFinanceDB_Customer_FirstTimeDeposits - new DB and new table with all FTD details 
2025-07-29     Daniel Kaplan Add new fields : FTDRecoveryDate -- Updated ,FTDTransactionID -- TransactionID,FTDPlatformID -- AccountTypeID
2025-11-18	   Ofir Abudy	 get vorrect Phone number to Dim_Customer
2026-02-17	   Inbal BML     Replace PhoneVerifiedID to be in [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_PhoneCustomer instead of [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_BOCustomer - new DB and new table with all the phone details 

-- =============================================
*/
	--DECLARE @dt [Date] = '2026-02-17' 
	DECLARE  @Yesterday as DATETIME
	DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
	
	SET @Yesterday= CAST(@dt as DATETIME) ;
	SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);

	DECLARE @DayDelay as int = -2 
	DECLARE @DelayDate as DATE = DATEADD(d, @DayDelay ,@CurrentDate ) 

	
-- Select Parameter Run Ind - Dim_Customer -------------
	--SELECT [IndRun]
	--FROM [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd](nolock)
	--where [TableName] = 'Dim_Customer'
--------------------------------------------------------

-- Ext_Dim_Customer_Affiliate --------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_Affiliate

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_Affiliate
											(AffiliateID,
											SubChannelID)
	SELECT AffiliateID,
	       SubChannelID
	FROM   [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_SubChannel_UnifyCode]
		
--------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_Dim_Customer_BOCustomer -------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_BOCustomer

	--check if table has CI. if so removes it.
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Remove_CI_From_Tables] @schemaName = '[DWH_dbo]', @tableName= '[Ext_Dim_Customer_BOCustomer]'

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_BOCustomer(
		CID,
		VerificationLevelID,
		RiskStatusID,
		RiskClassificationID,
		isEmployeeAccount,
		GuruStatusID,
		AccountTypeID,
		RegulationID,
		ManagerID,
		EvMatchStatus,
		DocumentStatusID,
		RegulationChangeDate,
		SuitabilityTestStatusID,
		IsCopyBlocked,
		IsEDD,
		MifidCategorizationID,
		DesignatedRegulationID,
		HasWallet,
		--PhoneVerifiedID,
		CashoutFeeGroupID,
		SalesForceAccountID
	)
	SELECT DISTINCT b.CID
			,ISNULL(a.VerificationLevelID,b.VerificationLevelID) AS VerificationLevelID
			,ISNULL(a.RiskStatusID,b.RiskStatusID) AS RiskStatusID
			,ISNULL(a.RiskClassificationID,b.RiskClassificationID) AS RiskClassificationID
			,isEmployeeAccount
			,ISNULL(a.GuruStatusID,b.GuruStatusID) AS GuruStatusID
			,ISNULL(a.AccountTypeID,b.AccountTypeID) AS AccountTypeID
			,ISNULL(a.RegulationID,b.RegulationID) AS RegulationID
			,ISNULL(a.ManagerID,b.ManagerID) AS ManagerID
			,ISNULL(a.EvMatchStatus,b.EvMatchStatus) AS EvMatchStatus
			,ISNULL(a.DocumentStatusID ,b.DocumentStatusID) AS DocumentStatusID
			,RegulationChangeDate 
	        ,ISNULL(a.SuitabilityTestStatusID,b.SuitabilityTestStatusID) AS SuitabilityTestStatusID
			,IsCopyBlocked 
			,IsEDD 
			,ISNULL(a.MifidCategorizationID ,b.MifidCategorizationID) AS MifidCategorizationID,
			ISNULL(a.DesignatedRegulationID ,b.DesignatedRegulationID) AS DesignatedRegulationID,
			ISNULL(cast(a.HasWallet as int ),cast(b.HasWallet as int)) AS HasWallet,
			--cast(HasWallet as int) as HasWallet,
		--	ISNULL(a.PhoneVerifiedID,b.PhoneVerifiedID) as PhoneVerifiedID,
			ISNULL(a.CashoutFeeGroupID,b.CashoutFeeGroupID) as CashoutFeeGroupID,
			[SF_ID] as SalesForceAccountID
	--, ISNULL(a.SalesForceAccountID,b.SalesForceAccountID ) as SalesForceAccountID	
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_BackOffice_Customer] b WITH (NOLOCK)
	LEFT JOIN (
				SELECT
					CID
					,VerificationLevelID
					,RiskStatusID
					,RiskClassificationID
					,GuruStatusID
					,AccountTypeID
					,RegulationID
					,ManagerID 
					,EvMatchStatus
					,SuitabilityTestStatusID
					,DocumentStatusID 
					,MifidCategorizationID
					,DesignatedRegulationID
				--	,PhoneVerifiedID
					,HasWallet
					,CashoutFeeGroupID 
					,rn
					--,SalesForceAccountID
					FROM
					(
						SELECT 
							CID
							,VerificationLevelID
							,RiskStatusID
							,RiskClassificationID
							,GuruStatusID
							,AccountTypeID
							,RegulationID
							,ManagerID 
							,EvMatchStatus
							,SuitabilityTestStatusID
							,DocumentStatusID 
							,MifidCategorizationID
							,DesignatedRegulationID
							--,PhoneVerifiedID
							,HasWallet
							,CashoutFeeGroupID 
							,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CID ORDER BY ValidFrom DESC, ValidTo  DESC) as rn
						--	,SalesForceAccountID
						FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] WITH (NOLOCK)
						WHERE ValidFrom < @CurrentDate  AND ValidFrom >= @DelayDate AND ValidTo >=@CurrentDate	
					) k WHERE rn=1 
			) a
	ON b.CID = a.CID
	LEFT JOIN (
				SELECT 
					CID
					,MAX(ValidTo) AS ValidTo
				FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Customer] WITH (NOLOCK) 
				WHERE ValidFrom < @CurrentDate AND ValidFrom >= @DelayDate AND ValidTo >= @CurrentDate	
				GROUP BY CID
				) c  				
	ON b.CID = c.CID 
	----------

	LEFT JOIN 
	[DWH_staging].[SalesForce_DB_Prod_dbo_IdMapTopology] sf
	on b.CID = sf.CID
	WHERE a.CID is not null  or c.CID is not null

--------------------------------------------------------
-- CREATE INDEX Ext_Dim_Customer_BOCustomer ------------
	IF NOT EXISTS (
		SELECT Name 
		FROM sys.indexes 
		WHERE object_id = object_id('[DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Customer_BOCustomer]')
		AND Name = 'IX_Ext_Dim_Customer_BOCustomerCID') 
	CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX IX_Ext_Dim_Customer_BOCustomerCID ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_BOCustomer  (CID)
--------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_Dim_Customer_2FA --------------------------------
    TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_2FA;

    with AllRecords AS
    (
        SELECT Gcid,AdditionalData,1 as 'TWOFA',
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Gcid ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC ) AS rn
        FROM [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData] WITH (NOLOCK)
        WHERE LoginTypeName in ('TwoFactor_UpdatedByUser','TwoFactor_UpdatedByAdmin') 
    )

    SELECT Gcid, case when AdditionalData like '%Disabled%' then 0 else 1 end as TWOFA into #TEMP FROM AllRecords where rn = 1

    INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_2FA(
        GCID,
        [2FA]
    )
    SELECT 
        [Gcid] as GCID
        ,TWOFA   
    FROM #TEMP
--------------------------------------------------------

-- Ext_Dim_Customer_PhoneCustomer--------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_PhoneCustomer

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_PhoneCustomer
    ( GCID, PhoneNumber, IsPhoneVerified, PhoneVerificationDate , PhoneVerifiedID  )
	SELECT 
		GCID
	  , PhoneNumber
	  , CASE WHEN VerificationStatusID IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsPhoneVerified
	  , CASE WHEN VerificationStatusID IN (1, 2) THEN VerificationDate  ELSE '1900-01-01' END AS PhoneVerificationDate 
	  , VerificationStatusID as PhoneVerifiedID
	FROM  [DWH_staging].[ContactVerification_Phone_Customer]  

--------------------------------------------------------

-- Ext_Dim_Customer_Customer ---------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_Customer

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Remove_CI_From_Tables] @schemaName = '[DWH_dbo]', @tableName= '[Ext_Dim_Customer_Customer]'

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Customer_Customer (
				GCID
			   , CID
			   , OriginalCID 
			   , UserName
			   , FirstName
			   , LastName
			   , MiddleName
			   , Gender
			   , BirthDate
			   , ReferralID
			   , CountryID
			   , [IP]
			   , Phone
			   ,Zip
			   , [Address]
			   , BuildingNumber
			   , City
			   ,SerialID
			   , CampaignID
			   , LabelID
			   , LanguageID
			   , Email
			   , PlayerStatusID
			   , PlayerLevelID
			   , FunnelID
			   , DownloadID
			   , Registered
			   , FunnelFromID
			   , CommunicationLanguageID
			   , BannerID
			   , AccountStatusID
			   , ID
			   , ExternalID
			   ,PlayerStatusReasonID
			   ,PendingClosureStatusID
			   , CountryIDByIP
			   , SubSerialID
	           , PrivacyPolicyID
			   ,IsEmailVerified
			   ,RegionByIP_ID
				,RegionID
				,CitizenshipCountryID
				,PlayerStatusSubReasonID
				,UserName_Lower
				,POBCountryID
				,WeekendFeePrecentage
	)
	SELECT	DISTINCT
		  b.GCID
		, b.CID
		, b.OriginalCID 
		, ISNULL(a.UserName,b.UserName) AS UserName
		, ISNULL(a.FirstName,b.FirstName) AS FirstName
		, ISNULL(a.LastName,b.LastName) AS LastName
		, Case when len(ISNULL(a.MiddleName,b.MiddleName)) ! = 0 then ISNULL(a.MiddleName,b.MiddleName) else NULL END AS MiddleName
		, ISNULL(a.Gender,b.Gender) AS Gender
		, ISNULL(a.BirthDate,b.BirthDate) AS BirthDate
		, b.ReferralID
		, ISNULL(a.CountryID,b.CountryID) AS CountryID
		, b.IP
		, ISNULL(phone.PhoneNumber, ISNULL(a.Phone,b.Phone)) AS Phone
		, ISNULL(a.Zip,b.Zip) AS Zip
		, ISNULL(a.[Address],b.[Address]) AS [Address]
		, b.BuildingNumber AS BuildingNumber
		, ISNULL(a.City,b.City) AS City
		, ISNULL(a.SerialID,b.SerialID) AS SerialID
		, ISNULL(a.CampaignID,b.CampaignID) AS CampaignID
		, ISNULL(a.LabelID,b.LabelID) AS LabelID
		, ISNULL(a.LanguageID,b.LanguageID) AS LanguageID
		, ISNULL(a.Email,b.Email) AS Email
		, ISNULL(a.PlayerStatusID,b.PlayerStatusID) AS PlayerStatusID
		, ISNULL(a.PlayerLevelID,b.PlayerLevelID) AS PlayerLevelID
		, b.FunnelID
		, b.DownloadID
		, b.Registered
		, ISNULL(b.FunnelFromID, 0) as FunnelFromID
		, ISNULL(a.CommunicationLanguageID,b.CommunicationLanguageID) AS CommunicationLanguageID
		, ISNULL(b.BannerID,0) as BannerID
		, ISNULL(a.AccountStatusID,b.AccountStatusID) AS AccountStatusID
		, b.ID
		, b.ExternalID
		, ISNULL(a.PlayerStatusReasonID,b.PlayerStatusReasonID) as PlayerStatusReasonID
		, ISNULL(a.PendingClosureStatusID,b.PendingClosureStatusID) AS PendingClosureStatusID
		, b.CountryIDByIP
		, ISNULL(b.SubSerialID, 0) as SubSerialID
	    , b.PrivacyPolicyID
		,ISNULL(a.IsEmailVerified,b.IsEmailVerified) as IsEmailVerified
		,ISNULL(a.RegionByIP_ID,b.RegionByIP_ID) as RegionByIP_ID
		,ISNULL(a.RegionID,b.RegionID) as RegionID
		,ISNULL(a.CitizenshipCountryID,b.CitizenshipCountryID) as CitizenshipCountryID
		,b.PlayerStatusSubReasonID
		,ISNULL(lower(a.UserName) , b.UserName_LOWER) AS UserName_Lower
		,b.POBCountryID
		,b.WeekendFeePrecentage
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Customer_Customer] b WITH (NOLOCK)
	LEFT JOIN (
				SELECT 
					  [CID]
					, [UserName] 
					, FirstName 
					, LastName
					, [Gender]
					, [BirthDate]
					, [CountryID]
					, Phone
					, Zip
					, [Address]
					, City
					, SerialID 
					, [CampaignID]
					, [LabelID]
					, [LanguageID]
					, [Email]
					, [PlayerStatusID]
					, [PlayerLevelID]
					, [CommunicationLanguageID]
					, [AccountStatusID]
					, PendingClosureStatusID
					, RegionByIP_ID, RegionID,CitizenshipCountryID
					, convert(int,IsEmailVerified) as IsEmailVerified
	                   , PlayerStatusReasonID
					, MiddleName 
					, rn
				FROM
				(
					SELECT 
						  [CID]
						, [UserName] 
						, FirstName 
						, LastName
						, [Gender]
						, [BirthDate]
						, [CountryID]
						, Phone
						, Zip
						, [Address]
						, City
						, SerialID 
						, [CampaignID]
						, [LabelID]
						, [LanguageID]
						, [Email]
						, [PlayerStatusID]
						, [PlayerLevelID]
						, [CommunicationLanguageID]
						, [AccountStatusID]
						, PendingClosureStatusID
						, convert(int,IsEmailVerified) as IsEmailVerified
						, RegionByIP_ID,RegionID,CitizenshipCountryID
	                       , PlayerStatusReasonID
						, MiddleName
						, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY CID ORDER BY ValidFrom DESC, ValidTo  DESC) AS rn
					FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Customer]  WITH (NOLOCK)
					
					WHERE ValidFrom < @CurrentDate AND ValidFrom >= @DelayDate  AND ValidTo >= @CurrentDate	
				) k 
			   WHERE rn=1				
		) a
	ON a.CID = b.CID
	LEFT JOIN 
	(
		SELECT CID, MAX(ValidTo) AS ValidTo 
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] WITH (NOLOCK) 
		WHERE ValidFrom < @CurrentDate AND ValidFrom >= @DelayDate AND ValidTo >= @CurrentDate	 
		GROUP BY CID
	) c 
	ON b.CID = c.CID
	LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Customer_PhoneCustomer] phone ON b.GCID = phone.GCID
	WHERE rn=1  
	or c.CID is not null

SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitt:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted] AS
BEGIN
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted


INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted]
([ProviderID]
,[InstrumentID]
,[DateFrom]
,[DateTo]
,[AskFirst]
,[AskLast]
,[AskMin]
,[AskMax]
,[BidFirst]
,[BidLast]
,[BidMin]
,[BidMax]
,[AskFirstOccurred]
,[AskLastOccurred]
,[AskMinOccurred]
,[AskMaxOccurred]
,[BidFirstOccurred]
,[BidLastOccurred]
,[BidMinOccurred]
,[BidMaxOccurred]
,[UpdateDate]
)
select 
[ProviderID]
,[InstrumentID]
,[DateFrom]
,[DateTo]
,[AskFirst]
,[AskLast]
,[AskMin]
,[AskMax]
,[BidFirst]
,[BidLast]
,[BidMin]
,[BidMax]
,[AskFirstOccurred]
,[AskLastOccurred]
,[AskMinOccurred]
,[AskMaxOccurred]
,[BidFirstOccurred]
,[BidLastOccurred]
,[BidMinOccurred]
,[BidMaxOccurred]
, getdate() as UpdateDate
FROM  [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_Candles_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted]

update [DWH_dbo].Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted
set
BuyCurrencyID = I.BuyCurrencyID,
SellCurrencyID = I.SellCurrencyID
FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted A
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument I
 ON I.InstrumentID = A.InstrumentID
END
SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate] AS
BEGIN


/*
2022-07-05  Boris   Add code to delete duplicate rows

*/

DECLARE @date datetime =cast(cast(getdate()-1 as date) as datetime)
DECLARE @nextdate as datetime
DECLARE @prevweekdate as datetime
SET @nextdate = dateadd(day,1,@date)
SET @prevweekdate = dateadd(week,-1,@date)
--select @date, @nextdate,@prevweekdate

delete [DWH_dbo].[Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate]
where [DateFrom] between @prevweekdate and @nextdate


    WHILE @prevweekdate < @nextdate
    BEGIN
		
     --   drop table if EXISTS #price
		IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#price') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #price;
        SELECT DISTINCT A.*
			           ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.InstrumentID ORDER BY DateFrom DESC) RN
        into #price 
        FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted A
        WHERE A.DateFrom =@prevweekdate

       -- drop table if EXISTS #LastPrice
		IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#LastPrice') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #LastPrice;
        SELECT InstrumentID
              ,DateFrom
	          ,AskFirst AS ASK
	          ,BidFirst AS Bid
	          ,BuyCurrencyID
	          ,SellCurrencyID
        into #LastPrice
        FROM #price 
        WHERE RN = 1 

        --WHILE @prevweekdate < @nextdate
        --BEGIN
        --print @prevweekdate
        INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate]
                   ([InstrumentID]
                   ,[DateFrom]
                   ,[BuyCurrencyID]
                   ,[SellCurrencyID]
                   ,[USD_ConversionRate]
		           ,UpdateDate)
        SELECT a.InstrumentID
              ,a.DateFrom
	          ,b.BuyCurrencyID
	          ,b.SellCurrencyID
              ,CASE WHEN b.SellCurrencyID = 1 THEN 1.00
      	            WHEN b.BuyCurrencyID = 1 THEN 1.00 /  b.Bid
      	            WHEN b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 AND b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 AND c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 THEN 1.00 / c.Bid
      	            WHEN b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 AND b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 AND d.SellCurrencyID = 1 THEN   d.Bid
               END as USD_ConversionRate
	           , getdate() as UpdateDate
        FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted a   	    		                
        --LEFT 
        JOIN #LastPrice b 
	           ON a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID and a.DateFrom = b.DateFrom 
              LEFT JOIN #LastPrice c 
	           ON b.SellCurrencyID = c.SellCurrencyID AND c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 --AND b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.DateFrom = b.DateFrom 
              LEFT JOIN #LastPrice d
	           ON b.SellCurrencyID = d.BuyCurrencyID AND d.SellCurrencyID = 1 ---AND b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and d.DateFrom = b.DateFrom 
        WHERE a.DateFrom  = @prevweekdate
       -- order by 2

        SET @prevweekdate = DATEADD(hour,1,@prevweekdate)   

    END

;

WITH CTE AS( 
   SELECT [InstrumentID],[DateFrom],[BuyCurrencyID],[SellCurrencyID], 
       RN = ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY [InstrumentID],[DateFrom],[BuyCurrencyID],[SellCurrencyID] ORDER BY UpdateDate) 
   FROM DWH_dbo.Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate 
) 

--Select * FROM CTE WHERE RN > 1 order by 2 
DELETE FROM CTE WHERE RN > 1 

END

CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate_DeleteByDateRange] @dateStart [DATETIME],@dateEnd [DATETIME] AS
BEGIN
/*
    Deletes data from Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate between the start and end date provided.
    Together with [DWH_dbo].SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate_InsertDataForHour 
    it replaces [DWH_dbo].SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate.

    Usage:
    EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate_DeleteByDateRange] '2022-01-06 00:00:00', '2022-01-14 00:00:00'

*/

---DECLARE @date datetime =cast(cast(getdate()-1 as date) as datetime)
DECLARE @nextdate as datetime
--DECLARE @prevweekdate as datetime
SET @nextdate = dateadd(day,1,@dateEnd)
--SET @prevweekdate = dateadd(week,-1,@date)


delete [DWH_dbo].[Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate]
where [DateFrom] >= @dateStart and [DateFrom] < @nextdate
END

CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate_InsertDataForHour] @date [DATETIME] AS
BEGIN
/*
This procedure together with [DWH_dbo].SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate_DeleteByDateRange 
replaces [DWH_dbo].SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate.
The responsibility of this procedure is to insert data for a single hour
into [DWH_dbo].Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate.

Usage:
EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate_InsertDataForHour] '2022-01-13 05:00:00'
*/

WITH lp AS (
    SELECT spc.InstrumentID
        ,spc.DateFrom
        ,spc.AskFirst AS ASK
        ,spc.BidFirst AS Bid
        ,spc.BuyCurrencyID
        ,spc.SellCurrencyID
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT A.*
            ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.InstrumentID ORDER BY DateFrom DESC) RN
        FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted A
        WHERE A.DateFrom =@date
    ) spc
    WHERE spc.RN = 1 
)

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Dim_GetSpreadedPriceUSDConversionRate]
    ([InstrumentID]
    ,[DateFrom]
    ,[BuyCurrencyID]
    ,[SellCurrencyID]
    ,[USD_ConversionRate]
    ,UpdateDate)
SELECT a.InstrumentID
        ,a.DateFrom
        ,b.BuyCurrencyID
        ,b.SellCurrencyID
        ,CASE WHEN b.SellCurrencyID = 1 THEN 1.00
            WHEN b.BuyCurrencyID = 1 THEN 1.00 /  b.Bid
            WHEN b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 AND b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 AND c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 THEN 1.00 / c.Bid
            WHEN b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 AND b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 AND d.SellCurrencyID = 1 THEN   d.Bid
        END as USD_ConversionRate
        , getdate() as UpdateDate
FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted a   	    		                
--LEFT 
JOIN lp b 
        ON a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID and a.DateFrom = b.DateFrom 
        LEFT JOIN lp c 
        ON b.SellCurrencyID = c.SellCurrencyID AND c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 --AND b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.DateFrom = b.DateFrom 
        LEFT JOIN lp d
        ON b.SellCurrencyID = d.BuyCurrencyID AND d.SellCurrencyID = 1 ---AND b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and d.DateFrom = b.DateFrom 
WHERE a.DateFrom  = @date
END

SP_Dim_Instrument:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN
-- EXEC  [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument] '2024-12-02'
/********************************************************************************************
Author:      
Date:        
Description: 
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
24.07.2022	   Inbal BML	Adding MetadataID 9315 in filter in EXTRACT TABLE [Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData]
30.10.2024     Inbal BML	Adding new cloumns to Dim_Instrument for Future project (IsFuture,Multiplier,ProviderID,ProviderMargin,eToroMargin,SettlementTime)
25.03.2026     Eyal Boas    a temporary fix to handle the type mismatch in the NumVal column   
*********************************************************************************************/
--declare @dt as date = '2024-12-10'
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[InstrumentTypeID]
           ,[InstrumentType]
           ,[Name]
           ,[DWHInstrumentID]
           ,[StatusID]
           ,[BuyCurrencyID]
           ,[SellCurrencyID]
           ,[BuyCurrency]
           ,[SellCurrency]
           ,[TradeRange]
           ,[DollarRatio]
           ,[PipDifferenceThreshold]
           ,[IsMajorID]
           ,[IsMajor]
           ,[UpdateDate]
           ,[InsertDate]
           ,[InstrumentDisplayName]
           ,[Industry]
           ,[CompanyInfo]
           ,[Exchange]
           ,[ISINCode]
           ,[ISINCountryCode]
           ,[Tradable]
           ,[Symbol]
           ,[BonusCreditUsePercent]
           ,[SymbolFull]
           ,[CUSIP]
           ,[Precision]
           ,[AllowBuy]
           ,[AllowSell]
           ,[VisibleInternallyOnly]
		   ,[IsFuture]
		   ,[Multiplier]
		   ,[ProviderID]
		   ,[ProviderMarginPerLot]
		   ,[eToroMarginPerLot]
		   ,[SettlementTime]
		   ,[OperationMode]
		   )


SELECT
b.InstrumentID,
b.InstrumentTypeID,
CASE WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID=1 THEN 'Currencies'
WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID=2 THEN 'Commodities'
WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID=4 THEN 'Indices'
WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID=5 THEN 'Stocks'
WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID = 6 THEN 'ETF'
WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID = 10 THEN 'Crypto Currencies'
Else 'Other'
END AS InstrumentType,
b.Name,
b.InstrumentID AS DWHInstrumentID,
1 AS [StatusID],
b.BuyCurrencyID,
b.SellCurrencyID,
[BuyCurrency].[Abbreviation] BuyCurrency,
[SellCurrency].[Abbreviation] SellCurrency,
b.TradeRange,
b.DollarRatio,
b.PipDifferenceThreshold,
b.IsMajor AS [IsMajorID],
CASE WHEN b.IsMajor = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No'
END IsMajor,
GETDATE() AS UpdateDate,
GETDATE() AS InsertDate,
InstrumentMetaData.InstrumentDisplayName,
InstrumentMetaData.Industry,
InstrumentMetaData.CompanyInfo,
InstrumentMetaData.Exchange,
InstrumentMetaData.ISINCode,
InstrumentMetaData.ISINCountryCode,
case 
when Tradable in (1,0) then cast(Tradable as int)  
end as Tradable
, Symbol
,pt.BonusCreditUsePercent
,InstrumentMetaData.SymbolFull
,ic.CUSIP
,pt.Precision
,cast(AllowBuy as int) as AllowBuy
,cast(AllowSell as int) as AllowSell
,cast(VisibleInternallyOnly as int) as VisibleInternallyOnly
, case when b.InstrumentID in (select distinct InstrumentID from [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_InstrumentGroups] where GroupID=25) then 1 else 0  end  as IsFuture   ---Inbal 29/10/2024
,fm.Multiplier
,pt.ProviderID
,fii.InitialMargin  as ProviderMarginPerLot
,pt.InitialMarginInAssetCurrency as eToroMarginPerLot
,cast(format(DATEPART(HOUR,  SettlementTime)*100 + DATEPART(MINUTE,  SettlementTime)*1, '00:00') as time) as SettlementTime
,eti.[OperationMode]
FROM
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
INNER JOIN
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Dictionary_Currency] [BuyCurrency]
ON b.[BuyCurrencyID] = [BuyCurrency].[CurrencyID]
INNER JOIN
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Dictionary_Currency] [SellCurrency]
ON b.[SellCurrencyID] = [SellCurrency].[CurrencyID]
LEFT JOIN
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData] as InstrumentMetaData
on b.InstrumentID = InstrumentMetaData.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN 
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_ProviderToInstrument] pt 
ON b.InstrumentID = pt.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN 
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_InstrumentCusip] ic 
ON b.InstrumentID = ic.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN  ---Inbal 29/10/2024
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_FuturesMetaData] fm 
ON b.InstrumentID = fm.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN  ---Inbal 12/11/2024
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_FuturesInstrumentsInitialMarginByProviderMapping]  fii 
ON b.InstrumentID =  fii.InstrumentID
Left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_Instrument] eti 
ON eti.[InstrumentID] = b.InstrumentID

TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData
 
 ------ this is a temporary fix to handle the type mismatch in the NumVal column -----
 update [DWH_staging].[Rankings_StockInfo_InstrumentData] set NumVal = NumVal/1000
where len(NumVal) > 35
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[Description]
           ,[KeyName]
           ,[NumVal])
select 
InstrumentID,
sm.Description,
sm.KeyName,
rs.NumVal
FROM [DWH_staging].[Rankings_StockInfo_InstrumentData] rs WITH(NOLOCK)
join [DWH_staging].[Rankings_StockInfo_Metadata] sm
on rs.MetadataID= sm.MetadataID
where rs.MetadataID in (8557, 8703, 8735, 8444, 9315)


TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData_Platform

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData_Platform]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[PlatformSector]
           ,[PlatformIndustry])
SELECT InstrumentID
,Sector AS PlatformSector
,Industry AS PlatformIndustry FROM 
(select InstrumentID, 
MAX(CASE WHEN MetadataID=8436 THEN StrVal END) Sector,
MAX(CASE WHEN MetadataID=8280 THEN StrVal END) Industry
FROM [DWH_staging].[Rankings_StockInfo_InstrumentData] WITH (NOLOCK) 
WHERE MetadataID IN (8436 ,8280) 
GROUP BY InstrumentID) a

TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerCurrent

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerCurrent]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[ReceivedOnPriceServer])
select InstrumentID,min(ReceivedOnPriceServer) as ReceivedOnPriceServer 
  from [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active]
 where 
Occurred>=dateadd(dd,-1, cast(getdate() as date)) and Occurred <  cast(getdate() as date)
group by InstrumentID


INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerStatic]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[ReceivedOnPriceServer])
select 
a.[InstrumentID]
,a.[ReceivedOnPriceServer]
from 
[DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerCurrent a
left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerStatic b
on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
where b.InstrumentID is null


Update	[DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument
 set [ReceivedOnPriceServer] = b.[ReceivedOnPriceServer]
from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument a
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerStatic b
on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
where a.[ReceivedOnPriceServer] is null


Update [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument
Set
AssetClass = b.AssetClass,
IndustryGroup = b.IndustryGroup
from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument  a
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_Classification_Static b
on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID

UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument
SET
ADV_Last3Months = ra.NumVal ,
MKTcap = isnull(ra2.NumVal , ra5.NumVal ),
SharesOutStanding = ra3.NumVal 
FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument di
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData ra
ON ra.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID AND ra.KeyName='AverageDailyVolumeLast3Months-TTM' --MetadataID=8557
LEFT JOIN  [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData ra2
ON ra2.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID AND ra2.KeyName='MarketCapitalization-TTM' --MetadataID=8735
LEFT JOIN  [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData ra3
ON ra3.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID AND ra3.KeyName='SharesOutstandingCurrent-Annual' --MetadataID=8444
LEFT JOIN  [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData ra4
ON ra4.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID AND ra4.KeyName='LastClose-TTM'  --MetadataID=8703
LEFT JOIN  [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData ra5
ON ra5.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID AND ra5.KeyName='CryptoMarketCap' --MetadataID=9315

UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument
SET
PlatformSector = b.[PlatformSector] ,
PlatformIndustry = b.[PlatformIndustry] 
FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument di
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData_Platform b
ON b.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID

SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation] @auxdate [datetime] AS
begin

--EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation] '2021-04-18'
/*IMPORTANT the reponsibility for the date of the run in on the user of this SP. 
e.g if you need quartertly covarience matrix make sure you put  int the write date */


/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Correlation 
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
2025-
  
*********************************************************************************************/


declare @date as DATETIME

DECLARE @row_count bigint;

set @date= dateadd(mm,-3,@auxdate)
declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@auxdate,112))

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#data') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #data;

Print 'First Date of Q: '+convert(varchar,@date,112)
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Get prices_Half_Records',@dateID,1,0 ,NULL,NULL,NULL
/*get price data in the form of price change*/
--drop table #data
select DateFrom
,InstrumentID
,cast((AskLast-AskFirst)/AskFirst as real) as PriceChange
into #data
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted ---[DWH_dbo].Syn_Price_rep.Candles.GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted
where DateFrom>=@date  and DateFrom<@auxdate 

OPTION(LABEL = 'Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted_1')
 
 --CREATE CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX  ix_date ON #data  --- DANNY

------------------create clustered index IX_datefrom on #data(InstrumentID) with (data_compression =page)

------------------select * into #data2 from #data

------------------create clustered index IX_datefrom2 on #data2(InstrumentID) with (data_compression =page)
 

SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
and row_count > -1
and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted_1'
order by r.[end_time] desc;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Get prices_Half_Records',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL



/*delete all rows for specific date befor insert*/
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Delete Previews data Half_Records',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL
delete from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Active where DateID = convert(int,convert(varchar, @auxdate,112))
OPTION(LABEL = 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Active_1')

SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
and row_count > -1
and r.[label] = 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Active_1'
order by r.[end_time] desc;
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Delete Previews data Half_Records',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


/*----------------------------------------------*/
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Compute Covariance Half_Records',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL




insert into [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Active(DateID,InstrumentID_a,InstrumentID_b,StandardDeviation_a,StandardDeviation_b,SampleSize,Covariance,PearsonCorrelation,InsertDate,UpdateDate)
select  
 convert(int,convert(varchar, @auxdate,112))
,InstrumentID_a
,InstrumentID_b
,STDEVP(PriceChange_a) as StandardDeviation_a
,STDEVP(PriceChange_b) as StandardDeviation_b
,count(*) as SampleSize
,cast(sum(PriceChange_a*PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20))/count(*)-(cast(sum(PriceChange_a)*sum(PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20)))/power(count(*),2.00) as Covariance
,(cast(sum(PriceChange_a*PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20))/count(*)-(cast(sum(PriceChange_a)*sum(PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20)))/power(count(*),2.00))/nullif(cast(STDEVP(PriceChange_a)*STDEVP(PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20)),0) as PearsonCorrelation
, GETDATE() AS InsertDate
, GETDATE() AS UpdateDate
from 
(
select a.DateFrom,a.InstrumentID as InstrumentID_a,b.InstrumentID as InstrumentID_b ,a.PriceChange as PriceChange_a,b.PriceChange as PriceChange_b
 from #data a join #data b on(a.DateFrom=b.DateFrom)
  WHERE a.InstrumentID <= b.InstrumentID
) k
group by InstrumentID_a,InstrumentID_b
having  STDEVP(PriceChange_a)>0 AND  STDEVP(PriceChange_b)>0
OPTION(LABEL = 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Active_2')

SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
and row_count > -1
and r.[label] = 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Active_2'
order by r.[end_time] desc;


--SELECT @row_count
--PRINT @row_count

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Compute Covariance Half_Records',@dateID,10, 0,NULL,NULL,NULL -- @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL
end/*Procedure*/
SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Build_Grou:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Build_GroupsInstruments] @auxdate [datetime] AS
begin
 
		declare @FromDate datetime =dateadd(mm,-3,@auxdate)
		


 		DECLARE @NumInstrumentID BIGINT
		DECLARE @NumRowsInGroup BIGINT
		SELECT @NumInstrumentID=COUNT_big(DISTINCT InstrumentID) FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted  
		WHERE DateFrom>=@FromDate AND DateFrom<@auxdate
		 
		PRINT @NumInstrumentID


		SET @NumRowsInGroup= CAST((@NumInstrumentID*@NumInstrumentID/2.0)/89.0 AS BigINT)
		PRINT @NumRowsInGroup
		
		TRUNCATE TABLE DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument_Correlation_GroupsInstruments

		;WITH Step1 AS 
		(
		SELECT InstrumentID,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY InstrumentID)  AS Rows_InstrumentID  
		FROM 
		(SELECT DISTINCT InstrumentID
		 from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted 
		 where DateFrom>=@FromDate  and DateFrom<@auxdate
		 
		 )DistInstrument
		)
		,Step2
		AS
		(
		SELECT *,
		@NumInstrumentID+1- Rows_InstrumentID AS CountRowPerInstrument  
		FROM Step1
		)
		,Step3 AS
		(
		SELECT *,SUM(CountRowPerInstrument) OVER (ORDER BY  Rows_InstrumentID)  AS Sum3
		FROM Step2
		)
		,Step4 AS
		(
		SELECT *,CAST (Sum3/@NumRowsInGroup AS int) +1 AS GroupID
		FROM Step3
		)
	 
		INSERT INTO DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument_Correlation_GroupsInstruments
		(GroupID,MinInstrumentID,MaxInstrumentID)
		SELECT GroupID,
			MIN(InstrumentID) AS MinInstrumentID,
			MAX(InstrumentID) AS MaxInstrumentID
			 
		FROM Step4
		GROUP BY GroupID
 
end
SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_FilterByIn:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_FilterByInstrumentID] @auxdate [datetime],@GroupID [int],@TableID [int],@WithDelete [int] AS
begin

 
/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Eitan Lipovetsky
Date:        2025-01-26
Description: Update table [DWH_dbo].SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_FilterByInstrumentID
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
   
*********************************************************************************************/


declare @date as DATETIME

DECLARE @row_count bigint;
DECLARE @FromInstrumentID INT
DECLARE @ToInstrumentID INT
DECLARE @SQL VARCHAR(8000)
set @date= dateadd(mm,-3,@auxdate)
declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@auxdate,112))

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#data') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #data;

Print 'First Date of Q: '+convert(varchar,@date,112)
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_FilterByInstrumentID','Get prices',@dateID,1,0 ,NULL,@TableID,@GroupID
/*get price data in the form of price change*/
--drop table #data

SET @SQL='
SELECT DateFrom,InstrumentID
,cast((AskLast-AskFirst)/AskFirst as real) as PriceChange
into #data
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted ---[DWH_dbo].Syn_Price_rep.Candles.GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted
where DateFrom>='''+CONVERT(VARCHAR(23), @date, 121) +'''  and DateFrom<'''+CONVERT(VARCHAR(23), @auxdate, 121)+''' 
OPTION(LABEL = ''Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted__'+CAST(@GroupID AS VARCHAR(5))+''')
'
--PRINT (@SQL)
EXEC (@SQL)


 SELECT
       @FromInstrumentID=MinInstrumentID,
       @ToInstrumentID=MaxInstrumentID
 FROM DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument_Correlation_GroupsInstruments
 WHERE GroupID=@GroupID

 

------------------create clustered index IX_datefrom on #data(InstrumentID) with (data_compression =page)

------------------select * into #data2 from #data

------------------create clustered index IX_datefrom2 on #data2(InstrumentID) with (data_compression =page)
 

SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
and row_count > -1
and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted__'+CAST(@GroupID AS VARCHAR(5))
order by r.[end_time] desc;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_FilterByInstrumentID','Get prices',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,@TableID,@GroupID



IF @WithDelete=1
begin

    /*delete all rows for specific date befor insert*/
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_FilterByInstrumentID','Delete Previews data',@dateID,1,0,NULL,@TableID,@GroupID
	--delete from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records_10 where DateID = convert(int,convert(varchar, @auxdate,112))

	SET @SQL='delete from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records_'+CAST(@TableID AS varchar(4))+' where DateID = ' + CAST(CONVERT(int,convert(varchar, @auxdate,112)) AS VARCHAR(8)) +'OPTION(LABEL = ''Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Delete_Previews__'+CAST(@GroupID AS VARCHAR(5))+''')'
	EXEC (@SQL)

	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Delete_Previews__'+CAST(@GroupID AS VARCHAR(5))
	order by r.[end_time] desc;
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_FilterByInstrumentID','Delete Previews data',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,@TableID,@GroupID

END
/*----------------------------------------------*/
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_FilterByInstrumentID','Compute Covariance',@dateID,1,0,NULL,@TableID,@GroupID


SET @SQL='
insert into [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records_'+CAST(@TableID  AS VARCHAR(4))+'(DateID,InstrumentID_a,InstrumentID_b,StandardDeviation_a,StandardDeviation_b,SampleSize,Covariance,PearsonCorrelation,InsertDate,UpdateDate)
select  
 '+CAST(convert(int,convert(varchar, @auxdate,112)) AS VARCHAR(8)) +' as DateID
,InstrumentID_a
,InstrumentID_b
,STDEVP(PriceChange_a) as StandardDeviation_a
,STDEVP(PriceChange_b) as StandardDeviation_b
,count(*) as SampleSize
,cast(sum(PriceChange_a*PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20))/count(*)-(cast(sum(PriceChange_a)*sum(PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20)))/power(count(*),2.00) as Covariance
,(cast(sum(PriceChange_a*PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20))/count(*)-(cast(sum(PriceChange_a)*sum(PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20)))/power(count(*),2.00))/nullif(cast(STDEVP(PriceChange_a)*STDEVP(PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20)),0) as PearsonCorrelation
, GETDATE() AS InsertDate
, GETDATE() AS UpdateDate
from 
(
select a.DateFrom,a.InstrumentID as InstrumentID_a,b.InstrumentID as InstrumentID_b ,a.PriceChange as PriceChange_a,b.PriceChange as PriceChange_b
 from #data a join #data b on(a.DateFrom=b.DateFrom)
  WHERE a.InstrumentID <= b.InstrumentID
  AND a.InstrumentID BETWEEN '+CAST(@FromInstrumentID AS varchar(10))+' AND '+CAST(@ToInstrumentID AS varchar(10))+' 
) k
group by InstrumentID_a,InstrumentID_b
having  STDEVP(PriceChange_a)>0 AND  STDEVP(PriceChange_b)>0
OPTION(LABEL = ''Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Compute_Covariance__'+CAST(@GroupID AS VARCHAR(5))+''')
'
EXEC (@SQL)

SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
and row_count > -1
and r.[label] = 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Compute_Covariance__'+CAST(@GroupID AS VARCHAR(5))
AND operation_type='OnOperation'
order by r.[end_time] desc;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_FilterByInstrumentID','Compute Covariance',@dateID,10, @row_count,NULL,@TableID,@GroupID-- @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL
END
SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Recor:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records] @auxdate [datetime] AS
begin

--EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records] '2021-04-18'
/*IMPORTANT the reponsibility for the date of the run in on the user of this SP. 
e.g if you need quartertly covarience matrix make sure you put  int the write date */


/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
2025-
  
*********************************************************************************************/


declare @date as DATETIME

DECLARE @row_count bigint;

set @date= dateadd(mm,-3,@auxdate)
declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@auxdate,112))

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#data') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #data;

Print 'First Date of Q: '+convert(varchar,@date,112)
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Get prices_Half_Records',@dateID,1,0 ,NULL,NULL,NULL
/*get price data in the form of price change*/
--drop table #data
select DateFrom
,InstrumentID
,cast((AskLast-AskFirst)/AskFirst as real) as PriceChange
into #data
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted ---[DWH_dbo].Syn_Price_rep.Candles.GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted
where DateFrom>=@date  and DateFrom<@auxdate 

OPTION(LABEL = 'Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted_1')
 
 --CREATE CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX  ix_date ON #data  --- DANNY

------------------create clustered index IX_datefrom on #data(InstrumentID) with (data_compression =page)

------------------select * into #data2 from #data

------------------create clustered index IX_datefrom2 on #data2(InstrumentID) with (data_compression =page)
 

SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
and row_count > -1
and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted_1'
order by r.[end_time] desc;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Get prices_Half_Records',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL



/*delete all rows for specific date befor insert*/
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Delete Previews data Half_Records',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL
delete from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records where DateID = convert(int,convert(varchar, @auxdate,112))
OPTION(LABEL = 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records_1')

SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
and row_count > -1
and r.[label] = 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records_1'
order by r.[end_time] desc;
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Delete Previews data Half_Records',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


/*----------------------------------------------*/
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Compute Covariance Half_Records',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL




insert into [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records(DateID,InstrumentID_a,InstrumentID_b,StandardDeviation_a,StandardDeviation_b,SampleSize,Covariance,PearsonCorrelation,InsertDate,UpdateDate)
select  
 convert(int,convert(varchar, @auxdate,112))
,InstrumentID_a
,InstrumentID_b
,STDEVP(PriceChange_a) as StandardDeviation_a
,STDEVP(PriceChange_b) as StandardDeviation_b
,count(*) as SampleSize
,cast(sum(PriceChange_a*PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20))/count(*)-(cast(sum(PriceChange_a)*sum(PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20)))/power(count(*),2.00) as Covariance
,(cast(sum(PriceChange_a*PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20))/count(*)-(cast(sum(PriceChange_a)*sum(PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20)))/power(count(*),2.00))/nullif(cast(STDEVP(PriceChange_a)*STDEVP(PriceChange_b) as decimal(38,20)),0) as PearsonCorrelation
, GETDATE() AS InsertDate
, GETDATE() AS UpdateDate
from 
(
select a.DateFrom,a.InstrumentID as InstrumentID_a,b.InstrumentID as InstrumentID_b ,a.PriceChange as PriceChange_a,b.PriceChange as PriceChange_b
 from #data a join #data b on(a.DateFrom=b.DateFrom)
  WHERE a.InstrumentID <= b.InstrumentID
) k
group by InstrumentID_a,InstrumentID_b
having  STDEVP(PriceChange_a)>0 AND  STDEVP(PriceChange_b)>0
OPTION(LABEL = 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records_2')

SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
and row_count > -1
and r.[label] = 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation_Half_Records_2'
order by r.[end_time] desc;


--SELECT @row_count
--PRINT @row_count

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Dim_Instrument_Correlation','Compute Covariance Half_Records',@dateID,10, 0,NULL,NULL,NULL -- @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL
end/*Procedure*/
SP_Dim_Instrument_Snapshot:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument_Snapshot] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author: Inbal BML   
Date: 2024-10-31       
Description: daily Snapshot of Dim_Instrument table
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------

  
*********************************************************************************************/
-- EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument_Snapshot] '2024-11-06'
--declare @dt as date = '2024-12-02'
  DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME
  DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
  DECLARE @Tomorrow as DATETIME
  SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
  SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday)
  SET @Tomorrow = DATEADD(DAY, 2 ,@Yesterday)
  DECLARE @Yesterdayint as int = convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,@Yesterday),0),112)) 
  DECLARE @CurrentDateint as int = convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,@CurrentDate),0),112))
  DECLARE @Tomorrowint as int = convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,@Tomorrow),0),112)) 
----------------------------- delete rows --------------------------
  DELETE FROM [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument_Snapshot]
  WHERE DateID >= @Yesterdayint
  and DateID < @CurrentDateint
--------------------------------------------------------------------

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument_Snapshot]
           ([DateID]
           ,[InstrumentID]
		   ,[Multiplier]
		   ,[ProviderID]
		   ,[ProviderMarginPerLot]
		   ,[eToroMarginPerLot]
		   ,[SettlementTime]
		   ,[IsFuture]
		   ,[UpdateDate]
		   )

SELECT 	   @Yesterdayint as DateID 
		  , InstrumentID 
		  , Multiplier
	 	  , ProviderID
		  , ProviderMarginPerLot
		  , eToroMarginPerLot
		  , CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(CHAR(8),  @dt, 112)  + ' ' + CONVERT(CHAR(8), SettlementTime , 108)) as SettlementDateTime
		  , IsFuture
		  , getdate() as UpdateDate
from [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument] 

END
SP_Dim_Instrument_bkp_2025_11_24:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument_bkp_2025_11_24] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN
-- EXEC  [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument] '2024-12-02'
/********************************************************************************************
Author:      
Date:        
Description: 
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
24.07.2022	   Inbal BML	Adding MetadataID 9315 in filter in EXTRACT TABLE [Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData]
30.10.2024     Inbal BML	Adding new cloumns to Dim_Instrument for Future project (IsFuture,Multiplier,ProviderID,ProviderMargin,eToroMargin,SettlementTime)
  
*********************************************************************************************/
--declare @dt as date = '2024-12-10'
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[InstrumentTypeID]
           ,[InstrumentType]
           ,[Name]
           ,[DWHInstrumentID]
           ,[StatusID]
           ,[BuyCurrencyID]
           ,[SellCurrencyID]
           ,[BuyCurrency]
           ,[SellCurrency]
           ,[TradeRange]
           ,[DollarRatio]
           ,[PipDifferenceThreshold]
           ,[IsMajorID]
           ,[IsMajor]
           ,[UpdateDate]
           ,[InsertDate]
           ,[InstrumentDisplayName]
           ,[Industry]
           ,[CompanyInfo]
           ,[Exchange]
           ,[ISINCode]
           ,[ISINCountryCode]
           ,[Tradable]
           ,[Symbol]
           ,[BonusCreditUsePercent]
           ,[SymbolFull]
           ,[CUSIP]
           ,[Precision]
           ,[AllowBuy]
           ,[AllowSell]
           ,[VisibleInternallyOnly]
		   ,[IsFuture]
		   ,[Multiplier]
		   ,[ProviderID]
		   ,[ProviderMarginPerLot]
		   ,[eToroMarginPerLot]
		   ,[SettlementTime]		   
		   )


SELECT
b.InstrumentID,
b.InstrumentTypeID,
CASE WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID=1 THEN 'Currencies'
WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID=2 THEN 'Commodities'
WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID=4 THEN 'Indices'
WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID=5 THEN 'Stocks'
WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID = 6 THEN 'ETF'
WHEN b.InstrumentTypeID = 10 THEN 'Crypto Currencies'
Else 'Other'
END AS InstrumentType,
b.Name,
b.InstrumentID AS DWHInstrumentID,
1 AS [StatusID],
b.BuyCurrencyID,
b.SellCurrencyID,
[BuyCurrency].[Abbreviation] BuyCurrency,
[SellCurrency].[Abbreviation] SellCurrency,
b.TradeRange,
b.DollarRatio,
b.PipDifferenceThreshold,
b.IsMajor AS [IsMajorID],
CASE WHEN b.IsMajor = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No'
END IsMajor,
GETDATE() AS UpdateDate,
GETDATE() AS InsertDate,
InstrumentMetaData.InstrumentDisplayName,
InstrumentMetaData.Industry,
InstrumentMetaData.CompanyInfo,
InstrumentMetaData.Exchange,
InstrumentMetaData.ISINCode,
InstrumentMetaData.ISINCountryCode,
case 
when Tradable in (1,0) then cast(Tradable as int)  
end as Tradable
, Symbol
,pt.BonusCreditUsePercent
,InstrumentMetaData.SymbolFull
,ic.CUSIP
,pt.Precision
,cast(AllowBuy as int) as AllowBuy
,cast(AllowSell as int) as AllowSell
,cast(VisibleInternallyOnly as int) as VisibleInternallyOnly
, case when b.InstrumentID in (select distinct InstrumentID from [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_InstrumentGroups] where GroupID=25) then 1 else 0  end  as IsFuture   ---Inbal 29/10/2024
,fm.Multiplier
,pt.ProviderID
,fii.InitialMargin  as ProviderMarginPerLot
,pt.InitialMarginInAssetCurrency as eToroMarginPerLot
,cast(format(DATEPART(HOUR,  SettlementTime)*100 + DATEPART(MINUTE,  SettlementTime)*1, '00:00') as time) as SettlementTime
FROM
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
INNER JOIN
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Dictionary_Currency] [BuyCurrency]
ON b.[BuyCurrencyID] = [BuyCurrency].[CurrencyID]
INNER JOIN
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Dictionary_Currency] [SellCurrency]
ON b.[SellCurrencyID] = [SellCurrency].[CurrencyID]
LEFT JOIN
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData] as InstrumentMetaData
on b.InstrumentID = InstrumentMetaData.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN 
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_ProviderToInstrument] pt 
ON b.InstrumentID = pt.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN 
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_InstrumentCusip] ic 
ON b.InstrumentID = ic.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN  ---Inbal 29/10/2024
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_FuturesMetaData] fm 
ON b.InstrumentID = fm.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN  ---Inbal 12/11/2024
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_FuturesInstrumentsInitialMarginByProviderMapping]  fii 
ON b.InstrumentID =  fii.InstrumentID

TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[Description]
           ,[KeyName]
           ,[NumVal])
select 
InstrumentID,
sm.Description,
sm.KeyName,
rs.NumVal
FROM [DWH_staging].[Rankings_StockInfo_InstrumentData] rs WITH(NOLOCK)
join [DWH_staging].[Rankings_StockInfo_Metadata] sm
on rs.MetadataID= sm.MetadataID
where rs.MetadataID in (8557, 8703, 8735, 8444, 9315)


TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData_Platform

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData_Platform]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[PlatformSector]
           ,[PlatformIndustry])
SELECT InstrumentID
,Sector AS PlatformSector
,Industry AS PlatformIndustry FROM 
(select InstrumentID, 
MAX(CASE WHEN MetadataID=8436 THEN StrVal END) Sector,
MAX(CASE WHEN MetadataID=8280 THEN StrVal END) Industry
FROM [DWH_staging].[Rankings_StockInfo_InstrumentData] WITH (NOLOCK) 
WHERE MetadataID IN (8436 ,8280) 
GROUP BY InstrumentID) a

TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerCurrent

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerCurrent]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[ReceivedOnPriceServer])
select InstrumentID,min(ReceivedOnPriceServer) as ReceivedOnPriceServer 
  from [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active]
 where 
Occurred>=dateadd(dd,-1, cast(getdate() as date)) and Occurred <  cast(getdate() as date)
group by InstrumentID


INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerStatic]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[ReceivedOnPriceServer])
select 
a.[InstrumentID]
,a.[ReceivedOnPriceServer]
from 
[DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerCurrent a
left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerStatic b
on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
where b.InstrumentID is null


Update	[DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument
 set [ReceivedOnPriceServer] = b.[ReceivedOnPriceServer]
from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument a
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_ReceivedOnPriceServerStatic b
on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
where a.[ReceivedOnPriceServer] is null


Update [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument
Set
AssetClass = b.AssetClass,
IndustryGroup = b.IndustryGroup
from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument  a
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_Classification_Static b
on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID

UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument
SET
ADV_Last3Months = ra.NumVal ,
MKTcap = isnull(ra2.NumVal , ra5.NumVal ),
SharesOutStanding = ra3.NumVal 
FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument di
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData ra
ON ra.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID AND ra.KeyName='AverageDailyVolumeLast3Months-TTM' --MetadataID=8557
LEFT JOIN  [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData ra2
ON ra2.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID AND ra2.KeyName='MarketCapitalization-TTM' --MetadataID=8735
LEFT JOIN  [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData ra3
ON ra3.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID AND ra3.KeyName='SharesOutstandingCurrent-Annual' --MetadataID=8444
LEFT JOIN  [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData ra4
ON ra4.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID AND ra4.KeyName='LastClose-TTM'  --MetadataID=8703
LEFT JOIN  [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData ra5
ON ra5.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID AND ra5.KeyName='CryptoMarketCap' --MetadataID=9315

UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument
SET
PlatformSector = b.[PlatformSector] ,
PlatformIndustry = b.[PlatformIndustry] 
FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument di
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Instrument_StockInfo_InstrumentData_Platform b
ON b.InstrumentID= di.InstrumentID 



INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[InstrumentTypeID]
           ,[InstrumentType]
           ,[Name]
           ,[DWHInstrumentID]
           ,[StatusID]
           ,[BuyCurrencyID]
           ,[SellCurrencyID]
           ,[BuyCurrency]
           ,[SellCurrency]
           ,[TradeRange]
           ,[DollarRatio]
           ,[PipDifferenceThreshold]
           ,[IsMajorID]
           ,[IsMajor]
           ,[UpdateDate]
           ,[InsertDate]
           ,[InstrumentDisplayName]
           ,[Industry]
           ,[CompanyInfo]
           ,[Exchange]
           ,[ISINCode]
           ,[ISINCountryCode]
           ,[Tradable]
           ,[Symbol]
           ,[ReceivedOnPriceServer]
           ,[BonusCreditUsePercent]
           ,[SymbolFull]
           ,[CUSIP]
           ,[Precision]
           ,[AllowBuy]
           ,[AllowSell]
           ,[AssetClass]
           ,[IndustryGroup]
           ,[ADV_Last3Months]
           ,[MKTcap]
           ,[SharesOutStanding]
           ,[VisibleInternallyOnly]
           ,[PlatformSector]
           ,[PlatformIndustry]
		   ,[IsFuture]
		   ,[Multiplier]
		   ,[ProviderID]
		   ,[ProviderMarginPerLot]
		   ,[eToroMarginPerLot]
		   ,[SettlementTime])
     VALUES
		  (
		 0	
		,0	
		,'NA'

		,0	
		,'NA'	
		,'NA'

		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL	
		,NULL
		,NULL
		,NULL
		,NULL

EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Instrument_Snapshot]  @dt
