SP_Dim_Mirror_DL_To_Synapse:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Mirror_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN
-- =============================================
-- Author:      <Re'em Cohen>
-- Create Date: 2021-09-05
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Mirror_DL_To_Synapse] 
-- =============================================

   DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
   DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME

   SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
   SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);

-- Select Parameter Run Ind - Dim_Mirror ---------
  --SELECT
  --   [IndRun]
  --FROM [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd](nolock)
  --where [TableName] = 'Dim_Mirror'
--------------------------------------------------
-- Update Delete Rows ----------------------------
	delete from [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Mirror] 
	where OpenOccurred >= @Yesterday and OpenOccurred < @CurrentDate 

	Update [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Mirror] 
	set 
	CloseOccurred = '1900-01-01 00:00:00.000' ,
	CloseDateID = 0
	where CloseOccurred >= @Yesterday and CloseOccurred < @CurrentDate
--------------------------------------------------
-- Extract Ext_Dim_Mirror_Real -------------------
	truncate table [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_Real

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_Real
	(
	   MirrorID
      ,CID
	  ,ParentCID
	  ,ParentUserName
	  ,Amount
	  ,OpenOccurred
	  ,OpenDateID
	  ,CloseOccurred
	  ,CloseDateID
	  ,MirrorTypeID
	  ,CloseMirrorActionType
	  ,IsActive
	  ,IsOpenOpen
	  ,PauseCopy
	  ,MirrorSL
	  ,MirrorSLPercentage
	  ,RealizedEquity
	  ,InitialInvestment
	  ,WithdrawalSummary
	  ,DepositSummary
	  ,RealziedPnL
      ,GuruTPV
      ,UseCopyDividend
	  )

	SELECT  
	   MirrorID
      ,CID
	  ,ParentCID
	  ,ParentUserName
	  ,Amount
	  ,Occurred as OpenOccurred
	  ,convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,Occurred),0),112)) as OpenDateID
	  ,cast(0 as datetime) as CloseOccurred
	  ,0 As CloseDateID
	  ,MirrorTypeID
	  ,CloseMirrorActionType
	  ,IsActive
	  ,IsOpenOpen
	  ,PauseCopy
	  ,MirrorSL
	  ,MirrorSLPercentage
	  ,RealizedEquity
	  ,InitialInvestment
	  ,WithdrawalSummary
	  ,DepositSummary
	  ,NetProfit as RealziedPnL
      ,GuruTPV
      ,UseCopyDividend
	  
	from [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_Mirror] with (Nolock)
	where Occurred < @CurrentDate
--------------------------------------------------
-- Extract Ext_Dim_Mirror_History ----------------
	truncate table [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_History

	insert into [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Mirror_History]
	(
	   MirrorID
      ,CID
	  ,ParentCID
	  ,ParentUserName
	  ,Amount
	  ,OpenOccurred
	  ,OpenDateID
	 	,CloseOccurred
	    ,CloseDateID
	  ,MirrorTypeID
	  ,CloseMirrorActionType
	  ,IsActive
	  ,IsOpenOpen
	  ,PauseCopy
	  ,MirrorSL
	  ,MirrorSLPercentage
	  ,RealizedEquity
	  ,InitialInvestment
	  ,WithdrawalSummary
	  ,DepositSummary
	  ,RealziedPnL
	  ,GuruTPV
	  ,UseCopyDividend
	)

	SELECT
	   MirrorID
      ,CID
	  ,ParentCID
	  ,ParentUserName
	  ,Amount
	  ,Occurred as OpenOccurred
	  ,convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,Occurred),0),112)) as OpenDateID
	 	,ModificationDate as CloseOccurred
	    ,convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,ModificationDate),0),112))as CloseDateID
	  ,MirrorTypeID
	  ,CloseMirrorActionType
	  ,IsActive
	  ,IsOpenOpen
	  ,PauseCopy
	  ,MirrorSL
	  ,MirrorSLPercentage
	  ,RealizedEquity
	  ,InitialInvestment
	  ,WithdrawalSummary
	  ,DepositSummary
	  ,NetProfit as RealziedPnL
	  ,GuruTPV
	  ,UseCopyDividend
	  
	from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Mirror] with (nolock)
	Where
	MirrorOperationID = 2 and 
		((
		ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
		and 
	                   ModificationDate < @CurrentDate
		)
	
	or
		(
		Occurred >= @Yesterday
		and
		Occurred < @CurrentDate
		and
	                  ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
		))
	
--------------------------------------------------
-- Update from Ext_Dim_Mirror_History ------------
	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Dim_Mirror 
	SET 
	Amount = b.Amount,
	OpenOccurred = b.OpenOccurred,
	OpenDateID = b.OpenDateID,
	CloseOccurred = b.CloseOccurred,
	CloseDateID = b.CloseDateID,
	MirrorTypeID = b.MirrorTypeID,
	CloseMirrorActionType = b.CloseMirrorActionType,
	IsActive = b.IsActive,
	IsOpenOpen = b.IsOpenOpen,
	PauseCopy = b.PauseCopy,
	MirrorSL = b.MirrorSL,
	MirrorSLPercentage = b.MirrorSLPercentage,
	RealizedEquity = b.RealizedEquity,
	InitialInvestment = b.InitialInvestment,
	WithdrawalSummary = b.WithdrawalSummary,
	DepositSummary = b.DepositSummary,
	RealziedPnL = b.RealziedPnL,
	GuruTPV = b.GuruTPV,
	UseCopyDividend = b.UseCopyDividend,
	UpdateDate = getdate()
	from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Mirror a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_History AS b
	ON a.MirrorID = b.MirrorID
	and a.CloseDateID = 0 
--------------------------------------------------
-- Insert from Ext_Dim_Mirror_History ------------
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Mirror]
	           ([MirrorID]
	           ,[CID]
	           ,[ParentCID]
	           ,[ParentUserName]
	           ,[Amount]
	           ,[OpenOccurred]
	           ,[OpenDateID]
	           ,[CloseOccurred]
	           ,[CloseDateID]
	           ,[MirrorTypeID]
	           ,[CloseMirrorActionType]
	           ,[IsActive]
	           ,[IsOpenOpen]
	           ,[PauseCopy]
	           ,[MirrorSL]
	           ,[MirrorSLPercentage]
	           ,[RealizedEquity]
	           ,[InitialInvestment]
	           ,[WithdrawalSummary]
	           ,[DepositSummary]
	           ,[RealziedPnL]
	           ,[GuruTPV]
	           ,[UseCopyDividend]
			   ,[UpdateDate])
	select  
	[MirrorID]
	,[CID]
	,[ParentCID]
	,[ParentUserName]
	,[Amount]
	,[OpenOccurred]
	,[OpenDateID]
	,case when CloseOccurred  >=cast(getdate() as date) then '19000101' else CloseOccurred  end as CloseOccurred
	,case when CloseOccurred >=cast(getdate() as date)  then 0 else convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,CloseOccurred),0),112)) end as CloseDateID
	--,[CloseOccurred]
	--,[CloseDateID]
	,[MirrorTypeID]
	,[CloseMirrorActionType]
	,[IsActive]
	,[IsOpenOpen]
	,[PauseCopy]
	,[MirrorSL]
	,[MirrorSLPercentage]
	,[RealizedEquity]
	,[InitialInvestment]
	,[WithdrawalSummary]
	,[DepositSummary]
	,[RealziedPnL]
	,[GuruTPV]
	,[UseCopyDividend]
	,getdate()
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_History
	where
	CloseDateID >= convert(int,convert(varchar, @Yesterday ,112))
	and OpenDateID =  convert(int,convert(varchar, @Yesterday,112))

--------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_Dim_Mirror_FundCIDs -----------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_FundCIDs

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Mirror_FundCIDs]

	SELECT b.CID
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_BackOffice_Customer] b WITH (NOLOCK)	
	WHERE b.AccountTypeID=9
--------------------------------------------------
-- Update IsCopyFundMirror Ext_Dim_Mirror_Real ---
	UPDATE a
	SET IsCopyFundMirror = 1
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_Real a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_FundCIDs b
	ON a.ParentCID = b.CID
--------------------------------------------------
-- Update IsCopyFundMirror Ext_Dim_Mirror_History-
	UPDATE a
	SET IsCopyFundMirror = 1
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_History a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_FundCIDs b
	ON a.ParentCID = b.CID
--------------------------------------------------
-- Remove Duplicate Mirrors ----------------------
	DELETE a
	FROM 
	[DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_Real a
	INNER JOIN
	[DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_History b
	ON
	a.MirrorID = b.MirrorID
--------------------------------------------------
-- Insert from Ext_Dim_Mirror_Real ---------------
	
	MERGE INTO [DWH_dbo].Dim_Mirror AS a
	USING [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_Real AS b
	ON a.MirrorID = b.MirrorID And a.CloseDateID = b.CloseDateID And a.CloseDateID = 0  
	WHEN MATCHED 
	THEN
	  UPDATE SET 
	Amount = b.Amount,
	OpenOccurred = b.OpenOccurred,
	OpenDateID = b.OpenDateID,
	CloseOccurred = b.CloseOccurred,
	CloseDateID = b.CloseDateID,
	MirrorTypeID = b.MirrorTypeID,
	CloseMirrorActionType = b.CloseMirrorActionType,
	IsActive = b.IsActive,
	IsOpenOpen = b.IsOpenOpen,
	PauseCopy = b.PauseCopy,
	MirrorSL = b.MirrorSL,
	MirrorSLPercentage = b.MirrorSLPercentage,
	RealizedEquity = b.RealizedEquity,
	InitialInvestment = b.InitialInvestment,
	WithdrawalSummary = b.WithdrawalSummary,
	DepositSummary = b.DepositSummary,
	RealziedPnL = b.RealziedPnL,
	IsCopyFundMirror = b.IsCopyFundMirror,
	UpdateDate = getdate()
	 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
	INSERT 
	([MirrorID]
	,[CID]
	,[ParentCID]
	,[ParentUserName]
	,[Amount]
	,[OpenOccurred]
	,[OpenDateID]
	,[CloseOccurred]
	,[CloseDateID]
	,[MirrorTypeID]
	,[CloseMirrorActionType]
	,[IsActive]
	,[IsOpenOpen]
	,[PauseCopy]
	,[MirrorSL]
	,[MirrorSLPercentage]
	,[RealizedEquity]
	,[InitialInvestment]
	,[WithdrawalSummary]
	,[DepositSummary]
	,[RealziedPnL]
	,[GuruTPV]
	,[UseCopyDividend]
	,IsCopyFundMirror
	,UpdateDate)
	
	VALUES(
	b.[MirrorID]
	,b.[CID]
	,b.[ParentCID]
	,b.[ParentUserName]
	,b.[Amount]
	,b.[OpenOccurred]
	,b.[OpenDateID]
	,b.[CloseOccurred]
	,b.[CloseDateID]
	,b.[MirrorTypeID]
	,b.[CloseMirrorActionType]
	,b.[IsActive]
	,b.[IsOpenOpen]
	,b.[PauseCopy]
	,b.[MirrorSL]
	,b.[MirrorSLPercentage]
	,b.[RealizedEquity]
	,b.[InitialInvestment]
	,b.[WithdrawalSummary]
	,b.[DepositSummary]
	,b.[RealziedPnL]
	,b.[GuruTPV]
	,b.[UseCopyDividend]
	,b.IsCopyFundMirror
	,getdate()
	   );
--------------------------------------------------
-- Extract Ext_Dim_Mirror_SessionID --------------
	truncate table [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Mirror_SessionID

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Mirror_SessionID]

	SELECT MirrorID
      , SessionID
	from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Mirror] with (nolock)
	Where
	MirrorOperationID = 1 and 
		((
		ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
		and 
	                   ModificationDate < @CurrentDate
		)
	
	or
		(
		Occurred >= @Yesterday
		and
		Occurred < @CurrentDate
		and
	                  ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
		))
--------------------------------------------------
--  Update from Ext_Dim_Mirror_SessionID ---------
	update [DWH_dbo].Dim_Mirror
	set SessionID = a.SessionID
	from [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Mirror_SessionID] a
	where Dim_Mirror.MirrorID = a.MirrorID
--------------------------------------------------
-- Update The Process Finish ---------------------
	--UPDATE [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd]
	--SET
	--[IndRun] = 2 ,
	--[UpdateDate] = GETDATE()
	--  where [TableName] = 'Dim_Mirror'
	--AND [IndRun] <> 2 
--------------------------------------------------

END
SP_Dim_PositionChangeLog_DL_To_Synapse:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_PositionChangeLog_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
-- Author:     <Adi  Ferber>
-- Create Date: 2021-09-12
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLog_DL_To_Synapse]
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date          Author       Description   
----------   ----------   ------------------------------------
2024-04-30	 Ofir Abudy   remove writing to EXT and add ChangeTypeID 5
2024-11-07	 Inbal BML	  Adding new cloumns to Dim_Instrument for Future project (NewLotCount and PreviousLotCount)
2025-01-05	 Inbal BML    Delete condition "AND ChangeTypeID in (1, 12, 11, 13, 5)"
*********************************************************************************************/
--declare @dt as date = '2025-01-05'
   DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
   DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME
   SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
   SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);
   DECLARE @YesterdayID int = convert(int,convert(varchar, @dt,112))
   DECLARE @CurrentDateID int=convert(int,convert(varchar, @CurrentDate,112))

 

 --Update Delete Rows ----------------------------


	delete from [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionChangeLog] 
	where OccurredDateID >=@YesterdayID 
--------------------------------------------------
-- Extract Ext_Dim_Mirror_Real -------------------
	truncate table [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_PositionChangeLog]
	

		INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionChangeLog]
	           (     PositionID
					,CID
					,Occurred
					,OccurredDateID
					,ChangeTypeID
					,PreviousAmount
					,AmountChanged
					,NewAmount
					,PreviousIsSettled
					,IsSettled
					,PreviousStopRate
					,StopRate
					,PreviousAmountInUnits
					,AmountInUnits
					,UpdateDate
					,LotCountDecimal
			        ,PreviousLotCountDecimal 
					)

	  Select
		     PositionID
			,CID
			,Occurred
			,cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , Occurred, 112 ) AS INT) as OccurredDateID
			,ChangeTypeID
			,PreviousAmount
			,AmountChanged
			,NewAmount
			,cast(PreviousIsSettled as int) as PreviousIsSettled
			,cast(IsSettled as int) as IsSettled
			,PreviousStopRate
			,StopRate
			,PreviousAmountInUnits
			,AmountInUnits
			,getdate() as UpdateDate 
			,LotCountDecimal
			,PreviousLotCountDecimal 
	From DWH_staging.etoro_History_PositionChangeLog
	WHERE Occurred >= @Yesterday
		--	AND ChangeTypeID in (1, 12, 11, 13, 5);

END
SP_Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_DL_T:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN

-- =============================================
-- Author:     <Adi  Ferber>
-- Create Date: 2021-09-19
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_DL_To_Synapse] 
-- =============================================
  
   DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
   DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME
   DECLARE @MaxDateDim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot as DATETIME
   SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
   SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);
   DECLARE @YesterdayID int = convert(int,convert(varchar, @dt,112))
   DECLARE @CurrentDateID int=convert(int,convert(varchar, @CurrentDate,112))

     

------------get max date Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot-------------------------------------

select @MaxDateDim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot=isnull(max(convert(datetime,convert(varchar(16),FromDate))),'2021-01-01')
from [DWH_dbo].Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot



 ------ Delete Rows ----------------------------
 IF @Yesterday<=@MaxDateDim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot
 BEGIN
	DELETE [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot]
	WHERE FromDate>= CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)
 END

  
 ------ Update DateRangeID ----------------------------

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot_UpdateToDate') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot_UpdateToDate;

SELECT PositionID,FromDate, ToDate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PositionID ORDER BY FromDate DESC)  AS rn
INTO #Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot_UpdateToDate
FROM [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot]


UPDATE a
SET ToDate = 20991231 
FROM [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot] a 
JOIN #Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot_UpdateToDate b
ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID AND b.FromDate = a.FromDate
WHERE rn = 1

 
 --TRUNCATE TABLE  [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog] ------
 
 
 TRUNCATE TABLE  [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog]
 
 
-------- Extract Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog -------------------

	INSERT INTO  [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog]
	(	PositionID	,
		OccurredDate,  
		OccurredDateID,
		FromHedgeServerID,	
		ToHedgeServerID, 
		UpdateDate)
	SELECT 
	PositionID	,
	ADM_DATE as OccurredDate,  
	cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , ADM_DATE, 112 ) AS INT) as OccurredDateID,
	FromHedgeServerID,	
	ToHedgeServerID, 
	getdate() as UpdateDate
	from [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_PositionsHedgeServerChangeLog]
	where ADM_DATE >= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday)  and ADM_DATE  < dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,@Yesterday),0)




-- Insert from [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionChangeLog]  ------------
EXEC DWH_dbo.[SP_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog]  @Yesterday

END
SP_Dim_Position_CheckExistPartition:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_CheckExistPartition] @dt [DATE] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: 
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------

*********************************************************************************************/
	--SET DEADLOCK_PRIORITY HIGH
	--WAITFOR DELAY '00:00:10';

	--exec [SP_Fact_CustomerAction_CheckExistPartition] '20200809'
    ---declare @dt datetime = cast(getdate()-1 as date)
	declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@dt,112))
    
	select  Count(*) as IndExistPartition_Dim_Position
	from sys.partitions p
	inner join sys.indexes i 
	 on p.object_id = i.object_id 
	 and p.index_id = i.index_id
	inner JOIN sys.data_spaces ds 
	 on i.data_space_id = ds.data_space_id
	inner JOIN sys.partition_schemes ps 
	 on ds.data_space_id = ps.data_space_id
	left outer JOIN sys.partition_range_values prv 
	 on prv.function_id = ps.function_id 
	 and p.partition_number = prv.boundary_id
	where p.index_id = 1 
	and (
	p.[object_id] = object_id('DWH_dbo.Dim_Position')
	and prv.value = convert(int,convert(varchar, @dt,112))
	)

END
SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS

BEGIN

-- =============================================
-- Author:      <Re'em Cohen>
-- Create Date: 2021-07-27
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse] '20250907'
-- =============================================
/***************************
** Change History
**************************
Date           Author        Description   
----------     ----------    ------------------------------------
01/02/2022     Inbal BML      add SettlementTypeID
14/04/2022	   Inbal BML	  add OpenMarketPriceRateID
2022-05-14     Boris Slutski  change caluclation VolumeonClose for closed Position --> Cast([AmountInUnitsDecimal]as Float)
2022-07-03     Boris Slutski  add condition to Merge script
2023-03-07     nir harari     add 12 column OpenMarket*,CloseMarket* ,CloseMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded ,CloseMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded 
2023-05-22     nir harari     add 3 columns RequestOpenOccurred,RequestCloseOccurred ,OrderType 
2023-06-14     nir harari     change update for dim position
2024-01-03     KatyF          Add PnLVersion & Fill InitConversionRate. Remove hardcoded NULL for InitConversionRate in ext
2024-01-15	   Inbal BML	  change [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] and [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay]
							  & Add PnLInDollars , EndOfDayPnLInDollars ,  OpenMarketSpread , CloseMarketSpread , CloseMarkupOnOpen , OpenMarkup and CloseMarkup
2024-03-10	   Daniel K	      add exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Check_PnLInDollars_in_DWH_staging_etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] 
2024-06-02     Ofir A         add DLT columns
2024-08-22     Katy F         Add CommisionVersion
2025-01-21	   Inbal BML	  Add LotCountDecimal to update of open positions that allready exist in Dim_Position
2025-01-25     Ofir A         add OpenPositionReasonID and ExitOrderType 
2025-06-25     Adi Ferber     add OpenTotalTaxes ,CloseTotalTaxes,OpenTotalFees,CloseTotalFees
2025-07-13	   Eitan L        add switch partition 
2025-09-08     Daniel Kaplan  Add new fields : EstimateCloseFeeForCFD ,EstimateCloseFeeOnOpenByUnits,EstimateCloseFeeOnOpen,Close_PnLInDollars,Close_CalculationRate,
Close_ConversionRate,Close_PriceType,CurrentCalculationRate ,CurrentConversionRate 

--********************************   **************************************************************************************/
    -- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
    -- interfering with SELECT statements.
    SET NOCOUNT ON
 --  DECLARE @dt Date ='2025-06-02'  
   DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
   DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME

   SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
   SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);

  print @dt
  print @CurrentDate
  print @Yesterday

	exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Check_PnLInDollars_in_DWH_staging_etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] 

-- Update Dim_Position --------------------------------------->
	DELETE FROM [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Position] 
	WHERE (OpenDateID >=  CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)
	AND OpenDateID <  CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @CurrentDate , 112 ) AS INT) )
	OR( CloseDateID >= CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday , 112 ) AS INT) AND CloseDateID < CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @CurrentDate, 112 ) AS INT) AND PositionID<> OriginalPositionID)

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Position] 
	set 
	CloseOccurred = '1900-01-01 00:00:00.000' ,
	CloseDateID = 19000101
	where CloseDateID >= cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday , 112 ) AS INT) AND CloseDateID < cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @CurrentDate, 112 ) AS INT)
	
	----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Dim_Position_Real --------------------------------------->
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real

	IF EXISTS (
	SELECT Name FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = object_id('[DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_Real]') 
	AND Name = 'CL_IX_Ext_Dim_Position_Real_CloseDateID_PositionID') 
		DROP INDEX CL_IX_Ext_Dim_Position_Real_CloseDateID_PositionID ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real;
	
	IF EXISTS (
	SELECT Name FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = object_id('[DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_Real]')
	AND Name = 'IX_Ext_Dim_Position_Real_CID') 
		DROP INDEX IX_Ext_Dim_Position_Real_CID ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real;

----------------------------------------------------------------->
	 
If Object_ID('tempdb..#etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer

Select  *
into #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer  -- Move duplicates rows, because two parquet files with another dates
from
(
select
CID,
RegulationID,
ValidFrom,
ValidTo,
CustomerHistoryID,
ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by a.CID, CustomerHistoryID  order by a.ValidTo ) as rn
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] a with (nolock)
) a
where  rn =1

--------------------
-- Extract Ext_Dim_Position_Real --------------------------------------->

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_Real]
           ( [PositionID]
           , [CID]
           , [CurrencyID]
           , [ProviderID]
           , [InstrumentID]
           , [HedgeID]
           , [HedgeServerID]
           , [Leverage]
           , [Amount]
           , [AmountInUnitsDecimal]
           , [UnitMargin]
           , [InitForexRate]
           , [NetProfit]
           , [SpreadedPipBid]
           , [SpreadedPipAsk]
           , [IsBuy]
           , [CloseOnEndOfWeek]
           , [EndOfWeekFee]
           , [Commission]
           , [CommissionOnClose]
           , [OpenOccurred]
           , [CloseOccurred]
           , [ParentPositionID]
           , [OrigParentPositionID]
           , [MirrorID]
           , [IsOpenOpen]
           , [OpenDateID]
           , [CloseDateID]
           , [LotCountDecimal]
           , [SpreadedCommission]
           , [EndForexRate]
           , [LastOpConversionRate]
           , [LimitRate]
           , [StopRate]
           , [ClosePositionReasonID]
           , [TreeID]
           , [FullCommission]
           , [FullCommissionOnClose]
           , [IsComputeForHedge]
           , [IsSettled]
           , [InitialAmountCents]
           , [RedeemStatus]
           , [RedeemID]
           , [ReopenForPositionID]
           , [IsReOpen]
           , [CommissionOnCloseOrig]
           , [FullCommissionOnCloseOrig]
           , [InitialUnits]
           , [IsDiscounted]
           , [CommissionByUnits]
           , [FullCommissionByUnits]
           , [Volume]
           , [VolumeOnClose]
           , [LastOpPriceRateID]
           , [InitForexPriceRateID]
           , [InitExecutionID]
           , [InitConversionRate]
           , [InitConversionRateID]
           , [OrderID]
           , [RegulationID]
           , [UpdateDate]
		   , [SettlementTypeID]
		   , OpenMarketPriceRateID
		   , RequestOccurred
		   , OrderType
		   , [PnLVersion] -- 20240103 KatyF
		   , PnLInDollars  --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
           /* New columns for DLT (Ofir)*/
           , DLTOpen
           -- , DLTClose
		   , OpenMarkupByUnits
		   , CommissionVersion
		   , OpenPositionReasonID -- ofir
		   , OpenTotalTaxes --20250620 Adi Ferber
		   , OpenTotalFees  --20250620 Adi Ferber
		   /* 2025-09-08     Daniel Kaplan  */
		   , EstimateCloseFeeForCFD 
		   , EstimateCloseFeeOnOpenByUnits
		   , EstimateCloseFeeOnOpen 
		   , Close_PnLInDollars
		   , Close_CalculationRate
		   , Close_ConversionRate
		   , Close_PriceType
		   , CurrentCalculationRate 
		   , CurrentConversionRate
		   /* 2025-09-08     Daniel Kaplan  */
		   )
		SELECT 
		     PositionID
		   , a.CID
		   , CurrencyID
		   , ProviderID
		   , a.InstrumentID
		   , HedgeID
		   , HedgeServerID
		   , Leverage
		   , Amount
		   , AmountInUnitsDecimal
		   , UnitMargin
		   , InitForexRate
		   , NetProfit
		   , SpreadedPipBid
		   , SpreadedPipAsk
		   , IsBuy
		   , ISNULL(CloseOnEndOfWeek, 0) as CloseOnEndOfWeek
		   , EndOfWeekFee
		   , Commission
		   , 0 as CommissionOnClose
		   , Occurred as OpenOccurred
		   , CAST(0 as datetime) as CloseOccurred
		   , ParentPositionID
		   , OrigParentPositionID
		   , MirrorID
		   , IsOpenOpen
		   , CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar,DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,0,Occurred),0),112)) as OpenDateID
		   , 0 as CloseDateID
		   , LotCountDecimal
		   , SpreadedCommission
		   , Null as EndForexRate
		   , LastOpConversionRate
		   , LimitRate
		   , StopRate
		   , Null as ClosePositionReasonID
		   , TreeID
		   , FullCommission
		   , NULL as FullCommissionOnClose
		   , IsComputeForHedge
		   , CASE 
		     WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN CAST(IsSettled as int)  
		     WHEN IsBuy = 1 AND Leverage = 1 AND b.InstrumentTypeID in (10,5,6) THEN 1 
		     ELSE 0 
		     END as IsSettled
		   , InitialAmountCents
		   , RedeemStatus
		   , NULL as RedeemID
		   , ReopenForPositionID
		   , CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN 1 END as IsReOpen
		   , 0.00 as CommissionOnCloseOrig
		   , 0.00 as FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		   , InitialUnits
		   , CAST(IsDiscounted as int)   IsDiscounted
		   , CommissionByUnits
		   , [FullCommissionByUnits]
		   , try_convert(int,ROUND(Cast([AmountInUnitsDecimal]as decimal(16,6))*Cast([InitForexRate] as decimal(16,8))*
			(CASE WHEN SellCurrencyID=1 THEN 1 WHEN BuyCurrencyID=1 THEN 1/cast([InitForexRate] as decimal (16,8)) else cast([LastOpConversionRate] as decimal (16,8)) end),0))  Volume
		   , 0 as VolumeOnClose
		   , LastOpPriceRateID
		   , InitForexPriceRateID
		   , InitExecutionID
		   , InitConversionRate
		   , InitConversionRateID
		   , OrderID
		   , ISNULL(c.RegulationID, 0) as RegulationID
		   , GETDATE() as UpdateDate
		   , SettlementTypeID
		   , OpenMarketPriceRateID
		   , RequestOccurred
		   , OrderType
		   , ISNULL(PnLVersion,0) AS PnLVersion  -- 20240103 KatyF
		   , PnLInDollars  --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , DLTOpen
           -- , DLTClose
		   , OpenMarkupByUnits
		   , a.CommissionVersion
		   , a.OpenActionType as OpenPositionReasonID 
		   , a.OpenTotalTaxes --20250620 Adi Ferber
		   , a.OpenTotalFees  --20250620 Adi Ferber
		   /* 2025-09-08     Daniel Kaplan  */
		   , a.EstimateCloseFeeForCFD 
		   , a.EstimateCloseFeeOnOpenByUnits
		   , a.EstimateCloseFeeOnOpen
		   , a.Close_PnLInDollars
		   , a.Close_CalculationRate
		   , a.Close_ConversionRate
		   , a.Close_PriceType
		   , a.CurrentCalculationRate
		   , a.CurrentConversionRate 
		   /* 2025-09-08     Daniel Kaplan  */
		From [DWH_staging].etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay a with (NOLOCK)
		left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
		on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
		left join #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer c with (nolock)
		--[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] c with (nolock)
		ON a.CID = c.CID
		AND c.ValidFrom < @CurrentDate
		--dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
		AND c.ValidTo >= @CurrentDate
		--dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
		WHERE a.Occurred< @CurrentDate
		--dateadd(day,1,?)

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real

-- Extract Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real ------------------------>

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real]
           ([PositionID]
           ,[CID]
           ,[CurrencyID]
           ,[ProviderID]
           ,[InstrumentID]
           ,[HedgeID]
           ,[HedgeServerID]
           ,[Leverage]
           ,[Amount]
           ,[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
           ,[UnitMargin]
           ,[InitForexRate]
           ,[NetProfit]
           ,[SpreadedPipBid]
           ,[SpreadedPipAsk]
           ,[IsBuy]
           ,[CloseOnEndOfWeek]
           ,[EndOfWeekFee]
           ,[Commission]
           ,[CommissionOnClose]
           ,[OpenOccurred]
           ,[CloseOccurred]
           ,[ParentPositionID]
           ,[OrigParentPositionID]
           ,[MirrorID]
           ,[IsOpenOpen]
           ,[OpenDateID]
           ,[CloseDateID]
           ,[LotCountDecimal]
           ,[SpreadedCommission]
           ,[EndForexRate]
           ,[LastOpConversionRate]
           ,[LimitRate]
           ,[StopRate]
           ,[ClosePositionReasonID]
           ,[TreeID]
           ,[FullCommission]
           ,[FullCommissionOnClose]
           ,[IsComputeForHedge]
           ,[IsSettled]
           ,[InitialAmountCents]
           ,[RedeemStatus]
           ,[RedeemID]
           ,[ReopenForPositionID]
           ,[IsReOpen]
           ,[CommissionOnCloseOrig]
           ,[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig]
		   ,[OriginalPositionID]
           ,[InitialUnits]
           ,[IsDiscounted]
           ,[CommissionByUnits]
           ,[FullCommissionByUnits]
           ,[Volume]
           ,[VolumeOnClose]
           ,[LastOpPriceRateID]
           ,[InitForexPriceRateID]
		   ,[EndForexPriceRateID]
           ,[InitExecutionID]
		   ,[EndExecutionID]
		   ,[CloseMarketPriceRateID]
           ,[InitConversionRate]
           ,[InitConversionRateID]
           ,[OrderID]
		   ,[ExitOrderID]
		   ,[RegulationID]
		   ,[LastOpPriceRate]
           ,[UpdateDate]
		   ,[SettlementTypeID]
		   ,OpenMarketPriceRateID
		   ,RequestOpenOccurred
		   ,RequestCloseOccurred
		   ,OrderType
		   ,[PnLVersion]
		   ,EndOfDayPnLInDollars -- 20240115 Inbal BML
		   ,OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   ,CloseMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   ,CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
		   ,OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		   ,CloseMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		   /* New columns for DLT (Ofir)*/
           , DLTOpen
           , DLTClose
		   , OpenMarkupByUnits
		   , CommissionVersion
		   , ExitOrderType -- Ofir New column
		   , OpenPositionReasonID
		   , OpenTotalTaxes --20250620 Adi Ferber
		   , CloseTotalTaxes --20250620 Adi Ferber
		   , OpenTotalFees  --20250620 Adi Ferber
		   , CloseTotalFees  --20250620 Adi Ferber
		   )
		SELECT
		     PositionID
		   , a.CID
		   , CurrencyID
		   , ProviderID
		   , a.InstrumentID
		   , HedgeID
		   , HedgeServerID
		   , Leverage
		   , Amount
		   , AmountInUnitsDecimal
		   , UnitMargin
		   , InitForexRate
		   , NetProfit
		   , SpreadedPipBid
		   , SpreadedPipAsk
		   , IsBuy
		   , CloseOnEndOfWeek
		   , EndOfWeekFee
		   , Commission
		   , CommissionOnClose
		   , OpenOccurred
		   , CloseOccurred
		   , ParentPositionID
		   , OrigParentPositionID
		   , MirrorID
		   , IsOpenOpen
		   , CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar,DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,0,OpenOccurred),0),112)) as OpenDateID
		   , CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar,DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,0,CloseOccurred),0),112)) as CloseDateID
		   , LotCountDecimal
		   , SpreadedCommission
		   , EndForexRate
		   , LastOpConversionRate
		   , LimitRate
		   , StopRate
		   , ActionType as ClosePositionReasonID
		   , TreeID
		   , ISNULL(FullCommission,0.00) FullCommission
		   , ISNULL(FullCommissionOnClose, 0.00) FullCommissionOnClose
		   , IsComputeForHedge
		   , CASE 
		     WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  
		     WHEN IsBuy = 1 AND Leverage = 1 AND b.InstrumentTypeID in (10,5,6) THEN 1 
		     ELSE 0 
		     END as IsSettled
		   , InitialAmountCents
		   , RedeemStatus
		   , RedeemID
		   , ReopenForPositionID
		   , CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as IsReOpen
		   , CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN CommissionOnClose ELSE 0 END AS CommissionOnCloseOrig
		   , CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN FullCommissionOnClose ELSE 0 END AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		   , OriginalPositionID
		   , InitialUnits
		   , CAST(IsDiscounted as int)   IsDiscounted
		   , CommissionByUnits
		   , FullCommissionByUnits
		   , try_convert(int,ROUND(Cast([AmountInUnitsDecimal]as decimal(16,6))*Cast([InitForexRate] as decimal(16,8))*
		     (CASE WHEN SellCurrencyID=1 THEN 1 WHEN BuyCurrencyID=1 THEN 1/cast([InitForexRate] as decimal (16,8)) else cast([LastOpConversionRate] as decimal (16,8)) end),0))  Volume
		   --,try_convert(int,ROUND(Cast([AmountInUnitsDecimal]as decimal(16,6))*Cast([InitForexRate] as decimal(16,8))*
		   --(CASE WHEN SellCurrencyID=1 THEN 1 WHEN BuyCurrencyID=1 THEN 1/cast(EndForexRate as decimal (16,8)) else cast([LastOpConversionRate] as decimal (16,8)) end),0))VolumeOnClose
		   ---,try_convert(int,ROUND(Cast([AmountInUnitsDecimal]as Float)*EndForexRate*(case when SellCurrencyID=1 then 1 when BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1/EndForexRate else LastOpConversionRate end),0)) VolumeOnClose  -- Not samr to DWH-01
		   , try_convert(int,ROUND([AmountInUnitsDecimal]*EndForexRate*(case when SellCurrencyID=1 then 1 when BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1/EndForexRate else LastOpConversionRate end),0)) VolumeOnClose
		   , LastOpPriceRateID
		   , InitForexPriceRateID
		   , EndForexPriceRateID
		   , [InitExecutionID]
		   , [EndExecutionID] 
		   , CloseMarketPriceRateID
		   , InitConversionRate  -- 20240103 KatyF
		   , InitConversionRateID  -- 20240103 KatyF
		   , OrderID
		   , ExitOrderID
		   , isnull(c.RegulationID, 0) AS RegulationID
		   , LastOpPriceRate
		   , GETDATE() AS UpdateDate
		   , SettlementTypeID
		   , OpenMarketPriceRateID
		   , RequestOpenOccurred
		   , RequestCloseOccurred
		   , OrderType
		   , ISNULL([PnLVersion],0) AS [PnLVersion]  -- 20240103 KatyF
		   , EndOfDayPnLInDollars -- 20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , CloseMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , CloseMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		   /* New columns for DLT (Ofir)*/
           , DLTOpen
           , DLTClose
		   , OpenMarkupByUnits
		   , a.CommissionVersion
		   , ExitOrderType
		   , OpenActionType as OpenPositionReasonIDfOpenTotalFees
		   , OpenTotalTaxes --20250620 Adi Ferber
		   , CloseTotalTaxes--20250620 Adi Ferber
		   , OpenTotalFees  --20250620 Adi Ferber
		   , CloseTotalFees --20250620 Adi Ferber
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay] a With (Nolock)   
		left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
		on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
		left join #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer c with (nolock)
		--[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer]  c with (nolock)
		ON a.CID = c.CID
		AND c.ValidFrom < @CurrentDate
		--dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0) 
		AND c.ValidTo >= @CurrentDate
		--dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
		
		WHERE
		(
			(
			 CloseOccurred >= @Yesterday
			 AND 
			 CloseOccurred <@CurrentDate
			 --dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
			)
		or
			(
			 OpenOccurred >= @Yesterday
			 AND
			 OpenOccurred < @CurrentDate
			 --dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
			 AND
			 CloseOccurred > @Yesterday
			)
		or
			(
			OpenOccurred < @CurrentDate
			--dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
			AND
			CloseOccurred >= @Yesterday
			)
		) 
		--OPTION	(RECOMPILE)

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- CREATE INDEX Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real ------------------->
	
	IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT Name FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = object_id('[DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real]') 
	AND Name = 'CL_IX_Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real_OpenDateID') 
	CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX CL_IX_Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real_OpenDateID ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real(CID,PositionID)


	UPDATE STATISTICS [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real

-- Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLog ---------------------------->
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLog

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLog
		SELECT
		PositionID,
		CID,
		Occurred,
		ISNULL(CAST(IsSettled as int),0) IsSettled,
		ISNULL(CAST(PreviousIsSettled as int ),0) PreviousIsSettled
		FROM
		(
			SELECT
			pl.PositionID
			,pl.CID
			,Occurred
			,pl.IsSettled
			,pl.PreviousIsSettled
			, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by pl.PositionID order by  pl.Occurred ) rn
			FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] pl with (NOLOCK)
			WHERE Occurred > DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0)
			---AND isnull(pl.IsSettled,-1) <> isnull(pl.PreviousIsSettled,-1)
			AND ISNULL(CAST(pl.IsSettled as int),0) <> ISNULL(CAST(pl.PreviousIsSettled as int),0)
		) a
		WHERE rn =1
	
----------------------------------------------------------------->

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_First_Open

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_First_Open
		SELECT
		PositionID,
		Occurred,
		CID,	
		ISNULL(CAST(IsSettled as int),0) IsSettled
		
		FROM
		(
			SELECT
			pl.PositionID
			,pl.CID
			,Occurred
			,pl.IsSettled
			, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by pl.PositionID order by  pl.Occurred ) rn
			FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] pl with (NOLOCK)
			WHERE Occurred >=@Yesterday
			AND ChangeTypeID=0
			
		) a
		WHERE rn =1






---------------------------------------------------------------------

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_Real IsSettled -------------------------------------------->

	UPDATE c
	SET IsSettled = PreviousIsSettled
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLog a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real c
	ON a.PositionID = c.PositionID 

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real  IsSettled --------------->
	UPDATE c
	SET IsSettled = PreviousIsSettled
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLog a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real  c
	ON a.PositionID = c.PositionID 

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount ----------------------------------------->

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount
	SELECT         
	PositionID
	,CID
	,Occurred
	,PreviousAmount
	,PreviousStopRate
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
		PositionID
		,CID
		,Occurred
		,PreviousAmount 
		,PreviousStopRate, AmountChanged
		,ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by PositionID ORDER BY  Occurred ) rn
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] 
		WHERE
		Occurred>= DATEADD(DAY,1,@Yesterday)
	) a
	WHERE rn=1
	

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount_ChangeType12
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount_ChangeType12
	SELECT
	PositionID
	,CID
	,SUM(AmountChanged) AS AmountChanged
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog]
	WHERE Occurred>= @CurrentDate AND ChangeTypeID IN (12) 
	GROUP BY
	PositionID
	,CID
	
----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real - Amount ---------------->

	UPDATE a
	SET
	Amount = b.PreviousAmount,
	StopRate = b.PreviousStopRate
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount b
	on a.PositionID = b.PositionID
	WHERE
	(
	  a.Amount <> b.PreviousAmount
	 OR 
      a.StopRate <> b.PreviousStopRate 
	)

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real - Amount ChangeTypeID12 --------->

	UPDATE a
	SET
	Amount = a.Amount + b.AmountChanged
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount_ChangeType12 b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Ext_Dim_Position_FundCIDs ------------------------------------>

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_FundCIDs
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_FundCIDs
	
	SELECT b.CID
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_BackOffice_Customer] b WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE b.AccountTypeID=9

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_Real - IsCopyFundPosition ------------------->

	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#copyFundPos') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #copyFundPos;

	SELECT
	    dp.PositionID
	   ,dp.CID
	   ,dp.TreeID 
	INTO #copyFundPos
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real dp
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position dp1
	 ON dp.TreeID = dp1.PositionID
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_FundCIDs c
	 ON dp1.CID = c.CID
	
	--CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX    #copyFundPos ON #copyFundPos (PositionID)
	    
	UPDATE a
	SET IsCopyFundPosition = 1
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real a
	JOIN #copyFundPos b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real - IsCopyFundPosition ------------>

	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#copyFundPos') IS NOT NULL
			DROP TABLE #copyFundPos;
	
	SELECT
	    dp.PositionID
	   ,dp.CID
	   ,dp.TreeID 
	INTO #copyFundPos
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real dp
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position dp1
	 ON dp.TreeID = dp1.PositionID
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_FundCIDs c
	 ON dp1.CID = c.CID
	
	--CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX    #copyFundPos ON #copyFundPos (PositionID)
	    
	UPDATE a
	SET IsCopyFundPosition = 1
	FROM [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real] a
	JOIN #copyFundPos b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID
----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Ext_Dim_Position_AirDrop  ----------------------------->

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_AirDrop

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_AirDrop
	
	SELECT PositionID FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_PositionAirdropLog]
	WHERE PositionID IS NOT NULL 
	AND ExecutionOccurred >= @Yesterday AND ExecutionOccurred < @CurrentDate

-- Execute SQL Task Update from Ext_Dim_Position_AirDrop  Real ----------->

	UPDATE a
	SET 
	IsAirDrop = 1
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_AirDrop b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Execute SQL Task Update from Ext_Dim_Position_AirDrop ---------------->
	UPDATE a
	SET 
	IsAirDrop = 1
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_AirDrop b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active ------------------------>
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active
	
	SELECT a.PriceRateID,
	 a.Ask, a.Bid, a.AskSpreaded, a.BidSpreaded, a.USDConversionRate,USDConversionRateBidSpreaded,USDConversionRateAskSpreaded,MarketPriceRateID
	FROM [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active] a
	WHERE Occurred>= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday) AND Occurred <= @CurrentDate
	
----------------------------------------------------------------->
-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_Real - CurrencyPrice_Active  --------------------------->

	UPDATE p
	SET
	[InitForex_Ask] = a.Ask,
	[InitForex_Bid] = a.Bid,
	[InitForex_AskSpreaded] = a.AskSpreaded,
	[InitForex_BidSpreaded] = a.BidSpreaded,
	[InitForex_USDConversionRate] = a.USDConversionRate
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real p
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active a
	ON a.PriceRateID = p.InitForexPriceRateID 

----------------------------------------------------------------->
-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_History - CurrencyPrice_Active ------------>
	
	UPDATE p
	SET
	[InitForex_Ask] = a.Ask,
	[InitForex_Bid] = a.Bid,
	[InitForex_AskSpreaded] = a.AskSpreaded,
	[InitForex_BidSpreaded] = a.BidSpreaded,
	[InitForex_USDConversionRate] = a.USDConversionRate
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active a
	ON a.PriceRateID = p.InitForexPriceRateID 
	WHERE OpenDateID = CONVERT(CHAR(8), CAST(@Yesterday as date), 112)
	
	UPDATE p
	SET
	[EndForex_Ask] = a.Ask,
	[EndForex_Bid] = a.Bid,
	[EndForex_AskSpreaded] = a.AskSpreaded,
	[EndForex_BidSpreaded] = a.BidSpreaded,
	[EndForex_USDConversionRate] = a.USDConversionRate
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active a
	ON a.PriceRateID = p.EndForexPriceRateID
----------------------------------------------------------------->

	SELECT  b.[PositionID]
	      , b.[CID]
	      , b.[CurrencyID]
	      , b.[ProviderID]
	      , b.[InstrumentID]
	      , b.[HedgeID]
	      , b.[HedgeServerID]
	      , b.[Leverage]
	      , b.[Amount]
	      , b.[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
	      , b.[UnitMargin]
	      , b.[InitForexRate]
	      , b.[NetProfit]
	      , b.[SpreadedPipBid]
	      , b.[SpreadedPipAsk]
	      , b.[IsBuy]
	      , b.[CloseOnEndOfWeek]
	      , b.[EndOfWeekFee]
	      , b.[Commission]
	      , b.[CommissionOnClose]
	      , b.[OpenOccurred]
	      , CASE WHEN b.CloseOccurred  >=CAST(GETDATE() as date)  THEN '19000101' ELSE b.CloseOccurred  END as CloseOccurred
	    -- , b.[CloseOccurred]
	      , b.[ParentPositionID]
	      , b.[OrigParentPositionID]

	      , b.[LimitRate]
	      , b.[StopRate]
	      , b.[ClosePositionReasonID]
	      , b.[TreeID]
	      , b.[OpenDateID]
	      , CASE WHEN b.CloseOccurred >=CAST(GETDATE() as date)  THEN 0 ELSE CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar,DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,0,b.CloseOccurred),0),112)) END AS CloseDateID
	    --, b.[CloseDateID]
	      , ISNULL(b.[RegulationID],0)
	      , getutcdate()
	      , b.[FullCommission]
	      , b.[FullCommissionOnClose]
	      , b.IsComputeForHedge
	      , b.IsSettled
	      , b.InitialAmountCents
	      , b.RedeemStatus
	      , b.RedeemID
	      , b.ReopenForPositionID
	      , b.IsReOpen
	      , b.CommissionOnCloseOrig
	      , b.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
	      , b.OriginalPositionID
	      , CASE WHEN b.PositionID <>   b.OriginalPositionID   AND  b.OriginalPositionID  is not null THEN 1 else  0 end IsPartialCloseChild
	      , b.InitialUnits
	      , b.IsDiscounted
	      , b.CommissionByUnits
	      , b.FullCommissionByUnits
	      , b.Volume
	      , b.VolumeOnClose
	      , b.LastOpPriceRateID
	      , b.IsAirDrop
	      , b.InitForexPriceRateID
	      , b.EndForexPriceRateID
	      , b.[InitForex_Ask] 
	      , b.[InitForex_Bid]

	      , b.[EndForex_Ask]

	      , b.[EndForex_AskSpreaded] 
	      , b.[EndForex_BidSpreaded]
	      , b.[EndForex_USDConversionRate] 
	      , b.[InitExecutionID]
	      , CASE WHEN b.CloseOccurred  >=CAST(GETDATE() as date)  
	        THEN 0 
	        ELSE b.[EndExecutionID] 
	        END EndExecutionID
	      --b.[EndExecutionID]
	      , b.[InitConversionRate]
	      , b.[InitConversionRateID]
	      , b.CloseMarketPriceRateID
	      , b.InitHedgeType 
	      , CASE WHEN b.CloseOccurred  >=CAST(GETDATE() as date)  
	        THEN NULL
	        ELSE b.EndHedgeType 
	        END EndHedgeType
	      --,b.EndHedgeType 
	      , b.OrderID
	      , b.ExitOrderID
	      , ISNULL(c.IsSettled,0) AS IsSettledOnOpen
	      , ISNULL(b.StopRate ,0) AS StopRateOnOpen
	      , ISNULL(b.LimitRate ,0) AS LimitRateOnOpen
	      , b.[LastOpPriceRate]
	      , b.SettlementTypeID
	      , b.OpenMarketPriceRateID
	      , b.CloseMarket_AskSpreaded
	      , b.CloseMarket_BidSpreaded
	      , b.CloseMarket_Ask 
	      , b.CloseMarket_Bid
	      , b.CloseMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded
	      , b.CloseMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded
	      , b.RequestOpenOccurred
	      , b.RequestCloseOccurred
	      , b.OrderType
	      , b.[PnLVersion]  -- 20240103 KatyF
	      , b.EndOfDayPnLInDollars as PnLInDollars -- 20240115 Inbal BML
		  , b.OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		  , b.CloseMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		  , b.CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
		  , b.OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		  , b.CloseMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		  -- Ofir - DLT commition
		  , b.DLTOpen
          , b.DLTClose
	      , b.OpenMarkupByUnits
		  , b.CommissionVersion
		  , b.ExitOrderType
		  , b.OpenPositionReasonID
		  , b.OpenTotalTaxes --20250620 Adi Ferber
		  , b.CloseTotalTaxes --20250620 Adi Ferber
		  , b.OpenTotalFees  	--20250620 Adi Ferber
		  , b.CloseTotalFees 	--20250620 Adi Ferber
	
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real AS b
	left join [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position a
	ON b.PositionID = a.PositionID
	left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_First_Open c
	on b.PositionID = c.PositionID
	
	WHERE
	(
		(b.CloseDateID >= CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar, @Yesterday,112)) AND b.OpenDateID =  CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar, @Yesterday,112)))
		
		OR( b.OriginalPositionID <> b.PositionID AND b.CloseDateID >= CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar, @Yesterday,112))  AND 
		b.CloseDateID < CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar,  dateadd(day,1,@Yesterday),112))   ) -- Partial close position
	)
	AND a.PositionID IS NULL

	----------------------------------------------------------------->----------------------------------------------------------------->
-- Remove Duplicate Positions -------------------->----------------------------------------------------------------->

	DELETE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real
	FROM 
	[DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real
	INNER JOIN
	[DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real
	ON
	Ext_Dim_Position_Real.PositionID = Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real.PositionID

-----------------------------------------------------------------> 
-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_Real - Amount  -----------------------> 
	update a
	SET
	Amount = b.PreviousAmount,
	StopRate = b.PreviousStopRate
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID
	WHERE
	(a.Amount <> b.PreviousAmount OR 
	a.StopRate <> b.PreviousStopRate )
-----------------------------------------------------------------> 
-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_Real - Amount ChangeTypeID 12 ----------------->

	UPDATE a
	SET
	Amount = a.Amount + b.AmountChanged
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount_ChangeType12 b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID

-- SQL Task Insert from Ext_Dim_Position_Real --------------------->
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position
	     ([PositionID]
	    , [CID]
	    , [CurrencyID]
	    , [ProviderID]
	    , [InstrumentID]
	    , [HedgeID]
	    , [HedgeServerID]
	    , [Leverage]
	    , [Amount]
	    , [AmountInUnitsDecimal]
	    , [UnitMargin]
	    , [InitForexRate]
	    , [NetProfit]
	    , [SpreadedPipBid]
	    , [SpreadedPipAsk]
	    , [IsBuy]
	    , [CloseOnEndOfWeek]
	    , [EndOfWeekFee]
	    , [Commission]
	    , [CommissionOnClose]
	    , [OpenOccurred]
	    , [CloseOccurred]
	    , [ParentPositionID]
	    , [OrigParentPositionID]
	    , [MirrorID]
	    , [IsOpenOpen]
	    , [LotCountDecimal]
	    , [SpreadedCommission]
	    , [EndForexRate]
	    , [LastOpConversionRate]
	    , [LimitRate]
	    , [StopRate]
	    , [ClosePositionReasonID]
	    , [TreeID]
	    , [OpenDateID]
	    , [CloseDateID]
	    , [RegulationIDOnOpen]
	    , [UpdateDate]
	    , [FullCommission]
	    , [FullCommissionOnClose]
	    , IsComputeForHedge
	    , IsSettled
	    , InitialAmountCents
	    , RedeemStatus
	    , RedeemID
	    , ReopenForPositionID
	    , IsReOpen
	    , CommissionOnCloseOrig
	    , FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
	    , InitialUnits
	    , IsDiscounted
	    , CommissionByUnits
	    , FullCommissionByUnits
	    , Volume
	    , VolumeOnClose 
	    , LastOpPriceRateID 
	    , IsAirDrop
	    , InitForexPriceRateID
	    , [InitForex_Ask] 
	    , [InitForex_Bid] 
	    , [InitForex_AskSpreaded] 
	    , [InitForex_BidSpreaded] 
	    , [InitForex_USDConversionRate] 
	    , InitExecutionID
	    , [InitConversionRate]
	    , [InitConversionRateID]
	    , InitHedgeType 
	    , OrderID
	    , IsSettledOnOpen
	    , StopRateOnOpen
	    , LimitRateOnOpen
	    , SettlementTypeID
	    , OpenMarketPriceRateID
	    , OpenMarket_Ask 
	    , OpenMarket_Bid 
	    , OpenMarket_AskSpreaded 
	    , OpenMarket_BidSpreaded 
	    , OpenMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded
	    , OpenMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded
	    , RequestOpenOccurred
        , OrderType
	    , PnLVersion -- 20240103 KatyF
		, PnLInDollars  --20240115 Inbal BML
		, OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		, CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
		, OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		/* ofir new dlt columns: */
		, DLTOpen 
        --, DLTClose
		, OpenMarkupByUnits
		, CommissionVersion
		, OpenPositionReasonID -- ofir
		, OpenTotalTaxes --20250620 Adi Ferber
	    , OpenTotalFees  --20250620 Adi Ferber
		/* 2025-09-08     Daniel Kaplan  */
	    , EstimateCloseFeeForCFD 
	    , EstimateCloseFeeOnOpenByUnits
	    , EstimateCloseFeeOnOpen 
	    , Close_PnLInDollars
	    , Close_CalculationRate
	    , Close_ConversionRate
	    , Close_PriceType
	    , CurrentCalculationRate 
	    , CurrentConversionRate
		/* 2025-09-08     Daniel Kaplan  */
	 )
	SELECT 
	     b.[PositionID]
	   , b.[CID]
	   , b.[CurrencyID]
	   , b.[ProviderID]
	   , b.[InstrumentID]
	   , b.[HedgeID]
	   , b.[HedgeServerID]
	   , b.[Leverage]
	   , b.[Amount]
	   , b.[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
	   , b.[UnitMargin]
	   , b.[InitForexRate]
	   , b.[NetProfit]
	   , b.[SpreadedPipBid]
	   , b.[SpreadedPipAsk]
	   , b.[IsBuy]
	   , b.[CloseOnEndOfWeek]
	   , b.[EndOfWeekFee]
	   , b.[Commission]
	   , b.[CommissionOnClose]
	   , b.[OpenOccurred]
	   , b.[CloseOccurred]
	   , b.[ParentPositionID]
	   , b.[OrigParentPositionID]
	   , b.[MirrorID]
	   , b.[IsOpenOpen]
	   , b.[LotCountDecimal]
	   , b.[SpreadedCommission]
	   , b.[EndForexRate]
	   , b.[LastOpConversionRate]
	   , b.[LimitRate]
	   , b.[StopRate]
	   , b.[ClosePositionReasonID]
	   , b.[TreeID]
	   , b.[OpenDateID]
	   , b.[CloseDateID]
	   , ISNULL(b.[RegulationID],0) AS RegulationIDOnOpen
	   , getutcdate()
	   , b.[FullCommission]
	   , b.[FullCommissionOnClose]
	   , b.IsComputeForHedge
	   , b.IsSettled
	   , b.InitialAmountCents
	   , b.RedeemStatus
	   , b.RedeemID
	   , b.ReopenForPositionID
	   , b.IsReOpen
	   , b.CommissionOnCloseOrig
	   , b.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
	   , b.InitialUnits
	   , b.IsDiscounted
	   , b.CommissionByUnits
	   , b.FullCommissionByUnits
	   , b.Volume
	   , b.VolumeOnClose
	   , b.LastOpPriceRateID
	   , b.IsAirDrop
	   , b.InitForexPriceRateID
	   , b.[InitForex_Ask] 
	   , b.[InitForex_Bid] 
	   , b.[InitForex_AskSpreaded] 
	   , b.[InitForex_BidSpreaded] 
	   , b.[InitForex_USDConversionRate] 
	   , b.InitExecutionID
	   , b.[InitConversionRate]
	   , b.[InitConversionRateID]
	   , b.InitHedgeType 
	   , b.OrderID
	   , ISNULL(c.IsSettled,0) AS IsSettledOnOpen
	   , ISNULL(b.StopRate ,0) AS StopRateOnOpen
	   , ISNULL(b.LimitRate ,0) AS LimitRateOnOpen
	   , b.SettlementTypeID
	   , b.OpenMarketPriceRateID
	   , b.OpenMarket_Ask 
	   , b.OpenMarket_Bid 
	   , b.OpenMarket_AskSpreaded 
	   , b.OpenMarket_BidSpreaded 
	   , b.OpenMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded
	   , b.OpenMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded
	   , RequestOccurred
       , b.OrderType
	   , b.PnLVersion -- 20240103 KatyF
	   , b.PnLInDollars  --20240115 Inbal BML
	   , b.OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
	   , b.CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
	   , b.OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
       , b.DLTOpen 
       -- , b.DLTClose
	   , b.OpenMarkupByUnits
	   , b.CommissionVersion
	   , b.OpenPositionReasonID -- ofir
	   , b.OpenTotalTaxes --20250620 Adi Ferber
	   , b.OpenTotalFees  --20250620 Adi Ferber
	   /* 2025-09-08     Daniel Kaplan  */
	   , b.EstimateCloseFeeForCFD 
	   , b.EstimateCloseFeeOnOpenByUnits
	   , b.EstimateCloseFeeOnOpen 
	   , b.Close_PnLInDollars
	   , b.Close_CalculationRate
	   , b.Close_ConversionRate
	   , b.Close_PriceType
	   , b.CurrentCalculationRate 
	   , b.CurrentConversionRate
	   /* 2025-09-08     Daniel Kaplan  */
	FROM  [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real AS b 
	left join  [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position AS a
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID
	left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_First_Open as c
	ON b.PositionID = c.PositionID
	WHERE a.PositionID IS NULL
-----------------------------------------------------------------> 
-- Update InitForex Dim_Position PatitialClose ------------------>

	UPDATE a
	SET
	[InitForex_Ask] = b.[InitForex_Ask],
	[InitForex_Bid] = b.[InitForex_Bid],
	[InitForex_AskSpreaded] = b.[InitForex_AskSpreaded],
	[InitForex_BidSpreaded] = b.[InitForex_BidSpreaded],
	[InitForex_USDConversionRate] = b.[InitForex_USDConversionRate]
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position a WITH (NOLOCk)
	join [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position b WITH (NOLOCk)
	ON a.OriginalPositionID = b.PositionID
	WHERE a.CloseDateID >= CONVERT(CHAR(8), cast(@Yesterday as date), 112)
	AND (a.InitForexPriceRateID > 1 AND a.InitForex_Ask IS NULL)
	AND a.IsPartialCloseChild = 1
	AND  b.InitForex_Ask IS NOT NULL
-----------------------------------------------------------------> 
-- Update RegulationIDOnOpen Dim_Position PatitialClose -------------->

	UPDATE a
	SET
	RegulationIDOnOpen = b.RegulationIDOnOpen
	FROM  [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position a (NOLOCK)
	join [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position b (NOLOCK)
	ON a.OriginalPositionID = b.PositionID
	WHERE a.CloseDateID >= CONVERT(CHAR(8), CAST(@Yesterday as date), 112)
	AND a.IsPartialCloseChild = 1
	AND a.RegulationIDOnOpen != b.RegulationIDOnOpen
-----------------------------------------------------------------> 
-- SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen -------------------------------->
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen @Yesterday
-----------------------------------------------------------------> 

-- SP_Dim_Position_IsPartialCloseParent -------------------------->
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Dim_Position_IsPartialCloseParent
----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update The Process Finish to Ind  2 Dim_Position -------------------->
	--UPDATE [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd]
	--SET
	--[IndRun] = 2 ,
	--[UpdateDate] = GETDATE()
	--WHERE TableName = 'Dim_Position'
	--AND [IndRun] <> 2 
----------------------------------------------------------------->




UPDATE p
    SET
    CloseMarket_AskSpreaded=a.AskSpreaded
    ,CloseMarket_BidSpreaded=a.BidSpreaded
    ,CloseMarket_Ask=a.Ask 
    ,CloseMarket_Bid=a.Bid
    ,CloseMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateBidSpreaded
    ,CloseMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateAskSpreaded
    FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position p
    join  [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active_5_days] a
    ON   a.PriceRateID  = p.CloseMarketPriceRateID
        AND a.InstrumentID = p.InstrumentID
    AND  CONVERT(date,a.Occurred) BETWEEN 
        DATEADD(DAY,-5,CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.CloseDateID)))
        AND 
        CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.CloseDateID))
	where p.CloseDateID=CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)
                          
-- all positions where the PriceRateID is found will be updated 


    UPDATE p
    SET
    CloseMarket_AskSpreaded=a.AskSpreaded
    ,CloseMarket_BidSpreaded=a.BidSpreaded
    ,CloseMarket_Ask=a.Ask 
    ,CloseMarket_Bid=a.Bid
    ,CloseMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateBidSpreaded
    ,CloseMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateAskSpreaded
    FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position p
    join  [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active_5_days] a
    ON  MarketPriceRateID   = p.CloseMarketPriceRateID
        AND a.InstrumentID = p.InstrumentID
    where CloseMarket_AskSpreaded IS NULL 
    AND CONVERT(date,a.Occurred) BETWEEN 
        DATEADD(DAY,-5,CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.CloseDateID)))
        AND 
        CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.CloseDateID))
	and p.CloseDateID=CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)
    -- this condition should join the only positions which are still null where MarketPriceRateID is found in the Ext table but not PriceRateID

-- step 1: update on PriceRateID. example for this: Position 2394055999, PriceRateID = 64496832199, MarketPriceRateID = 650511496561, we want to 
-- join on PriceRateID if exists, then go over the nulls and join the remaining on MarketPriceRateID:

    UPDATE p
    SET
    OpenMarket_Ask  = a.Ask,
    OpenMarket_Bid = a.Bid,
    OpenMarket_AskSpreaded  = a.AskSpreaded,
    OpenMarket_BidSpreaded = a.BidSpreaded,
    OpenMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateBidSpreaded,
    OpenMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateAskSpreaded
    FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position p
    --[DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real p
    join  [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active_5_days] a
    ON a.PriceRateID = p.OpenMarketPriceRateID
        AND a.InstrumentID = p.InstrumentID
    AND  CONVERT(date,a.Occurred) BETWEEN 
        DATEADD(DAY,-5,CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.OpenDateID)))
        AND 
        CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.OpenDateID))
	where p.OpenDateID=CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)
-- all positions where the PriceRateID is found will be updated 
    

    UPDATE p
    SET
    OpenMarket_Ask  = a.Ask,
    OpenMarket_Bid = a.Bid,
    OpenMarket_AskSpreaded  = a.AskSpreaded,
    OpenMarket_BidSpreaded = a.BidSpreaded,
    OpenMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateBidSpreaded,
    OpenMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateAskSpreaded
    FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position p
    join  [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active_5_days] a
    ON MarketPriceRateID = p.OpenMarketPriceRateID
        AND a.InstrumentID = p.InstrumentID
    where OpenMarket_Ask IS NULL
    AND  CONVERT(date,a.Occurred) BETWEEN 
        DATEADD(DAY,-5,CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.OpenDateID)))
        AND 
        CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.OpenDateID))
		and p.OpenDateID=CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)
    -- this condition should join the only positions which are still null where MarketPriceRateID is found in the Ext table but not PriceRateID


		UPDATE DWH_dbo.Dim_Position
SET    OpenMarket_Ask            = InitForex_Ask
     , OpenMarket_Bid            = InitForex_Bid
     , OpenMarket_AskSpreaded    = InitForex_AskSpreaded
     , OpenMarket_BidSpreaded    = InitForex_BidSpreaded
WHERE OpenMarket_Ask IS NULL 
    AND InitForexPriceRateID = OpenMarketPriceRateID
    AND InitForex_Ask IS NOT null 
    AND OpenDateID=CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)

END
SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse_bkp_2024_0:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse_bkp_2024_08_04] @dt [Date] AS

BEGIN

-- =============================================
-- Author:      <Re'em Cohen>
-- Create Date: 2021-07-27
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse] '20240123'
-- =============================================
/***************************
** Change History
**************************
Date           Author        Description   
----------     ----------    ------------------------------------
01/02/2022     Inbal BML      add SettlementTypeID
14/04/2022	   Inbal BML	  add OpenMarketPriceRateID
2022-05-14     Boris Slutski  change caluclation VolumeonClose for closed Position --> Cast([AmountInUnitsDecimal]as Float)
2022-07-03     Boris Slutski  add condition to Merge script
2023-03-07     nir harari     add 12 column OpenMarket*,CloseMarket* ,CloseMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded ,CloseMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded 
2023-05-22     nir harari     add 3 columns RequestOpenOccurred,RequestCloseOccurred ,OrderType 
2023-06-14     nir harari     change update for dim position
2024-01-03     KatyF          Add PnLVersion & Fill InitConversionRate. Remove hardcoded NULL for InitConversionRate in ext
2024-01-15	   Inbal BML	  change [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] and [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay]
							  & Add PnLInDollars , EndOfDayPnLInDollars ,  OpenMarketSpread , CloseMarketSpread , CloseMarkupOnOpen , OpenMarkup and CloseMarkup
2024-03-10	   Daniel K	      add exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Check_PnLInDollars_in_DWH_staging_etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] 

--**********************************************************************************************************************/
    -- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
    -- interfering with SELECT statements.
    SET NOCOUNT ON
--DECLARE @dt Date ='2024-01-23'  
   DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
   DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME

   SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
   SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);

	exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Check_PnLInDollars_in_DWH_staging_etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] 

-- Update Dim_Position --------------------------------------->
	DELETE FROM [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Position] 
	WHERE (OpenDateID >=  CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)
	AND OpenDateID <  CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @CurrentDate , 112 ) AS INT) )
	OR( CloseDateID >= CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday , 112 ) AS INT) AND CloseDateID < CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @CurrentDate, 112 ) AS INT) AND PositionID<> OriginalPositionID)

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Position] 
	set 
	CloseOccurred = '1900-01-01 00:00:00.000' ,
	CloseDateID = 19000101
	where CloseDateID >= cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday , 112 ) AS INT) AND CloseDateID < cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @CurrentDate, 112 ) AS INT)
	
	----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Dim_Position_Real --------------------------------------->
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real

	IF EXISTS (
	SELECT Name FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = object_id('[DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_Real]') 
	AND Name = 'CL_IX_Ext_Dim_Position_Real_CloseDateID_PositionID') 
		DROP INDEX CL_IX_Ext_Dim_Position_Real_CloseDateID_PositionID ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real;
	
	IF EXISTS (
	SELECT Name FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = object_id('[DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_Real]')
	AND Name = 'IX_Ext_Dim_Position_Real_CID') 
		DROP INDEX IX_Ext_Dim_Position_Real_CID ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real;

----------------------------------------------------------------->
	 
If Object_ID('tempdb..#etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer

Select  *
into #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer  -- Move duplicates rows, because two parquet files with another dates
from
(
select
CID,
RegulationID,
ValidFrom,
ValidTo,
CustomerHistoryID,
ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by a.CID, CustomerHistoryID  order by a.ValidTo ) as rn
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] a with (nolock)
) a
where  rn =1

--------------------
-- Extract Ext_Dim_Position_Real --------------------------------------->

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_Real]
           ( [PositionID]
           , [CID]
           , [CurrencyID]
           , [ProviderID]
           , [InstrumentID]
           , [HedgeID]
           , [HedgeServerID]
           , [Leverage]
           , [Amount]
           , [AmountInUnitsDecimal]
           , [UnitMargin]
           , [InitForexRate]
           , [NetProfit]
           , [SpreadedPipBid]
           , [SpreadedPipAsk]
           , [IsBuy]
           , [CloseOnEndOfWeek]
           , [EndOfWeekFee]
           , [Commission]
           , [CommissionOnClose]
           , [OpenOccurred]
           , [CloseOccurred]
           , [ParentPositionID]
           , [OrigParentPositionID]
           , [MirrorID]
           , [IsOpenOpen]
           , [OpenDateID]
           , [CloseDateID]
           , [LotCountDecimal]
           , [SpreadedCommission]
           , [EndForexRate]
           , [LastOpConversionRate]
           , [LimitRate]
           , [StopRate]
           , [ClosePositionReasonID]
           , [TreeID]
           , [FullCommission]
           , [FullCommissionOnClose]
           , [IsComputeForHedge]
           , [IsSettled]
           , [InitialAmountCents]
           , [RedeemStatus]
           , [RedeemID]
           , [ReopenForPositionID]
           , [IsReOpen]
           , [CommissionOnCloseOrig]
           , [FullCommissionOnCloseOrig]
           , [InitialUnits]
           , [IsDiscounted]
           , [CommissionByUnits]
           , [FullCommissionByUnits]
           , [Volume]
           , [VolumeOnClose]
           , [LastOpPriceRateID]
           , [InitForexPriceRateID]
           , [InitExecutionID]
           , [InitConversionRate]
           , [InitConversionRateID]
           , [OrderID]
           , [RegulationID]
           , [UpdateDate]
		   , [SettlementTypeID]
		   , OpenMarketPriceRateID
		   , RequestOccurred
		   , OrderType
		   , [PnLVersion] -- 20240103 KatyF
		   , PnLInDollars  --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML

		   
		   )
		
		SELECT 
		     PositionID
		   , a.CID
		   , CurrencyID
		   , ProviderID
		   , a.InstrumentID
		   , HedgeID
		   , HedgeServerID
		   , Leverage
		   , Amount
		   , AmountInUnitsDecimal
		   , UnitMargin
		   , InitForexRate
		   , NetProfit
		   , SpreadedPipBid
		   , SpreadedPipAsk
		   , IsBuy
		   , ISNULL(CloseOnEndOfWeek, 0) as CloseOnEndOfWeek
		   , EndOfWeekFee
		   , Commission
		   , 0 as CommissionOnClose
		   , Occurred as OpenOccurred
		   , CAST(0 as datetime) as CloseOccurred
		   , ParentPositionID
		   , OrigParentPositionID
		   , MirrorID
		   , IsOpenOpen
		   , CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar,DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,0,Occurred),0),112)) as OpenDateID
		   , 0 as CloseDateID
		   , LotCountDecimal
		   , SpreadedCommission
		   , Null as EndForexRate
		   , LastOpConversionRate
		   , LimitRate
		   , StopRate
		   , Null as ClosePositionReasonID
		   , TreeID
		   , FullCommission
		   , NULL as FullCommissionOnClose
		   , IsComputeForHedge
		   , CASE 
		     WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN CAST(IsSettled as int)  
		     WHEN IsBuy = 1 AND Leverage = 1 AND b.InstrumentTypeID in (10,5,6) THEN 1 
		     ELSE 0 
		     END as IsSettled
		   , InitialAmountCents
		   , RedeemStatus
		   , NULL as RedeemID
		   , ReopenForPositionID
		   , CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN 1 END as IsReOpen
		   , 0.00 as CommissionOnCloseOrig
		   , 0.00 as FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		   , InitialUnits
		   , CAST(IsDiscounted as int)   IsDiscounted
		   , CommissionByUnits
		   , [FullCommissionByUnits]
		   , try_convert(int,ROUND(Cast([AmountInUnitsDecimal]as decimal(16,6))*Cast([InitForexRate] as decimal(16,8))*
			(CASE WHEN SellCurrencyID=1 THEN 1 WHEN BuyCurrencyID=1 THEN 1/cast([InitForexRate] as decimal (16,8)) else cast([LastOpConversionRate] as decimal (16,8)) end),0))  Volume
		   , 0 as VolumeOnClose
		   , LastOpPriceRateID
		   , InitForexPriceRateID
		   , InitExecutionID
		   , InitConversionRate
		   , InitConversionRateID
		   , OrderID
		   , ISNULL(c.RegulationID, 0) as RegulationID
		   , GETDATE() as UpdateDate
		   , SettlementTypeID
		   , OpenMarketPriceRateID
		   , RequestOccurred
		   , OrderType
		   , ISNULL(PnLVersion,0) AS PnLVersion  -- 20240103 KatyF
		   , PnLInDollars  --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		From [DWH_staging].etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay a with (NOLOCK)
		left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
		on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
		left join #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer c with (nolock)
		--[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] c with (nolock)
		ON a.CID = c.CID
		AND c.ValidFrom < @CurrentDate
		--dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
		AND c.ValidTo >= @CurrentDate
		--dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
		WHERE a.Occurred< @CurrentDate
		--dateadd(day,1,?)

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real

-- DROP INDEX Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real ---------------------->
	IF EXISTS (SELECT Name FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = object_id('[DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real]')

	DROP INDEX CL_IX_Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real_OpenDateID ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real
