-- Extract Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real ------------------------>

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real]
           ([PositionID]
           ,[CID]
           ,[CurrencyID]
           ,[ProviderID]
           ,[InstrumentID]
           ,[HedgeID]
           ,[HedgeServerID]
           ,[Leverage]
           ,[Amount]
           ,[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
           ,[UnitMargin]
           ,[InitForexRate]
           ,[NetProfit]
           ,[SpreadedPipBid]
           ,[SpreadedPipAsk]
           ,[IsBuy]
           ,[CloseOnEndOfWeek]
           ,[EndOfWeekFee]
           ,[Commission]
           ,[CommissionOnClose]
           ,[OpenOccurred]
           ,[CloseOccurred]
           ,[ParentPositionID]
           ,[OrigParentPositionID]
           ,[MirrorID]
           ,[IsOpenOpen]
           ,[OpenDateID]
           ,[CloseDateID]
           ,[LotCountDecimal]
           ,[SpreadedCommission]
           ,[EndForexRate]
           ,[LastOpConversionRate]
           ,[LimitRate]
           ,[StopRate]
           ,[ClosePositionReasonID]
           ,[TreeID]
           ,[FullCommission]
           ,[FullCommissionOnClose]
           ,[IsComputeForHedge]
           ,[IsSettled]
           ,[InitialAmountCents]
           ,[RedeemStatus]
           ,[RedeemID]
           ,[ReopenForPositionID]
           ,[IsReOpen]
           ,[CommissionOnCloseOrig]
           ,[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig]
		   ,[OriginalPositionID]
           ,[InitialUnits]
           ,[IsDiscounted]
           ,[CommissionByUnits]
           ,[FullCommissionByUnits]
           ,[Volume]
           ,[VolumeOnClose]
           ,[LastOpPriceRateID]
           ,[InitForexPriceRateID]
		   ,[EndForexPriceRateID]
           ,[InitExecutionID]
		   ,[EndExecutionID]
		   ,[CloseMarketPriceRateID]
           ,[InitConversionRate]
           ,[InitConversionRateID]
           ,[OrderID]
		   ,[ExitOrderID]
		   ,[RegulationID]
		   ,[LastOpPriceRate]
           ,[UpdateDate]
		   ,[SettlementTypeID]
		   ,OpenMarketPriceRateID
		   ,RequestOpenOccurred
		   ,RequestCloseOccurred
		   ,OrderType
		   ,[PnLVersion]
		   ,EndOfDayPnLInDollars -- 20240115 Inbal BML
		   ,OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   ,CloseMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   ,CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
		   ,OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		   ,CloseMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
			)

		SELECT
		     PositionID
		   , a.CID
		   , CurrencyID
		   , ProviderID
		   , a.InstrumentID
		   , HedgeID
		   , HedgeServerID
		   , Leverage
		   , Amount
		   , AmountInUnitsDecimal
		   , UnitMargin
		   , InitForexRate
		   , NetProfit
		   , SpreadedPipBid
		   , SpreadedPipAsk
		   , IsBuy
		   , CloseOnEndOfWeek
		   , EndOfWeekFee
		   , Commission
		   , CommissionOnClose
		   , OpenOccurred
		   , CloseOccurred
		   , ParentPositionID
		   , OrigParentPositionID
		   , MirrorID
		   , IsOpenOpen
		   , CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar,DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,0,OpenOccurred),0),112)) as OpenDateID
		   , CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar,DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,0,CloseOccurred),0),112)) as CloseDateID
		   , LotCountDecimal
		   , SpreadedCommission
		   , EndForexRate
		   , LastOpConversionRate
		   , LimitRate
		   , StopRate
		   , ActionType as ClosePositionReasonID
		   , TreeID
		   , ISNULL(FullCommission,0.00) FullCommission
		   , ISNULL(FullCommissionOnClose, 0.00) FullCommissionOnClose
		   , IsComputeForHedge
		   , CASE 
		     WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  
		     WHEN IsBuy = 1 AND Leverage = 1 AND b.InstrumentTypeID in (10,5,6) THEN 1 
		     ELSE 0 
		     END as IsSettled
		   , InitialAmountCents
		   , RedeemStatus
		   , RedeemID
		   , ReopenForPositionID
		   , CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as IsReOpen
		   , CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN CommissionOnClose ELSE 0 END AS CommissionOnCloseOrig
		   , CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN FullCommissionOnClose ELSE 0 END AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		   , OriginalPositionID
		   , InitialUnits
		   , CAST(IsDiscounted as int)   IsDiscounted
		   , CommissionByUnits
		   , FullCommissionByUnits
		   , try_convert(int,ROUND(Cast([AmountInUnitsDecimal]as decimal(16,6))*Cast([InitForexRate] as decimal(16,8))*
		     (CASE WHEN SellCurrencyID=1 THEN 1 WHEN BuyCurrencyID=1 THEN 1/cast([InitForexRate] as decimal (16,8)) else cast([LastOpConversionRate] as decimal (16,8)) end),0))  Volume
		   --,try_convert(int,ROUND(Cast([AmountInUnitsDecimal]as decimal(16,6))*Cast([InitForexRate] as decimal(16,8))*
		   --(CASE WHEN SellCurrencyID=1 THEN 1 WHEN BuyCurrencyID=1 THEN 1/cast(EndForexRate as decimal (16,8)) else cast([LastOpConversionRate] as decimal (16,8)) end),0))VolumeOnClose
		   ---,try_convert(int,ROUND(Cast([AmountInUnitsDecimal]as Float)*EndForexRate*(case when SellCurrencyID=1 then 1 when BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1/EndForexRate else LastOpConversionRate end),0)) VolumeOnClose  -- Not samr to DWH-01
		   , try_convert(int,ROUND([AmountInUnitsDecimal]*EndForexRate*(case when SellCurrencyID=1 then 1 when BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1/EndForexRate else LastOpConversionRate end),0)) VolumeOnClose
		   , LastOpPriceRateID
		   , InitForexPriceRateID
		   , EndForexPriceRateID
		   , [InitExecutionID]
		   , [EndExecutionID] 
		   , CloseMarketPriceRateID
		   , InitConversionRate  -- 20240103 KatyF
		   , InitConversionRateID  -- 20240103 KatyF
		   , OrderID
		   , ExitOrderID
		   , isnull(c.RegulationID, 0) AS RegulationID
		   , LastOpPriceRate
		   , GETDATE() AS UpdateDate
		   , SettlementTypeID
		   , OpenMarketPriceRateID
		   , RequestOpenOccurred
		   , RequestCloseOccurred
		   , OrderType
		   , ISNULL([PnLVersion],0) AS [PnLVersion]  -- 20240103 KatyF
		   , EndOfDayPnLInDollars -- 20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , CloseMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		   , CloseMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay] a With (Nolock)   
		
		left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
		on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
		left join #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer c with (nolock)
		--[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer]  c with (nolock)
		ON a.CID = c.CID
		AND c.ValidFrom < @CurrentDate
		--dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0) 
		AND c.ValidTo >= @CurrentDate
		--dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
		
		WHERE
		(
			(
			 CloseOccurred >= @Yesterday
			 AND 
			 CloseOccurred <@CurrentDate
			 --dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
			)
		or
			(
			 OpenOccurred >= @Yesterday
			 AND
			 OpenOccurred < @CurrentDate
			 --dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
			 AND
			 CloseOccurred > @Yesterday
			)
		or
			(
			OpenOccurred < @CurrentDate
			--dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,?),0)
			AND
			CloseOccurred >= @Yesterday
			)
		) 
		--OPTION	(RECOMPILE)

	IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT Name FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = object_id('[DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real]') 
	AND Name = 'CL_IX_Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real_OpenDateID')

-- Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLog ---------------------------->
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLog

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLog
		SELECT
		PositionID,
		CID,
		Occurred,
		ISNULL(CAST(IsSettled as int),0) IsSettled,
		ISNULL(CAST(PreviousIsSettled as int ),0) PreviousIsSettled
		FROM
		(
			SELECT
			pl.PositionID
			,pl.CID
			,Occurred
			,pl.IsSettled
			,pl.PreviousIsSettled
			, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by pl.PositionID order by  pl.Occurred ) rn
			FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] pl with (NOLOCK)
			WHERE Occurred > DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0)
			---AND isnull(pl.IsSettled,-1) <> isnull(pl.PreviousIsSettled,-1)
			AND ISNULL(CAST(pl.IsSettled as int),0) <> ISNULL(CAST(pl.PreviousIsSettled as int),0)
		) a
		WHERE rn =1
	
----------------------------------------------------------------->

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_First_Open

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_First_Open
		SELECT
		PositionID,
		Occurred,
		CID,	
		ISNULL(CAST(IsSettled as int),0) IsSettled
		
		FROM
		(
			SELECT
			pl.PositionID
			,pl.CID
			,Occurred
			,pl.IsSettled
			, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by pl.PositionID order by  pl.Occurred ) rn
			FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] pl with (NOLOCK)
			WHERE Occurred >=@Yesterday
			AND ChangeTypeID=0
			
		) a
		WHERE rn =1

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_Real IsSettled -------------------------------------------->

	UPDATE c
	SET IsSettled = PreviousIsSettled
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLog a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real c
	ON a.PositionID = c.PositionID 

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real  IsSettled --------------->
	UPDATE c
	SET IsSettled = PreviousIsSettled
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLog a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real  c
	ON a.PositionID = c.PositionID

-- Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount ----------------------------------------->

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount
	SELECT         
	PositionID
	,CID
	,Occurred
	,PreviousAmount
	,PreviousStopRate
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
		PositionID
		,CID
		,Occurred
		,PreviousAmount 
		,PreviousStopRate, AmountChanged
		,ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by PositionID ORDER BY  Occurred ) rn
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] 
		WHERE
		Occurred>= DATEADD(DAY,1,@Yesterday)
	) a
	WHERE rn=1
	

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount_ChangeType12
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount_ChangeType12
	SELECT
	PositionID
	,CID
	,SUM(AmountChanged) AS AmountChanged
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog]
	WHERE Occurred>= @CurrentDate AND ChangeTypeID IN (12) 
	GROUP BY
	PositionID
	,CID
	
----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real - Amount ---------------->

	UPDATE a
	SET
	Amount = b.PreviousAmount,
	StopRate = b.PreviousStopRate
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount b
	on a.PositionID = b.PositionID
	WHERE
	(
	  a.Amount <> b.PreviousAmount
	 OR 
      a.StopRate <> b.PreviousStopRate 
	)

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real - Amount ChangeTypeID12 --------->

	UPDATE a
	SET
	Amount = a.Amount + b.AmountChanged
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount_ChangeType12 b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Ext_Dim_Position_FundCIDs ------------------------------------>

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_FundCIDs
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_FundCIDs
	
	SELECT b.CID
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_BackOffice_Customer] b WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE b.AccountTypeID=9

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_Real - IsCopyFundPosition ------------------->

	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#copyFundPos') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #copyFundPos;

	SELECT
	    dp.PositionID
	   ,dp.CID
	   ,dp.TreeID 
	INTO #copyFundPos
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real dp
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position dp1
	 ON dp.TreeID = dp1.PositionID
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_FundCIDs c
	 ON dp1.CID = c.CID
	
	--CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX    #copyFundPos ON #copyFundPos (PositionID)
	    
	UPDATE a
	SET IsCopyFundPosition = 1
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real a
	JOIN #copyFundPos b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID

----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real - IsCopyFundPosition ------------>

	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#copyFundPos') IS NOT NULL
			DROP TABLE #copyFundPos;
	
	SELECT
	    dp.PositionID
	   ,dp.CID
	   ,dp.TreeID 
	INTO #copyFundPos
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real dp
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position dp1
	 ON dp.TreeID = dp1.PositionID
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_FundCIDs c
	 ON dp1.CID = c.CID
	
	--CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX    #copyFundPos ON #copyFundPos (PositionID)
	    
	UPDATE a
	SET IsCopyFundPosition = 1
	FROM [DWH_dbo].[Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real] a
	JOIN #copyFundPos b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID

	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real a

-- Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active ------------------------>
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active
	
	SELECT a.PriceRateID,
	 a.Ask, a.Bid, a.AskSpreaded, a.BidSpreaded, a.USDConversionRate,USDConversionRateBidSpreaded,USDConversionRateAskSpreaded,MarketPriceRateID
	FROM [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active] a
	WHERE Occurred>= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday) AND Occurred <= @CurrentDate
	
----------------------------------------------------------------->
-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_Real - CurrencyPrice_Active  --------------------------->

	UPDATE p
	SET
	[InitForex_Ask] = a.Ask,
	[InitForex_Bid] = a.Bid,
	[InitForex_AskSpreaded] = a.AskSpreaded,
	[InitForex_BidSpreaded] = a.BidSpreaded,
	[InitForex_USDConversionRate] = a.USDConversionRate
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real p
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active a
	ON a.PriceRateID = p.InitForexPriceRateID 

----------------------------------------------------------------->
-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_History - CurrencyPrice_Active ------------>
	
	UPDATE p
	SET
	[InitForex_Ask] = a.Ask,
	[InitForex_Bid] = a.Bid,
	[InitForex_AskSpreaded] = a.AskSpreaded,
	[InitForex_BidSpreaded] = a.BidSpreaded,
	[InitForex_USDConversionRate] = a.USDConversionRate
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active a
	ON a.PriceRateID = p.InitForexPriceRateID 
	WHERE OpenDateID = CONVERT(CHAR(8), CAST(@Yesterday as date), 112)
	
	UPDATE p
	SET
	[EndForex_Ask] = a.Ask,
	[EndForex_Bid] = a.Bid,
	[EndForex_AskSpreaded] = a.AskSpreaded,
	[EndForex_BidSpreaded] = a.BidSpreaded,
	[EndForex_USDConversionRate] = a.USDConversionRate
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_CurrencyPrice_Active a
	ON a.PriceRateID = p.EndForexPriceRateID
----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Execute SQL Task Update from Ext_Dim_Position_History -------------------->----------------------------------------------------------------->
	UPDATE a 
	SET 
	  [AmountInUnitsDecimal]=b.[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
	, [InitForexRate]=b.[InitForexRate]
	, CloseOccurred = CASE WHEN b.CloseOccurred  >=CAST(GETDATE() as date)  THEN '19000101' else b.CloseOccurred  end 
	, CloseDateID = CASE WHEN b.CloseOccurred >=CAST(GETDATE() as date)  THEN 0 ELSE CONVERT (int,CONVERT(varchar,DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,0,b.CloseOccurred),0),112)) END
	, NetProfit = b.NetProfit
	, CommissionOnClose = b.CommissionOnClose
	, Commission = b.Commission
	, MirrorID = b.MirrorID
	, ParentPositionID = b.ParentPositionID
	, OrigParentPositionID = b.OrigParentPositionID
	, Amount = b.Amount
	, CloseOnEndOfWeek = b.CloseOnEndOfWeek
	, EndOfWeekFee = b.EndOfWeekFee
	, EndForexRate = b.EndForexRate
	, LastOpConversionRate = b.LastOpConversionRate
	, LimitRate = b.LimitRate
	, StopRate = b.StopRate
	, ClosePositionReasonID = b.ClosePositionReasonID
	, TreeID = b.TreeID
	, HedgeID = b.HedgeID
	, HedgeServerID = b.HedgeServerID
	, UpdateDate = getutcdate()
	, FullCommission = b.FullCommission
	, FullCommissionOnClose = b.FullCommissionOnClose
	, IsComputeForHedge = b.IsComputeForHedge
	, IsSettled = b.IsSettled
	, InitialAmountCents = b.InitialAmountCents
	, RedeemStatus = b.RedeemStatus
	, RedeemID = b.RedeemID
	, InitialUnits = b.InitialUnits
	, IsDiscounted = b.IsDiscounted
	, CommissionByUnits = b.CommissionByUnits
	, FullCommissionByUnits = b.FullCommissionByUnits
	, Volume = b.Volume
	, VolumeOnClose = b.VolumeOnClose
	--,InitForexPriceRateID = b.InitForexPriceRateID
	, EndForexPriceRateID= b.EndForexPriceRateID
	--,[InitForex_Ask] = b.InitForex_Ask

	SELECT  b.[PositionID]
	      , b.[CID]
	      , b.[CurrencyID]
	      , b.[ProviderID]
	      , b.[InstrumentID]
	      , b.[HedgeID]
	      , b.[HedgeServerID]
	      , b.[Leverage]
	      , b.[Amount]
	      , b.[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
	      , b.[UnitMargin]
	      , b.[InitForexRate]
	      , b.[NetProfit]
	      , b.[SpreadedPipBid]
	      , b.[SpreadedPipAsk]
	      , b.[IsBuy]
	      , b.[CloseOnEndOfWeek]
	      , b.[EndOfWeekFee]
	      , b.[Commission]
	      , b.[CommissionOnClose]
	      , b.[OpenOccurred]
	      , CASE WHEN b.CloseOccurred  >=CAST(GETDATE() as date)  THEN '19000101' ELSE b.CloseOccurred  END as CloseOccurred
	    -- , b.[CloseOccurred]
	      , b.[ParentPositionID]
	      , b.[OrigParentPositionID]
	      , b.[MirrorID]
	      , b.[IsOpenOpen]
	      , b.[LotCountDecimal]
	      , b.[SpreadedCommission]
	      , b.[EndForexRate]
	      , b.[LastOpConversionRate]
	      , b.[LimitRate]
	      , b.[StopRate]
	      , b.[ClosePositionReasonID]
	      , b.[TreeID]
	      , b.[OpenDateID]
	      , CASE WHEN b.CloseOccurred >=CAST(GETDATE() as date)  THEN 0 ELSE CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar,DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,0,b.CloseOccurred),0),112)) END AS CloseDateID
	    --, b.[CloseDateID]
	      , ISNULL(b.[RegulationID],0)
	      , getutcdate()
	      , b.[FullCommission]
	      , b.[FullCommissionOnClose]
	      , b.IsComputeForHedge
	      , b.IsSettled
	      , b.InitialAmountCents
	      , b.RedeemStatus
	      , b.RedeemID
	      , b.ReopenForPositionID
	      , b.IsReOpen
	      , b.CommissionOnCloseOrig
	      , b.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
	      , b.OriginalPositionID
	      , CASE WHEN b.PositionID <>   b.OriginalPositionID   AND  b.OriginalPositionID  is not null THEN 1 else  0 end IsPartialCloseChild
	      , b.InitialUnits
	      , b.IsDiscounted
	      , b.CommissionByUnits
	      , b.FullCommissionByUnits
	      , b.Volume
	      , b.VolumeOnClose
	      , b.LastOpPriceRateID
	      , b.IsAirDrop
	      , b.InitForexPriceRateID
	      , b.EndForexPriceRateID
	      , b.[InitForex_Ask] 
	      , b.[InitForex_Bid] 
	      , b.[InitForex_AskSpreaded] 
	      , b.[InitForex_BidSpreaded] 
	      , b.[InitForex_USDConversionRate] 
	      , b.[EndForex_Ask] 
	      , b.[EndForex_Bid]
	      , b.[EndForex_AskSpreaded] 
	      , b.[EndForex_BidSpreaded]
	      , b.[EndForex_USDConversionRate] 
	      , b.[InitExecutionID]
	      , CASE WHEN b.CloseOccurred  >=CAST(GETDATE() as date)  
	        THEN 0 
	        ELSE b.[EndExecutionID] 
	        END EndExecutionID
	      --b.[EndExecutionID]
	      , b.[InitConversionRate]
	      , b.[InitConversionRateID]
	      , b.CloseMarketPriceRateID
	      , b.InitHedgeType 
	      , CASE WHEN b.CloseOccurred  >=CAST(GETDATE() as date)  
	        THEN NULL
	        ELSE b.EndHedgeType 
	        END EndHedgeType
	      --,b.EndHedgeType 
	      , b.OrderID
	      , b.ExitOrderID
	      , ISNULL(c.IsSettled,0) AS IsSettledOnOpen
	      , ISNULL(b.StopRate ,0) AS StopRateOnOpen
	      , ISNULL(b.LimitRate ,0) AS LimitRateOnOpen
	      , b.[LastOpPriceRate]
	      , b.SettlementTypeID
	      , b.OpenMarketPriceRateID
	      , b.CloseMarket_AskSpreaded
	      , b.CloseMarket_BidSpreaded
	      , b.CloseMarket_Ask 
	      , b.CloseMarket_Bid
	      , b.CloseMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded
	      , b.CloseMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded
	      , b.RequestOpenOccurred
	      , b.RequestCloseOccurred
	      , b.OrderType
	      , b.[PnLVersion]  -- 20240103 KatyF
	      , b.EndOfDayPnLInDollars as PnLInDollars -- 20240115 Inbal BML
		  , b.OpenMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		  , b.CloseMarketSpread --20240115 Inbal BML
		  , b.CloseMarkupOnOpen --20240115 Inbal BML
		  , b.OpenMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
		  , b.CloseMarkup --20240115 Inbal BML
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real AS b
	left join [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position a
	ON b.PositionID = a.PositionID
	left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_First_Open c
	on b.PositionID = c.PositionID
	WHERE
	(
		(b.CloseDateID >= CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar, @Yesterday,112)) AND b.OpenDateID =  CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar, @Yesterday,112)))
		
		OR( b.OriginalPositionID <> b.PositionID AND b.CloseDateID >= CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar, @Yesterday,112))  AND 
		b.CloseDateID < CONVERT(int,CONVERT(varchar,  dateadd(day,1,@Yesterday),112))   ) -- Partial close position
	)
	AND a.PositionID IS NULL

-- Remove Duplicate Positions -------------------->----------------------------------------------------------------->

	DELETE [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real
	FROM 
	[DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real
	INNER JOIN
	[DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real
	ON
	Ext_Dim_Position_Real.PositionID = Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real.PositionID

-----------------------------------------------------------------> 
-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_Real - Amount  -----------------------> 
	update a
	SET
	Amount = b.PreviousAmount,
	StopRate = b.PreviousStopRate
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID
	WHERE
	(a.Amount <> b.PreviousAmount OR 
	a.StopRate <> b.PreviousStopRate )
-----------------------------------------------------------------> 
-- Update Ext_Dim_Position_Real - Amount ChangeTypeID 12 ----------------->

	UPDATE a
	SET
	Amount = a.Amount + b.AmountChanged
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionChangeLogAmount_ChangeType12 b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID

-- Update InitForex Dim_Position PatitialClose ------------------>

	UPDATE a
	SET
	[InitForex_Ask] = b.[InitForex_Ask],
	[InitForex_Bid] = b.[InitForex_Bid],
	[InitForex_AskSpreaded] = b.[InitForex_AskSpreaded],
	[InitForex_BidSpreaded] = b.[InitForex_BidSpreaded],
	[InitForex_USDConversionRate] = b.[InitForex_USDConversionRate]
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position a WITH (NOLOCk)
	join [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position b WITH (NOLOCk)
	ON a.OriginalPositionID = b.PositionID
	WHERE a.CloseDateID >= CONVERT(CHAR(8), cast(@Yesterday as date), 112)
	AND (a.InitForexPriceRateID > 1 AND a.InitForex_Ask IS NULL)
	AND a.IsPartialCloseChild = 1
	AND  b.InitForex_Ask IS NOT NULL
-----------------------------------------------------------------> 
-- Update RegulationIDOnOpen Dim_Position PatitialClose -------------->

	UPDATE a
	SET
	RegulationIDOnOpen = b.RegulationIDOnOpen
	FROM  [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position a (NOLOCK)
	join [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position b (NOLOCK)
	ON a.OriginalPositionID = b.PositionID
	WHERE a.CloseDateID >= CONVERT(CHAR(8), CAST(@Yesterday as date), 112)
	AND a.IsPartialCloseChild = 1
	AND a.RegulationIDOnOpen != b.RegulationIDOnOpen
-----------------------------------------------------------------> 
-- SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen -------------------------------->
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen @Yesterday
-----------------------------------------------------------------> 

-- SP_Dim_Position_IsPartialCloseParent -------------------------->
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Dim_Position_IsPartialCloseParent
----------------------------------------------------------------->

-- Update The Process Finish to Ind  2 Dim_Position -------------------->
	--UPDATE [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd]
	--SET
	--[IndRun] = 2 ,
	--[UpdateDate] = GETDATE()
	--WHERE TableName = 'Dim_Position'
	--AND [IndRun] <> 2 
----------------------------------------------------------------->




UPDATE p
    SET
    CloseMarket_AskSpreaded=a.AskSpreaded
    ,CloseMarket_BidSpreaded=a.BidSpreaded
    ,CloseMarket_Ask=a.Ask 
    ,CloseMarket_Bid=a.Bid
    ,CloseMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateBidSpreaded
    ,CloseMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateAskSpreaded
    FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position p
    join  [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active_5_days] a
    ON   a.PriceRateID  = p.CloseMarketPriceRateID
        AND a.InstrumentID = p.InstrumentID
    AND  CONVERT(date,a.Occurred) BETWEEN 
        DATEADD(DAY,-5,CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.CloseDateID)))
        AND 
        CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.CloseDateID))
	where p.CloseDateID=CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)
                          
-- all positions where the PriceRateID is found will be updated 


    UPDATE p
    SET
    CloseMarket_AskSpreaded=a.AskSpreaded
    ,CloseMarket_BidSpreaded=a.BidSpreaded
    ,CloseMarket_Ask=a.Ask 
    ,CloseMarket_Bid=a.Bid
    ,CloseMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateBidSpreaded
    ,CloseMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateAskSpreaded
    FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position p
    join  [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active_5_days] a
    ON  MarketPriceRateID   = p.CloseMarketPriceRateID
        AND a.InstrumentID = p.InstrumentID
    where CloseMarket_AskSpreaded IS NULL 
    AND CONVERT(date,a.Occurred) BETWEEN 
        DATEADD(DAY,-5,CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.CloseDateID)))
        AND 
        CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.CloseDateID))
	and p.CloseDateID=CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)
    -- this condition should join the only positions which are still null where MarketPriceRateID is found in the Ext table but not PriceRateID

-- step 1: update on PriceRateID. example for this: Position 2394055999, PriceRateID = 64496832199, MarketPriceRateID = 650511496561, we want to 
-- join on PriceRateID if exists, then go over the nulls and join the remaining on MarketPriceRateID:

    UPDATE p
    SET
    OpenMarket_Ask  = a.Ask,
    OpenMarket_Bid = a.Bid,
    OpenMarket_AskSpreaded  = a.AskSpreaded,
    OpenMarket_BidSpreaded = a.BidSpreaded,
    OpenMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateBidSpreaded,
    OpenMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateAskSpreaded
    FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position p
    --[DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real p
    join  [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active_5_days] a
    ON a.PriceRateID = p.OpenMarketPriceRateID
        AND a.InstrumentID = p.InstrumentID
    AND  CONVERT(date,a.Occurred) BETWEEN 
        DATEADD(DAY,-5,CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.OpenDateID)))
        AND 
        CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.OpenDateID))
	where p.OpenDateID=CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)
-- all positions where the PriceRateID is found will be updated 
    

    UPDATE p
    SET
    OpenMarket_Ask  = a.Ask,
    OpenMarket_Bid = a.Bid,
    OpenMarket_AskSpreaded  = a.AskSpreaded,
    OpenMarket_BidSpreaded = a.BidSpreaded,
    OpenMarketCoversionRateBidSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateBidSpreaded,
    OpenMarketCoversionRateAskSpreaded=a.USDConversionRateAskSpreaded
    FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position p
    join  [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_History_CurrencyPrice_Active_5_days] a
    ON MarketPriceRateID = p.OpenMarketPriceRateID
        AND a.InstrumentID = p.InstrumentID
    where OpenMarket_Ask IS NULL
    AND  CONVERT(date,a.Occurred) BETWEEN 
        DATEADD(DAY,-5,CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.OpenDateID)))
        AND 
        CONVERT(date, convert(varchar(10), p.OpenDateID))
		and p.OpenDateID=CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)
    -- this condition should join the only positions which are still null where MarketPriceRateID is found in the Ext table but not PriceRateID


		UPDATE DWH_dbo.Dim_Position
SET    OpenMarket_Ask            = InitForex_Ask
     , OpenMarket_Bid            = InitForex_Bid
     , OpenMarket_AskSpreaded    = InitForex_AskSpreaded
     , OpenMarket_BidSpreaded    = InitForex_BidSpreaded
WHERE OpenMarket_Ask IS NULL 
    AND InitForexPriceRateID = OpenMarketPriceRateID
    AND InitForex_Ask IS NOT null 
    AND OpenDateID=CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @Yesterday, 112 ) AS INT)

END
SP_Dim_Position_HedgeType_History:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_HedgeType_History] @date [datetime] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2021-07-11
Description: Update table Dim_Position
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
2023-05-07     Boris.P        Optimize InitHedgeType Update statements 
*********************************************************************************************/
--declare @date as datetime = Cast(getdate() - 1 as date)
--EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_HedgeType_History] @date
declare @dateid as INT
declare @datnexteid as INT

set @dateid=convert(int,convert(varchar,@date,112))
set @datnexteid=cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , dateadd(day,1,@date), 112 ) AS INT)  


UPDATE p
SET
EndHedgeType = CASE WHEN aa.ExecutionID IS NOT NULL THEN 'HBC' ELSE 'CBH' END 
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p
left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_HBCExecutionLog aa
on p.EndExecutionID  = aa.ExecutionID  
Where OpenDateID<@datnexteid 
AND CloseDateID=@dateid

UPDATE p
SET
InitHedgeType = CASE WHEN a.ExecutionID IS NOT NULL THEN 'HBC' ELSE 'CBH' END ,
EndHedgeType = CASE WHEN aa.ExecutionID IS NOT NULL THEN 'HBC' ELSE 'CBH' END 
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p
left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_HBCExecutionLog a
on p.InitExecutionID  = a.ExecutionID  
left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_HBCExecutionLog aa
on p.EndExecutionID  = aa.ExecutionID  
Where OpenDateID>=@dateid  
AND CloseDateID=@dateid


UPDATE p
SET
InitHedgeType = CASE WHEN a.ExecutionID IS NOT NULL THEN 'HBC' ELSE 'CBH' END 
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p
left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_HBCExecutionLog a
on p.InitExecutionID  = a.ExecutionID  
Where OpenDateID>=@dateid
AND CloseDateID>@dateid


Declare @MinOpenDateID int

set @MinOpenDateID = (select min(OpenDateID) from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real)

--UPDATE p
--SET
--InitHedgeType = ap.InitHedgeType
--from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p
--join [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position ap
--on p.OriginalPositionID = ap.PositionID
--Where p.OriginalPositionID != p.PositionID
--and ap.OpenDateID>=@MinOpenDateID

--UPDATE p
--SET
--InitHedgeType = ap.InitHedgeType
--from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p
--join [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position ap
--on p.ReopenForPositionID = ap.PositionID
--Where p.ReopenForPositionID != p.PositionID
--AND p.IsReOpen = 1
--and ap.OpenDateID>=@MinOpenDateID


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#pos ') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #pos 
CREATE TABLE #pos  
    WITH (CLUSTERED INDEX(PositionID),DISTRIBUTION=ROUND_ROBIN)
AS 
SELECT ap.InitHedgeType ,ap.PositionID  from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p  
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position ap  on p.OriginalPositionID = ap.PositionID  
WHERE p.OriginalPositionID != p.PositionID  
and ap.OpenDateID>= @MinOpenDateID


UPDATE p  SET  InitHedgeType = ap.InitHedgeType  from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p  
join #pos ap  on p.OriginalPositionID = ap.PositionID  
Where p.OriginalPositionID != p.PositionID  


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#pos2 ') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #pos2 
CREATE TABLE #pos2  
    WITH (CLUSTERED INDEX(PositionID),DISTRIBUTION=ROUND_ROBIN)
AS 
SELECT ap.InitHedgeType ,ap.PositionID  from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p  
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position ap  on p.OriginalPositionID = ap.PositionID  
Where p.ReopenForPositionID != p.PositionID  
AND p.IsReOpen = 1  and ap.OpenDateID>= @MinOpenDateID

UPDATE p  SET  InitHedgeType = ap.InitHedgeType  from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real p  
join #pos2 ap  on p.ReopenForPositionID = ap.PositionID  
Where p.ReopenForPositionID != p.PositionID 
AND p.IsReOpen = 1

END

SP_Dim_Position_IsPartialCloseParent:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_IsPartialCloseParent] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-12-16
Description:
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------

*********************************************************************************************/
--Drop table If Exists #OriginalPositionID
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OriginalPositionID') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #OriginalPositionID;       

select distinct OriginalPositionID
into #OriginalPositionID
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real
where
PositionID <> OriginalPositionID

-- create clustered index #OriginalPositionID on #OriginalPositionID(OriginalPositionID)


declare @DateMin int = (SELECT convert(int,convert(varchar,min(OpenOccurred),112))  from  [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real)


Update a
set 
IsPartialCloseParent = 1
from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position a
join #OriginalPositionID b
on a.PositionID = b.OriginalPositionID
and a.OpenDateID >=@DateMin

end
SP_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChang:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog] @date [date] AS
BEGIN


/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2020-11-16
Description: Data for Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2022-04-26    Boris          Syns SPbetween two Env (DWH-01 to Synapse)
*********************************************************************************************/

--declare @date date = cast(getdate()-1 as date)
declare @dateID int  = cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @date, 112 ) AS INT)
declare @dateprev date = DATEADD(DAY,-1,@date)
declare @dateIDprev int  = cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @dateprev, 112 ) AS INT)

--------Truncate table [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog 

--------INSERT iNTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog
--------select
--------PositionID ,
--------ADM_DATE as OccurredDate,  
--------cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , ADM_DATE, 112 ) AS INT) as OccurredDateID,
--------FromHedgeServerID,
--------ToHedgeServerID,
--------getdate() as UpdateDate
--------from [AZR-W-REAL-DB-2-BIDBUser].etoro.Trade.PositionsHedgeServerChangeLog  
--------where ADM_DATE>=@date and ADM_DATE<dateadd(day, 1, @date)
--------;
;
WITH CTE(PositionID, 
    OccurredDate, 
    DuplicateCount)
AS (SELECT PositionID, 
           OccurredDate,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY PositionID  ORDER BY OccurredDate DESC) AS DuplicateCount
    FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog)
DELETE 
--SELECT  *
FROM CTE
WHERE DuplicateCount > 1;

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PositionHedgeServerChangeLog') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #PositionHedgeServerChangeLog;


SELECT DISTINCT a.PositionID
INTO #PositionHedgeServerChangeLog
FROM [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot] AS a
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog AS b
ON a.PositionID=b.PositionID
WHERE ToDate=20991231 

UPDATE [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot]
SET 
ToDate=@dateIDprev
,UpdateDate=getdate()
FROM  [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot] a
JOIN #PositionHedgeServerChangeLog b
ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID
WHERE ToDate=20991231

--- Insert a new rows after update (exist position)
INSERT INTO  [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot]
(PositionID	,HedgeServerID	,FromDate,	ToDate	,UpdateDate	)
SELECT		a.PositionID	,ToHedgeServerID	,@dateID,	20991231	,GETDATE()
FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog a
JOIN #PositionHedgeServerChangeLog b
ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID

--- Find OpenDateID for Intial Change of Hedge

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#NewPositions') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #NewPositions;


SELECT b.*, c.OpenDateID
INTO #NewPositions
FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog AS b
LEFT JOIN 
[DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot] AS a
on a.PositionID = b.PositionID
JOIN 
[DWH_dbo].Dim_Position AS c
on b.PositionID = c.PositionID -- AND c.OpenDateID>=@dateID
WHERE a.PositionID IS NULL

-- Add a new position OpenDateID<OccurredDateID
INSERT INTO  [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot]
(PositionID, HedgeServerID, FromDate, ToDate, UpdateDate)
SELECT		
PositionID	,FromHedgeServerID	,
OpenDateID,
CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , dateadd(day,-1,CAST(OccurredDate AS DATE)), 112 ) AS INT),
GETDATE()
FROM #NewPositions
WHERE OpenDateID<OccurredDateID

-- Add a new position OpenDateID<OccurredDateID --> Initial Row
INSERT INTO  [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot]
(PositionID, HedgeServerID, FromDate, ToDate, UpdateDate)
SELECT		
PositionID	,ToHedgeServerID	,
OccurredDateID,
20991231,
GETDATE()
FROM #NewPositions
------WHERE OpenDateID<OccurredDateID


-------- Add a new position OpenDateID<OccurredDateID --> First Change
------INSERT INTO  [DWH_dbo].[Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot]
------(PositionID, HedgeServerID, FromDate, ToDate, UpdateDate)
------SELECT		
------PositionID	,ToHedgeServerID,
------OpenDateID,
------20991231,
------GETDATE()
------FROM #NewPositions
------WHERE OpenDateID=OccurredDateID


END

CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_backup_20210621] @date [date] AS
BEGIN


/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2020-11-16
Description: Data for Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description  
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 
*********************************************************************************************/


--declare @date date = cast(getdate()-1 as date)
declare @dateID int  = cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @date, 112 ) AS INT)

-- list of PositionID
--drop table if exists #PositionID
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PositionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #PositionID;

Select Distinct PositionID
into #PositionID
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog
where OccurredDateID>=@dateID

 --Create Clustered index #PositionID on #PositionID(PositionID)

-- tale all data for relevant PositionID
--drop table if exists #PositionHedgeServerChangeLog
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PositionHedgeServerChangeLog') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #PositionHedgeServerChangeLog;
     
Select a.*
into #PositionHedgeServerChangeLog
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog a
join #PositionID b
on a.PositionID = b.PositionID

 --Create Clustered index #PositionHedgeServerChangeLog on #PositionHedgeServerChangeLog(PositionID)

--Calculate all data (include historical data) for relevant Positions
--drop table if exists #FinalData
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#FinalData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #FinalData;
     
SELECT a.PositionID  , FromHedgeServerID as HedgeServerID
, b.OpenDateID as FromDate
, cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , cast(dateadd(day, -1, OccurredDate) as date), 112 ) AS INT) as ToDate
, getdate() UpdateDate
into #FinalData
FROM
(
select PositionID, OccurredDate, FromHedgeServerID, row_number() over (partition by PositionID order by OccurredDate) rn
FROM #PositionHedgeServerChangeLog a
) a
join [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position b on a.PositionID = b.PositionID
where a.rn=1
union
SELECT PositionID  
, ToHedgeServerID as HedgeServerID
, cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , cast(OccurredDate as date), 112 ) AS INT) as FromDate
, cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , DATEADD(day, -1, LEAD(cast(OccurredDate as date), 1, '2099-12-31') OVER (PARTITION BY PositionID ORDER BY OccurredDate)), 112 ) AS INT) as ToDate
, getdate() UpdateDate
FROM #PositionHedgeServerChangeLog

-- Delete all rows
Delete [DWH_dbo].Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog
from [DWH_dbo].Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog a
join #PositionID b
on a.PositionID = b.PositionID

insert into [DWH_dbo].Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog
(
[PositionID]
           ,[HedgeServerID]
           ,[FromDate]
           ,[ToDate]
           ,[UpdateDate]
  )
select [PositionID]
           ,[HedgeServerID]
           ,[FromDate]
           ,[ToDate]
           ,[UpdateDate] from #FinalData


END
SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen] @date [datetime] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-11-11
Description: Update table Dim_Position
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------

*********************************************************************************************/
	--declare @date as datetime = '20181230'
	declare @dateid as int
	set @dateid=convert(int,convert(varchar,@date,112))


	-- Fund PositionID Child that do Partial Close after ReOpen 
--DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #IsPartialCloseChildFromReOpen
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#IsPartialCloseChildFromReOpen') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #IsPartialCloseChildFromReOpen;

	select PositionID 
	into #IsPartialCloseChildFromReOpen
	from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position  -- list of positon Reopen add do Partial Close for them
	where PositionID in 
	(
	select 
	 OriginalPositionID from  [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position
	where IsPartialCloseChild =1
	and CloseDateID = @dateid)
	and IsReOpen =1

	--- Add Indication For PositionID that do Partial Close after ReOpen 
	Update a
	set 
	IsPartialCloseChildFromReOpen = 1
	from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position a join #IsPartialCloseChildFromReOpen b
	on a.PositionID = b.PositionID
	
	Update a
	set IsPartialCloseChildFromReOpen = 1,
		CommissionOnCloseOrig = a.CommissionOnClose,
	    FullCommissionOnCloseOrig = a.FullCommissionOnClose
	from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position a join #IsPartialCloseChildFromReOpen b
	on a.OriginalPositionID = b.PositionID
	where CloseDateID = @dateid



--DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #ReopenForPosition
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ReopenForPosition') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #ReopenForPosition;
------------ #ReopenForPosition

select PositionID, ReopenForPositionID, CommissionOnClose,FullCommissionOnClose ,AmountInUnitsDecimal, InitialUnits
into #ReopenForPosition  -- postions IsReOpen =1 for update  fron Trade
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_Real
where IsReOpen = 1

insert into #ReopenForPosition
select PositionID, ReopenForPositionID, CommissionOnClose,FullCommissionOnClose ,AmountInUnitsDecimal, InitialUnits
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_Dim_Position_History_Real -- postions IsReOpen =1 for update  fron History
where IsReOpen = 1

-- create CLUSTERED INdex #ReopenForPosition on #ReopenForPosition(PositionID)

--DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #PositionOrigin
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PositionOrigin') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #PositionOrigin;

SELECT a.PositionID, a.CommissionOnClose,a.FullCommissionOnClose
into #PositionOrigin -- Origin Commission 
from 
[DWH_dbo].Dim_Position  a join #ReopenForPosition b 
on a.PositionID = b.ReopenForPositionID

 --create CLUSTERED INdex #PositionOrigin on #PositionOrigin(PositionID)


Update a
SET
CommissionOnClose = b.CommissionOnClose - c.CommissionOnClose * (a.AmountInUnitsDecimal / a.InitialUnits)
, FullCommissionOnClose = b.FullCommissionOnClose - c.FullCommissionOnClose * (a.AmountInUnitsDecimal / a.InitialUnits)
from
[DWH_dbo].Dim_Position a join #ReopenForPosition b on a.PositionID = b.PositionID -- postion for update 
			   join #PositionOrigin c on b.ReopenForPositionID  = c.PositionID -- data from origin position 
 where a.CloseOccurred <>'1900-01-01 00:00:00.000'


 ------------------ Reopen an PartialClose

 Update a
SET
CommissionOnClose = a.CommissionOnCloseOrig - e.CommissionOnClose * (a.AmountInUnitsDecimal / a.InitialUnits)
, FullCommissionOnClose = a.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig - e.FullCommissionOnClose * (a.AmountInUnitsDecimal / a.InitialUnits)
	from
[DWH_dbo].Dim_Position a join #IsPartialCloseChildFromReOpen b
on b.PositionID = a.OriginalPositionID 
join [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position c
on a.OriginalPositionID = c.PositionID
join [DWH_dbo].Dim_Position e
on e.PositionID = c.ReopenForPositionID
 where a.CloseOccurred <>'1900-01-01 00:00:00.000'


END

CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_DropStagingTables] @tableName [nvarchar](max) AS
BEGIN
-- =============================================

-- Create Date: 2021-09-05
-- Description: SP intended to drop staging tables before DWH process
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_DropStagingTables] <schemaName> ,<tableName>

DECLARE @schemaName [nvarchar](max) = 'DWH_staging'

SET @sql = 
	(SELECT 
		'IF OBJECT_ID('''+@schemaName+'.'+@tableName+''')

	)
	
--print @sql
EXEC (@sql)

END

SP_Fact_BillingDeposit:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_BillingDeposit] @date [date] AS
BEGIN
/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2020-07-05
Description: Create SP_Fact_BillingDeposit
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
*********************************************************************************************/
--declare @date date = cast(getdate()-1 as date)
declare @dateID int  = cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @date, 112 ) AS INT)


declare @dt1 datetime 
declare @dt2 datetime 
declare @flag int=0    
while @flag<2    
begin          
   
set @flag=0    
----Flag 1-------------------------------------- 

select @dt1 = MAX(UpdateDate)
FROM [DWH_dbo].[Dim_CountryBin]

PRINT @dt1    
   
	IF @dt1>=cast( getdate() as date)    
        SET @flag=@flag+1    
PRINT @flag    

----Flag 2-------------------------------------- 

select @dt2 = MAX(UpdateDate)
FROM [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Country]

PRINT @dt2   
   
	IF @dt2>=cast( getdate() as date)    
        SET @flag=@flag+1    
PRINT @flag

if @flag = 2
	BREAK    
ELSE    
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].[WaitforSeconds] 60 --WAITFOR DELAY '00:01:00'  -- Check SP  for Dan    
 
end


--DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #MOPCountry
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#MOPCountry') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #MOPCountry;

CREATE TABLE #MOPCountry  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT fbd.DepositID
      ,mopcountrynum.Name MOPCountry1
      ,mopcountryabb.Name MOPCountry2
      ,mopcountryabb1.Name MOPCountry3
FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_BillingDeposit fbd
left join [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Country] mopcountrynum
    on mopcountrynum.CountryID= CASE WHEN Isnumeric([CountryIDAsString])=1 THEN fbd.[CountryIDAsString] ELSE NULL END
left join [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Country] mopcountryabb
    on mopcountryabb.[LongAbbreviation]=CASE WHEN Isnumeric([CountryIDAsString])=0 THEN fbd.[CountryIDAsString] ELSE NULL END
left join [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Country] mopcountryabb1
    on mopcountryabb1.[Abbreviation]=CASE WHEN Isnumeric([CountryIDAsString])=0 THEN fbd.[CountryIDAsString] ELSE NULL END
WHERE fbd.ModificationDateID=@dateID

--create Clustered Index #MOPCountry on #MOPCountry (DepositID)

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#MOPCountryFinal') IS NOT NULL 
	DROP TABLE #MOPCountryFinal;

CREATE TABLE #MOPCountryFinal  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT t.DepositID
      ,case when MOPCountry1 is not null then MOPCountry1
            when MOPCountry2 is not null then MOPCountry2
            else MOPCountry3 end as MOPCountry
FROM #MOPCountry t 
where 
	case when MOPCountry1 is not null then MOPCountry1
         when MOPCountry2 is not null then MOPCountry2
         else MOPCountry3 
	end is not null

create Clustered Index #MOPCountryFinal on #MOPCountryFinal (DepositID)

Update a
set
MOPCountry = m.MOPCountry
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_BillingDeposit a
join #MOPCountryFinal m
on a.DepositID = m.DepositID
where a.ModificationDateID=@dateID
  

UPDATE fbw
SET 
BankName =cb.IssuingBank,
CardCategory = cb.CardCategory
FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_BillingDeposit fbw
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_CountryBin cb
ON CAST(fbw.BinCodeAsString AS INT)  = cb.BinCode
WHERE ModificationDateID = @dateID

end
SP_Fact_BillingDeposit_DL_To_Synapse:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_BillingDeposit_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN
/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2020-07-05
Description: Create SP_Fact_BillingDeposit
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
03/02/2025		Daniel		Add columns IsAftSupportedAsBool ,IsAftEligibleAsBool  ,IsAftProcessedAsBool
2025-04-17     Katy F       Switch Amount (line 200) to CASE for handling extreme values. 
*********************************************************************************************/

--declare @dt as date = '02-02-2025' EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_BillingDeposit_DL_To_Synapse] @dt
  DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
  DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME

  SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
  SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);
  
  -- Select Parameter Run Ind - Fact_BillingDeposit ------------------
	--SELECT [IndRun]
	--FROM [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd](nolock)
	--where [TableName] = 'Fact_BillingDeposit'
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- delete rows -----------------------------------------------------
	DELETE FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_BillingDeposit 
	WHERE
	ModificationDateID >= convert(INT,convert(varchar, @Yesterday ,112))
	and
	ModificationDateID < convert(INT,convert(varchar, @CurrentDate ,112))
	
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Extract Ext_Fact_BillingDeposit ---------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FBD_Fact_BillingDeposit

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FBD_Fact_BillingDeposit
	(
	   [CID]
      ,[CurrencyID]
      ,[Commission]
      ,[Approved]
      ,[ModificationDate]
      ,[ModificationDateID]
      ,[FundingID]
      ,[ExchangeRate]
      ,[DepositID]
	  ,[ProcessorValueDate]
      ,[DepotID]
      ,[SecuredCardDataAsString]
      ,[BinCodeAsString]
      ,[BinCountryIDAsInteger]
	  ,[CardTypeIDAsInteger]
      ,[PaymentStatusID]
      ,[ManagerID]
      ,[RiskManagementStatusID]
      ,[Amount]
      ,[PaymentDate]
	  ,[IPAddress]
      ,[ClearingHouseEffectiveDate]
      ,[IsFTD]
      ,[RefundVerificationCode]
      ,[MatchStatusID]
      ,[BonusStatusID]
      ,[BonusAmount]
      ,[BonusErrorCode]
      ,[ExTransactionID]
	  ,[FundingTypeID]
      ,[IsRefundExcluded]
      ,[DocumentRequired]
      ,[UpdateDate]
      ,[ExpirationDateID]
      ,[CountryIDAsInteger]
      ,[StateIDAsInteger]
      ,[BankIDAsInteger]
      ,[AccountNameAsString]
	  ,[AccountTypeAsString]
      ,[BankAccountAsString]
      ,[BankAddressAsString]
      ,[BankCodeAsDecimal]
      ,[BankDetailsAccountIDAsString]
      ,[BankIDAsString]
      ,[BankNameAsString]
      ,[BICCodeAsString]
      ,[CIDAsString]
      ,[v]
	  ,[CustomerAddressAsString]
      ,[CustomerNameAsString]
      ,[FundingType]
      ,[MaskedAccountIDAsString]
      ,[PurseAsString]
      ,[RoutingNumberAsString]
      ,[SecureIDAsDecimal]
      ,[SortCodeAsString]
      ,[AccountBalanceAsDecimal]
      ,[AccountHolderAsString]
      ,[AccountIDAsDecimal]
      ,[ACHBankAccountIDAsInteger]
      ,[Address1AsString]
      ,[Address2AsString]
	  ,[AdviseAsString]
      ,[AvailableBalanceAsDecimal]
      ,[BankCodeAsString]
      ,[BillNumberAsString]
      ,[BuildingNumberAsString]
      ,[CardHolderPhoneNumberBodyAsString]
      ,[CardHolderPhoneNumberPrefixAsString]
      ,[CardNumberAsString]
      ,[CityAsString]
      ,[CountryIDAsString]
      ,[CountryNameAsString]
      ,[CreatedAtAsString]
      ,[CurrentBalanceAsDecimal]
      ,[CustomerIDAsString]
      ,[EmailAsString]
      ,[EndPointIDAsString]
	  ,[ErrorCodeAsString]
      ,[ErrorTypeAsString]
      ,[FirstNameAsString]
      ,[IBANCodeAsString]
      ,[InitialTransactionIDAsString]
      ,[IPAsString]
      ,[LanguageIDAsInteger]
      ,[LastNameAsString]
      ,[MD5AsString]
      ,[PayerAsString]
      ,[PayerBusiness]
      ,[PayerIDAsString]
      ,[PayerPurseAsString]
      ,[PayerStatus]
      ,[PaymentAmountAsDecimal]
      ,[PaymentDateAsDateTime]
      ,[PaymentGuaranteeAsString]
      ,[PaymentModeAsInteger]
	  ,[PaymentProviderTransactionStatusAsString]
      ,[PaymentStatusAsInteger]
      ,[PaymentTypeAsString]
      ,[PlaidItemIDAsString]
      ,[PlaidNamesAsString]
      ,[PlatformIDAsInteger]
      ,[PromotionCodeAsString]
      ,[PSPCodeAsString]
      ,[RapidFirstNameAsString]
      ,[RapidLastNameAsString]
      ,[ResponseMessageAsString]
      ,[ResponseTimeAsString]
      ,[SecretKeyAsString]
      ,[ThreeDsAsJson]
      ,[ThreeDsResponseType]
      ,[TokenAsString]
      ,[TransactionIDAsString]
      ,[ZipCodeAsString]
      ,[BaseExchangeRate]
      ,[ExchangeFee]
      ,[ProtocolMIDSettingsID]
      ,[FunnelID]
      ,[SessionID]
      ,[SwiftCodeAsString]
      ,[ClientBankNameAsString]
	  ,PaymentGeneration
	  ,ProcessRegulationID
	  ,MerchantAccountID
	  ,IsSetBalanceCompleted
	  ,RoutingReasonID
	  ,IsRecurring
	  ,FlowID
	  ,IsAftSupportedAsBool
	  ,IsAftEligibleAsBool
	  ,IsAftProcessedAsBool
	)
	SELECT  
	[CID]
	,[CurrencyID]
	,[Commission]
	,[Approved]
	,[ModificationDate]
	,convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,ModificationDate),0),112)) as ModificationDateID
	,d.[FundingID]
	,[ExchangeRate]
	,[DepositID]
	,[ProcessorValueDate]
	,[DepotID]
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('SecuredCardDataAsString',f.FundingData) as SecuredCardDataAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BinCodeAsString',f.FundingData) as BinCodeAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BinCountryIDAsInteger',f.FundingData) as BinCountryIDAsInteger
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('CardTypeIDAsInteger',f.FundingData) as CardTypeIDAsInteger
	,[PaymentStatusID]
	,d.[ManagerID]
	,[RiskManagementStatusID]
	--,[Amount] -- 2025-04-17 add case to handle extreme values KF. 
	, CASE WHEN Amount >= 1000000000 THEN 99999999 
                WHEN Amount <= -1000000000 THEN -99999999
                ELSE Amount 
            END AS Amount
	,[PaymentDate]
	,[IPAddress]
	,[ClearingHouseEffectiveDate]
	,isnull(cast([IsFTD] as int),0)  as IsFTD
	,[RefundVerificationCode]
	,[MatchStatusID]
	,[BonusStatusID]
	,[BonusAmount]
	,[BonusErrorCode]
	, ExTransactionID
	,f.[FundingTypeID]
	,cast(f.[IsRefundExcluded] as int) as IsRefundExcluded
	,cast(f.[DocumentRequired] as int) as DocumentRequired
	, getdate() as UpdateDate
	, Case when [DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ExpirationDateAsString',f.FundingData) is null then 190001
		 when len([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ExpirationDateAsString',f.FundingData))<4 then 190001
	else 
	200000
	+
	RIGHT([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ExpirationDateAsString',f.FundingData),2) * 100
	+	  
	Left( [DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ExpirationDateAsString',f.FundingData),2)
	end
	 as ExpirationDateID
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('CountryIDAsInteger',f.FundingData) as CountryIDAsInteger
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('StateIDAsInteger',d.PaymentData) as StateIDAsInteger
	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BankIDAsInteger',d.PaymentData), [DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BankIDAsInteger',f.FundingData)) as BankIDAsInteger
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('AccountNameAsString',f.FundingData) as AccountNameAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('AccountTypeAsString',f.FundingData) as AccountTypeAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BankAccountAsString',f.FundingData) as BankAccountAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BankAddressAsString',f.FundingData) as BankAddressAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BankCodeAsDecimal',f.FundingData) as BankCodeAsDecimal
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BankDetailsAccountIDAsString',f.FundingData) as BankDetailsAccountIDAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BankIDAsString',f.FundingData) as BankIDAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BankNameAsString',f.FundingData) as BankNameAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BICCodeAsString',f.FundingData) as BICCodeAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('CIDAsString',f.FundingData) as CIDAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ClientBankNameAsString',f.FundingData) as v
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('CustomerAddressAsString',f.FundingData) as CustomerAddressAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('CustomerNameAsString',f.FundingData) as CustomerNameAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('FundingType',f.FundingData) as FundingType
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('MaskedAccountIDAsString',f.FundingData) as MaskedAccountIDAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('PurseAsString',f.FundingData) as PurseAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('RoutingNumberAsString',f.FundingData) as RoutingNumberAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('SecureIDAsDecimal',f.FundingData) as SecureIDAsDecimal
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('SortCodeAsString',f.FundingData) as SortCodeAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('AccountBalanceAsDecimal',d.PaymentData) as AccountBalanceAsDecimal
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('AccountHolderAsString',d.PaymentData) as AccountHolderAsString
	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('AccountIDAsDecimal',d.PaymentData),[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('AccountIDAsDecimal',f.FundingData)) as AccountIDAsDecimal
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ACHBankAccountIDAsInteger',d.PaymentData) as ACHBankAccountIDAsInteger

	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BillNumberAsString',d.PaymentData) as BillNumberAsString

	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('TokenAsString',d.PaymentData) as TokenAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('TransactionIDAsString',d.PaymentData) as TransactionIDAsString

	,d.BaseExchangeRate
	, d.ExchangeFee
	, d.ProtocolMIDSettingsID 
	, d.FunnelID
	,isnull(d.SessionID,0) as SessionID 
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('SwiftCodeAsString',f.FundingData) AS SwiftCodeAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ClientBankNameAsString',f.FundingData) AS ClientBankNameAsString
	,d.PaymentGeneration
	,d.ProcessRegulationID
	,d.MerchantAccountID
	,CAST(d.IsSetBalanceCompleted AS INT) AS IsSetBalanceCompleted
	,d.RoutingReasonID
	,ISNULL(Recurring.IsRecurring,0) IsRecurring
	,FlowID
	,isnull([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('IsAftSupportedAsBool',d.PaymentData),0) as IsAftSupportedAsBool
	,isnull([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('IsAftEligibleAsBool',d.PaymentData),0)  as IsAftEligibleAsBool
	,isnull([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('IsAftProcessedAsBool',d.PaymentData),0) as IsAftProcessedAsBool
	FROM 
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Deposit] d with(nolock)
	join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Funding] f with(nolock)
	on d.[FundingID] = f.[FundingID]
	OUTER APPLY (SELECT 1 AS IsRecurring FROM  [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_RecurringDeposit] 
				WHERE DepositID = d.DepositID
			) Recurring
	where
	------[PaymentStatusID] = 2 and 
	ModificationDate >= @Yesterday AND ModificationDate <dateadd(day,1, @CurrentDate)

-- Update PlatformID -----------------------------------------------
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Fact_BillingDepositAction') IS NOT NULL 
	DROP TABLE #Fact_BillingDepositAction;

	CREATE TABLE #Fact_BillingDepositAction  
	WITH
	(  
		HEAP,
		DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
	) AS
	SELECT RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
	into #Fact_BillingDepositAction
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
	WHERE ActionTypeID  =14 
	and DateID >= convert(int,convert(varchar(8),DATEADD(DAY,-14,@Yesterday),112))
	
	CREATE CLUSTERED index #Fact_BillingDepositAction on #Fact_BillingDepositAction (RealCID, SessionID)
	
	update a
	SET PlatformID = b.PlatformID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_BillingDeposit a
	join #Fact_BillingDepositAction b
	ON a.CID =  b.RealCID and a.SessionID = b.SessionID 
	WHERE a.[ModificationDateID] =  convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@Yesterday,112))
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Execute SQL Task - SP_Fact_BillingDeposit -----------------------
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_BillingDeposit @Yesterday
--------------------------------------------------------------------

	--SET
	--[IndRun] = 2 ,
	--[UpdateDate] = GETDATE()
	--    where [TableName] = 'Fact_BillingDeposit'
	--AND [IndRun] <> 2 
--------------------------------------------------------------------
END
SP_Fact_BillingRedeem_DL_To_Synapse:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_BillingRedeem_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN

  DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME
  DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
  DECLARE @From as DATETIME

  SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
  SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);
  SET @From = DATEADD(DAY, -7, @Yesterday)

  -- Select Parameter Run Ind - Fact_BillingRedeem -------------------
	--SELECT
	-- [IndRun]
	--FROM [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd](nolock)
	--WHERE [TableName] = 'Fact_BillingRedeem'
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Delete rows from Fact_BillingRedeem -----------------------------
	DELETE FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_BillingRedeem
	WHERE
	ModificationDateID >= convert(int,convert(varchar, @From,112))
	AND
	ModificationDateID < convert(int,convert(varchar, @CurrentDate,112))
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Truncate Ext_FBR_Fact_BillingRedeem -----------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FBR_Fact_BillingRedeem
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Extract Ext_Fact_BillingRedeem ----------------------------------
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FBR_Fact_BillingRedeem
	(
		   CID
	  , RedeemID
	   ,PositionID
	   ,RedeemStatusID
	   ,RedeemReasonID
	   ,AmountOnRequest
	   ,AmountOnClose
	   ,FundingID
	   ,RequestDate
	   ,LastModificationDate
	   ,ModificationDateID
	   ,UpdateDate
	)
	SELECT 
	   CID
	  , RedeemID
	   ,PositionID
	   ,RedeemStatusID
	   ,RedeemReasonID
	   ,AmountOnRequest
	   ,AmountOnClose
	   ,FundingID
	   ,RequestDate
	   ,LastModificationDate
	   ,convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,LastModificationDate),0),112)) as ModificationDateID
	   ,getdate() as UpdateDate
	   FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Redeem]
	WHERE
	LastModificationDate >= @From AND LastModificationDate <dateadd(day,1, @CurrentDate)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Delete and Insert rows ------------------------------------------
	DELETE w
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_BillingRedeem w
	INNER JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FBR_Fact_BillingRedeem e
	ON w.RedeemID=e.RedeemID

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Fact_BillingRedeem]
           (CID
	, RedeemID
	,PositionID
	,RedeemStatusID
	,RedeemReasonID
	,AmountOnRequest
	,AmountOnClose
	,FundingID
	,RequestDate
	,LastModificationDate
	,ModificationDateID
	, UpdateDate)
	     SELECT 
	 CID
	, RedeemID
	,PositionID
	,RedeemStatusID
	,RedeemReasonID
	,AmountOnRequest
	,AmountOnClose
	,FundingID
	,RequestDate
	,LastModificationDate
	,ModificationDateID
	,UpdateDate
	 FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FBR_Fact_BillingRedeem
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Update The Process Finish to Ind 2 Fact_BillingRedeem -----------
	--UPDATE [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd]
	--SET
	--[IndRun] = 2 ,
	--[UpdateDate] = GETDATE()
	--  where [TableName] = 'Fact_BillingRedeem'
	--AND [IndRun] <> 2 
--------------------------------------------------------------------


END
SP_Fact_BillingWithdraw:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_BillingWithdraw] @date [date] AS
BEGIN



declare @dateID int  = cast(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , @date, 112 ) AS INT)

declare @dt1 datetime    
declare @flag int=0    
while @flag<1    
begin          
   
set @flag=0    
----Flag 1-------------------------------------- 

select @dt1 = MAX(UpdateDate)
FROM [DWH_dbo].[Dim_CountryBin]

PRINT @dt1    
   
	IF @dt1>=cast( getdate() as date)    
        SET @flag=@flag+1    
PRINT @flag    
   
if @flag = 1    
	BREAK    
ELSE    
	exec [DWH_dbo].[WaitforSeconds] 60  -- Check SP  for Dan    
 
end  

UPDATE DWH_dbo.Fact_BillingWithdraw
SET 
BankName =cb.IssuingBank,
CardCategory = cb.CardCategory
FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_BillingWithdraw fbw
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_CountryBin cb
ON CAST(fbw.BinCodeAsString AS INT)  = cb.BinCode
WHERE ModificationDateID = @dateID

end

	WHERE

	and
	ModificationDateID < convert(int,convert(varchar,@CurrentDate ,112))
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Extract Ext_Fact_BillingWithdraw --------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FBW_Fact_BillingWithdraw
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FBW_Fact_BillingWithdraw
	(
	
WithdrawID
,CID
,CurrencyID
,FundingTypeID_Withdraw
,RequestDate
,Amount_Withdraw
,Commission
,Approved
,ModificationDate
,ModificationDateID
,Fee
,FundingID
,CashoutReasonID
,ClientWithdrawReasonID
,AccountCurrencyID
,CashoutStatusID_Withdraw
,CashoutStatusID_Funding
,ProcessCurrencyID
,ExchangeRate
,Amount_WithdrawToFunding
,ModificationDate_WithdrawToFunding
,AccountIDAsString
,ACHBankAccountIDAsInteger
,BinCodeAsString
,BinCountryIDAsInteger
,BSBNumberAsString
,CardTypeIDAsInteger
,CityAsString
,ClientAddressAsString
,ClientBankNameAsString
,CountryIDAsInteger
,ExpirationDateAsString
,ErrorCodeAsString
,IBANCodeAsString
,InitialTransactionIDAsString
,MD5AsString
,PayeeNameAsString
,PayerPurseAsString
,ReferenceNumberAsString
,ResponseMessageAsString
,ResponseTimeAsString
,RoutingNumberAsString
,SecuredCardDataAsString
,SortCodeAsString
,SwiftCodeAsString
,DepositID
,CashoutTypeID
,VerificationCode
,ProcessorValueDate
,DepotID
,ExchangeFee
,FundingTypeID_Funding
,AccountIDAsDecimal
,AccountNameAsString
,AccountTypeAsString
,BankAccountAsString
,BankAddressAsString
,BankCodeAsString
,BankDetailsAccountIDAsString
,BankIDAsInteger
,BankIDAsString
,BankNameAsString
,CardNumberAsString
,CryptoCodeAsString
,CustomerAddressAsString
,CustomerNameAsString
,EmailAsString
,ExpirationDateID
,InstrumentIDAsInteger
,MaskedAccountIDAsString
,PayerIDAsString
,PurseAsString
,SecureIDAsDecimal
,UpdateDate
,WithdrawPaymentID 
,BaseExchangeRate
,ProtocolMIDSettingsID
,Comment
,CashoutModeID
,FlowID
,WithdrawTypeID
	)
	SELECT
	bw.WithdrawID
	,bw.CID
	,bw.CurrencyID
	,bw.FundingTypeID AS FundingTypeID_Withdraw
	,bw.RequestDate
	,bw.Amount AS Amount_Withdraw
	,bw.Commission
	,cast(bw.Approved AS INT) AS Approved
	,bw.ModificationDate
	,convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,bw.ModificationDate),0),112)) AS ModificationDateID
	,bw.Fee
	,bw.FundingID
	,bw.CashoutReasonID
	,bw.ClientWithdrawReasonID
	,bw.AccountCurrencyID
	,bw.CashoutStatusID AS CashoutStatusID_Withdraw
	,wtf.CashoutStatusID AS CashoutStatusID_Funding
	,wtf.ProcessCurrencyID
	,wtf.ExchangeRate
	,wtf.Amount AS Amount_WithdrawToFunding
	,wtf.ModificationDate AS ModificationDate_WithdrawToFunding
	--  ,wtf.WithdrawData -- parse
	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('AccountIDAsString',wtf.WithdrawData),[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('AccountIDAsString',bf.FundingData)) AS AccountIDAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ACHBankAccountIDAsInteger',wtf.WithdrawData) AS ACHBankAccountIDAsInteger
	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BinCodeAsString',wtf.WithdrawData),[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BinCodeAsString',bf.FundingData)) AS BinCodeAsString
	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BinCountryIDAsInteger',wtf.WithdrawData) ,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BinCountryIDAsInteger',bf.FundingData)) AS BinCountryIDAsInteger
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('BSBNumberAsString',wtf.WithdrawData) AS BSBNumberAsString
	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('CardTypeIDAsInteger',wtf.WithdrawData),[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('CardTypeIDAsInteger',bf.FundingData)) AS CardTypeIDAsInteger
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('CityAsString',wtf.WithdrawData) AS CityAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ClientAddressAsString',wtf.WithdrawData) AS ClientAddressAsString
	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ClientBankNameAsString',wtf.WithdrawData),[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ClientBankNameAsString',bf.FundingData)) AS ClientBankNameAsString
	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('CountryIDAsInteger',wtf.WithdrawData),[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('CountryIDAsInteger',bf.FundingData)) AS CountryIDAsInteger
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ExpirationDateAsString',wtf.WithdrawData) AS ExpirationDateAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ErrorCodeAsString',wtf.WithdrawData) as ErrorCodeAsString
	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('IBANCodeAsString',wtf.WithdrawData),[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('IBANCodeAsString',bf.FundingData)) as IBANCodeAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('InitialTransactionIDAsString',wtf.WithdrawData) as InitialTransactionIDAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('MD5AsString',wtf.WithdrawData) as MD5AsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('PayeeNameAsString',wtf.WithdrawData) as PayeeNameAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('PayerPurseAsString',wtf.WithdrawData) as PayerPurseAsString
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('ReferenceNumberAsString',wtf.WithdrawData) as ReferenceNumberAsString

	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('SecuredCardDataAsString',wtf.WithdrawData),[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('SecuredCardDataAsString',bf.FundingData)) as SecuredCardDataAsString
	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('SortCodeAsString',wtf.WithdrawData),[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('SortCodeAsString',bf.FundingData)) as SortCodeAsString
	,COALESCE([DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('SwiftCodeAsString',wtf.WithdrawData),[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('SwiftCodeAsString',bf.FundingData)) as SwiftCodeAsString
	,wtf.DepositID
	,wtf.CashoutTypeID
	,wtf.VerificationCode
	,wtf.ProcessorValueDate
	,wtf.DepotID
	,wtf.ExchangeFee
	,bf.FundingTypeID AS FundingTypeID_Funding
	--,bf.FundingData --parse
	,[DWH_dbo].[ExtractXMLValue]('AccountIDAsDecimal',bf.FundingData) as AccountIDAsDecimal

	      else

	--  where [TableName] = 'Fact_BillingWithdraw'

SP_Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit_DL_To_Syn:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN

-- =============================================
-- Author:     <Adi  Ferber>
-- Create Date: 2021-10-12
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit_DL_To_Synapse] '20211201'

--DATE          NAME                    CHANGE DETAILES 

--2022-04-27     Inbal BML & Adi F       replace  [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_Candles_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplitView] with [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_Candles_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplitView_SplitInsHistory]
--2023-02-26	 MeravHu				 Add ConvertRateIsBuy_1 , ConvertRateIsBuy_0
--2023-03-09	 MeravHu				 Bugfix	
-- =============================================
--DECLARE @dt [Date] = '2021-12-10'
DECLARE @DateID int = cast(CONVERT(varchar(10),cast(@dt as date),112) as INT) 
DECLARE @CountRowsSplit as int

DELETE from [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit]
where
OccurredDateID = @DateID



INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit]
           ([ProviderID]
           ,[InstrumentID]
           ,[Occurred]
           ,[OccurredDate]
           ,[OccurredDateID]
           ,[isvalid]
           ,[AskSpreaded]
           ,[BidSpreaded]
           ,[RateLastEx]
           ,[Ask]
           ,[Bid]
           ,[UpdateDate]
      )
SELECT
[ProviderID]
      ,[InstrumentID]
      ,[Occurred]
      ,[OccurredDate]
      ,[OccurredDateID]
      ,[isvalid]
      ,[AskSpreaded]
      ,[BidSpreaded]
      ,[RateLastEx]
      ,[Ask]
      ,[Bid]
,getdate() as UpdateDate
FROM [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_Candles_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplitView]


TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCPWS_History_SplitRatio]

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCPWS_History_SplitRatio]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[MinDate]
           ,[MaxDate]
           ,[PriceRatio]
           ,[AmountRatio])
select InstrumentID, MinDate, MaxDate, PriceRatio, AmountRatio
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_SplitRatio] with(NOLOCK) 
where MinDate>= @dt and MinDate <  dateadd(day,1, @dt)


Select @CountRowsSplit = count(*)
from [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCPWS_History_SplitRatio]

IF  @CountRowsSplit> 0
	BEGIN

		if object_id ('tempdb..#SplitInstrument') is not null drop table  #SplitInstrument
		
		select Distinct InstrumentID 
		Into #SplitInstrument
		from [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCPWS_History_SplitRatio]


		if object_id ('tempdb..#ConvertRateIsBuy') is not null drop table  #ConvertRateIsBuy
		if object_id ('tempdb..#ConvertRateIsBuy_all') is not null drop table  #ConvertRateIsBuy_all
		
	
			select distinct a.InstrumentID, a.OccurredDateID, a.ConvertRateIsBuy_1 , a.ConvertRateIsBuy_0
			,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY a.OccurredDateID ORDER BY a.ConvertRateIsBuy_1 desc ) RowNumber
			into #ConvertRateIsBuy_all 
			from [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit]  a 
			join #SplitInstrument b on a.InstrumentID=b.InstrumentID 
		
			select  a.InstrumentID, a.OccurredDateID, a.ConvertRateIsBuy_1 , a.ConvertRateIsBuy_0
			into  #ConvertRateIsBuy
			from #ConvertRateIsBuy_all a
			where RowNumber=1
		
		
		delete [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit] 
		where InstrumentID in 
		(select  InstrumentID from #SplitInstrument)
		
		INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit]
		           ([ProviderID]
		           ,[InstrumentID]
		           ,[Occurred]
		           ,[OccurredDate]
		           ,[OccurredDateID]
		           ,[isvalid]
		           ,[AskSpreaded]
		           ,[BidSpreaded]
		           ,[RateLastEx]
		           ,[Ask]
		           ,[Bid]
		           ,ConvertRateIsBuy_1 
				   ,ConvertRateIsBuy_0
				   ,[UpdateDate]
				 
				   
		)
		SELECT distinct
		[ProviderID]
		      ,a.InstrumentID
		      ,[Occurred]
		      ,[OccurredDate]
		      ,a.OccurredDateID
		      ,[isvalid]
		      ,[AskSpreaded]
		      ,[BidSpreaded]
		      ,[RateLastEx]
		      ,[Ask]
		      ,[Bid]
			  ,ConvertRateIsBuy_1
			  ,ConvertRateIsBuy_0
		,getdate() as UpdateDate
		FROM [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_Candles_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplitView_SplitInstHistory] a
		left join #ConvertRateIsBuy b  on a.InstrumentID=b.InstrumentID and a.OccurredDateID=b.OccurredDateID
		--[DWH_staging].[PriceLog_Candles_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplitView]
		where a.InstrumentID in 
		(
		select Distinct InstrumentID
		from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_SplitRatio] with(NOLOCK) 
		where MinDate>=@dt and MinDate <  dateadd(day,1,@dt)
		
		--select InstrumentID from #SplitInstrument
		)
	
	END

TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCPWS_Instrument]


INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCPWS_Instrument]
           ([InstrumentID]
           ,[BuyCurrencyID]
           ,[SellCurrencyID])
SELECT
b.InstrumentID,
b.BuyCurrencyID,
b.SellCurrencyID
FROM
[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b

UPDATE a
SET 
ConvertRateIsBuy_1 = 
cast(
CASE
WHEN Pair.SellCurrencyID = 1
THEN 1.00
WHEN Pair.BuyCurrencyID = 1
THEN (1.00 / a.Bid )-- IsBuy = 1
WHEN (Pair.BuyCurrencyID != 1 AND Pair.SellCurrencyID != 1)
THEN coalesce(1.00 /I2Price.Bid , I3Price.Bid , 1.00)-- IsBuy = 1
END
AS MONEY) 
,
ConvertRateIsBuy_0 = 
cast(
CASE
WHEN Pair.SellCurrencyID = 1
THEN 1.00
WHEN Pair.BuyCurrencyID = 1
THEN (1.00 / a.Ask )-- IsBuy = 0
WHEN (Pair.BuyCurrencyID != 1 AND Pair.SellCurrencyID != 1)
THEN coalesce(1.00 /I2Price.Ask , I3Price.Ask , 1.00)-- IsBuy = 0
END
AS MONEY) 

FROM [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit] a
JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCPWS_Instrument] Pair
ON a.InstrumentID = Pair.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit] PairPrice WITH (NOLOCK)
ON Pair.InstrumentID = PairPrice.InstrumentID 
AND PairPrice.OccurredDateID=@DateID
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCPWS_Instrument] I2 WITH (NOLOCK)
ON I2.InstrumentID <> Pair.InstrumentID -- This is so I won't get doubled records.
AND I2.SellCurrencyID = Pair.SellCurrencyID AND I2.BuyCurrencyID = 1 -- USD
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit] I2Price WITH (NOLOCK)
ON I2Price.InstrumentID = I2.InstrumentID 
AND I2Price.OccurredDateID=@DateID
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCPWS_Instrument] I3 WITH (NOLOCK)
ON I3.InstrumentID <> Pair.InstrumentID -- This is so I won't get doubled records.
AND I3.BuyCurrencyID = Pair.SellCurrencyID AND I3.SellCurrencyID = 1 -- USD
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit] I3Price WITH (NOLOCK)
ON I3Price.InstrumentID = I3.InstrumentID 
AND I3Price.OccurredDateID=@DateID
WHERE
a.OccurredDateID=@DateID



END

CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit_DL_To_Synapse_OLD_VER] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN

-- =============================================

TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCPWS_History_SplitRatio]

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCPWS_History_SplitRatio]
           ([InstrumentID]

select InstrumentID, MinDate, MaxDate, PriceRatio, AmountRatio

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit]
           ([ProviderID]

           ,[OccurredDate]
           ,[OccurredDateID]
           ,[isvalid]
           ,[AskSpreaded]
           ,[BidSpreaded]
           ,[RateLastEx]
           ,[Ask]
           ,[Bid]
           ,[UpdateDate]
	       -- ,ConvertRateIsBuy_1	 adi

)

[ProviderID]

      ,[OccurredDate]
      ,[OccurredDateID]
      ,[isvalid]
      ,[AskSpreaded]
      ,[BidSpreaded]
      ,[RateLastEx]
      ,[Ask]
      ,[Bid]
,getdate() as UpdateDate
--ConvertRateIsBuy_1	, adi 
--ConvertRateIsBuy_0 adi

FROM [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_Candles_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplitView_SplitInstHistory]
--[DWH_staging].[PriceLog_Candles_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplitView]
where [InstrumentID] in

select Distinct InstrumentID

THEN (1.00 / a.Ask )-- IsBuy = 0
