SP_Fact_CustomerAction:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction] @dt [DATE] AS
BEGIN


/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table Fact_CustomerAction
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2018-05-09     Boris Slutski  drop table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_SocialAlert_Loggin - table not in use 
 2018-09-25     Boris Slutski  add  Redeem [DWH_dbo].Ext_Position tables
 2019-01-22     Boris Slutski  Add SesiioID & PlatformID for ActionTypeID in (2,41)
 2019-04-07     Boris Slutski  Add Update IsSettled for OpenPosition
 2020-02-16     Boris Slutski  Add CountryIDByIP to ActionType = 41
 2020-11-30     Boris Slutski  Update script to ActionTypeID = 35 
 2021-11-29     Adi Ferber     Add MoveMoneyReasonID
 2022-02-03		Inbal BML	   Add SettlementTypeID 
 2022-04-03     Adi Ferber     Add Action type 42 - Cashout Rollback
 2022-05-10     Adi Ferber     Add new Action type 43-Reverse Deposit
 2023-09-27     Adi Ferber     Add IsFeeDividend=3 for sdrt
 2024-03-05		Inbal BML	   Add IsFeeDividend=4 for sdrt 
 2024-04-03     Nir H		   add ActionTypeID in(44,45) and MoveMoneyReason=5
 2024-06-02     Ofir A         add DLT columns
 2024-08-08     Ofir A         add Description to Fact_CustomerAction 
 2024-09-22     Ofir A         add IsBuy to Fact_CustomerAction 
 2025-07-30     Guy M	       add CreditID to the final schema
 2025-12-21     Guy M	       add CompensationReasonID on position opens (for airdrop identification reasons)

*********************************************************************************************/
 --   exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction] '2023-09-17'
    ---declare @dt datetime = cast(getdate()-1 as date)
	--- declare @dt datetime = '20251220'
	declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@dt,112))
    declare @dateID14daysAgo INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),DATEADD(DAY,-14,@dt),112))
    --SELECT @dateID, @dateID14daysAgo
	DECLARE @row_count int

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
	insert into [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
	(CID,
	Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	CreditID,
	Description,
	MoveMoneyReasonID)
	------------------------2017-02-13 update to avoid duplicate WithdrawProcessingID
	----------pull unique WithdrawProcessingID separately-------
	SELECT 
	CID,
	Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	CreditID,
	Description,
	MoveMoneyReasonID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawPaymentID IS NULL
	UNION ALL  
	SELECT 
	CID,
	MIN(Occurred) as Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	MIN(CreditID) as CreditID
	,Description
	,MoveMoneyReasonID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction WITH (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawPaymentID IS NOT NULL
	GROUP BY CID,
			Credit,
			Payment,
			TotalCashChange,
			CreditTypeID,
			CashoutID,
			CampaignID,
			PositionID,
			DepositID,
			WithdrawID,
			PaymentID,
			BonusTypeID,
			MirrorID,
			CompensationReasonID,
			WithdrawPaymentID,
			BonusCredit,
			Description,
			MoveMoneyReasonID
	OPTION(LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction1')

		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction1'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ReopenForPosition') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ReopenForPosition;

select PositionID, ReopenForPositionID, CommissionOnClose,FullCommissionOnClose
into #ReopenForPosition  -- postions IsReOpen =1 for update  fron Trade
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
where IsReOpen = 1


--create CLUSTERED INdex #ReopenForPosition on #ReopenForPosition(PositionID)

--	DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #PositionOrigin
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PositionOrigin') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #PositionOrigin;
-- Old position 
SELECT a.PositionID, a.CommissionOnClose,a.FullCommissionOnClose
into #PositionOrigin -- Origin Commission 
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction  a 
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position b 
on a.PositionID = b.ReopenForPositionID
where  ActionTypeID in (4,5,6,28,40)  and a.DateID < @dateID

--  position close and reopen in same day
insert into #PositionOrigin -- Origin Commission 
SELECT a.PositionID, a.CommissionOnClose,a.FullCommissionOnClose
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position  a 
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position b 
on a.PositionID = b.ReopenForPositionID

--create CLUSTERED INdex #PositionOrigin on #PositionOrigin(PositionID)


Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
SET
CommissionOnClose = b.CommissionOnClose - c.CommissionOnClose
, FullCommissionOnClose = isnull(b.FullCommissionOnClose,0) - isnull(c.FullCommissionOnClose,0)
FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position a 
JOIN #ReopenForPosition b on a.PositionID = b.PositionID -- postion for update 
			   join #PositionOrigin c on b.ReopenForPositionID  = c.PositionID -- data from origin position 
 where a.CloseOccurred <>'1900-01-01 00:00:00.000'

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	/*OpenPositions*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Open Positions_Real',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL



	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , Leverage
										   , InstrumentID
										   , PositionID
										   , Commission
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   , FullCommission
										   , FullCommissionOnClose
										   , RegulationIDOnOpen
										   , ReopenForPositionID
										   , IsReOpen
										   , SessionID
										   , MirrorID
										   , IsSettled
										   , InitialUnits
										   , IsDiscounted
										   , CommissionByUnits
										   , FullCommissionByUnits
										   , IsAirDrop
										   , SettlementTypeID
										   , DLTOpen
                                           , DLTClose
		                                   , OpenMarkupByUnits
										   , Description
										   , IsBuy
										   , CreditID
										   , CompensationReasonID -- guym 2025-12-21

										   )
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , CASE
			   WHEN d.PositionID is null THEN 39 /*PositionOpenTypeUnknown- need to fix at weekly maintenance*/

			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   1
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   2
			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   3
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		 ,0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(a.TotalCashChange, 0)
		 , isnull(d.Leverage, 0)
		 , isnull(d.InstrumentID, 0)
		 , isnull(d.PositionID, 0)
		 , isnull(d.Commission, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 , d.FullCommission
		 , d.FullCommissionOnClose
		 , d.RegulationIDOnOpen
		 , d.ReopenForPositionID
		 , d.IsReOpen
		 , CASE 
		   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 then b.SessionID 
		   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN e.SessionID
		   else null end as SessionID
		 , d.MirrorID
		 , IsSettled
	     , InitialUnits
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , CommissionByUnits
	     , FullCommissionByUnits
		 , IsAirDrop
		 , d.SettlementTypeID
		 , d.DLTOpen
         , d.DLTClose
		 , d.OpenMarkupByUnits
		 , a.Description
		 , d.IsBuy
		 , a.CreditID -- guym 2025-07-30
		, CompensationReasonID -- guym 2025-12-21

	FROM
		(SELECT *
		 FROM
			 [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
		 WHERE
			 CreditTypeID = 3) a
		JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position d
			ON (a.PositionID = d.PositionID )
			Left JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Position_Session b
			on a.PositionID = b.PositionID
			Left JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session e
			on d.MirrorID = e.MirrorID
	OPTION (LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All1')
	
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All1'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	/*ClosedPositions*/
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Closed Positions_Real',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL


	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , InstrumentID
										   , NetProfit
										   , CommissionOnClose
										   , Commission
										   , PositionID
										   , Leverage
										  -- , DurationInSeconds
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   , FullCommission
										   , FullCommissionOnClose
										   , RedeemStatus
									       , RedeemID
										   , IsRedeem
										   , RegulationIDOnOpen
										   , ReopenForPositionID
										   , IsReOpen
										   , CommissionOnCloseOrig
										   , FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
										   , OriginalPositionID
										   , IsPartialCloseChild
										   , IsSettled
										   , InitialUnits
										   , IsDiscounted
										   , CommissionByUnits
										   , FullCommissionByUnits
										   , IsAirDrop
										   , SettlementTypeID
										   , DLTOpen
                                           , DLTClose
		                                   , OpenMarkupByUnits
										   , [Description]
										   , IsBuy
										   , CreditID
										   )
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 ,  CASE
			   WHEN d.PositionID is null THEN 40 /*PositionCloseTypeUnknown- need to fix at weekly maintenance*/

			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   4
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   5
			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   6
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   28
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		   ,0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(a.TotalCashChange, 0)
		 , isnull(d.InstrumentID, 0) 
		 , isnull(NetProfit, 0)
		 , isnull(CommissionOnClose, 0)
		 , isnull(Commission, 0)
		 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0)
		 , Leverage
		-- , isnull(DurationInSeconds, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 , isnull(d.FullCommission, 0)
		 , isnull(d.FullCommissionOnClose, 0)
		 , isnull(d.RedeemStatus, 0)
		 , d.RedeemID
		 , case when d.RedeemID is null then 0 else 1 end as IsRedeem
		 , d.RegulationIDOnOpen
		 , d.ReopenForPositionID
		 , d.IsReOpen
		 , d.CommissionOnCloseOrig
		 , d.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		 , d.OriginalPositionID
		 , case when a.PositionID <>   d.OriginalPositionID   and  d.OriginalPositionID  is not null then 1 else  0 end IsPartialCloseChild
		 , IsSettled
	     , InitialUnits
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , CommissionByUnits
	     , FullCommissionByUnits
		 , IsAirDrop
		 , d.SettlementTypeID
		 , DLTOpen
         , DLTClose
		 , OpenMarkupByUnits
		 , a.Description
		 , IsBuy
		 , CreditID
	FROM
		(SELECT CID
			  , PositionID
			  , Occurred
			  , Payment
			  , TotalCashChange
			  , Description
			  , CreditID
		 FROM
			 [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
		 WHERE
			 CreditTypeID = 4) a
		JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position d
			ON (a.PositionID = d.PositionID )
	OPTION (LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All4')

	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All4'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , PositionID
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   ,StatusID
										   ,MirrorID
										   ,IsFeeDividend
										   ,DividendID -- added by Geri 20140619
										   ,Description 
										   , CreditID
										   )

select
CID
, Occurred
, IsReal
, ActionTypeID
, PlatformTypeID
, Amount
, credit.PositionID
, DateID
, TimeID
,StatusID
,MirrorID
,IsFeeDividend
,DividendID
,Description
, CreditID
from
  ( Select ---564,210
       *,
       row_number() over (partition by PositionID, IsFeeDividend order by Occurred, Amount) rn
      from
		  (
			SELECT CID
				 , Occurred
				 , 1 AS IsReal
				 , 35 as ActionTypeID
				 , 0 AS PlatformTypeID
				 , isnull(TotalCashChange, 0) as Amount---- Changed from Payment by Geri 20140619
				 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0) as PositionID
				 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, Occurred, 112)) as DateID
				 , datepart (HOUR, Occurred) as TimeID
				 ,1 as StatusID
				 ,isnull(MirrorID,0) as MirrorID -- added by Geri 20140619 
				 ,case when lower(Description) like '%dividend%' OR  Description  like '%divident%' then 2 
					   when Lower(Description) like '%sdrt%'  then 3
					   when Lower(Description) like '%opentotalfees%' or Lower(Description) like '%closetotalfees%' then 4
					   else 1 end as IsFeeDividend
				 , Description
				 , a.CreditID
			  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All a
			 WHERE
				CreditTypeID = 14
			) a
  ) credit
	left join
		(  select * ,
		    row_number() over (partition by PositionID order by ProcessTime, DividendValueInCurrency) rn--?? only dividends 
		     from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionsProcessedForIndexDividnds
		) dividnd
		on credit.PositionID = dividnd.PositionID 
		and credit.rn = dividnd.rn
		and IsFeeDividend =2
		OPTION (LABEL ='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All6')

	print 'Cashier| TIME IS: ' + convert(varchar(30),getdate(),120)
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , PositionID
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , CampaignID
										   , BonusTypeID
										   , FundingTypeID
										   , WithdrawID
										   , DepositID
										   , WithdrawPaymentID
										   , IPNumber
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , CompensationReasonID
										   , StatusID
										   , IsRedeem
										   , SessionID
										   , IsFTD
										   , MoveMoneyReasonID
										   , Description
										   , CreditID
										   )
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , a.PositionID
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , CASE --ActionTypeID
			  -- WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 AND c.FundingID = 5 THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				--   38 /*Affiliate Deposit*/
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 and isnull(MoveMoneyReasonID,0)<>5 THEN
				   7
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 and isnull(MoveMoneyReasonID,0)<>5 THEN
				   8
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 6 THEN
				   36 
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 7 THEN
				   9
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 11 THEN
				   11
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 12 THEN
				   12
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 16 THEN
				   13
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 29 THEN
				   34
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 33 THEN
				   42
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 32 THEN
				   43
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 and MoveMoneyReasonID=5 THEN
				   44
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 and MoveMoneyReasonID=5 THEN
				   45
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		 , CASE 
			   WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN 0
				   --CASE ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
					  -- WHEN FunnelID IN (7, 8, 9) THEN
						 --  2
					  -- WHEN FunnelID IN (20, 5) THEN
						 --  1
					  -- WHEN FunnelID = 6 THEN
						 --  3
					  -- ELSE
						 --  0
				   --END
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   2
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS PlatformTypeID
		 , ISNULL(CASE
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 THEN
				   b.Amount
			   ELSE
				  a.Payment
		   END, 0) AS Amount
		 , isnull(CampaignID, 0)
		 , isnull(BonusTypeID, 0)
		 , CASE
			   WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				   isnull(d.FundingTypeID,  isnull(dd.FundingTypeID, 0))
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   isnull(b.FundingTypeID, 0)
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS FundingType
		 , isnull(a.WithdrawID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.DepositID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.WithdrawPaymentID, 0)
		 , CASE
			  WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				   isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(d.IPAddress), 0)
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(b.IPAddress), 0)
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS IPNumber
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, Occurred)
		 , isnull(CompensationReasonID, 0)
		 , 1
		 , case when CreditTypeID = 2 and b.FundingTypeID = 27 then 1 else 0 end as IsRedeem
		 , CASE WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 THEN d.SessionID else null end as SessionID
		 , d.IsFTD
		 , MoveMoneyReasonID
		 , a.Description
		 , a.CreditID
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All a
		LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding b
			ON (a.WithdrawPaymentID = b.WithdrawPaymentID AND b.CashoutStatusID = 3) --WithdrawPaymentID (in [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction) = ID (in Billing.WithdrawToFuding) = WithdrawProccessingID (in History.Credit))
		--LEFT JOIN DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit c ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
			--ON (a.DepositID = c.DepositID)
			----Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit_Session d
			----on a.DepositID = d.DepositID --> union to one table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit
			Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit d
			on a.DepositID = d.DepositID and d.PaymentStatusID = 2
			Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit dd
			on a.DepositID = dd.DepositID and dd.PaymentStatusID = 11	
	WHERE
		CreditTypeID IN (1, 2, 6, 7, 11, 12, 16,29,33,32)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All8')

	/** Add historic data where WTF ID does not exist - FOR HISTORY ONLY **/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','WTF History-Fix',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	--1. Get all Withdraws where WithdrawPaymentID is null, ActionType = 8 (Pay cashout part) and rank by order
	--Drop table #OldCOs
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OldCOs') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #OldCOs

	SELECT CustomerActionID,WithdrawID,
	RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY WithdrawID ORDER BY Occurred) as Ranking
	INTO #OldCOs
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	WHERE ActionTypeID = 8
	AND (WithdrawPaymentID is null or WithdrawPaymentID = 0)

	--2. Get all successfull cashout payments (CashoutStatusID = 3) and rank by order
	--Drop table #OldWTF
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OldWTF') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #OldWTF

	SELECT WithdrawID, WithdrawPaymentID, Amount, IPAddress, FundingTypeID, 
	RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY WithdrawID ORDER BY ModificationDate) as Ranking
	INTO #OldWTF
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding
	WHERE CashoutStatusID = 3

	--3. Update all missing fields with Payment, FundingType, and IP

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.WithdrawPaymentID = #OldWTF.WithdrawPaymentID
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.Amount = #OldWTF.Amount
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.IPNumber = isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(#OldWTF.IPAddress), 0)
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.FundingTypeID = #OldWTF.FundingTypeID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	INNER JOIN #OldWTF ON 
	[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.WithdrawID = #OldWTF.WithdrawID
	INNER JOIN #OldCOs ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.CustomerActionID = #OldCOs.CustomerActionID
	WHERE #OldCOs.Ranking = #OldWTF.Ranking
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction9')

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID

	SELECT CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , CASE
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 18 THEN
				   15
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 19 THEN
				   16
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 20 THEN
				   17
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 21 THEN
				   18
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 27 THEN
				   19
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 28 THEN
				   20
		   END
		 , 0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(Payment, 0) AS Amount
		 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.MirrorID, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 ,case when CreditTypeID = 20 THEN b.SessionID else null end as SessionID
		 , a.Description
		 , a.CreditID
	FROM

		 , 1
		 , Case EngagementType
			   When 'Discussion' Then 21
			   When 'Comment'	 Then 22
			   When 'Like'		 Then 23
		   End
		 , Case ApplicationName
				When 'OBdesktop' Then 1
				When 'OBMobile' Then 3
				When 'Openbook Mobile Proxy - Android' Then 5
				When 'Openbook Mobile Proxy - iOS' Then 7
				When 'WebTrader' Then 2
				Else 0
		   End
		 , -1
		 , PostRootID
		 , Convert(Int, Convert(Varchar, Occurred, 112))
		 , Datepart (Hour, Occurred)
		 , 1
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement OBE With (Nolock)
		--Join DWH.[DWH_dbo].Dim_Customer DC With (Nolock) -------------------------- check with MAX, Double Table . [DWH_dbo].Extract Customer
		Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer DC With (Nolock)
			--On Lower(Right(OBE.UserName,Len(OBE.UserName)-1)) = Lower(DC.UserName) collate database_default
			On OBE.UserNameCalc =DC.UserNameCalc --collate database_default
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement14')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count

		Where r.request_id = s.request_id

		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement14'

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Open Book User Engagement',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred

										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , PaymentStatusID
										   , Amount
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID)
	SELECT CID  as RealCID
		 , ModificationDate
		 , 1
		 , 27 -- Deposit Attempt
		 , 0
		 , PaymentStatusID
		 , CASE WHEN Amount >= 1000000000 THEN 99999999 
                WHEN Amount <= -1000000000 THEN -99999999
                ELSE Amount 
            END AS Amount
		 , Convert(Int, Convert(Varchar, ModificationDate, 112))
		 , Datepart (Hour, ModificationDate)
		 , 1
	FROM

		--drop table if EXISTS #Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate

		)b

		update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration
		set 
		PlatformID = case 
					 when FunnelID = 36 and b.PlatformID=103 then 104
					 when FunnelID = 36 and b.PlatformID=109 then 110
					 when FunnelID = 36 then 117			 
					 when FunnelID = 42 then 111
					 when FunnelID = 43 then 105
					 when b.PlatformID = 116 then 117 --(reToro	Web	Browsers)
					 when b.PlatformID = 109 then 110 --(reToro	Mobile	iOS)
					 when b.PlatformID = 103 then 104 --(reToro	Mobile	Android)
					 when b.PlatformID is not null then b.PlatformID
					 end				  
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration a
		left join #Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate b
		on a.CID =b.CID 


	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   , PlatformID
										   , IPNumber
										   , CountryIDByIP
										   )

	SELECT CID
		  ,Registered
		  ,IsReal
		  ,ActionTypeID
		  ,PlatformTypeID
		  ,0
		  ,DateID
		  ,TimeID
		  ,1
		  ,PlatformID
		  ,case when charindex(',',IP) = 0 then isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(IP), 0)
				else isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(left(IP, charindex(',',IP)-1)), 0)
			end
	     , CountryIDByIP
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration16')

		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Customer Registration',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	/************************************************************************CRM Cases*****************************************************************************************/
	--support cases,retention cases, type of case (phone,chat,mail) Account Manager-Check
	------------------Validation----------------

	---------------------------------------------

	/*UPDATE GCID TO ALL RECORDS*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCAFact_CustomerAction',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	---print 'Update GCID_Real| TIME IS: ' + convert(varchar(30),getdate(),120)

	--Create NonClustered Index RealCID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCAFact_CustomerAction(RealCID);  

	--Create NonClustered Index CID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCACustomer(CID);

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET
		GCID = b.GCID, DemoCID = 0
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
		JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer b 
			ON (a.RealCID = b.CID)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction17')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction17'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCAFact_CustomerAction',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	---print 'Update GCID_Demo| TIME IS: ' + convert(varchar(30),getdate(),120)

	/*Update Keys*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','UpdateHistoryID',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET
		HistoryID = case when GCID =-1 /**/
						 then convert(DECIMAL(38), cast(4 AS VARCHAR(1)) + cast(IsReal AS VARCHAR(1)) + right('00' + cast(ActionTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('00' + cast(PlatformTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('0000000000' + cast(RealCID AS VARCHAR(10)), 10))
						 else convert(DECIMAL(38), cast(4 AS VARCHAR(1)) + cast(IsReal AS VARCHAR(1)) + right('00' + cast(ActionTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('00' + cast(PlatformTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('0000000000' + cast(GCID AS VARCHAR(10)), 10))
					end
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction18')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction18'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','UpdateHistoryID',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


	--- Update PlatformId for Session Deposit / Manual Open Position / Mirror
		TRUNCATE tABLE [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14]


		INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14]
           ([SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID]
           ,[DateID])
		SELECT
			[SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID]
           ,[DateID]
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
		where ActionTypeID = 14



	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.PlatformID = b.PlatformID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14 b
	on a.SessionID = b.SessionID
	where a.ActionTypeID in(1, 2, 7, 17)

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	Set CountryIDByIP = di.CountryID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction lg
    JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_CountryIP di WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON lg.IPNumber BETWEEN di.IPFrom AND di.IPTo
	where  lg.IPNumber is not null and lg.IPNumber !=0


	------- Update Anonymous IP 
	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	Set 
	CountryIDByIP = di.CountryID,
	IsAnonymousIP = 1,
	ProxyType = di.ProxyType
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction lg
    JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_CountryIPAnonymous di WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON lg.IPNumber BETWEEN di.IPFrom AND di.IPTo
	where  lg.IPNumber is not null and lg.IPNumber !=0

------ Session Id for 
/*
1. 17 - Register new mirror.
2. 2 - CopyPositionOpen.   
3. 1 - ManualPositionOpen.
4. 7 - Deposit.  
*/

    --drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeIDsRealCID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeIDsRealCID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeIDsRealCID;
		
    SELECT Distinct RealCID
    into #ActionTypeIDsRealCID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where (ActionTypeID in (1,2,7,17) and  (SessionID  = 0 or SessionID is null or SessionID = -1 or PlatformID is null)) 

    -- found SessionID for action type LogIN
   -- drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeID14SessionID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeID14SessionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeID14SessionID;


    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
    into #ActionTypeID14SessionID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)

    -- found relevant data for update
    insert into #ActionTypeID14SessionID
		   Select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
   from
   (
    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID, 
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCID ORDER BY Occurred desc,SessionID desc) AS RN
    from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)
    and DateID >= @dateID14daysAgo and DateID < @dateID
	)a where RN=1

    ------select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
    ------from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
    ------where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)
    ------and DateID >= @dateID14daysAgo

    -- Found rows for update
    --drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeIDsSessionID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeIDsSessionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeIDsSessionID;

    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID, DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    into #ActionTypeIDsSessionID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID in (1,2,7,17) and  (SessionID  = 0 or SessionID is null or SessionID = -1 or PlatformID is null) 
	and RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)

   -- drop table If EXISTS #UpdateSession
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#UpdateSession') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #UpdateSession;

    -- data for update
    select
    RealCID, PlatformID, SessionID,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    into #UpdateSession
    from
    (
    select *
        ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCID,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID ORDER BY Occurred) AS RN
        from
    (
        select a.RealCID, a.PlatformID, a.SessionID, a.Occurred, Datediff(SECOND, a.Occurred, b.Occurred) DiffSecond ,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    from #ActionTypeID14SessionID a
    left join #ActionTypeIDsSessionID b
    on a.RealCID = b.RealCID
    and
    a.Occurred<=b.Occurred
    --where b.ActionTypeID = 7
    ) a
    ) b
    where RN = 1

    -- run script to update MirrorID ActionTypeID in (17)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.MirrorID = b.MirrorID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (17)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)

        -- run script to update DepositID ActionTypeID in (7)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b -- select * from #UpdateSession
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.DepositID = b.DepositID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (7)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)

            -- run script to update PositionID ActionTypeID in (1,2)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction -- select * from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction where Occurred between '20240315' and '20240316'
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.PositionID = b.PositionID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (1,2)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)

	--- update positionopens with comp reason id for airdrops  -- guym 2025-12-21

	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#openCompReason') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #openCompReason 
    CREATE TABLE #openCompReason
        WITH (HEAP,DISTRIBUTION = HASH(CID))
    as
	SELECT CID, PositionID, CompensationReasonID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
	WHERE CreditTypeID = 3
	AND CompensationReasonID IS NOT NULL

	UPDATE  t1
	SET 
	t1.CompensationReasonID = t2.CompensationReasonID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction t1
	INNER JOIN #openCompReason t2
		 ON t1.RealCID = t2.CID AND t1.PositionID = t2.PositionID
	WHERE t1.ActionTypeID = 1


	-------

	----EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_IsParitalCloseParent] 

END/*PROCEDURE*/
SP_Fact_CustomerAction_CheckExistPartiti:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_CheckExistPartition] @dt [DATE] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table Fact_CustomerAction
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------

*********************************************************************************************/
	--SET DEADLOCK_PRIORITY HIGH
	--exec [SP_Fact_CustomerAction_CheckExistPartition] '20200809'
    ---declare @dt datetime = cast(getdate()-1 as date)
	declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@dt,112))
    
	select  Count(*) as IndExistPartition_Fact_CustomerAction
	from sys.partitions p
	inner join sys.indexes i 
	 on p.object_id = i.object_id 
	 and p.index_id = i.index_id
	inner JOIN sys.data_spaces ds 
	 on i.data_space_id = ds.data_space_id
	inner JOIN sys.partition_schemes ps 
	 on ds.data_space_id = ps.data_space_id
	left outer JOIN sys.partition_range_values prv 
	 on prv.function_id = ps.function_id 
	 and p.partition_number = prv.boundary_id
	where p.index_id = 1 
    AND p.[object_id] = object_id('DWH_dbo.Fact_CustomerAction')
	and prv.value = convert(int,convert(varchar, @dt,112))

--	SET DEADLOCK_PRIORITY NORMAL

END/*PROCEDURE*/

	IF OBJECT_ID('[DWH_dbo].[Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH]') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH]

	SET @sql2 = 'CREATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH]

					,DISTRIBUTION =  HASH ([RealCID])

SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN


-- =============================================
-- Author:      <Re'em Cohen>
-- Create Date: 2021-08-01
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse] '2024-01-23'
-- =============================================
/**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2022-02-03		Inbal BML	   Add SettlementTypeID 
 2024-01-07	    Inbal BML	   change [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] and [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay]
 2024-05-01     Boris P  Partiton [STS_Audit_UserOperationsData]
 2024-06-02     Ofir A         add DLT columns
 2024-08-08     Ofir A         add Description to Fact_CustomerAction 
 2024-09-22     Ofir A         add IsBuy to Fact_CustomerAction 
 2025-07-30     Guy M	       add CreditID to the final schema

*********************************************************************************************/
   -- exec dwh_dbo.[SP_Fact_CustomerAction] '2025-08-01'
  -- DECLARE @dt as DATE = '2025-08-01'
  --'2021-07-01'
  DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME
  DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME

  SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
  SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);
  
-- Check Exist Partition Fact_CustomerAction -----------------------
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_CustomerAction_CheckExistPartition @Yesterday

	
-------------------------------------------
-- SELECT Parameter Run Ind - Fact_CustomerAction ------------------
	--SELECT [IndRun]
	--FROM [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd](nolock)
	--where [TableName] = 'Fact_CustomerAction'
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Customer ------------------------------------------------

	
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer
 
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer 
	(		
	  [CID] 
	 ,[GCID]
	 ,[UserName]  
	 ,[UserNameCalc]
	)
	SELECT
	   [CID]
	  ,[GCID]
	  ,[UserName]
	,Lower(UserName) as UserNameCalc
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Customer_CustomerStatic]
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin ---------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin
	([LoginID]
           ,[CID]
           ,[LoggedIn]
           ,[LoggedOut]
           ,[ClientVersion]
           ,[IP]
           ,[SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID])
	SELECT 
	LoginID, 
	CID, 
	LoggedIn,
	0 AS LoggedOut, 
	ClientVersion, 
	IP,
	SessionIdentifier as SessionID ,--Browser,ApplicationIdentifierAgg,
	CASE
	---- Wallet
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =2  then 118
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =2  then 119
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =2 then 120
	---- EtoroX
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =4  then 121
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =4  then 122
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =4 then 123
	---- Delta 
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =8  then 124
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =8  then 125
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =8 then 126
	---- Etoro
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 101
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 102
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 103
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 104
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoroandroid' then 105
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 106
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletandroid' then 118

	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 107
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 108
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 109 
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 110
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoroios' then 111
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 112
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletios' then 119

	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 113
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 114
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 115
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 116 
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 117
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletweb' then 120
	else 99 end as PlatformID
	from
	(
	select cast(a.LoggedIn as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	---case when Browser = 'Browsers' then 'Web' else 'Mobile' end as 'Web/Mobile',
	Browser,
	CASE
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoro','ReToro') then 'retoro'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'retoro, retoro' then 'retoro'
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoroios','ReToroIOS') then 'retoroios'
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoroandroid','ReToroAndroid') then 'retoroandroid'

	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoro') then 'retoro'
	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoroios') then 'retoroios'
	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoroandroid') then 'retoroandroid'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidretoro' then 'retoroandroid'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidetoro' then 'retoroandroid'
	when ApplicationIdentifier in ('registrationapi','registrationservice') then 'registrationapi'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletweb' then 'retoro'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletios' then 'retoroios'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletandroid' then 'retoroandroid'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'iostrader' then 'trader'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidtrader' then 'trader'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'webtrader' then 'trader'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'iosopenbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidopenbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'openbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'openbook_news_publisher' then 'openbook'
	else 'other' END AS ApplicationIdentifierAgg
	,LoginID
	,CID
	,LoggedOut
	,ClientVersion
	,[IP]
	,SessionIdentifier
	,GatewayAppId
	from
	(
	SELECT ApplicationIdentifier as ApplicationIdentifier
	,0 as LoginID
	,EnvironmentDetailsFirst
	,ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst
	,RealCid as CID,
	CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	CASE
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '{"useragent":null}' and ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst = 'retoroandroid' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '{"useragent":null}' and ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst = 'retoroios' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%android%' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%iphone%' or lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%ipad%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%android%' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%retoroios%' THEN 'iOS'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%iostrader%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%androidtrader%' THEN 'Android'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%iosopenbook%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%androidopenbook%' THEN 'Android'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%walletios%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%walletandroid%' THEN 'Android'

	ELSE 'Browsers'
	END as Browser,
	0 as LoggedOut,
	CASE ApplicationIdentifier
	 WHEN 'webtrader' THEN 2
	 WHEN 'iostrader' THEN 8
	 WHEN 'androidtrader' THEN 6
	 WHEN 'androidopenbook' THEN 5
	 WHEN 'iosopenbook' THEN 7
	 WHEN 'openbook' THEN 1
	 ELSE 99
	 END ClientVersion,
	CAST([ClientIp] as varchar(15)) as [IP],
	SessionId AS SessionIdentifier,
	GatewayAppId
	from [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData] LH with (NOLOCK)
	left join
	(
	Select CID, SessionIdentifier as SessionIdentifierFirst, EnvironmentDetails as EnvironmentDetailsFirst,ApplicationIdentifierFrom as ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst
	from
	(
	SELECT
	RealCid as CID,
	CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	SessionId AS SessionIdentifier,
	UserAgent as EnvironmentDetails,ApplicationIdentifier AS  ApplicationIdentifierFrom ,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCid,SessionId  ORDER BY CreatedAt) rn
	from [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData] with (NOLOCK)
	where CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) >= dateadd(day,datediff(day,7,@Yesterday ),0) and  CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) <= @CurrentDate
	AND LoginTypeName = 'Login'
	) a
	WHERE rn = 1
	) LHS on LH.RealCid = LHS.CID and LH.SessionId = LHS.SessionIdentifierFirst
	where CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) >= dateadd(day,datediff(day,7,@Yesterday ),0) and  CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) <= @CurrentDate
	AND LHS.SessionIdentifierFirst is not NULL
	AND LoginTypeName = 'Login'
	) a
	) b
	WHERE CAST(LoggedIn as datetime) >= @Yesterday 
	AND CAST(LoggedIn as datetime) < @CurrentDate
	and  [CID]  <>0
--------------------------------------------------------------------


--DELETE FROM DWH_dbo.STS_User_Operations_Data_History
--WHERE [DateID] =  convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,@Yesterday),0),112)) 


EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_STS_User_Operations_Data_History_CREATE_SWITCH_SINGLE] @dt 

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[STS_User_Operations_Data_History_SWITCH_SINGLE] (
    [Gcid] ,
    [RealCid] ,
    [DemoCid] ,
    [ApplicationIdentifier] ,
    [ApplicationVersion] ,
    [ClientIp] ,
    [ClientName] ,
    [CreatedAt] ,
    [UserAgent] ,
    [AccessTokenHashed] ,
   [ClientDeviceId] ,
    [ParentSessionId] ,
    [AccountTypeName] ,
    [LoginTypeName] ,
    [SessionId] ,
    [GatewayAppId] ,
	[ProxyType] ,
	[CountryISOCode],
	[AdditionalData],
	[DateID],
	[UpdateDate]
	)
SELECT 
    [Gcid] ,
    [RealCid] ,
    [DemoCid] ,
    [ApplicationIdentifier] ,
    [ApplicationVersion] ,
    [ClientIp] ,
    [ClientName] ,
    [CreatedAt] ,
    [UserAgent] ,
    [AccessTokenHashed] ,
    [ClientDeviceId],
    [ParentSessionId] ,
    [AccountTypeName] ,
    [LoginTypeName] ,
    [SessionId] ,
    [GatewayAppId] ,
	[ProxyType] ,
	[CountryISOCode],
	[AdditionalData],
    convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,@Yesterday),0),112))  ,
    GETDATE()
FROM [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData]  (nolock)
WHERE [CreatedAt] >= @Yesterday AND [CreatedAt] < @CurrentDate


EXEC  [DWH_dbo].[SP_STS_User_Operations_Data_History_SWITCH]


-- Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Loggin -------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Loggin

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Loggin
	SELECT
	LoginID,
	CID,
	LoggedIn,
	LoggedOut,
	IP
	FROM
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Login] with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE LoggedIn >= @Yesterday AND  LoggedIn <  @CurrentDate

		

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration ------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration
	(
	 [CID]
	 ,[Registered]
	 ,[IsReal] 
	 ,[ActionTypeID] 
	 ,[PlatformTypeID]
	 ,[DateID] 
	 ,[TimeID] 
	 ,[FunnelID]  
	 ,[IP] 
	 ,[CountryIDByIP] 
	 ,[PlatformID]
	)
	SELECT DISTINCT 
	[CID],
	[Registered],
	cast([IsReal] as tinyint) as [IsReal],
	41 as [ActionTypeID],
	99 as [PlatformTypeID],
	convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, [Registered], 112)) as [DateID],
	datepart (HOUR, [Registered]) as [TimeID],FunnelID
	,[IP]
	,[CountryIDByIP]
	,NULL as NULL_column
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Customer_CustomerStatic] with(nolock)
	WHERE Registered>= @Yesterday AND Registered< @CurrentDate 

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position -------------------------------------

--SSIS flow use derived columns. one column adds as a new columns and
-- assigned with Null as default value. second column is IsSettled, intended
-- to replace the origin by casting it to four-byte signed integer.
	
-- Here using INSERT INTO command, any column that is not specified assigned with her
--default value. the second problem solved by staging table that contain
--the relevant field.
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position
	(	
	   [PositionID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[CurrencyID]
      ,[ProviderID]
      ,[InstrumentID]
      ,[HedgeID]
      ,[HedgeServerID]
      ,[Leverage]
      ,[Amount]
      ,[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
      ,[UnitMargin]
      ,[InitForexRate]
      ,[NetProfit]
      ,[SpreadedPipBid]
      ,[SpreadedPipAsk]
      ,[IsBuy]
      ,[CloseOnEndOfWeek]
      ,[EndOfWeekFee]
      ,[Commission]
      ,[CommissionOnClose]
      ,[OpenOccurred]
      ,[CloseOccurred]
      ,[ParentPositionID]
      ,[OrigParentPositionID]
      ,[MirrorID]
      ,[IsOpenOpen]
      ,[FullCommission]
      ,[FullCommissionOnClose]
      ,[RedeemStatus]
      ,[RedeemID]
      ,[ReopenForPositionID]
      ,[IsReOpen]
      ,[CommissionOnCloseOrig]
      ,[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig]
      ,[InitialUnits]
      ,[IsSettled]
      ,[IsDiscounted]
      ,[CommissionByUnits]
      ,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	  ,[SettlementTypeID]
	  -- Ofir DLT new columns
	  ,[DLTOpen]
      -- ,[DLTClose]
      ,[OpenMarkupByUnits]
	)

	SELECT
	PositionID,
	CID,
	CurrencyID,
	ProviderID,
	a.InstrumentID,
	HedgeID,
	HedgeServerID,
	Leverage,
	ISNULL(Amount,0)  AS Amount,
	AmountInUnitsDecimal,
	UnitMargin,
	InitForexRate,
	0 AS NetProfit, 
	SpreadedPipBid,
	SpreadedPipAsk,
	IsBuy,
	ISNULL(CloseOnEndOfWeek, 0) as CloseOnEndOfWeek,
	EndOfWeekFee,
	Commission,
	0 AS CommissionOnClose,
	Occurred AS OpenOccurred,
	CAST(0 AS DATETIME) AS CloseOccurred,
	ParentPositionID,
	OrigParentPositionID,
	MirrorID,
	IsOpenOpen,
	ISNULL([FullCommission],0.00) AS FullCommission,
	0.00 AS FullCommissionOnClose,
	RedeemStatus,
	NULL as RedeemID,
	ReopenForPositionID,
	CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN 1 END AS IsReOpen,
	0.00 AS CommissionOnCloseOrig,
	0.00 AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
	, InitialUnits
	,CASE 
	WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  
	WHEN IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 AND b.InstrumentTypeID IN (10,5,6) THEN 1 
	ELSE 0 
	END AS IsSettled
	,IsDiscounted
	,[CommissionByUnits]
	,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	,SettlementTypeID
	,[DLTOpen]
     -- ,[DLTClose]
    ,[OpenMarkupByUnits]
	FROM
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] a WITH (NOLOCK)
	left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
	on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
	WHERE Occurred>= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday)  and Occurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@CurrentDate),0)

	
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Position -------------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position
	([PositionID], 
	[CID], 
	[CurrencyID], 
	[ProviderID], 
	[InstrumentID], 
	[HedgeID], 
	[HedgeServerID], 
	[Leverage],
	[Amount], 
	[AmountInUnitsDecimal], 
	[UnitMargin], 
	[InitForexRate], 
	[NetProfit], 
	[SpreadedPipBid], 
	[SpreadedPipAsk], 
	[IsBuy], 
	[CloseOnEndOfWeek], 
	[EndOfWeekFee], 
	[Commission], 
	[CommissionOnClose], 
	[OpenOccurred], 
	[CloseOccurred], 
	[ParentPositionID], 
	[OrigParentPositionID],
	[MirrorID], 
	[IsOpenOpen], 
	[FullCommission],
	[FullCommissionOnClose], 
	[RedeemStatus], 
	[RedeemID], 
	[ReopenForPositionID], 
	[IsReOpen], 
	[CommissionOnCloseOrig], 
	[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig], 
	[OriginalPositionID],
	[IsSettled], 
	[InitialUnits], 
	[IsDiscounted], 
	[CommissionByUnits], 
	[FullCommissionByUnits],
	[SettlementTypeID],
	[DLTOpen],
    [DLTClose], 
    [OpenMarkupByUnits]
	)

		SELECT 
		PositionID,
		CID,
		CurrencyID,
		ProviderID,
		a.InstrumentID,
		HedgeID,
		HedgeServerID,
		Leverage,
		isnull(Amount,0) as Amount,
		AmountInUnitsDecimal,
		UnitMargin,
		InitForexRate,
		NetProfit,
		SpreadedPipBid,
		SpreadedPipAsk,
		IsBuy,
		CloseOnEndOfWeek,
		EndOfWeekFee,
		Commission,
		CommissionOnClose,
		OpenOccurred,
		CloseOccurred,
		isnull([ParentPositionID],0) AS ParentPositionID,
		OrigParentPositionID,
		MirrorID,
		IsOpenOpen,
		ISNULL([FullCommission],0.00) AS FullCommission,
		ISNULL([FullCommissionOnClose],0.00) AS FullCommissionOnClose
		                   ,RedeemStatus
		                   , RedeemID
		,ReopenForPositionID
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS IsReOpen
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN CommissionOnClose END AS CommissionOnCloseOrig
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN FullCommissionOnClose END AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		,OriginalPositionID
	
		,CASE WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  WHEN IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 and b.InstrumentTypeID in (10,5,6) THEN 1 else 0  END AS IsSettled
		,InitialUnits
		,IsDiscounted
		,[CommissionByUnits]
		,[FullCommissionByUnits]
		,SettlementTypeID
		,[DLTOpen]
        ,[DLTClose]
        ,[OpenMarkupByUnits]
		FROM
		[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay] a WITH (NOLOCK) 
		left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
		ON a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
		WHERE 
		(OpenOccurred>=DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday)  and OpenOccurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0))
		OR (CloseOccurred>= @Yesterday  and CloseOccurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0))  --OPTION	(RECOMPILE)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction -----------------------

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction


	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction
	([CID], [Occurred], [Credit], [Payment], [TotalCashChange], [CreditTypeID], [CashoutID], [CampaignID], [PositionID], 
	[DepositID], [WithdrawID], [PaymentID], [BonusTypeID], [MirrorID], [CompensationReasonID], [WithdrawPaymentID], 
	[BonusCredit], [CreditID], [Description], [MoveMoneyReasonID])

--[MirrorDividendID]--[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	SELECT 
	  CID,
		Occurred,
		Credit,
		Payment,
		TotalCashChange,
		CreditTypeID,
		CashoutID,
		CampaignID,
		PositionID,
		DepositID,
		WithdrawID,
		PaymentID,
		BonusTypeID,
		MirrorID,
		CompensationReasonID,
		WithdrawProcessingID,
		BonusCredit,
		CreditID
		,Description
		,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Credit] with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawProcessingID IS NULL AND (Occurred>= @Yesterday and Occurred< @CurrentDate)
	UNION 
	SELECT CID,
		MIN(Occurred) as Occurred,
		Credit,
		Payment,
		TotalCashChange,
		CreditTypeID,
		CashoutID,
		CampaignID,
		PositionID,
		DepositID,
		WithdrawID,
		PaymentID,
		BonusTypeID,
		MirrorID,
		CompensationReasonID,
		WithdrawProcessingID,
		BonusCredit,
		MIN(CreditID) as CreditID
		,Description
		,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Credit] WITH (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawProcessingID IS NOT NULL AND(Occurred>= @Yesterday and Occurred < @CurrentDate)
	GROUP BY CID,
			Credit,
			Payment,
			TotalCashChange,

			PositionID,
			DepositID,
			WithdrawID,
			PaymentID,
			BonusTypeID,

			CompensationReasonID,

			BonusCredit
			,Description
			,[MoveMoneyReasonID]

	SELECT 
	b.CID,
	b.VerificationLevelID,
	b.RiskStatusID,
	b.RiskClassificationID,
	--b.isEmployeeAccount,
	0 AS isEmployeeAccount,

	b.AccountTypeID,

	b.[ValidFrom] AS  Occurred

-- Ext_FCA_PositionsProcessedForIndexDividnds ----------------------

	(
	  [PositionID] 
	 ,[DividendID] 
	 ,[ProcessTime]

	)
	SELECT a.PositionID,	a.DividendID,	a.ProcessTime, b.DividendValueInCurrency
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_PositionsProcessedForIndexDividnds] a

	ON a.DividendID=b.DividendID
	WHERE a.ProcessTime>= @Yesterday AND a.ProcessTime< @CurrentDate
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw -----------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw
	([WithdrawID],
	[CID], 
	[CashoutStatusID], 
	[Amount], 
	[IPAddress],
[ModificationDate], 
	[FundingTypeID], 
	[Fee])
	SELECT 	
	   [WithdrawID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[CashoutStatusID]
      ,[Amount]
     ,CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15)) [IPAddress]
      ,[ModificationDate]
      ,[FundingTypeID]
      ,[Fee]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw]


--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw ----------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw
	(
	 [WithdrawID] 
	 ,[CID] 
	 ,[Amount] 
	 ,[IPAddress] 
	 ,[ModificationDate] 
	 ,[Fee] 
	 ,[FundingTypeID]
	)
	SELECT
	 isnull(a.WithdrawID, 0) as WithdrawID
	 ,  CID
	 , ISNULL(Amount,0) as Amount
	 , CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15)) [IPAddress]
	 , ModificationDate
	 ,Fee /*We Bring the CO fee only on Requset and processed CO in order to be able to calculate Unrealized fee*/
	, FundingTypeID
	FROM
	(
		SELECT Distinct [WithdrawID]
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_WithdrawAction] WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE
			ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
			AND
			ModificationDate < @CurrentDate
			AND 
			CashoutStatusID=3 
			AND WithdrawID NOT IN
			(
				SELECT WithdrawID AS WithdrawID_ModificationDateMin
				From
				(
					SELECT WithdrawID, min(ModificationDate) AS ModificationDateMin
					FROM
						[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_WithdrawAction] WITH (NOLOCK)
					WHERE
						ModificationDate < @Yesterday
						and
						CashoutStatusID=3
					group by WithdrawID
				) a
			)
	)  a
	join  
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw] b  WITH (NOLOCK)
	on
	a.WithdrawID=b.WithdrawID -- OPTION	(RECOMPILE)


--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding ---------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding
	(
	  [WithdrawID]
	 ,[CID]
	 , [CashoutStatusID]
	 , [Amount]
     , [IPAddress]
	 , [ModificationDate]
	 , [FundingTypeID]
	 , [WithdrawPaymentID]
	 , [SessionID]
	 )
	SELECT 
		a.WithdrawID,
		CID,
		CashoutStatusID,
		Amount,
		CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15))IPAddress,
		ModificationDate,
		b.FundingTypeID,
		ID as [WithdrawPaymentID],
		SessionID
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_vWithdrawToFunding] a WITH (NOLOCK)
		JOIN (
		SELECT 
		CID,
		WithdrawID,
		IPAddress,
		FundingTypeID,
		SessionID
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw] WITH (NOLOCK)
	) b
	ON a.WithdrawID = b.WithdrawID

-- Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog ---------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog
	(
	  [PositionID] 
	 ,[CID] 
	 ,[Occurred] 
	 ,[IsSettled]
	 ,[PreviousIsSettled]
	)
	SELECT 
	PositionID,
	CID,
	Occurred,
	CAST(IsSettled AS INT) IsSettled,
	CAST(PreviousIsSettled AS INT) PreviousIsSettled
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
		pl.PositionID
		,pl.CID
		,Occurred
		,pl.IsSettled
		,pl.PreviousIsSettled
		, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pl.PositionID ORDER BY pl.Occurred ) rn
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] pl WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE Occurred > @Yesterday
		---and isnull(pl.IsSettled,-1) <> isnull(pl.PreviousIsSettled,-1)
		and pl.IsSettled <> pl.PreviousIsSettled
	) a
	WHERE rn =1

SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse_202:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse_20240507] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN


-- =============================================
-- Author:      <Re'em Cohen>
-- Create Date: 2021-08-01
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse] '2024-01-23'
-- =============================================
/**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2022-02-03		Inbal BML	   Add SettlementTypeID 
 2024-01-07	    Inbal BML	   change [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] and [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay]

*********************************************************************************************/
   -- exec [SP_Fact_CustomerAction] '2019-03-18'
  --DECLARE @dt as DATE = cAST(GETDATE()-1 AS DATE)
  --'2021-07-01'
  DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME
  DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME

  SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
  SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);
  
-- Check Exist Partition Fact_CustomerAction -----------------------
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_CustomerAction_CheckExistPartition @Yesterday

	
-------------------------------------------
-- SELECT Parameter Run Ind - Fact_CustomerAction ------------------
	--SELECT [IndRun]
	--FROM [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd](nolock)
	--where [TableName] = 'Fact_CustomerAction'
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Customer ------------------------------------------------

	
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer
 
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer 
	(		
	  [CID] 
	 ,[GCID]
	 ,[UserName]  
	 ,[UserNameCalc]
	)
	SELECT
	   [CID]
	  ,[GCID]
	  ,[UserName]
	,Lower(UserName) as UserNameCalc
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Customer_CustomerStatic]
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin ---------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin
	([LoginID]
           ,[CID]
           ,[LoggedIn]
           ,[LoggedOut]
           ,[ClientVersion]
           ,[IP]
           ,[SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID])
	SELECT 
	LoginID, 
	CID, 
	LoggedIn,
	0 AS LoggedOut, 
	ClientVersion, 
	IP,
	SessionIdentifier as SessionID ,--Browser,ApplicationIdentifierAgg,
	CASE
	---- Wallet
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =2  then 118
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =2  then 119
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =2 then 120
	---- EtoroX
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =4  then 121
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =4  then 122
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =4 then 123
	---- Delta 
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =8  then 124
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =8  then 125
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =8 then 126
	---- Etoro
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 101
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 102
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 103
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 104
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoroandroid' then 105
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 106
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletandroid' then 118

	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 107
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 108
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 109 
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 110
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoroios' then 111
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 112
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletios' then 119

	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 113
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 114
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 115
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 116 
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 117
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletweb' then 120
	else 99 end as PlatformID
	from
	(
	select cast(a.LoggedIn as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	---case when Browser = 'Browsers' then 'Web' else 'Mobile' end as 'Web/Mobile',
	Browser,
	CASE
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoro','ReToro') then 'retoro'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'retoro, retoro' then 'retoro'
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoroios','ReToroIOS') then 'retoroios'
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoroandroid','ReToroAndroid') then 'retoroandroid'

	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoro') then 'retoro'
	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoroios') then 'retoroios'
	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoroandroid') then 'retoroandroid'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidretoro' then 'retoroandroid'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidetoro' then 'retoroandroid'
	when ApplicationIdentifier in ('registrationapi','registrationservice') then 'registrationapi'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletweb' then 'retoro'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletios' then 'retoroios'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletandroid' then 'retoroandroid'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'iostrader' then 'trader'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidtrader' then 'trader'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'webtrader' then 'trader'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'iosopenbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidopenbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'openbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'openbook_news_publisher' then 'openbook'
	else 'other' END AS ApplicationIdentifierAgg
	,LoginID
	,CID
	,LoggedOut
	,ClientVersion
	,[IP]
	,SessionIdentifier
	,GatewayAppId
	from
	(
	SELECT ApplicationIdentifier as ApplicationIdentifier
	,0 as LoginID
	,EnvironmentDetailsFirst
	,ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst
	,RealCid as CID,
	CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	CASE
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '{"useragent":null}' and ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst = 'retoroandroid' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '{"useragent":null}' and ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst = 'retoroios' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%android%' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%iphone%' or lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%ipad%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%android%' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%retoroios%' THEN 'iOS'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%iostrader%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%androidtrader%' THEN 'Android'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%iosopenbook%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%androidopenbook%' THEN 'Android'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%walletios%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%walletandroid%' THEN 'Android'

	ELSE 'Browsers'
	END as Browser,
	0 as LoggedOut,
	CASE ApplicationIdentifier
	 WHEN 'webtrader' THEN 2
	 WHEN 'iostrader' THEN 8
	 WHEN 'androidtrader' THEN 6
	 WHEN 'androidopenbook' THEN 5
	 WHEN 'iosopenbook' THEN 7
	 WHEN 'openbook' THEN 1
	 ELSE 99
	 END ClientVersion,
	CAST([ClientIp] as varchar(15)) as [IP],
	SessionId AS SessionIdentifier,
	GatewayAppId
	from [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData] LH with (NOLOCK)
	left join
	(
	Select CID, SessionIdentifier as SessionIdentifierFirst, EnvironmentDetails as EnvironmentDetailsFirst,ApplicationIdentifierFrom as ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst
	from
	(
	SELECT
	RealCid as CID,
	CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	SessionId AS SessionIdentifier,
	UserAgent as EnvironmentDetails,ApplicationIdentifier AS  ApplicationIdentifierFrom ,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCid,SessionId  ORDER BY CreatedAt) rn
	from [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData] with (NOLOCK)
	where CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) >= dateadd(day,datediff(day,7,@Yesterday ),0) and  CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) <= @CurrentDate
	AND LoginTypeName = 'Login'
	) a
	WHERE rn = 1
	) LHS on LH.RealCid = LHS.CID and LH.SessionId = LHS.SessionIdentifierFirst
	where CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) >= dateadd(day,datediff(day,7,@Yesterday ),0) and  CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) <= @CurrentDate
	AND LHS.SessionIdentifierFirst is not NULL
	AND LoginTypeName = 'Login'
	) a
	) b
	WHERE CAST(LoggedIn as datetime) >= @Yesterday 
	AND CAST(LoggedIn as datetime) < @CurrentDate
	and  [CID]  <>0

-- Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position -------------------------------------

--SSIS flow use derived columns. one column adds as a new columns and
-- assigned with Null as default value. second column is IsSettled, intended
-- to replace the origin by casting it to four-byte signed integer.
	
-- Here using INSERT INTO command, any column that is not specified assigned with her
--default value. the second problem solved by staging table that contain
--the relevant field.
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position
	(	
	   [PositionID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[CurrencyID]
      ,[ProviderID]
      ,[InstrumentID]
      ,[HedgeID]
      ,[HedgeServerID]
      ,[Leverage]
      ,[Amount]
      ,[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
      ,[UnitMargin]
      ,[InitForexRate]
      ,[NetProfit]
      ,[SpreadedPipBid]
      ,[SpreadedPipAsk]
      ,[IsBuy]
      ,[CloseOnEndOfWeek]
      ,[EndOfWeekFee]
      ,[Commission]
      ,[CommissionOnClose]
      ,[OpenOccurred]
      ,[CloseOccurred]
      ,[ParentPositionID]
      ,[OrigParentPositionID]
      ,[MirrorID]
      ,[IsOpenOpen]
      ,[FullCommission]
      ,[FullCommissionOnClose]
      ,[RedeemStatus]
      ,[RedeemID]
      ,[ReopenForPositionID]
      ,[IsReOpen]
      ,[CommissionOnCloseOrig]
      ,[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig]
      ,[InitialUnits]
      ,[IsSettled]
      ,[IsDiscounted]
      ,[CommissionByUnits]
      ,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	  ,[SettlementTypeID]
	)

	SELECT
	PositionID,
	CID,
	CurrencyID,
	ProviderID,
	a.InstrumentID,
	HedgeID,
	HedgeServerID,
	Leverage,
	ISNULL(Amount,0)  AS Amount,
	AmountInUnitsDecimal,
	UnitMargin,
	InitForexRate,
	0 AS NetProfit, 
	SpreadedPipBid,
	SpreadedPipAsk,
	IsBuy,
	ISNULL(CloseOnEndOfWeek, 0) as CloseOnEndOfWeek,
	EndOfWeekFee,
	Commission,
	0 AS CommissionOnClose,
	Occurred AS OpenOccurred,
	CAST(0 AS DATETIME) AS CloseOccurred,
	ParentPositionID,
	OrigParentPositionID,
	MirrorID,
	IsOpenOpen,
	ISNULL([FullCommission],0.00) AS FullCommission,
	0.00 AS FullCommissionOnClose,
	RedeemStatus,
	NULL as RedeemID,
	ReopenForPositionID,
	CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN 1 END AS IsReOpen,
	0.00 AS CommissionOnCloseOrig,
	0.00 AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
	, InitialUnits
	,CASE 
	WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  
	WHEN IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 AND b.InstrumentTypeID IN (10,5,6) THEN 1 
	ELSE 0 
	END AS IsSettled
	,IsDiscounted
	,[CommissionByUnits]
	,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	,SettlementTypeID
	FROM
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] a WITH (NOLOCK)
	left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
	on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
	WHERE Occurred>= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday)  and Occurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@CurrentDate),0)

	
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Position -------------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position
	([PositionID], 
	[CID], 
	[CurrencyID], 
	[ProviderID], 
	[InstrumentID], 
	[HedgeID], 
	[HedgeServerID], 
	[Leverage],
	[Amount], 
	[AmountInUnitsDecimal], 
	[UnitMargin], 
	[InitForexRate], 
	[NetProfit], 
	[SpreadedPipBid], 
	[SpreadedPipAsk], 
	[IsBuy], 
	[CloseOnEndOfWeek], 
	[EndOfWeekFee], 
	[Commission], 
	[CommissionOnClose], 
	[OpenOccurred], 
	[CloseOccurred], 
	[ParentPositionID], 
	[OrigParentPositionID],
	[MirrorID], 
	[IsOpenOpen], 
	[FullCommission],
	[FullCommissionOnClose], 
	[RedeemStatus], 
	[RedeemID], 
	[ReopenForPositionID], 
	[IsReOpen], 
	[CommissionOnCloseOrig], 
	[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig], 
	[OriginalPositionID],
	[IsSettled], 
	[InitialUnits], 
	[IsDiscounted], 
	[CommissionByUnits], 
	[FullCommissionByUnits],
	[SettlementTypeID])

		SELECT 
		PositionID,
		CID,
		CurrencyID,
		ProviderID,
		a.InstrumentID,
		HedgeID,
		HedgeServerID,
		Leverage,
		isnull(Amount,0) as Amount,
		AmountInUnitsDecimal,
		UnitMargin,
		InitForexRate,
		NetProfit,
		SpreadedPipBid,
		SpreadedPipAsk,
		IsBuy,
		CloseOnEndOfWeek,
		EndOfWeekFee,
		Commission,
		CommissionOnClose,
		OpenOccurred,
		CloseOccurred,
		isnull([ParentPositionID],0) AS ParentPositionID,
		OrigParentPositionID,
		MirrorID,
		IsOpenOpen,
		ISNULL([FullCommission],0.00) AS FullCommission,
		ISNULL([FullCommissionOnClose],0.00) AS FullCommissionOnClose
		                   ,RedeemStatus
		                   , RedeemID
		,ReopenForPositionID
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS IsReOpen
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN CommissionOnClose END AS CommissionOnCloseOrig
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN FullCommissionOnClose END AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		,OriginalPositionID
	
		,CASE WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  WHEN IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 and b.InstrumentTypeID in (10,5,6) THEN 1 else 0  END AS IsSettled
		,InitialUnits
		,IsDiscounted
		,[CommissionByUnits]
		,[FullCommissionByUnits]
		,SettlementTypeID
		FROM
		[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay] a WITH (NOLOCK) 
		left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
		ON a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
		WHERE 
		(OpenOccurred>=DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday)  and OpenOccurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0))
		OR (CloseOccurred>= @Yesterday  and CloseOccurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0))  --OPTION	(RECOMPILE)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction -----------------------

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction


	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction
	([CID], [Occurred], [Credit], [Payment], [TotalCashChange], [CreditTypeID], [CashoutID], [CampaignID], [PositionID], 
	[DepositID], [WithdrawID], [PaymentID], [BonusTypeID], [MirrorID], [CompensationReasonID], [WithdrawPaymentID], 
	[BonusCredit], [CreditID], [Description], [MoveMoneyReasonID])

--[MirrorDividendID]--[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	SELECT 
	  CID,
		Occurred,
		Credit,
		Payment,
		TotalCashChange,
		CreditTypeID,
		CashoutID,
		CampaignID,
		PositionID,
		DepositID,
		WithdrawID,
		PaymentID,
		BonusTypeID,
		MirrorID,
		CompensationReasonID,
		WithdrawProcessingID,
		BonusCredit,
		CreditID
		,Description
		,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Credit] with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawProcessingID IS NULL AND (Occurred>= @Yesterday and Occurred< @CurrentDate)
	UNION 
	SELECT CID,
		MIN(Occurred) as Occurred,
		Credit,
		Payment,
		TotalCashChange,
		CreditTypeID,
		CashoutID,
		CampaignID,
		PositionID,
		DepositID,
		WithdrawID,
		PaymentID,
		BonusTypeID,
		MirrorID,
		CompensationReasonID,
		WithdrawProcessingID,
		BonusCredit,
		MIN(CreditID) as CreditID
		,Description
		,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Credit] WITH (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawProcessingID IS NOT NULL AND(Occurred>= @Yesterday and Occurred < @CurrentDate)
	GROUP BY CID,
			Credit,
			Payment,
			TotalCashChange,
			CreditTypeID,
			CashoutID,
			CampaignID,
			PositionID,
			DepositID,
			WithdrawID,
			PaymentID,
			BonusTypeID,
			MirrorID,
			CompensationReasonID,
			WithdrawProcessingID,
			BonusCredit
			,Description
			,[MoveMoneyReasonID]

-- Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw -----------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw
	([WithdrawID],
	[CID], 
	[CashoutStatusID], 
	[Amount], 
	[IPAddress],
[ModificationDate], 
	[FundingTypeID], 
	[Fee])
	SELECT 	
	   [WithdrawID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[CashoutStatusID]
      ,[Amount]
     ,CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15)) [IPAddress]
      ,[ModificationDate]
      ,[FundingTypeID]
      ,[Fee]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw]


--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw ----------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw
	(
	 [WithdrawID] 
	 ,[CID] 
	 ,[Amount] 
	 ,[IPAddress] 
	 ,[ModificationDate] 
	 ,[Fee] 
	 ,[FundingTypeID]
	)
	SELECT
	 isnull(a.WithdrawID, 0) as WithdrawID
	 ,  CID
	 , ISNULL(Amount,0) as Amount
	 , CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15)) [IPAddress]
	 , ModificationDate
	 ,Fee /*We Bring the CO fee only on Requset and processed CO in order to be able to calculate Unrealized fee*/
	, FundingTypeID
	FROM
	(
		SELECT Distinct [WithdrawID]
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_WithdrawAction] WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE
			ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
			AND
			ModificationDate < @CurrentDate
			AND 
			CashoutStatusID=3 
			AND WithdrawID NOT IN
			(
				SELECT WithdrawID AS WithdrawID_ModificationDateMin
				From
				(
					SELECT WithdrawID, min(ModificationDate) AS ModificationDateMin
					FROM
						[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_WithdrawAction] WITH (NOLOCK)
					WHERE
						ModificationDate < @Yesterday
						and
						CashoutStatusID=3
					group by WithdrawID
				) a
			)
	)  a
	join  
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw] b  WITH (NOLOCK)
	on
	a.WithdrawID=b.WithdrawID -- OPTION	(RECOMPILE)

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding
	(

     , [IPAddress]
	 , [ModificationDate]

-- Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog ---------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog
	(
	  [PositionID] 
	 ,[CID] 
	 ,[Occurred] 
	 ,[IsSettled]
	 ,[PreviousIsSettled]
	)
	SELECT 
	PositionID,
	CID,
	Occurred,
	CAST(IsSettled AS INT) IsSettled,
	CAST(PreviousIsSettled AS INT) PreviousIsSettled
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
		pl.PositionID
		,pl.CID
		,Occurred
		,pl.IsSettled
		,pl.PreviousIsSettled
		, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pl.PositionID ORDER BY pl.Occurred ) rn
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] pl WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE Occurred > @Yesterday
		---and isnull(pl.IsSettled,-1) <> isnull(pl.PreviousIsSettled,-1)
		and pl.IsSettled <> pl.PreviousIsSettled
	) a
	WHERE rn =1
