TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement]
           ([EngagementType]
           ,[Occurred]
           ,[UserName]
           ,[PostRootID]
           ,[ApplicationName]
           ,[UserNameCalc])
SELECT TypeName
     , OccurredAt
     , Username
     , RootId
     , ApplicationName 
     , Lower(Right(Username,Len(Username)-1)) as UserNameCalc
From [DWH_staging].[Streams0_dbo_Entries] With (Nolock)
Where TypeName In ('Like', 'Comment', 'Discussion')
And OccurredAt >= @Yesterday
And OccurredAt < @CurrentDate


-- Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit -----------------------------------------

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit
	(
	 [DepositID] 
	,[ModificationDate] 
	,[IPAddress] 
	,[FundingTypeID] 
	,[SessionID] 
	,[IsFTD]
	,[PaymentStatusID]
	)
	SELECT
		DepositID
		,ModificationDate
		,CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15))IPAddress
		, FundingTypeID
		,isnull(SessionID,0) AS SessionID
		, CASE 
			WHEN IsFTD IN (1,0) then cast(IsFTD AS INT)  
		  END AS IsFTD
		,PaymentStatusID
		
	FROM  [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Deposit] bd
			JOIN [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Funding] bf
			ON bd.FundingID = bf.FundingID
	WHERE 		
	bd.ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
	AND
	bd.ModificationDate < @CurrentDate
	AND bd.PaymentStatusID in ( 2,11)

-- Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session ------------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session
	(
	  MirrorID
	  ,SessionID
	  ,Occurred
	)
	SELECT  MirrorID, SessionID, Occurred
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Mirror]
	WHERE
	Occurred >= @Yesterday
	AND
	Occurred < @CurrentDate
	AND MirrorOperationID = 1 -- = register mirror

-- Ext_FCA_Position_Session ----------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Position_Session
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Position_Session
	(
	  PositionID
	 ,SessionID
	 ,Occurred
	)
	SELECT PositionID, SessionID,Occurred
	FROM
	(
		SELECT PositionID, ISNULL(SessionID,-1) as SessionID,Occurred,max(PositionChangeID) as MaxPositionChangeID
		--SELECT PositionID, SessionID,Occurred,max(PositionChangeID) as MaxPositionChangeID
		--FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog_Active]
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog]
		Where ChangeTypeID = 0
		AND Occurred >= @Yesterday
		AND
		Occurred < @CurrentDate
		GROUP BY PositionID, SessionID,Occurred
	) a

-- Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14 -----------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14
	(
	  SessionID
	 ,[PlatformID]
	 ,DateID
	)
	SELECT SessionID, [PlatformID],DateID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CustomerAction]
	WHERE ActionTypeID = 14 
	--and [DateID] between  cast(dateadd(day,datediff(day,-30,@Yesterday),0) as int)
	--and cast(@Yesterday as int)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- SP_Fact_CustomerAction ------------------------------------------
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_CustomerAction @Yesterday
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- SP_Fact_CustomerAction_Create_SWITCH_SINGLE ---------------------
	-- EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_CustomerAction_Create_SWITCH_SINGLE @dt 

		
   DECLARE @DateID INT 
  SET @DateID =  CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), @dt,112)

	DELETE FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction WHERE DateID = @DateID
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Insert to Fact_CustomerAction_Create_SWITCH_SINGLE --------------
	--INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH_SINGLE
	--INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction



	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
	(
	  [HistoryID]
	 ,[GCID] 
	 ,[RealCID] 
	 ,[DemoCID] 
	 ,[Occurred]
	 ,[IPNumber]
	 ,[IsReal] 
	 ,[ActionTypeID]  
	 ,[PlatformTypeID]
	 ,[InstrumentID] 
	 ,[Amount] 
 	 ,[Leverage]  
	 ,[NetProfit] 
	 ,[Commission]
	 ,[PositionID]
	 ,[CampaignID]
	 ,[BonusTypeID]  
	 ,[FundingTypeID]
	 ,[LoginID] 
	 ,[MirrorID]
	 ,[WithdrawID] 
	 ,[DurationInSeconds] 
	 ,[PostID] 
	 ,[CaseID] 
	 ,[UpdateDate] 
	 ,[DateID]  
	 ,[TimeID]  
	 ,[StatusID]
	 ,[PreviousOccurred]    
	 ,[CompensationReasonID]
	 ,[WithdrawPaymentID]
	 ,[CommissionOnClose]
	 ,[IsPlug]   
	 ,[DepositID]
	 ,[PostRootID]
	 ,[FullCommission]
	 ,[FullCommissionOnClose] 
	 ,[RedeemID] 
	 ,[RedeemStatus]
	 ,[SessionID]
	 ,[IsRedeem] 
	 ,[RegulationIDOnOpen] 
	 ,[PlatformID] 
	 ,[ReopenForPositionID] 
	 ,[IsReOpen] 
	 ,[CommissionOnCloseOrig] 
	 ,[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig] 
	 ,[OriginalPositionID] 
	 ,[IsPartialCloseParent]
	 ,[IsPartialCloseChild] 
	 ,[InitialUnits]   
	 ,[PaymentStatusID]
	 ,[IsDiscounted] 
	 ,[IsSettled] 
	 ,[CommissionByUnits]    
	 ,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	 ,[IsFTD]		 
	 ,[CountryIDByIP]
	 ,[IsAnonymousIP]
	 ,[ProxyType] 
	 ,[IsFeeDividend] 
	 ,[IsAirDrop] 
	 ,[DividendID]
	 ,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	 ,[SettlementTypeID]
	)
	SELECT 
	     HistoryID
		 ,GCID
		 , RealCID
		 , DemoCID
		 , Occurred
		 , ISNULL(IPNumber,0) AS IPNumber
		 , IsReal
		 , ActionTypeID
		 , PlatformTypeID
		 , ISNULL(InstrumentID,0) AS InstrumentID
		 , ISNULL(Amount,0) AS Amount
		 , ISNULL(Leverage,0) AS Leverage
		 , ISNULL(NetProfit,0) AS NetProfit
		 , ISNULL(Commission,0) AS Commission
		 , ISNULL(PositionID,0) AS PositionID
		 , ISNULL(CampaignID,0) AS CampaignID
		 , ISNULL(BonusTypeID,0) AS BonusTypeID
		 , ISNULL(FundingTypeID,0) AS FundingTypeID
		 , ISNULL(LoginID,0) AS LoginID
		 , ISNULL(MirrorID,0) AS MirrorID
		 , ISNULL(WithdrawID,0) AS WithdrawID
		 , ISNULL(DurationInSeconds,0) as DurationInSeconds
		 , NULL AS PostID
		 , ISNULL(CaseID,0) as CaseID
		 , getdate() as UpdateDate
		 , DateID
		 , TimeID
		 , StatusID
		 , PreviousOccurred
		 , ISNULL(CompensationReasonID,0) AS CompensationReasonID
		 , ISNULL(WithdrawPaymentID,0) as WithdrawPaymentID
		 , ISNULL(CommissionOnClose,0) AS CommissionOnClose
		 , NULL AS IsPlug
		 , DepositID
		 , PostRootID
		 , FullCommission
		 , FullCommissionOnClose
		 , RedeemID
		 , RedeemStatus
		 , SessionID
		 , IsRedeem
		 , RegulationIDOnOpen
         , PlatformID
		,ReopenForPositionID
		,IsReOpen
		,CommissionOnCloseOrig
		,FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		,OriginalPositionID
		, NULL AS IsPartialCloseParent
		,IsPartialCloseChild
		,InitialUnits
		,PaymentStatusID
		,IsDiscounted
		,IsSettled
		,CommissionByUnits
		,FullCommissionByUnits
		, IsFTD
		, CountryIDByIP
		,IsAnonymousIP 
		,ProxyType
		,IsFeeDividend
		, IsAirDrop
		, DividendID
		,MoveMoneyReasonID
		,SettlementTypeID
		--,NULL AS NULL_1
		--,NULL AS NULL_2
		 		FROM
				[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
				WHERE 
				ActionTypeID is not null
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- SP_Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH -----------------------------------
--	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- SP_Fact_CustomerAction_IsParitalCloseParent ---------------------
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_CustomerAction_IsParitalCloseParent

	--SET

SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse_bkp:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse_bkp_2024_08_04] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN


-- =============================================
-- Author:      <Re'em Cohen>
-- Create Date: 2021-08-01
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse] '2024-01-23'
-- =============================================
/**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2022-02-03		Inbal BML	   Add SettlementTypeID 
 2024-01-07	    Inbal BML	   change [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] and [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay]
 2024-05-01     Boris P  Partiton [STS_Audit_UserOperationsData]
*********************************************************************************************/
   -- exec [SP_Fact_CustomerAction] '2019-03-18'
  --DECLARE @dt as DATE = cAST(GETDATE()-1 AS DATE)
  --'2021-07-01'
  DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME
  DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME

  SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
  SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);
  
-- Check Exist Partition Fact_CustomerAction -----------------------
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_CustomerAction_CheckExistPartition @Yesterday

	
-------------------------------------------
-- SELECT Parameter Run Ind - Fact_CustomerAction ------------------
	--SELECT [IndRun]
	--FROM [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd](nolock)
	--where [TableName] = 'Fact_CustomerAction'
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Customer ------------------------------------------------

	
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer
 
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer 
	(		
	  [CID] 
	 ,[GCID]
	 ,[UserName]  
	 ,[UserNameCalc]
	)
	SELECT
	   [CID]
	  ,[GCID]
	  ,[UserName]
	,Lower(UserName) as UserNameCalc
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Customer_CustomerStatic]
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin ---------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin
	([LoginID]
           ,[CID]
           ,[LoggedIn]
           ,[LoggedOut]
           ,[ClientVersion]
           ,[IP]
           ,[SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID])
	SELECT 
	LoginID, 
	CID, 
	LoggedIn,
	0 AS LoggedOut, 
	ClientVersion, 
	IP,
	SessionIdentifier as SessionID ,--Browser,ApplicationIdentifierAgg,
	CASE
	---- Wallet
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =2  then 118
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =2  then 119
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =2 then 120
	---- EtoroX
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =4  then 121
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =4  then 122
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =4 then 123
	---- Delta 
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =8  then 124
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =8  then 125
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =8 then 126
	---- Etoro
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 101
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 102
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 103
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 104
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoroandroid' then 105
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 106
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletandroid' then 118

	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 107
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 108
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 109 
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 110
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoroios' then 111
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 112
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletios' then 119

	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 113
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 114
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 115
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 116 
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 117
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletweb' then 120
	else 99 end as PlatformID
	from
	(
	select cast(a.LoggedIn as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	---case when Browser = 'Browsers' then 'Web' else 'Mobile' end as 'Web/Mobile',
	Browser,
	CASE
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoro','ReToro') then 'retoro'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'retoro, retoro' then 'retoro'
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoroios','ReToroIOS') then 'retoroios'
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoroandroid','ReToroAndroid') then 'retoroandroid'

	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoro') then 'retoro'
	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoroios') then 'retoroios'
	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoroandroid') then 'retoroandroid'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidretoro' then 'retoroandroid'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidetoro' then 'retoroandroid'
	when ApplicationIdentifier in ('registrationapi','registrationservice') then 'registrationapi'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletweb' then 'retoro'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletios' then 'retoroios'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletandroid' then 'retoroandroid'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'iostrader' then 'trader'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidtrader' then 'trader'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'webtrader' then 'trader'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'iosopenbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidopenbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'openbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'openbook_news_publisher' then 'openbook'
	else 'other' END AS ApplicationIdentifierAgg
	,LoginID
	,CID
	,LoggedOut
	,ClientVersion
	,[IP]
	,SessionIdentifier
	,GatewayAppId
	from
	(
	SELECT ApplicationIdentifier as ApplicationIdentifier
	,0 as LoginID
	,EnvironmentDetailsFirst
	,ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst
	,RealCid as CID,
	CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	CASE
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '{"useragent":null}' and ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst = 'retoroandroid' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '{"useragent":null}' and ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst = 'retoroios' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%android%' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%iphone%' or lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%ipad%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%android%' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%retoroios%' THEN 'iOS'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%iostrader%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%androidtrader%' THEN 'Android'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%iosopenbook%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%androidopenbook%' THEN 'Android'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%walletios%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%walletandroid%' THEN 'Android'

	ELSE 'Browsers'
	END as Browser,
	0 as LoggedOut,
	CASE ApplicationIdentifier
	 WHEN 'webtrader' THEN 2
	 WHEN 'iostrader' THEN 8
	 WHEN 'androidtrader' THEN 6
	 WHEN 'androidopenbook' THEN 5
	 WHEN 'iosopenbook' THEN 7
	 WHEN 'openbook' THEN 1
	 ELSE 99
	 END ClientVersion,
	CAST([ClientIp] as varchar(15)) as [IP],
	SessionId AS SessionIdentifier,
	GatewayAppId
	from [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData] LH with (NOLOCK)
	left join
	(
	Select CID, SessionIdentifier as SessionIdentifierFirst, EnvironmentDetails as EnvironmentDetailsFirst,ApplicationIdentifierFrom as ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst
	from
	(
	SELECT
	RealCid as CID,
	CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	SessionId AS SessionIdentifier,
	UserAgent as EnvironmentDetails,ApplicationIdentifier AS  ApplicationIdentifierFrom ,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCid,SessionId  ORDER BY CreatedAt) rn
	from [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData] with (NOLOCK)
	where CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) >= dateadd(day,datediff(day,7,@Yesterday ),0) and  CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) <= @CurrentDate
	AND LoginTypeName = 'Login'
	) a
	WHERE rn = 1
	) LHS on LH.RealCid = LHS.CID and LH.SessionId = LHS.SessionIdentifierFirst
	where CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) >= dateadd(day,datediff(day,7,@Yesterday ),0) and  CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) <= @CurrentDate
	AND LHS.SessionIdentifierFirst is not NULL
	AND LoginTypeName = 'Login'
	) a
	) b
	WHERE CAST(LoggedIn as datetime) >= @Yesterday 
	AND CAST(LoggedIn as datetime) < @CurrentDate
	and  [CID]  <>0
--------------------------------------------------------------------


--DELETE FROM DWH_dbo.STS_User_Operations_Data_History
--WHERE [DateID] =  convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,@Yesterday),0),112)) 


EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_STS_User_Operations_Data_History_CREATE_SWITCH_SINGLE] @dt 

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[STS_User_Operations_Data_History_SWITCH_SINGLE] (
    [Gcid] ,
    [RealCid] ,
    [DemoCid] ,
    [ApplicationIdentifier] ,
    [ApplicationVersion] ,
    [ClientIp] ,
    [ClientName] ,
    [CreatedAt] ,
    [UserAgent] ,
    [AccessTokenHashed] ,
   [ClientDeviceId] ,
    [ParentSessionId] ,
    [AccountTypeName] ,
    [LoginTypeName] ,
    [SessionId] ,
    [GatewayAppId] ,
	[ProxyType] ,
	[CountryISOCode],
	[AdditionalData],
	[DateID],
	[UpdateDate]
	)
SELECT 
    [Gcid] ,
    [RealCid] ,
    [DemoCid] ,
    [ApplicationIdentifier] ,
    [ApplicationVersion] ,
    [ClientIp] ,
    [ClientName] ,
    [CreatedAt] ,
    [UserAgent] ,
    [AccessTokenHashed] ,
    [ClientDeviceId],
    [ParentSessionId] ,
    [AccountTypeName] ,
    [LoginTypeName] ,
    [SessionId] ,
    [GatewayAppId] ,
	[ProxyType] ,
	[CountryISOCode],
	[AdditionalData],
    convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,@Yesterday),0),112))  ,
    GETDATE()
FROM [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData]  (nolock)
WHERE [CreatedAt] >= @Yesterday AND [CreatedAt] < @CurrentDate


EXEC  [DWH_dbo].[SP_STS_User_Operations_Data_History_SWITCH]


-- Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Loggin -------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Loggin

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Loggin
	SELECT
	LoginID,
	CID,
	LoggedIn,
	LoggedOut,
	IP
	FROM
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Login] with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE LoggedIn >= @Yesterday AND  LoggedIn <  @CurrentDate

		

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration ------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration
	(
	 [CID]
	 ,[Registered]
	 ,[IsReal] 
	 ,[ActionTypeID] 
	 ,[PlatformTypeID]
	 ,[DateID] 
	 ,[TimeID] 
	 ,[FunnelID]  
	 ,[IP] 
	 ,[CountryIDByIP] 
	 ,[PlatformID]
	)
	SELECT DISTINCT 
	[CID],
	[Registered],
	cast([IsReal] as tinyint) as [IsReal],
	41 as [ActionTypeID],
	99 as [PlatformTypeID],
	convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, [Registered], 112)) as [DateID],
	datepart (HOUR, [Registered]) as [TimeID],FunnelID
	,[IP]
	,[CountryIDByIP]
	,NULL as NULL_column
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Customer_CustomerStatic] with(nolock)
	WHERE Registered>= @Yesterday AND Registered< @CurrentDate 

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position -------------------------------------

--SSIS flow use derived columns. one column adds as a new columns and
-- assigned with Null as default value. second column is IsSettled, intended
-- to replace the origin by casting it to four-byte signed integer.
	
-- Here using INSERT INTO command, any column that is not specified assigned with her
--default value. the second problem solved by staging table that contain
--the relevant field.
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position
	(	
	   [PositionID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[CurrencyID]
      ,[ProviderID]
      ,[InstrumentID]
      ,[HedgeID]
      ,[HedgeServerID]
      ,[Leverage]
      ,[Amount]
      ,[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
      ,[UnitMargin]
      ,[InitForexRate]
      ,[NetProfit]
      ,[SpreadedPipBid]
      ,[SpreadedPipAsk]
      ,[IsBuy]
      ,[CloseOnEndOfWeek]
      ,[EndOfWeekFee]
      ,[Commission]
      ,[CommissionOnClose]
      ,[OpenOccurred]
      ,[CloseOccurred]
      ,[ParentPositionID]
      ,[OrigParentPositionID]
      ,[MirrorID]
      ,[IsOpenOpen]
      ,[FullCommission]
      ,[FullCommissionOnClose]
      ,[RedeemStatus]
      ,[RedeemID]
      ,[ReopenForPositionID]
      ,[IsReOpen]
      ,[CommissionOnCloseOrig]
      ,[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig]
      ,[InitialUnits]
      ,[IsSettled]
      ,[IsDiscounted]
      ,[CommissionByUnits]
      ,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	  ,[SettlementTypeID]
	)

	SELECT
	PositionID,
	CID,
	CurrencyID,
	ProviderID,
	a.InstrumentID,
	HedgeID,
	HedgeServerID,
	Leverage,
	ISNULL(Amount,0)  AS Amount,
	AmountInUnitsDecimal,
	UnitMargin,
	InitForexRate,
	0 AS NetProfit, 
	SpreadedPipBid,
	SpreadedPipAsk,
	IsBuy,
	ISNULL(CloseOnEndOfWeek, 0) as CloseOnEndOfWeek,
	EndOfWeekFee,
	Commission,
	0 AS CommissionOnClose,
	Occurred AS OpenOccurred,
	CAST(0 AS DATETIME) AS CloseOccurred,
	ParentPositionID,
	OrigParentPositionID,
	MirrorID,
	IsOpenOpen,
	ISNULL([FullCommission],0.00) AS FullCommission,
	0.00 AS FullCommissionOnClose,
	RedeemStatus,
	NULL as RedeemID,
	ReopenForPositionID,
	CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN 1 END AS IsReOpen,
	0.00 AS CommissionOnCloseOrig,
	0.00 AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
	, InitialUnits
	,CASE 
	WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  
	WHEN IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 AND b.InstrumentTypeID IN (10,5,6) THEN 1 
	ELSE 0 
	END AS IsSettled
	,IsDiscounted
	,[CommissionByUnits]
	,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	,SettlementTypeID
	FROM
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] a WITH (NOLOCK)
	left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
	on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
	WHERE Occurred>= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday)  and Occurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@CurrentDate),0)

	
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Position -------------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position
	([PositionID], 
	[CID], 
	[CurrencyID], 
	[ProviderID], 
	[InstrumentID], 
	[HedgeID], 
	[HedgeServerID], 
	[Leverage],
	[Amount], 
	[AmountInUnitsDecimal], 
	[UnitMargin], 
	[InitForexRate], 
	[NetProfit], 
	[SpreadedPipBid], 
	[SpreadedPipAsk], 
	[IsBuy], 
	[CloseOnEndOfWeek], 
	[EndOfWeekFee], 
	[Commission], 
	[CommissionOnClose], 
	[OpenOccurred], 
	[CloseOccurred], 
	[ParentPositionID], 
	[OrigParentPositionID],
	[MirrorID], 
	[IsOpenOpen], 
	[FullCommission],
	[FullCommissionOnClose], 
	[RedeemStatus], 
	[RedeemID], 
	[ReopenForPositionID], 
	[IsReOpen], 
	[CommissionOnCloseOrig], 
	[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig], 
	[OriginalPositionID],
	[IsSettled], 
	[InitialUnits], 
	[IsDiscounted], 
	[CommissionByUnits], 
	[FullCommissionByUnits],
	[SettlementTypeID])

		SELECT 
		PositionID,
		CID,
		CurrencyID,
		ProviderID,
		a.InstrumentID,
		HedgeID,
		HedgeServerID,
		Leverage,
		isnull(Amount,0) as Amount,
		AmountInUnitsDecimal,
		UnitMargin,
		InitForexRate,
		NetProfit,
		SpreadedPipBid,
		SpreadedPipAsk,
		IsBuy,
		CloseOnEndOfWeek,
		EndOfWeekFee,
		Commission,
		CommissionOnClose,
		OpenOccurred,
		CloseOccurred,
		isnull([ParentPositionID],0) AS ParentPositionID,
		OrigParentPositionID,
		MirrorID,
		IsOpenOpen,
		ISNULL([FullCommission],0.00) AS FullCommission,
		ISNULL([FullCommissionOnClose],0.00) AS FullCommissionOnClose
		                   ,RedeemStatus
		                   , RedeemID
		,ReopenForPositionID
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS IsReOpen
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN CommissionOnClose END AS CommissionOnCloseOrig
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN FullCommissionOnClose END AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		,OriginalPositionID
	
		,CASE WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  WHEN IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 and b.InstrumentTypeID in (10,5,6) THEN 1 else 0  END AS IsSettled
		,InitialUnits
		,IsDiscounted
		,[CommissionByUnits]
		,[FullCommissionByUnits]
		,SettlementTypeID
		FROM
		[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay] a WITH (NOLOCK) 
		left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
		ON a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
		WHERE 
		(OpenOccurred>=DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday)  and OpenOccurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0))
		OR (CloseOccurred>= @Yesterday  and CloseOccurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0))  --OPTION	(RECOMPILE)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction -----------------------

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction


	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction
	([CID], [Occurred], [Credit], [Payment], [TotalCashChange], [CreditTypeID], [CashoutID], [CampaignID], [PositionID], 
	[DepositID], [WithdrawID], [PaymentID], [BonusTypeID], [MirrorID], [CompensationReasonID], [WithdrawPaymentID], 
	[BonusCredit], [CreditID], [Description], [MoveMoneyReasonID])

--[MirrorDividendID]--[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	SELECT 
	  CID,
		Occurred,
		Credit,
		Payment,
		TotalCashChange,
		CreditTypeID,
		CashoutID,
		CampaignID,
		PositionID,
		DepositID,
		WithdrawID,
		PaymentID,
		BonusTypeID,
		MirrorID,
		CompensationReasonID,
		WithdrawProcessingID,
		BonusCredit,
		CreditID
		,Description
		,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Credit] with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawProcessingID IS NULL AND (Occurred>= @Yesterday and Occurred< @CurrentDate)
	UNION 
	SELECT CID,
		MIN(Occurred) as Occurred,
		Credit,
		Payment,
		TotalCashChange,
		CreditTypeID,
		CashoutID,
		CampaignID,
		PositionID,
		DepositID,
		WithdrawID,
		PaymentID,
		BonusTypeID,
		MirrorID,
		CompensationReasonID,
		WithdrawProcessingID,
		BonusCredit,
		MIN(CreditID) as CreditID
		,Description
		,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Credit] WITH (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawProcessingID IS NOT NULL AND(Occurred>= @Yesterday and Occurred < @CurrentDate)
	GROUP BY CID,
			Credit,
			Payment,
			TotalCashChange,
			CreditTypeID,
			CashoutID,
			CampaignID,
			PositionID,
			DepositID,
			WithdrawID,
			PaymentID,
			BonusTypeID,
			MirrorID,
			CompensationReasonID,
			WithdrawProcessingID,
			BonusCredit
			,Description
			,[MoveMoneyReasonID]



--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_BackOffice_Customer -------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_BackOffice_Customer
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_BackOffice_Customer
	SELECT 
	b.CID,
	b.VerificationLevelID,
	b.RiskStatusID,
	b.RiskClassificationID,
	--b.isEmployeeAccount,
	0 AS isEmployeeAccount,
	b.GuruStatusID,
	b.AccountTypeID,
	b.RegulationID,
	b.ManagerID,
	b.[ValidFrom] AS  Occurred
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] b WITH (nolock)
	WHERE 
	b.[ValidFrom]>= @Yesterday
	AND b.[ValidFrom]< @CurrentDate

-- Ext_FCA_PositionsProcessedForIndexDividnds ----------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionsProcessedForIndexDividnds
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionsProcessedForIndexDividnds
	(
	  [PositionID] 
	 ,[DividendID] 
	 ,[ProcessTime]
	 ,[DividendValueInCurrency]
	)
	SELECT a.PositionID,	a.DividendID,	a.ProcessTime, b.DividendValueInCurrency
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_PositionsProcessedForIndexDividnds] a
	join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_IndexDividends] b 
	ON a.DividendID=b.DividendID
	WHERE a.ProcessTime>= @Yesterday AND a.ProcessTime< @CurrentDate
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw -----------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw
	([WithdrawID],
	[CID], 
	[CashoutStatusID], 
	[Amount], 
	[IPAddress],
[ModificationDate], 
	[FundingTypeID], 
	[Fee])
	SELECT 	
	   [WithdrawID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[CashoutStatusID]
      ,[Amount]
     ,CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15)) [IPAddress]
      ,[ModificationDate]
      ,[FundingTypeID]
      ,[Fee]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw]


--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw ----------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw
	(
	 [WithdrawID] 
	 ,[CID] 
	 ,[Amount] 
	 ,[IPAddress] 
	 ,[ModificationDate] 
	 ,[Fee] 
	 ,[FundingTypeID]
	)
	SELECT
	 isnull(a.WithdrawID, 0) as WithdrawID
	 ,  CID
	 , ISNULL(Amount,0) as Amount
	 , CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15)) [IPAddress]
	 , ModificationDate
	 ,Fee /*We Bring the CO fee only on Requset and processed CO in order to be able to calculate Unrealized fee*/
	, FundingTypeID
	FROM
	(
		SELECT Distinct [WithdrawID]
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_WithdrawAction] WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE
			ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
			AND
			ModificationDate < @CurrentDate
			AND 
			CashoutStatusID=3 
			AND WithdrawID NOT IN
			(
				SELECT WithdrawID AS WithdrawID_ModificationDateMin
				From
				(
					SELECT WithdrawID, min(ModificationDate) AS ModificationDateMin
					FROM
						[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_WithdrawAction] WITH (NOLOCK)
					WHERE
						ModificationDate < @Yesterday
						and
						CashoutStatusID=3
					group by WithdrawID
				) a
			)
	)  a
	join  
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw] b  WITH (NOLOCK)
	on
	a.WithdrawID=b.WithdrawID -- OPTION	(RECOMPILE)


--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding ---------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding
	(
	  [WithdrawID]
	 ,[CID]
	 , [CashoutStatusID]
	 , [Amount]
     , [IPAddress]
	 , [ModificationDate]
	 , [FundingTypeID]
	 , [WithdrawPaymentID]
	 , [SessionID]
	 )
	SELECT 
		a.WithdrawID,
		CID,
		CashoutStatusID,
		Amount,
		CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15))IPAddress,
		ModificationDate,
		b.FundingTypeID,
		ID as [WithdrawPaymentID],
		SessionID
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_vWithdrawToFunding] a WITH (NOLOCK)
		JOIN (
		SELECT 
		CID,
		WithdrawID,
		IPAddress,
		FundingTypeID,
		SessionID
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw] WITH (NOLOCK)
	) b
	ON a.WithdrawID = b.WithdrawID

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog ---------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog
	(
	  [PositionID] 
	 ,[CID] 
	 ,[Occurred] 
	 ,[IsSettled]
	 ,[PreviousIsSettled]
	)
	SELECT 
	PositionID,
	CID,
	Occurred,
	CAST(IsSettled AS INT) IsSettled,
	CAST(PreviousIsSettled AS INT) PreviousIsSettled
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
		pl.PositionID
		,pl.CID
		,Occurred
		,pl.IsSettled
		,pl.PreviousIsSettled
		, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pl.PositionID ORDER BY pl.Occurred ) rn
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] pl WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE Occurred > @Yesterday
		---and isnull(pl.IsSettled,-1) <> isnull(pl.PreviousIsSettled,-1)
		and pl.IsSettled <> pl.PreviousIsSettled
	) a
	WHERE rn =1

-- Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit -----------------------------------------

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit
	(
	 [DepositID] 
	,[ModificationDate] 
	,[IPAddress] 
	,[FundingTypeID] 
	,[SessionID] 
	,[IsFTD]
	,[PaymentStatusID]
	)
	SELECT
		DepositID
		,ModificationDate
		,CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15))IPAddress
		, FundingTypeID
		,isnull(SessionID,0) AS SessionID
		, CASE 
			WHEN IsFTD IN (1,0) then cast(IsFTD AS INT)  
		  END AS IsFTD
		,PaymentStatusID
		
	FROM  [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Deposit] bd
			JOIN [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Funding] bf
			ON bd.FundingID = bf.FundingID
	WHERE 		
	bd.ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
	AND
	bd.ModificationDate < @CurrentDate
	AND bd.PaymentStatusID in ( 2,11)

CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse_bkp_2024_08_20] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN


-- =============================================
-- Author:      <Re'em Cohen>
-- Create Date: 2021-08-01
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse] '2024-01-23'
-- =============================================
/**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2022-02-03		Inbal BML	   Add SettlementTypeID 
 2024-01-07	    Inbal BML	   change [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] and [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay]
 2024-05-01     Boris P  Partiton [STS_Audit_UserOperationsData]
 2024-06-02     Ofir A         add DLT columns

*********************************************************************************************/
   -- exec [SP_Fact_CustomerAction] '2019-03-18'
  --DECLARE @dt as DATE = cAST(GETDATE()-1 AS DATE)
  --'2021-07-01'
  DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME
  DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME

  SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
  SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);
  
-- Check Exist Partition Fact_CustomerAction -----------------------
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_CustomerAction_CheckExistPartition @Yesterday

	
-------------------------------------------
-- SELECT Parameter Run Ind - Fact_CustomerAction ------------------
	--SELECT [IndRun]
	--FROM [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd](nolock)
	--where [TableName] = 'Fact_CustomerAction'
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Customer ------------------------------------------------

	
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer
 
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer 
	(		
	  [CID] 
	 ,[GCID]
	 ,[UserName]  
	 ,[UserNameCalc]
	)
	SELECT
	   [CID]
	  ,[GCID]
	  ,[UserName]
	,Lower(UserName) as UserNameCalc
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Customer_CustomerStatic]
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin ---------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin
	([LoginID]
           ,[CID]
           ,[LoggedIn]
           ,[LoggedOut]
           ,[ClientVersion]
           ,[IP]
           ,[SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID])
	SELECT 
	LoginID, 
	CID, 
	LoggedIn,
	0 AS LoggedOut, 
	ClientVersion, 
	IP,
	SessionIdentifier as SessionID ,--Browser,ApplicationIdentifierAgg,
	CASE
	---- Wallet
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =2  then 118
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =2  then 119
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =2 then 120
	---- EtoroX
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =4  then 121
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =4  then 122
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =4 then 123
	---- Delta 
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =8  then 124
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =8  then 125
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =8 then 126
	---- Etoro
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 101
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 102
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 103
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 104
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoroandroid' then 105
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 106
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletandroid' then 118

	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 107
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 108
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 109 
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 110
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoroios' then 111
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 112
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletios' then 119

	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 113
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 114
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 115
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 116 
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 117
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletweb' then 120
	else 99 end as PlatformID
	from
	(
	select cast(a.LoggedIn as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	---case when Browser = 'Browsers' then 'Web' else 'Mobile' end as 'Web/Mobile',
	Browser,
	CASE
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoro','ReToro') then 'retoro'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'retoro, retoro' then 'retoro'
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoroios','ReToroIOS') then 'retoroios'
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoroandroid','ReToroAndroid') then 'retoroandroid'

	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoro') then 'retoro'
	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoroios') then 'retoroios'
	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoroandroid') then 'retoroandroid'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidretoro' then 'retoroandroid'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidetoro' then 'retoroandroid'
	when ApplicationIdentifier in ('registrationapi','registrationservice') then 'registrationapi'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletweb' then 'retoro'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletios' then 'retoroios'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletandroid' then 'retoroandroid'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'iostrader' then 'trader'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidtrader' then 'trader'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'webtrader' then 'trader'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'iosopenbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidopenbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'openbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'openbook_news_publisher' then 'openbook'
	else 'other' END AS ApplicationIdentifierAgg
	,LoginID
	,CID
	,LoggedOut
	,ClientVersion
	,[IP]
	,SessionIdentifier
	,GatewayAppId
	from
	(
	SELECT ApplicationIdentifier as ApplicationIdentifier
	,0 as LoginID
	,EnvironmentDetailsFirst
	,ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst
	,RealCid as CID,
	CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	CASE
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '{"useragent":null}' and ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst = 'retoroandroid' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '{"useragent":null}' and ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst = 'retoroios' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%android%' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%iphone%' or lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%ipad%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%android%' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%retoroios%' THEN 'iOS'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%iostrader%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%androidtrader%' THEN 'Android'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%iosopenbook%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%androidopenbook%' THEN 'Android'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%walletios%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%walletandroid%' THEN 'Android'

	ELSE 'Browsers'
	END as Browser,
	0 as LoggedOut,
	CASE ApplicationIdentifier
	 WHEN 'webtrader' THEN 2
	 WHEN 'iostrader' THEN 8
	 WHEN 'androidtrader' THEN 6
	 WHEN 'androidopenbook' THEN 5
	 WHEN 'iosopenbook' THEN 7
	 WHEN 'openbook' THEN 1
	 ELSE 99
	 END ClientVersion,
	CAST([ClientIp] as varchar(15)) as [IP],
	SessionId AS SessionIdentifier,
	GatewayAppId
	from [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData] LH with (NOLOCK)
	left join
	(
	Select CID, SessionIdentifier as SessionIdentifierFirst, EnvironmentDetails as EnvironmentDetailsFirst,ApplicationIdentifierFrom as ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst
	from
	(
	SELECT
	RealCid as CID,
	CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	SessionId AS SessionIdentifier,
	UserAgent as EnvironmentDetails,ApplicationIdentifier AS  ApplicationIdentifierFrom ,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCid,SessionId  ORDER BY CreatedAt) rn
	from [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData] with (NOLOCK)
	where CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) >= dateadd(day,datediff(day,7,@Yesterday ),0) and  CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) <= @CurrentDate
	AND LoginTypeName = 'Login'
	) a
	WHERE rn = 1
	) LHS on LH.RealCid = LHS.CID and LH.SessionId = LHS.SessionIdentifierFirst
	where CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) >= dateadd(day,datediff(day,7,@Yesterday ),0) and  CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) <= @CurrentDate
	AND LHS.SessionIdentifierFirst is not NULL
	AND LoginTypeName = 'Login'
	) a
	) b
	WHERE CAST(LoggedIn as datetime) >= @Yesterday 
	AND CAST(LoggedIn as datetime) < @CurrentDate
	and  [CID]  <>0

-- Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position -------------------------------------

--SSIS flow use derived columns. one column adds as a new columns and
-- assigned with Null as default value. second column is IsSettled, intended
-- to replace the origin by casting it to four-byte signed integer.
	
-- Here using INSERT INTO command, any column that is not specified assigned with her
--default value. the second problem solved by staging table that contain
--the relevant field.
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position
	(	
	   [PositionID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[CurrencyID]
      ,[ProviderID]
      ,[InstrumentID]
      ,[HedgeID]
      ,[HedgeServerID]
      ,[Leverage]
      ,[Amount]
      ,[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
      ,[UnitMargin]
      ,[InitForexRate]
      ,[NetProfit]
      ,[SpreadedPipBid]
      ,[SpreadedPipAsk]
      ,[IsBuy]
      ,[CloseOnEndOfWeek]
      ,[EndOfWeekFee]
      ,[Commission]
      ,[CommissionOnClose]
      ,[OpenOccurred]
      ,[CloseOccurred]
      ,[ParentPositionID]
      ,[OrigParentPositionID]
      ,[MirrorID]
      ,[IsOpenOpen]
      ,[FullCommission]
      ,[FullCommissionOnClose]
      ,[RedeemStatus]
      ,[RedeemID]
      ,[ReopenForPositionID]
      ,[IsReOpen]
      ,[CommissionOnCloseOrig]
      ,[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig]
      ,[InitialUnits]
      ,[IsSettled]
      ,[IsDiscounted]
      ,[CommissionByUnits]
      ,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	  ,[SettlementTypeID]
	  -- Ofir DLT new columns
	  ,[DLTOpen]
      -- ,[DLTClose]
      ,[OpenMarkupByUnits]
	)

	SELECT
	PositionID,
	CID,
	CurrencyID,
	ProviderID,
	a.InstrumentID,
	HedgeID,
	HedgeServerID,
	Leverage,
	ISNULL(Amount,0)  AS Amount,
	AmountInUnitsDecimal,
	UnitMargin,
	InitForexRate,
	0 AS NetProfit, 
	SpreadedPipBid,
	SpreadedPipAsk,
	IsBuy,
	ISNULL(CloseOnEndOfWeek, 0) as CloseOnEndOfWeek,
	EndOfWeekFee,
	Commission,
	0 AS CommissionOnClose,
	Occurred AS OpenOccurred,
	CAST(0 AS DATETIME) AS CloseOccurred,
	ParentPositionID,
	OrigParentPositionID,
	MirrorID,
	IsOpenOpen,
	ISNULL([FullCommission],0.00) AS FullCommission,
	0.00 AS FullCommissionOnClose,
	RedeemStatus,
	NULL as RedeemID,
	ReopenForPositionID,
	CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN 1 END AS IsReOpen,
	0.00 AS CommissionOnCloseOrig,
	0.00 AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
	, InitialUnits
	,CASE 
	WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  
	WHEN IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 AND b.InstrumentTypeID IN (10,5,6) THEN 1 
	ELSE 0 
	END AS IsSettled
	,IsDiscounted
	,[CommissionByUnits]
	,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	,SettlementTypeID
	,[DLTOpen]
     -- ,[DLTClose]
    ,[OpenMarkupByUnits]
	FROM
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] a WITH (NOLOCK)
	left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
	on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
	WHERE Occurred>= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday)  and Occurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@CurrentDate),0)

-- Ext_FCA_Real_Position -------------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position
	([PositionID], 
	[CID], 
	[CurrencyID], 
	[ProviderID], 
	[InstrumentID], 
	[HedgeID], 
	[HedgeServerID], 
	[Leverage],
	[Amount], 
	[AmountInUnitsDecimal], 
	[UnitMargin], 
	[InitForexRate], 
	[NetProfit], 
	[SpreadedPipBid], 
	[SpreadedPipAsk], 
	[IsBuy], 
	[CloseOnEndOfWeek], 
	[EndOfWeekFee], 
	[Commission], 
	[CommissionOnClose], 
	[OpenOccurred], 
	[CloseOccurred], 
	[ParentPositionID], 
	[OrigParentPositionID],
	[MirrorID], 
	[IsOpenOpen], 
	[FullCommission],
	[FullCommissionOnClose], 
	[RedeemStatus], 
	[RedeemID], 
	[ReopenForPositionID], 
	[IsReOpen], 
	[CommissionOnCloseOrig], 
	[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig], 
	[OriginalPositionID],
	[IsSettled], 
	[InitialUnits], 
	[IsDiscounted], 
	[CommissionByUnits], 
	[FullCommissionByUnits],
	[SettlementTypeID],
	[DLTOpen],
    [DLTClose], 
    [OpenMarkupByUnits]
	)

		SELECT 
		PositionID,
		CID,
		CurrencyID,
		ProviderID,
		a.InstrumentID,
		HedgeID,
		HedgeServerID,
		Leverage,
		isnull(Amount,0) as Amount,
		AmountInUnitsDecimal,
		UnitMargin,
		InitForexRate,
		NetProfit,
		SpreadedPipBid,
		SpreadedPipAsk,
		IsBuy,
		CloseOnEndOfWeek,
		EndOfWeekFee,
		Commission,
		CommissionOnClose,
		OpenOccurred,
		CloseOccurred,
		isnull([ParentPositionID],0) AS ParentPositionID,
		OrigParentPositionID,
		MirrorID,
		IsOpenOpen,
		ISNULL([FullCommission],0.00) AS FullCommission,
		ISNULL([FullCommissionOnClose],0.00) AS FullCommissionOnClose
		                   ,RedeemStatus
		                   , RedeemID
		,ReopenForPositionID
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS IsReOpen
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN CommissionOnClose END AS CommissionOnCloseOrig
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN FullCommissionOnClose END AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		,OriginalPositionID
	
		,CASE WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  WHEN IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 and b.InstrumentTypeID in (10,5,6) THEN 1 else 0  END AS IsSettled
		,InitialUnits
		,IsDiscounted
		,[CommissionByUnits]
		,[FullCommissionByUnits]
		,SettlementTypeID
		,[DLTOpen]
        ,[DLTClose]
        ,[OpenMarkupByUnits]
		FROM
		[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay] a WITH (NOLOCK) 
		left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
		ON a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
		WHERE 
		(OpenOccurred>=DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday)  and OpenOccurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0))
		OR (CloseOccurred>= @Yesterday  and CloseOccurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0))  --OPTION	(RECOMPILE)

-- Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction -----------------------

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction


	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction
	([CID], [Occurred], [Credit], [Payment], [TotalCashChange], [CreditTypeID], [CashoutID], [CampaignID], [PositionID], 
	[DepositID], [WithdrawID], [PaymentID], [BonusTypeID], [MirrorID], [CompensationReasonID], [WithdrawPaymentID], 
	[BonusCredit], [CreditID], [Description], [MoveMoneyReasonID])

--[MirrorDividendID]--[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	SELECT 
	  CID,
		Occurred,
		Credit,
		Payment,
		TotalCashChange,
		CreditTypeID,
		CashoutID,
		CampaignID,
		PositionID,
		DepositID,
		WithdrawID,
		PaymentID,
		BonusTypeID,
		MirrorID,
		CompensationReasonID,
		WithdrawProcessingID,
		BonusCredit,
		CreditID
		,Description
		,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Credit] with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawProcessingID IS NULL AND (Occurred>= @Yesterday and Occurred< @CurrentDate)
	UNION 
	SELECT CID,
		MIN(Occurred) as Occurred,
		Credit,
		Payment,
		TotalCashChange,
		CreditTypeID,
		CashoutID,
		CampaignID,
		PositionID,
		DepositID,
		WithdrawID,
		PaymentID,
		BonusTypeID,
		MirrorID,
		CompensationReasonID,
		WithdrawProcessingID,
		BonusCredit,
		MIN(CreditID) as CreditID
		,Description
		,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Credit] WITH (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawProcessingID IS NOT NULL AND(Occurred>= @Yesterday and Occurred < @CurrentDate)
	GROUP BY CID,
			Credit,
			Payment,
			TotalCashChange,
			CreditTypeID,
			CashoutID,
			CampaignID,
			PositionID,
			DepositID,
			WithdrawID,
			PaymentID,
			BonusTypeID,
			MirrorID,
			CompensationReasonID,
			WithdrawProcessingID,
			BonusCredit
			,Description
			,[MoveMoneyReasonID]

-- Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw -----------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw
	([WithdrawID],
	[CID], 
	[CashoutStatusID], 
	[Amount], 
	[IPAddress],
[ModificationDate], 
	[FundingTypeID], 
	[Fee])
	SELECT 	
	   [WithdrawID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[CashoutStatusID]
      ,[Amount]
     ,CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15)) [IPAddress]
      ,[ModificationDate]
      ,[FundingTypeID]
      ,[Fee]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw]


--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw ----------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw
	(
	 [WithdrawID] 
	 ,[CID] 
	 ,[Amount] 
	 ,[IPAddress] 
	 ,[ModificationDate] 
	 ,[Fee] 
	 ,[FundingTypeID]
	)
	SELECT
	 isnull(a.WithdrawID, 0) as WithdrawID
	 ,  CID
	 , ISNULL(Amount,0) as Amount
	 , CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15)) [IPAddress]
	 , ModificationDate
	 ,Fee /*We Bring the CO fee only on Requset and processed CO in order to be able to calculate Unrealized fee*/
	, FundingTypeID
	FROM
	(
		SELECT Distinct [WithdrawID]
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_WithdrawAction] WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE
			ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
			AND
			ModificationDate < @CurrentDate
			AND 
			CashoutStatusID=3 
			AND WithdrawID NOT IN
			(
				SELECT WithdrawID AS WithdrawID_ModificationDateMin
				From
				(
					SELECT WithdrawID, min(ModificationDate) AS ModificationDateMin
					FROM
						[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_WithdrawAction] WITH (NOLOCK)
					WHERE
						ModificationDate < @Yesterday
						and
						CashoutStatusID=3
					group by WithdrawID
				) a
			)
	)  a
	join  
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw] b  WITH (NOLOCK)
	on
	a.WithdrawID=b.WithdrawID -- OPTION	(RECOMPILE)

-- Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding ---------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding
	(
	  [WithdrawID]
	 ,[CID]
	 , [CashoutStatusID]
	 , [Amount]
     , [IPAddress]
	 , [ModificationDate]
	 , [FundingTypeID]
	 , [WithdrawPaymentID]
	 , [SessionID]
	 )
	SELECT 
		a.WithdrawID,
		CID,
		CashoutStatusID,
		Amount,
		CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15))IPAddress,
		ModificationDate,
		b.FundingTypeID,
		ID as [WithdrawPaymentID],
		SessionID
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_vWithdrawToFunding] a WITH (NOLOCK)
		JOIN (
		SELECT 
		CID,
		WithdrawID,
		IPAddress,
		FundingTypeID,
		SessionID
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw] WITH (NOLOCK)
	) b
	ON a.WithdrawID = b.WithdrawID

-- Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog ---------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog
	(
	  [PositionID] 
	 ,[CID] 
	 ,[Occurred] 
	 ,[IsSettled]
	 ,[PreviousIsSettled]
	)
	SELECT 
	PositionID,
	CID,
	Occurred,
	CAST(IsSettled AS INT) IsSettled,
	CAST(PreviousIsSettled AS INT) PreviousIsSettled
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
		pl.PositionID
		,pl.CID
		,Occurred
		,pl.IsSettled
		,pl.PreviousIsSettled
		, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pl.PositionID ORDER BY pl.Occurred ) rn
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] pl WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE Occurred > @Yesterday
		---and isnull(pl.IsSettled,-1) <> isnull(pl.PreviousIsSettled,-1)
		and pl.IsSettled <> pl.PreviousIsSettled
	) a
	WHERE rn =1

TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement]
           ([EngagementType]
           ,[Occurred]
           ,[UserName]
           ,[PostRootID]
           ,[ApplicationName]
           ,[UserNameCalc])
SELECT TypeName
     , OccurredAt
     , Username
     , RootId
     , ApplicationName 
     , Lower(Right(Username,Len(Username)-1)) as UserNameCalc
From [DWH_staging].[Streams0_dbo_Entries] With (Nolock)
Where TypeName In ('Like', 'Comment', 'Discussion')
And OccurredAt >= @Yesterday
And OccurredAt < @CurrentDate


-- Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit -----------------------------------------

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit
	(
	 [DepositID] 
	,[ModificationDate] 
	,[IPAddress] 
	,[FundingTypeID] 
	,[SessionID] 
	,[IsFTD]
	,[PaymentStatusID]
	)
	SELECT
		DepositID
		,ModificationDate
		,CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15))IPAddress
		, FundingTypeID
		,isnull(SessionID,0) AS SessionID
		, CASE 
			WHEN IsFTD IN (1,0) then cast(IsFTD AS INT)  
		  END AS IsFTD
		,PaymentStatusID
		
	FROM  [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Deposit] bd
			JOIN [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Funding] bf
			ON bd.FundingID = bf.FundingID
	WHERE 		
	bd.ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
	AND
	bd.ModificationDate < @CurrentDate
	AND bd.PaymentStatusID in ( 2,11)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session ------------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session
	(
	  MirrorID
	  ,SessionID
	  ,Occurred
	)
	SELECT  MirrorID, SessionID, Occurred
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Mirror]
	WHERE
	Occurred >= @Yesterday
	AND
	Occurred < @CurrentDate
	AND MirrorOperationID = 1 -- = register mirror
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Position_Session ----------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Position_Session
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Position_Session
	(
	  PositionID
	 ,SessionID
	 ,Occurred
	)
	SELECT PositionID, SessionID,Occurred
	FROM
	(
		SELECT PositionID, ISNULL(SessionID,-1) as SessionID,Occurred,max(PositionChangeID) as MaxPositionChangeID
		--SELECT PositionID, SessionID,Occurred,max(PositionChangeID) as MaxPositionChangeID
		--FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog_Active]
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog]
		Where ChangeTypeID = 0
		AND Occurred >= @Yesterday
		AND
		Occurred < @CurrentDate
		GROUP BY PositionID, SessionID,Occurred
	) a
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14 -----------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14
	(
	  SessionID
	 ,[PlatformID]
	 ,DateID
	)
	SELECT SessionID, [PlatformID],DateID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].[Fact_CustomerAction]
	WHERE ActionTypeID = 14 
	--and [DateID] between  cast(dateadd(day,datediff(day,-30,@Yesterday),0) as int)
	--and cast(@Yesterday as int)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- SP_Fact_CustomerAction ------------------------------------------
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_CustomerAction @Yesterday
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- SP_Fact_CustomerAction_Create_SWITCH_SINGLE ---------------------
	-- EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_CustomerAction_Create_SWITCH_SINGLE @dt 

		
   DECLARE @DateID INT 
  SET @DateID =  CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), @dt,112)

	DELETE FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction WHERE DateID = @DateID
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Insert to Fact_CustomerAction_Create_SWITCH_SINGLE --------------
	--INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH_SINGLE
	--INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction



	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
	(
	  [HistoryID]
	 ,[GCID] 
	 ,[RealCID] 
	 ,[DemoCID] 
	 ,[Occurred]
	 ,[IPNumber]
	 ,[IsReal] 
	 ,[ActionTypeID]  
	 ,[PlatformTypeID]
	 ,[InstrumentID] 
	 ,[Amount] 
 	 ,[Leverage]

	 ,[PositionID]

	 ,[BonusTypeID]  
	 ,[FundingTypeID]

	 ,[PostID] 
	 ,[CaseID] 
	 ,[UpdateDate] 
	 ,[DateID]  
	 ,[TimeID]

	 ,[CompensationReasonID]

		 , ISNULL(WithdrawPaymentID,0) as WithdrawPaymentID

		 , NULL AS IsPlug

		 , PostRootID
		 , FullCommission
		 , FullCommissionOnClose
		 , RedeemID
		 , RedeemStatus
		 , SessionID
		 , IsRedeem
		 , RegulationIDOnOpen
         , PlatformID

		,ProxyType
		,IsFeeDividend
		, IsAirDrop
		, DividendID
		,MoveMoneyReasonID
		,SettlementTypeID
		--,NULL AS NULL_1
		--,NULL AS NULL_2
		, DLTOpen
        , DLTClose
		, OpenMarkupByUnits
		 		FROM
				[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
				WHERE

CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse_bkp_2024_09_25] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN


-- =============================================
-- Author:      <Re'em Cohen>
-- Create Date: 2021-08-01
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_DL_To_Synapse] '2024-01-23'
-- =============================================
/**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2022-02-03		Inbal BML	   Add SettlementTypeID 
 2024-01-07	    Inbal BML	   change [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] and [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay]
 2024-05-01     Boris P  Partiton [STS_Audit_UserOperationsData]
 2024-06-02     Ofir A         add DLT columns

*********************************************************************************************/
   -- exec [SP_Fact_CustomerAction] '2019-03-18'
  --DECLARE @dt as DATE = cAST(GETDATE()-1 AS DATE)
  --'2021-07-01'
  DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME
  DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME

  SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
  SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);
  
-- Check Exist Partition Fact_CustomerAction -----------------------
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_CustomerAction_CheckExistPartition @Yesterday

	
-------------------------------------------
-- SELECT Parameter Run Ind - Fact_CustomerAction ------------------
	--SELECT [IndRun]
	--FROM [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd](nolock)
	--where [TableName] = 'Fact_CustomerAction'
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Customer ------------------------------------------------

	
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer
 
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer 
	(		
	  [CID] 
	 ,[GCID]
	 ,[UserName]  
	 ,[UserNameCalc]
	)
	SELECT
	   [CID]
	  ,[GCID]
	  ,[UserName]
	,Lower(UserName) as UserNameCalc
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Customer_CustomerStatic]
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin ---------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin
	([LoginID]
           ,[CID]
           ,[LoggedIn]
           ,[LoggedOut]
           ,[ClientVersion]
           ,[IP]
           ,[SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID])
	SELECT 
	LoginID, 
	CID, 
	LoggedIn,
	0 AS LoggedOut, 
	ClientVersion, 
	IP,
	SessionIdentifier as SessionID ,--Browser,ApplicationIdentifierAgg,
	CASE
	---- Wallet
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =2  then 118
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =2  then 119
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =2 then 120
	---- EtoroX
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =4  then 121
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =4  then 122
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =4 then 123
	---- Delta 
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and GatewayAppId =8  then 124
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and GatewayAppId =8  then 125
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and GatewayAppId =8 then 126
	---- Etoro
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 101
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 102
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 103
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 104
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoroandroid' then 105
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 106
	WHEN Browser = 'Android' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletandroid' then 118

	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 107
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 108
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 109 
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 110
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoroios' then 111
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 112
	WHEN Browser = 'iOS' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletios' then 119

	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'trader' then 113
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'openbook' then 114
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'other' then 115
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'registrationapi' then 116 
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'retoro' then 117
	WHEN Browser = 'Browsers' and ApplicationIdentifierAgg = 'walletweb' then 120
	else 99 end as PlatformID
	from
	(
	select cast(a.LoggedIn as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	---case when Browser = 'Browsers' then 'Web' else 'Mobile' end as 'Web/Mobile',
	Browser,
	CASE
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoro','ReToro') then 'retoro'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'retoro, retoro' then 'retoro'
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoroios','ReToroIOS') then 'retoroios'
	--when ApplicationIdentifier in ('retoroandroid','ReToroAndroid') then 'retoroandroid'

	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoro') then 'retoro'
	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoroios') then 'retoroios'
	when lower(ApplicationIdentifier) in ('retoroandroid') then 'retoroandroid'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidretoro' then 'retoroandroid'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidetoro' then 'retoroandroid'
	when ApplicationIdentifier in ('registrationapi','registrationservice') then 'registrationapi'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletweb' then 'retoro'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletios' then 'retoroios'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'walletandroid' then 'retoroandroid'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'iostrader' then 'trader'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidtrader' then 'trader'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'webtrader' then 'trader'

	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'iosopenbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'androidopenbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'openbook' then 'openbook'
	when ApplicationIdentifier = 'openbook_news_publisher' then 'openbook'
	else 'other' END AS ApplicationIdentifierAgg
	,LoginID
	,CID
	,LoggedOut
	,ClientVersion
	,[IP]
	,SessionIdentifier
	,GatewayAppId
	from
	(
	SELECT ApplicationIdentifier as ApplicationIdentifier
	,0 as LoginID
	,EnvironmentDetailsFirst
	,ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst
	,RealCid as CID,
	CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	CASE
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '{"useragent":null}' and ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst = 'retoroandroid' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '{"useragent":null}' and ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst = 'retoroios' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%android%' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%iphone%' or lower(EnvironmentDetailsFirst) LIKE '%ipad%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%android%' THEN 'Android'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%retoroios%' THEN 'iOS'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%iostrader%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%androidtrader%' THEN 'Android'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%iosopenbook%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%androidopenbook%' THEN 'Android'

	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%walletios%' THEN 'iOS'
	WHEN ApplicationIdentifier LIKE '%walletandroid%' THEN 'Android'

	ELSE 'Browsers'
	END as Browser,
	0 as LoggedOut,
	CASE ApplicationIdentifier
	 WHEN 'webtrader' THEN 2
	 WHEN 'iostrader' THEN 8
	 WHEN 'androidtrader' THEN 6
	 WHEN 'androidopenbook' THEN 5
	 WHEN 'iosopenbook' THEN 7
	 WHEN 'openbook' THEN 1
	 ELSE 99
	 END ClientVersion,
	CAST([ClientIp] as varchar(15)) as [IP],
	SessionId AS SessionIdentifier,
	GatewayAppId
	from [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData] LH with (NOLOCK)
	left join
	(
	Select CID, SessionIdentifier as SessionIdentifierFirst, EnvironmentDetails as EnvironmentDetailsFirst,ApplicationIdentifierFrom as ApplicationIdentifierFromFirst
	from
	(
	SELECT
	RealCid as CID,
	CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) as LoggedIn,
	SessionId AS SessionIdentifier,
	UserAgent as EnvironmentDetails,ApplicationIdentifier AS  ApplicationIdentifierFrom ,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCid,SessionId  ORDER BY CreatedAt) rn
	from [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData] with (NOLOCK)
	where CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) >= dateadd(day,datediff(day,7,@Yesterday ),0) and  CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) <= @CurrentDate
	AND LoginTypeName = 'Login'
	) a
	WHERE rn = 1
	) LHS on LH.RealCid = LHS.CID and LH.SessionId = LHS.SessionIdentifierFirst
	where CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) >= dateadd(day,datediff(day,7,@Yesterday ),0) and  CAST(CreatedAt as datetime) <= @CurrentDate
	AND LHS.SessionIdentifierFirst is not NULL
	AND LoginTypeName = 'Login'
	) a
	) b
	WHERE CAST(LoggedIn as datetime) >= @Yesterday 
	AND CAST(LoggedIn as datetime) < @CurrentDate
	and  [CID]  <>0
--------------------------------------------------------------------


--DELETE FROM DWH_dbo.STS_User_Operations_Data_History
--WHERE [DateID] =  convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,@Yesterday),0),112)) 


EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_STS_User_Operations_Data_History_CREATE_SWITCH_SINGLE] @dt 

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[STS_User_Operations_Data_History_SWITCH_SINGLE] (
    [Gcid] ,
    [RealCid] ,
    [DemoCid] ,
    [ApplicationIdentifier] ,
    [ApplicationVersion] ,
    [ClientIp] ,
    [ClientName] ,
    [CreatedAt] ,
    [UserAgent] ,
    [AccessTokenHashed] ,
   [ClientDeviceId] ,
    [ParentSessionId] ,
    [AccountTypeName] ,
    [LoginTypeName] ,
    [SessionId] ,
    [GatewayAppId] ,
	[ProxyType] ,
	[CountryISOCode],
	[AdditionalData],
	[DateID],
	[UpdateDate]
	)
SELECT 
    [Gcid] ,
    [RealCid] ,
    [DemoCid] ,
    [ApplicationIdentifier] ,
    [ApplicationVersion] ,
    [ClientIp] ,
    [ClientName] ,
    [CreatedAt] ,
    [UserAgent] ,
    [AccessTokenHashed] ,
    [ClientDeviceId],
    [ParentSessionId] ,
    [AccountTypeName] ,
    [LoginTypeName] ,
    [SessionId] ,
    [GatewayAppId] ,
	[ProxyType] ,
	[CountryISOCode],
	[AdditionalData],
    convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,@Yesterday),0),112))  ,
    GETDATE()
FROM [DWH_staging].[STS_Audit_UserOperationsData]  (nolock)
WHERE [CreatedAt] >= @Yesterday AND [CreatedAt] < @CurrentDate


EXEC  [DWH_dbo].[SP_STS_User_Operations_Data_History_SWITCH]


-- Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Loggin -------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Loggin

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Loggin
	SELECT
	LoginID,
	CID,
	LoggedIn,
	LoggedOut,
	IP
	FROM
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Login] with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE LoggedIn >= @Yesterday AND  LoggedIn <  @CurrentDate

		

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration ------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration
	(
	 [CID]
	 ,[Registered]
	 ,[IsReal] 
	 ,[ActionTypeID] 
	 ,[PlatformTypeID]
	 ,[DateID] 
	 ,[TimeID] 
	 ,[FunnelID]  
	 ,[IP] 
	 ,[CountryIDByIP] 
	 ,[PlatformID]
	)
	SELECT DISTINCT 
	[CID],
	[Registered],
	cast([IsReal] as tinyint) as [IsReal],
	41 as [ActionTypeID],
	99 as [PlatformTypeID],
	convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, [Registered], 112)) as [DateID],
	datepart (HOUR, [Registered]) as [TimeID],FunnelID
	,[IP]
	,[CountryIDByIP]
	,NULL as NULL_column
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Customer_CustomerStatic] with(nolock)
	WHERE Registered>= @Yesterday AND Registered< @CurrentDate 

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position -------------------------------------

--SSIS flow use derived columns. one column adds as a new columns and
-- assigned with Null as default value. second column is IsSettled, intended
-- to replace the origin by casting it to four-byte signed integer.
	
-- Here using INSERT INTO command, any column that is not specified assigned with her
--default value. the second problem solved by staging table that contain
--the relevant field.
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position
	(	
	   [PositionID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[CurrencyID]
      ,[ProviderID]
      ,[InstrumentID]
      ,[HedgeID]
      ,[HedgeServerID]
      ,[Leverage]
      ,[Amount]
      ,[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
      ,[UnitMargin]
      ,[InitForexRate]
      ,[NetProfit]
      ,[SpreadedPipBid]
      ,[SpreadedPipAsk]
      ,[IsBuy]
      ,[CloseOnEndOfWeek]
      ,[EndOfWeekFee]
      ,[Commission]
      ,[CommissionOnClose]
      ,[OpenOccurred]
      ,[CloseOccurred]
      ,[ParentPositionID]
      ,[OrigParentPositionID]
      ,[MirrorID]
      ,[IsOpenOpen]
      ,[FullCommission]
      ,[FullCommissionOnClose]
      ,[RedeemStatus]
      ,[RedeemID]
      ,[ReopenForPositionID]
      ,[IsReOpen]
      ,[CommissionOnCloseOrig]
      ,[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig]
      ,[InitialUnits]
      ,[IsSettled]
      ,[IsDiscounted]
      ,[CommissionByUnits]
      ,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	  ,[SettlementTypeID]
	  -- Ofir DLT new columns
	  ,[DLTOpen]
      -- ,[DLTClose]
      ,[OpenMarkupByUnits]
	)

	SELECT
	PositionID,
	CID,
	CurrencyID,
	ProviderID,
	a.InstrumentID,
	HedgeID,
	HedgeServerID,
	Leverage,
	ISNULL(Amount,0)  AS Amount,
	AmountInUnitsDecimal,
	UnitMargin,
	InitForexRate,
	0 AS NetProfit, 
	SpreadedPipBid,
	SpreadedPipAsk,
	IsBuy,
	ISNULL(CloseOnEndOfWeek, 0) as CloseOnEndOfWeek,
	EndOfWeekFee,
	Commission,
	0 AS CommissionOnClose,
	Occurred AS OpenOccurred,
	CAST(0 AS DATETIME) AS CloseOccurred,
	ParentPositionID,
	OrigParentPositionID,
	MirrorID,
	IsOpenOpen,
	ISNULL([FullCommission],0.00) AS FullCommission,
	0.00 AS FullCommissionOnClose,
	RedeemStatus,
	NULL as RedeemID,
	ReopenForPositionID,
	CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID is not null THEN 1 END AS IsReOpen,
	0.00 AS CommissionOnCloseOrig,
	0.00 AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
	, InitialUnits
	,CASE 
	WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  
	WHEN IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 AND b.InstrumentTypeID IN (10,5,6) THEN 1 
	ELSE 0 
	END AS IsSettled
	,IsDiscounted
	,[CommissionByUnits]
	,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	,SettlementTypeID
	,[DLTOpen]
     -- ,[DLTClose]
    ,[OpenMarkupByUnits]
	FROM
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] a WITH (NOLOCK)
	left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
	on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
	WHERE Occurred>= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday)  and Occurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@CurrentDate),0)

	
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Real_Position -------------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position
	([PositionID], 
	[CID], 
	[CurrencyID], 
	[ProviderID], 
	[InstrumentID], 
	[HedgeID], 
	[HedgeServerID], 
	[Leverage],
	[Amount], 
	[AmountInUnitsDecimal], 
	[UnitMargin], 
	[InitForexRate], 
	[NetProfit], 
	[SpreadedPipBid], 
	[SpreadedPipAsk], 
	[IsBuy], 
	[CloseOnEndOfWeek], 
	[EndOfWeekFee], 
	[Commission], 
	[CommissionOnClose], 
	[OpenOccurred], 
	[CloseOccurred], 
	[ParentPositionID], 
	[OrigParentPositionID],
	[MirrorID], 
	[IsOpenOpen], 
	[FullCommission],
	[FullCommissionOnClose], 
	[RedeemStatus], 
	[RedeemID], 
	[ReopenForPositionID], 
	[IsReOpen], 
	[CommissionOnCloseOrig], 
	[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig], 
	[OriginalPositionID],
	[IsSettled], 
	[InitialUnits], 
	[IsDiscounted], 
	[CommissionByUnits], 
	[FullCommissionByUnits],
	[SettlementTypeID],
	[DLTOpen],
    [DLTClose], 
    [OpenMarkupByUnits]
	)

		SELECT 
		PositionID,
		CID,
		CurrencyID,
		ProviderID,
		a.InstrumentID,
		HedgeID,
		HedgeServerID,
		Leverage,
		isnull(Amount,0) as Amount,
		AmountInUnitsDecimal,
		UnitMargin,
		InitForexRate,
		NetProfit,
		SpreadedPipBid,
		SpreadedPipAsk,
		IsBuy,
		CloseOnEndOfWeek,
		EndOfWeekFee,
		Commission,
		CommissionOnClose,
		OpenOccurred,
		CloseOccurred,
		isnull([ParentPositionID],0) AS ParentPositionID,
		OrigParentPositionID,
		MirrorID,
		IsOpenOpen,
		ISNULL([FullCommission],0.00) AS FullCommission,
		ISNULL([FullCommissionOnClose],0.00) AS FullCommissionOnClose
		                   ,RedeemStatus
		                   , RedeemID
		,ReopenForPositionID
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS IsReOpen
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN CommissionOnClose END AS CommissionOnCloseOrig
		,CASE WHEN ReopenForPositionID IS NOT NULL THEN FullCommissionOnClose END AS FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		,OriginalPositionID
	
		,CASE WHEN IsSettled in (1,0) THEN cast(IsSettled as int)  WHEN IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 and b.InstrumentTypeID in (10,5,6) THEN 1 else 0  END AS IsSettled
		,InitialUnits
		,IsDiscounted
		,[CommissionByUnits]
		,[FullCommissionByUnits]
		,SettlementTypeID
		,[DLTOpen]
        ,[DLTClose]
        ,[OpenMarkupByUnits]
		FROM
		[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay] a WITH (NOLOCK) 
		left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
		ON a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
		WHERE 
		(OpenOccurred>=DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @Yesterday)  and OpenOccurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0))
		OR (CloseOccurred>= @Yesterday  and CloseOccurred< DATEADD(DAY,DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Yesterday),0))  --OPTION	(RECOMPILE)

-- Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction -----------------------

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction


	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction
	([CID], [Occurred], [Credit], [Payment], [TotalCashChange], [CreditTypeID], [CashoutID], [CampaignID], [PositionID], 
	[DepositID], [WithdrawID], [PaymentID], [BonusTypeID], [MirrorID], [CompensationReasonID], [WithdrawPaymentID], 
	[BonusCredit], [CreditID], [Description], [MoveMoneyReasonID])

--[MirrorDividendID]--[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	SELECT 
	  CID,
		Occurred,
		Credit,
		Payment,
		TotalCashChange,
		CreditTypeID,
		CashoutID,
		CampaignID,
		PositionID,
		DepositID,
		WithdrawID,
		PaymentID,
		BonusTypeID,
		MirrorID,
		CompensationReasonID,
		WithdrawProcessingID,
		BonusCredit,
		CreditID
		,Description
		,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Credit] with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawProcessingID IS NULL AND (Occurred>= @Yesterday and Occurred< @CurrentDate)
	UNION 
	SELECT CID,
		MIN(Occurred) as Occurred,
		Credit,
		Payment,
		TotalCashChange,
		CreditTypeID,
		CashoutID,
		CampaignID,
		PositionID,
		DepositID,
		WithdrawID,
		PaymentID,
		BonusTypeID,
		MirrorID,
		CompensationReasonID,
		WithdrawProcessingID,
		BonusCredit,
		MIN(CreditID) as CreditID
		,Description
		,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Credit] WITH (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawProcessingID IS NOT NULL AND(Occurred>= @Yesterday and Occurred < @CurrentDate)
	GROUP BY CID,
			Credit,
			Payment,
			TotalCashChange,
			CreditTypeID,
			CashoutID,
			CampaignID,
			PositionID,
			DepositID,
			WithdrawID,
			PaymentID,
			BonusTypeID,
			MirrorID,
			CompensationReasonID,
			WithdrawProcessingID,
			BonusCredit
			,Description
			,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
