-- Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw -----------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw
	([WithdrawID],
	[CID], 
	[CashoutStatusID], 
	[Amount], 
	[IPAddress],
[ModificationDate], 
	[FundingTypeID], 
	[Fee])
	SELECT 	
	   [WithdrawID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[CashoutStatusID]
      ,[Amount]
     ,CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15)) [IPAddress]
      ,[ModificationDate]
      ,[FundingTypeID]
      ,[Fee]
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw]


--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw ----------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Withdraw
	(
	 [WithdrawID] 
	 ,[CID] 
	 ,[Amount] 
	 ,[IPAddress] 
	 ,[ModificationDate] 
	 ,[Fee] 
	 ,[FundingTypeID]
	)
	SELECT
	 isnull(a.WithdrawID, 0) as WithdrawID
	 ,  CID
	 , ISNULL(Amount,0) as Amount
	 , CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15)) [IPAddress]
	 , ModificationDate
	 ,Fee /*We Bring the CO fee only on Requset and processed CO in order to be able to calculate Unrealized fee*/
	, FundingTypeID
	FROM
	(
		SELECT Distinct [WithdrawID]
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_WithdrawAction] WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE
			ModificationDate >= @Yesterday
			AND
			ModificationDate < @CurrentDate
			AND 
			CashoutStatusID=3 
			AND WithdrawID NOT IN
			(
				SELECT WithdrawID AS WithdrawID_ModificationDateMin
				From
				(
					SELECT WithdrawID, min(ModificationDate) AS ModificationDateMin
					FROM
						[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_WithdrawAction] WITH (NOLOCK)
					WHERE
						ModificationDate < @Yesterday
						and
						CashoutStatusID=3
					group by WithdrawID
				) a
			)
	)  a
	join  
	[DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw] b  WITH (NOLOCK)
	on
	a.WithdrawID=b.WithdrawID -- OPTION	(RECOMPILE)

     , [IPAddress]

	SELECT

		Amount,
		CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15))IPAddress,
		ModificationDate,

-- Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog ---------------------------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog
	(
	  [PositionID] 
	 ,[CID] 
	 ,[Occurred] 
	 ,[IsSettled]
	 ,[PreviousIsSettled]
	)
	SELECT 
	PositionID,
	CID,
	Occurred,
	CAST(IsSettled AS INT) IsSettled,
	CAST(PreviousIsSettled AS INT) PreviousIsSettled
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
		pl.PositionID
		,pl.CID
		,Occurred
		,pl.IsSettled
		,pl.PreviousIsSettled
		, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pl.PositionID ORDER BY pl.Occurred ) rn
		FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] pl WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE Occurred > @Yesterday
		---and isnull(pl.IsSettled,-1) <> isnull(pl.PreviousIsSettled,-1)
		and pl.IsSettled <> pl.PreviousIsSettled
	) a
	WHERE rn =1

		,CAST(cast([IPAddress] as decimal(18,0) )as varchar(15))IPAddress
		, FundingTypeID
		,isnull(SessionID,0) AS SessionID
		, CASE 
			WHEN IsFTD IN (1,0) then cast(IsFTD AS INT)

	FROM  [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Deposit] bd

	WHERE

	AND
	bd.ModificationDate < @CurrentDate
	AND bd.PaymentStatusID in ( 2,11)

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
	(
	  [HistoryID]
	 ,[GCID] 
	 ,[RealCID] 
	 ,[DemoCID] 
	 ,[Occurred]
	 ,[IPNumber]
	 ,[IsReal] 
	 ,[ActionTypeID]

 	 ,[Leverage]

	 ,[Commission]

	 ,[BonusTypeID]  
	 ,[FundingTypeID]

	 ,[MirrorID]

	 ,[DurationInSeconds] 
	 ,[PostID] 
	 ,[CaseID] 
	 ,[UpdateDate] 
	 ,[DateID]  
	 ,[TimeID]  
	 ,[StatusID]
	 ,[PreviousOccurred]    
	 ,[CompensationReasonID]
	 ,[WithdrawPaymentID]
	 ,[CommissionOnClose]
	 ,[IsPlug]   
	 ,[DepositID]
	 ,[PostRootID]
	 ,[FullCommission]
	 ,[FullCommissionOnClose] 
	 ,[RedeemID] 
	 ,[RedeemStatus]
	 ,[SessionID]
	 ,[IsRedeem] 
	 ,[RegulationIDOnOpen] 
	 ,[PlatformID] 
	 ,[ReopenForPositionID] 
	 ,[IsReOpen] 
	 ,[CommissionOnCloseOrig] 
	 ,[FullCommissionOnCloseOrig] 
	 ,[OriginalPositionID] 
	 ,[IsPartialCloseParent]
	 ,[IsPartialCloseChild] 
	 ,[InitialUnits]   
	 ,[PaymentStatusID]
	 ,[IsDiscounted] 
	 ,[IsSettled] 
	 ,[CommissionByUnits]    
	 ,[FullCommissionByUnits]
	 ,[IsFTD]		 
	 ,[CountryIDByIP]
	 ,[IsAnonymousIP]
	 ,[ProxyType] 
	 ,[IsFeeDividend] 
	 ,[IsAirDrop] 
	 ,[DividendID]
	 ,[MoveMoneyReasonID]
	 ,[SettlementTypeID]
	 , DLTOpen
     , DLTClose
	 , OpenMarkupByUnits
	 , [Description]
	)
	SELECT 
	     HistoryID
		 ,GCID
		 , RealCID
		 , DemoCID
		 , Occurred
		 , ISNULL(IPNumber,0) AS IPNumber
		 , IsReal
		 , ActionTypeID
		 , PlatformTypeID
		 , ISNULL(InstrumentID,0) AS InstrumentID
		 , ISNULL(Amount,0) AS Amount
		 , ISNULL(Leverage,0) AS Leverage
		 , ISNULL(NetProfit,0) AS NetProfit
		 , ISNULL(Commission,0) AS Commission
		 , ISNULL(PositionID,0) AS PositionID
		 , ISNULL(CampaignID,0) AS CampaignID
		 , ISNULL(BonusTypeID,0) AS BonusTypeID
		 , ISNULL(FundingTypeID,0) AS FundingTypeID
		 , ISNULL(LoginID,0) AS LoginID
		 , ISNULL(MirrorID,0) AS MirrorID
		 , ISNULL(WithdrawID,0) AS WithdrawID
		 , ISNULL(DurationInSeconds,0) as DurationInSeconds
		 , NULL AS PostID
		 , ISNULL(CaseID,0) as CaseID
		 , getdate() as UpdateDate
		 , DateID
		 , TimeID
		 , StatusID
		 , PreviousOccurred
		 , ISNULL(CompensationReasonID,0) AS CompensationReasonID
		 , ISNULL(WithdrawPaymentID,0) as WithdrawPaymentID
		 , ISNULL(CommissionOnClose,0) AS CommissionOnClose
		 , NULL AS IsPlug
		 , DepositID
		 , PostRootID
		 , FullCommission
		 , FullCommissionOnClose
		 , RedeemID
		 , RedeemStatus
		 , SessionID
		 , IsRedeem
		 , RegulationIDOnOpen
         , PlatformID
		,ReopenForPositionID
		,IsReOpen
		,CommissionOnCloseOrig
		,FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		,OriginalPositionID
		, NULL AS IsPartialCloseParent
		,IsPartialCloseChild
		,InitialUnits
		,PaymentStatusID
		,IsDiscounted
		,IsSettled
		,CommissionByUnits
		,FullCommissionByUnits
		, IsFTD
		, CountryIDByIP
		,IsAnonymousIP 
		,ProxyType
		,IsFeeDividend
		, IsAirDrop
		, DividendID
		,MoveMoneyReasonID
		,SettlementTypeID
		--,NULL AS NULL_1
		--,NULL AS NULL_2
		, DLTOpen
        , DLTClose
		, OpenMarkupByUnits
		, Description
		 		FROM
				[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
				WHERE 
				ActionTypeID is not null

SP_Fact_CustomerAction_IsParitalClosePar:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_IsParitalCloseParent] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-12-16
Description:
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------

*********************************************************************************************/

--Drop table If Exists #OriginalPositionID
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OriginalPositionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OriginalPositionID;

CREATE TABLE #OriginalPositionID  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select distinct OriginalPositionID
from [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction]
where
PositionID <> OriginalPositionID 
AND ActionTypeID in (4,5,6,28,40)

create clustered index #OriginalPositionID on #OriginalPositionID(OriginalPositionID)


declare @DateMin int = (SELECT convert(int,convert(varchar,min(OpenOccurred),112))  FROM  [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position)

Update a
set 
--IsPartialCloseParent = 1
IsPartialCloseParent = CASE WHEN    a.ActionTypeID in (1,2,3,39) AND a.DateID >=@DateMin THEN 1 ELSE a.IsPartialCloseParent END 
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction a
join #OriginalPositionID b
on a.PositionID = b.OriginalPositionID

--Changed by Boris Pinsky on 2022-02-07
--"Where" filters were moved to case for better performance (Yes , It's strange... ) 

--Update a
--set 
--IsPartialCloseParent = 1
--from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction a
--join #OriginalPositionID b
--on a.PositionID = b.OriginalPositionID 
--AND ActionTypeID in (1,2,3,39)
--and a.DateID >=@DateMin



end
SP_Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH] AS
BEGIN


--   set deadlock_priority high
--- we have to have same indexes and constraints as partitioned table
Declare @CurrentDay int
Declare @PartToSwitch int 
Declare @SqlStr varchar(max)
Declare @TS BIT = 1
Declare @MaxValue int
Declare @MinValue int
Declare @LastPar int
Declare @IsRight bit 


Declare @MaxValue_SGL int
Declare @MinValue_SGL int
Declare @LastPar_SGL int
Declare @IsRight_SGL bit 
Declare @PartToSwitch_SGL int 





-----------------------

set  @CurrentDay = (Select top 1  DateID from DWH_dbo.Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH_SINGLE)

-----create constraint for table
--set @SqlStr = 'ALTER TABLE Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH_SINGLE ADD CONSTRAINT FCASS_value_for_switch CHECK (DateID = ' + CAST(@CurrentDay as varchar) + ' );'

----print @SqlStr
--exec (@SqlStr)

-------------------------------------------
-- get the partition number for the dateid 

--select @PartToSwitch = $partition.PF_CUSTOMERACTION_MONTH_DAYS(@CurrentDay)



SELECT 
@MaxValue_SGL=max(cast(rng.value as int )),
@MinValue_SGL=min(cast(rng.value as int )),
@IsRight_SGL=max(cast(pf.boundary_value_on_right as int)),
@LastPar_SGL=max(partition_number)
FROM        sys.schemas    sch
INNER JOIN  sys.tables     tbl ON  sch.schema_id   = tbl.schema_id
INNER JOIN  sys.partitions prt ON  prt.[object_id] = tbl.[object_id]
INNER JOIN  sys.indexes    idx ON  prt.[object_id] = idx.[object_id]               AND                                prt.[index_id]  = idx.[index_id]
INNER JOIN  sys.data_spaces ds ON  idx.[data_space_id] = ds.[data_space_id]
INNER JOIN  sys.partition_schemes    ps  ON  ds.[data_space_id]  = ps.[data_space_id]
INNER JOIN sys.partition_functions   pf  ON  ps.[function_id]    = pf.[function_id]
LEFT JOIN sys.partition_range_values rng ON  pf.[function_id]    = rng.[function_id]
AND  rng.[boundary_id] = prt.[partition_number]
WHERE tbl.object_id =object_id('DWH_dbo.Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH_SINGLE')



SELECT 
@MaxValue=max(cast(rng.value as int )),
@MinValue=min(cast(rng.value as int )),
@IsRight=max(cast(pf.boundary_value_on_right as int)),
@LastPar=max(partition_number)
FROM        sys.schemas    sch
INNER JOIN  sys.tables     tbl ON  sch.schema_id   = tbl.schema_id
INNER JOIN  sys.partitions prt ON  prt.[object_id] = tbl.[object_id]
INNER JOIN  sys.indexes    idx ON  prt.[object_id] = idx.[object_id]               AND                                prt.[index_id]  = idx.[index_id]
INNER JOIN  sys.data_spaces ds ON  idx.[data_space_id] = ds.[data_space_id]
INNER JOIN  sys.partition_schemes    ps  ON  ds.[data_space_id]  = ps.[data_space_id]
INNER JOIN sys.partition_functions   pf  ON  ps.[function_id]    = pf.[function_id]
LEFT JOIN sys.partition_range_values rng ON  pf.[function_id]    = rng.[function_id]
AND  rng.[boundary_id] = prt.[partition_number]
WHERE tbl.object_id =object_id('DWH_dbo.Fact_CustomerAction')





        IF @CurrentDay <= @MinValue_SGL 
		BEGIN
			SET @PartToSwitch_SGL = 1 
		END 

		IF @CurrentDay > @MaxValue_SGL 
		BEGIN
		     SET @PartToSwitch_SGL=@LastPar_SGL
		END 

		IF @PartToSwitch_SGL IS NULL 
		 BEGIN  
			SELECT TOP 1 @PartToSwitch_SGL = prt.[partition_number]
			FROM        sys.schemas    sch
			INNER JOIN  sys.tables     tbl ON  sch.schema_id   = tbl.schema_id
			INNER JOIN  sys.partitions prt ON  prt.[object_id] = tbl.[object_id]
			INNER JOIN  sys.indexes    idx ON  prt.[object_id] = idx.[object_id] AND prt.[index_id]  = idx.[index_id]
			INNER JOIN  sys.data_spaces ds ON  idx.[data_space_id] = ds.[data_space_id]
			INNER JOIN  sys.partition_schemes  ps  ON  ds.[data_space_id]  = ps.[data_space_id]
			INNER JOIN  sys.partition_functions pf  ON  ps.[function_id]    = pf.[function_id]
			LEFT  JOIN  sys.partition_range_values rng ON  pf.[function_id]    = rng.[function_id]
			AND  rng.[boundary_id] = prt.[partition_number]
			WHERE tbl.object_id =object_id('DWH_dbo.Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH_SINGLE')
			AND rng.value  >= @CurrentDay
			ORDER BY CAST(rng.value as int)
		END




       IF @CurrentDay <= @MinValue 
		BEGIN
			SET @PartToSwitch = 1 
		END 

		IF @CurrentDay > @MaxValue 
		BEGIN
		     SET @PartToSwitch=@LastPar
		END 

		IF @PartToSwitch IS NULL 
		 BEGIN  
			SELECT TOP 1 @PartToSwitch = prt.[partition_number]
			FROM        sys.schemas    sch
			INNER JOIN  sys.tables     tbl ON  sch.schema_id   = tbl.schema_id
			INNER JOIN  sys.partitions prt ON  prt.[object_id] = tbl.[object_id]
			INNER JOIN  sys.indexes    idx ON  prt.[object_id] = idx.[object_id] AND prt.[index_id]  = idx.[index_id]
			INNER JOIN  sys.data_spaces ds ON  idx.[data_space_id] = ds.[data_space_id]
			INNER JOIN  sys.partition_schemes  ps  ON  ds.[data_space_id]  = ps.[data_space_id]
			INNER JOIN  sys.partition_functions pf  ON  ps.[function_id]    = pf.[function_id]
			LEFT  JOIN  sys.partition_range_values rng ON  pf.[function_id]    = rng.[function_id]
			AND  rng.[boundary_id] = prt.[partition_number]
			WHERE tbl.object_id =object_id('DWH_dbo.Fact_CustomerAction')
			AND rng.value  >= @CurrentDay
			ORDER BY CAST(rng.value as int)
		END 



---------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- build switch statement

--- 1 .switch existing data in partition to shadow table 
Set @SqlStr = 'ALTER TABLE DWH_dbo.Fact_CustomerAction SWITCH PARTITION ' + CAST(@PartToSwitch as varchar) +
' TO DWH_dbo.Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH PARTITION ' + CAST(@PartToSwitch_SGL as varchar) + ';'
--print @SqlStr   
exec (@SqlStr)

--- 2 .switch new data to partitioned table
Set @SqlStr = 'ALTER TABLE DWH_dbo.Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH_SINGLE SWITCH PARTITION ' + CAST(@PartToSwitch_SGL as varchar) + '  TO DWH_dbo.Fact_CustomerAction PARTITION ' + CAST(@PartToSwitch as varchar) +' WITH (TRUNCATE_TARGET = ON);'
--print @SqlStr
exec (@SqlStr)
--- 3. remove check constraint
---Set @SqlStr = 'ALTER TABLE dbo.Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH_SINGLE DROP CONSTRAINT FCASS_value_for_switch'

-- print @SqlStr
---exec (@SqlStr)

--- 4 . truncate shadow table
TRUNCATE TABLE DWH_dbo.Fact_CustomerAction_SWITCH

END
SP_Fact_CustomerAction_bkp_2024_08_04:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_bkp_2024_08_04] @dt [DATE] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table Fact_CustomerAction
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2018-05-09     Boris Slutski  drop table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_SocialAlert_Loggin - table not in use 
 2018-09-25     Boris Slutski  add  Redeem [DWH_dbo].Ext_Position tables
 2019-01-22     Boris Slutski  Add SesiioID & PlatformID for ActionTypeID in (2,41)
 2019-04-07     Boris Slutski  Add Update IsSettled for OpenPosition
 2020-02-16     Boris Slutski  Add CountryIDByIP to ActionType = 41
 2020-11-30     Boris Slutski  Update script to ActionTypeID = 35 
 2021-11-29     Adi Ferber     Add MoveMoneyReasonID
 2022-02-03		Inbal BML	   Add SettlementTypeID 
 2022-04-03     Adi Ferber     Add Action type 42 - Cashout Rollback
 2022-05-10     Adi Ferber     Add new Action type 43-Reverse Deposit
 2023-09-27     Adi Ferber     Add IsFeeDividend=3 for sdrt
 2024-03-05		Inbal BML	   Add IsFeeDividend=4 for sdrt 
 2024-04-03     Nir H		   add ActionTypeID in(44,45) and MoveMoneyReason=5
*********************************************************************************************/
 --   exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction] '2023-09-17'
    ---declare @dt datetime = cast(getdate()-1 as date)
	---declare @dt datetime = '2024-03-15'
	declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@dt,112))
    declare @dateID14daysAgo INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),DATEADD(DAY,-14,@dt),112))
    --SELECT @dateID, @dateID14daysAgo
	DECLARE @row_count int

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
	insert into [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
	(CID,
	Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	CreditID,
	Description,
	MoveMoneyReasonID)
	------------------------2017-02-13 update to avoid duplicate WithdrawProcessingID
	----------pull unique WithdrawProcessingID separately-------
	SELECT 
	CID,
	Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	CreditID,
	Description,
	MoveMoneyReasonID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawPaymentID IS NULL
	UNION ALL  
	SELECT 
	CID,
	MIN(Occurred) as Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	MIN(CreditID) as CreditID
	,Description
	,MoveMoneyReasonID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction WITH (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawPaymentID IS NOT NULL
	GROUP BY CID,
			Credit,
			Payment,
			TotalCashChange,
			CreditTypeID,
			CashoutID,
			CampaignID,
			PositionID,
			DepositID,
			WithdrawID,
			PaymentID,
			BonusTypeID,
			MirrorID,
			CompensationReasonID,
			WithdrawPaymentID,
			BonusCredit,
			Description,
			MoveMoneyReasonID
	OPTION(LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction1')

		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction1'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


	/*************************TRANSFOM************************/
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Ext_FCA_Real_Position',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	TRUNCATE TABLE  [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position 	(PositionID,
									CID,
									Leverage,
									NetProfit,
									CommissionOnClose,
									Commission,
									InstrumentID,
									Amount,
									CurrencyID,
									ProviderID,
									HedgeID,
									HedgeServerID,
									AmountInUnitsDecimal,
									UnitMargin,
									InitForexRate,
									SpreadedPipBid,
									SpreadedPipAsk,
									IsBuy,
									CloseOnEndOfWeek,
									EndOfWeekFee,
									OpenOccurred,
									CloseOccurred,
									ParentPositionID,
									OrigParentPositionID,
									MirrorID,
									IsOpenOpen,
									FullCommission,
									FullCommissionOnClose,
								    RedeemStatus,
									RedeemID,
									ReopenForPositionID,
									IsReOpen,
									CommissionOnCloseOrig,
									FullCommissionOnCloseOrig,
									OriginalPositionID,
									IsSettled,
								    InitialUnits,
									IsDiscounted,
									CommissionByUnits,
									FullCommissionByUnits,
									SettlementTypeID
									)
SELECT PositionID
	 , CID
	 , Leverage
	 , NetProfit
	 , CommissionOnClose
	 , Commission
	 , InstrumentID
	 , Amount
	 , CurrencyID
	 , ProviderID
	 , HedgeID
	 , HedgeServerID
	 , AmountInUnitsDecimal
	 , UnitMargin
	 , InitForexRate
	 , SpreadedPipBid
	 , SpreadedPipAsk
	 , IsBuy
	 , CloseOnEndOfWeek
	 , EndOfWeekFee
	 , OpenOccurred
	 , CloseOccurred
	 , ParentPositionID
	 , OrigParentPositionID
	 , MirrorID
	 , IsOpenOpen
     , FullCommission
	 , FullCommissionOnClose
	 , RedeemStatus
	 , RedeemID
	 , ReopenForPositionID
	 , IsReOpen
	 , CommissionOnCloseOrig
	 , FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
	 , OriginalPositionID
	 , IsSettled
	 , InitialUnits
	 , IsDiscounted
	 , CommissionByUnits
	 , FullCommissionByUnits
	 , SettlementTypeID
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position WITH (NOLOCK)




	/*START [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position*/

	update  [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position
	set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position a 
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog b
	on a.PositionID = b.PositionID

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position	(PositionID,
										CID,
										Leverage,
										NetProfit,
										CommissionOnClose,
										Commission,
										InstrumentID,
										Amount,
										CurrencyID,
										ProviderID,
										HedgeID,
										HedgeServerID,
										AmountInUnitsDecimal,
										UnitMargin,
										InitForexRate,
										SpreadedPipBid,
										SpreadedPipAsk,
										IsBuy,
										CloseOnEndOfWeek,
										EndOfWeekFee,
										OpenOccurred,
										CloseOccurred,
										ParentPositionID,
										OrigParentPositionID,
										MirrorID,
										IsOpenOpen,
										FullCommission,
										FullCommissionOnClose,
										RedeemStatus,
									    RedeemID,
										ReopenForPositionID,
										IsReOpen,
										CommissionOnCloseOrig,
										FullCommissionOnCloseOrig,
									    IsSettled,
								        InitialUnits,
										IsDiscounted,
									    CommissionByUnits,
									    FullCommissionByUnits,
										SettlementTypeID
										)
	SELECT a.PositionID
			   ,a.CID
			   ,a.Leverage
			   ,0 as NetProfit
			   ,0 AS CommissionOnClose
			   ,a.Commission AS Commission
			   ,a.InstrumentID
			   ,ISNULL(a.Amount,0) 
			   ,a.CurrencyID
			   ,a.ProviderID
			   ,a.HedgeID
			   ,a.HedgeServerID
			   ,a.AmountInUnitsDecimal
			   ,a.UnitMargin
			   ,a.InitForexRate
			   ,a.SpreadedPipBid
			   ,a.SpreadedPipAsk
			   ,a.IsBuy
			   ,a.CloseOnEndOfWeek
			   ,a.EndOfWeekFee
			   ,a.OpenOccurred
			   ,0 AS CloseOccurred
			   ,a.ParentPositionID
			   ,a.OrigParentPositionID
			   ,a.MirrorID
			   ,a.IsOpenOpen
			   ,ISNULL(a.FullCommission,0.00)
			   , 0.00 FullCommissionOnClose
			   ,a.RedeemStatus
			   ,a.RedeemID
			   , a.ReopenForPositionID
				 , a.IsReOpen
				 , a.CommissionOnCloseOrig
				 , a.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
				 , a.IsSettled
				 , a.InitialUnits
				 , a.IsDiscounted
				 , a.CommissionByUnits
				 , a.FullCommissionByUnits
				 , a.SettlementTypeID
		  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position a WITH (NOLOCK)
		  left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position b
		  on(a.PositionID=b.PositionID) 
		  where b.PositionID is null
		  OPTION (LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position2') 
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position2'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Ext_FCA_Real_Position',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


	-------------------------------
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#RegulationIDOnOpen') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #RegulationIDOnOpen;
	---Drop table if exists #RegulationIDOnOpen

	Select * 
	into #RegulationIDOnOpen
	from
	(
	Select CID, isnull(RegulationID, 0) as RegulationID,Occurred, 
	row_number() over (partition by CID order by Occurred desc) rn
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_BackOffice_Customer
	) a
	where rn=1


	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
	SET RegulationIDOnOpen = isnull(a.RegulationID, 0)
	FROM #RegulationIDOnOpen a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position c
	ON a.CID = c.CID 
	-----------------------

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
	SET 
	IsAirDrop = 1
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position AS a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Position_AirDrop b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID


	--------------ReOpenPosition - Commission On Close
	
--	DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #ReopenForPosition
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ReopenForPosition') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ReopenForPosition;

select PositionID, ReopenForPositionID, CommissionOnClose,FullCommissionOnClose
into #ReopenForPosition  -- postions IsReOpen =1 for update  fron Trade
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
where IsReOpen = 1


--create CLUSTERED INdex #ReopenForPosition on #ReopenForPosition(PositionID)

--	DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #PositionOrigin
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PositionOrigin') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #PositionOrigin;
-- Old position 
SELECT a.PositionID, a.CommissionOnClose,a.FullCommissionOnClose
into #PositionOrigin -- Origin Commission 
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction  a 
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position b 
on a.PositionID = b.ReopenForPositionID
where  ActionTypeID in (4,5,6,28,40)  and a.DateID < @dateID

--  position close and reopen in same day
insert into #PositionOrigin -- Origin Commission 
SELECT a.PositionID, a.CommissionOnClose,a.FullCommissionOnClose
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position  a 
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position b 
on a.PositionID = b.ReopenForPositionID

--create CLUSTERED INdex #PositionOrigin on #PositionOrigin(PositionID)


Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
SET
CommissionOnClose = b.CommissionOnClose - c.CommissionOnClose
, FullCommissionOnClose = isnull(b.FullCommissionOnClose,0) - isnull(c.FullCommissionOnClose,0)
FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position a 
JOIN #ReopenForPosition b on a.PositionID = b.PositionID -- postion for update 
			   join #PositionOrigin c on b.ReopenForPositionID  = c.PositionID -- data from origin position 
 where a.CloseOccurred <>'1900-01-01 00:00:00.000'

-------------------------------------------------------


	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	/*OpenPositions*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Open Positions_Real',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , Leverage
										   , InstrumentID
										   , PositionID
										   , Commission
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   , FullCommission
										   , FullCommissionOnClose
										   , RegulationIDOnOpen
										   , ReopenForPositionID
										   , IsReOpen
										   , SessionID
										   , MirrorID
										   , IsSettled
										   , InitialUnits
										   , IsDiscounted
										   , CommissionByUnits
										   , FullCommissionByUnits
										   , IsAirDrop
										   , SettlementTypeID
										   )
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , CASE
			   WHEN d.PositionID is null THEN 39 /*PositionOpenTypeUnknown- need to fix at weekly maintenance*/

			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   1
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   2
			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   3
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		 ,0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(a.TotalCashChange, 0)
		 , isnull(d.Leverage, 0)
		 , isnull(d.InstrumentID, 0)
		 , isnull(d.PositionID, 0)
		 , isnull(d.Commission, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 , d.FullCommission
		 , d.FullCommissionOnClose
		 , d.RegulationIDOnOpen
		 , d.ReopenForPositionID
		 , d.IsReOpen
		 , CASE 
		   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 then b.SessionID 
		   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN e.SessionID
		   else null end as SessionID
		 , d.MirrorID
		 , IsSettled
	     , InitialUnits
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , CommissionByUnits
	     , FullCommissionByUnits
		 , IsAirDrop
		 , d.SettlementTypeID
	FROM
		(SELECT *
		 FROM
			 [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
		 WHERE
			 CreditTypeID = 3) a
		JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position d
			ON (a.PositionID = d.PositionID )
			Left JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Position_Session b
			on a.PositionID = b.PositionID
			Left JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session e
			on d.MirrorID = e.MirrorID
	OPTION (LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All1')
	
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All1'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Open Positions_Real',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	UPDATE STATISTICS [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction WITH FULLSCAN

	----***************************
	---- Fund All CopyPositionOPen

		--Drop Table IF EXISTS #CopyPositionOpen
		IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#CopyPositionOpen') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #CopyPositionOpen;
		select a.PositionID, a.ParentPositionID
		into #CopyPositionOpen
		from
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position a
		left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position b
		on a.ParentPositionID = b.PositionID
		where  a.ParentPositionID <>0

		---- Fund All PositionOPen
		--Drop Table IF EXISTS #PositionOpenSessionID
		IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PositionOpenSessionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #PositionOpenSessionID;
		
		select PositionID, SessionID
		into #PositionOpenSessionID
		from
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
		where  ActionTypeID in ( 1,2)

        --- Fill SessionID for ActionTypeID = 2 


   
	    Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction  --(30709 rows affected)
		set
		SessionID = b.SessionID
		from 
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction c
		join
		#CopyPositionOpen a 
		on c.PositionID = a.PositionID and c.ActionTypeID = 2
		join #PositionOpenSessionID b
		on a.ParentPositionID = b.PositionID
	     ----***************************

	/*ClosedPositions*/
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Closed Positions_Real',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , InstrumentID
										   , NetProfit
										   , CommissionOnClose
										   , Commission
										   , PositionID
										   , Leverage
										  -- , DurationInSeconds
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   , FullCommission
										   , FullCommissionOnClose
										   , RedeemStatus
									       , RedeemID
										   , IsRedeem
										   , RegulationIDOnOpen
										   , ReopenForPositionID
										   , IsReOpen
										   , CommissionOnCloseOrig
										   , FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
										   , OriginalPositionID
										   , IsPartialCloseChild
										   , IsSettled
										   , InitialUnits
										   , IsDiscounted
										   , CommissionByUnits
										   , FullCommissionByUnits
										   , IsAirDrop
										   , SettlementTypeID
										   )
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 ,  CASE
			   WHEN d.PositionID is null THEN 40 /*PositionCloseTypeUnknown- need to fix at weekly maintenance*/

			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   4
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   5
			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   6
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   28
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		   ,0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(a.TotalCashChange, 0)
		 , isnull(d.InstrumentID, 0) 
		 , isnull(NetProfit, 0)
		 , isnull(CommissionOnClose, 0)
		 , isnull(Commission, 0)
		 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0)
		 , Leverage
		-- , isnull(DurationInSeconds, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 , isnull(d.FullCommission, 0)
		 , isnull(d.FullCommissionOnClose, 0)
		 , isnull(d.RedeemStatus, 0)
		 , d.RedeemID
		 , case when d.RedeemID is null then 0 else 1 end as IsRedeem
		 , d.RegulationIDOnOpen
		 , d.ReopenForPositionID
		 , d.IsReOpen
		 , d.CommissionOnCloseOrig
		 , d.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		 , d.OriginalPositionID
		 , case when a.PositionID <>   d.OriginalPositionID   and  d.OriginalPositionID  is not null then 1 else  0 end IsPartialCloseChild
		 , IsSettled
	     , InitialUnits
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , CommissionByUnits
	     , FullCommissionByUnits
		 , IsAirDrop
		 , d.SettlementTypeID
	FROM
		(SELECT CID
			  , PositionID
			  , Occurred
			  , Payment
			  , TotalCashChange
		 FROM
			 [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
		 WHERE
			 CreditTypeID = 4) a
		JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position d
			ON (a.PositionID = d.PositionID )
	OPTION (LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All4')

	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All4'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , PositionID

select
CID
, Occurred
, IsReal
, ActionTypeID
, PlatformTypeID
, Amount
, credit.PositionID
, DateID
, TimeID
,StatusID
,MirrorID
,IsFeeDividend
,DividendID
from
(
Select ---564,210
*,
row_number() over (partition by PositionID, IsFeeDividend order by Occurred, Amount) rn
from
(
	SELECT CID
		 , Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , 35 as ActionTypeID
		 , 0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(TotalCashChange, 0) as Amount---- Changed from Payment by Geri 20140619
		 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0) as PositionID
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, Occurred, 112)) as DateID
		 , datepart (HOUR, Occurred) as TimeID
		 ,1 as StatusID
		 ,isnull(MirrorID,0) as MirrorID -- added by Geri 20140619 
		 ,case when lower(Description) like '%dividend%' OR  Description  like '%divident%' then 2 
			   when Lower(Description) like '%sdrt%'  then 3
			   when Lower(Description) like '%opentotalfees%' or Lower(Description) like '%closetotalfees%' then 4
			   else 1 end as IsFeeDividend
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All a
		WHERE
		CreditTypeID = 14
		)a
		)credit
		left join
		(select * ,
		row_number() over (partition by PositionID order by ProcessTime, DividendValueInCurrency) rn--?? only dividends 
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionsProcessedForIndexDividnds
		) dividnd
		on credit.PositionID = dividnd.PositionID 
		and credit.rn = dividnd.rn
		and IsFeeDividend =2
		OPTION (LABEL ='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All6')

	 --Create NonClustered Index WithdrawPaymentID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction(WithdrawPaymentID); -- 2 sec

	 --Create NonClustered Index WithdrawPaymentID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding(WithdrawPaymentID); --4 sec

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Cashier',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	print 'Cashier| TIME IS: ' + convert(varchar(30),getdate(),120)
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , PositionID
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , CampaignID
										   , BonusTypeID
										   , FundingTypeID
										   , WithdrawID
										   , DepositID
										   , WithdrawPaymentID
										   , IPNumber
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , CompensationReasonID
										   , StatusID
										   , IsRedeem
										   , SessionID
										   , IsFTD
										   ,MoveMoneyReasonID)
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , a.PositionID
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , CASE --ActionTypeID
			  -- WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 AND c.FundingID = 5 THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				--   38 /*Affiliate Deposit*/
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 and isnull(MoveMoneyReasonID,0)<>5 THEN
				   7
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 and isnull(MoveMoneyReasonID,0)<>5 THEN
				   8
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 6 THEN
				   36 
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 7 THEN
				   9
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 11 THEN
				   11
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 12 THEN
				   12
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 16 THEN
				   13
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 29 THEN
				   34
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 33 THEN
				   42
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 32 THEN
				   43
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 and MoveMoneyReasonID=5 THEN
				   44
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 and MoveMoneyReasonID=5 THEN
				   45
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		 , CASE 
			   WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN 0
				   --CASE ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
					  -- WHEN FunnelID IN (7, 8, 9) THEN
						 --  2
					  -- WHEN FunnelID IN (20, 5) THEN
						 --  1
					  -- WHEN FunnelID = 6 THEN
						 --  3
					  -- ELSE
						 --  0
				   --END
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   2
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS PlatformTypeID
		 , ISNULL(CASE
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 THEN
				   b.Amount
			   ELSE
				  a.Payment
		   END, 0) AS Amount
		 , isnull(CampaignID, 0)
		 , isnull(BonusTypeID, 0)
		 , CASE
			   WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				   isnull(d.FundingTypeID,  isnull(dd.FundingTypeID, 0))
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   isnull(b.FundingTypeID, 0)
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS FundingType
		 , isnull(a.WithdrawID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.DepositID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.WithdrawPaymentID, 0)
		 , CASE
			  WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				   isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(d.IPAddress), 0)
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(b.IPAddress), 0)
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS IPNumber
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, Occurred)
		 , isnull(CompensationReasonID, 0)
		 , 1
		 , case when CreditTypeID = 2 and b.FundingTypeID = 27 then 1 else 0 end as IsRedeem
		 , CASE WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 THEN d.SessionID else null end as SessionID
		 , d.IsFTD
		 ,MoveMoneyReasonID
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All a
		LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding b
			ON (a.WithdrawPaymentID = b.WithdrawPaymentID AND b.CashoutStatusID = 3) --WithdrawPaymentID (in [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction) = ID (in Billing.WithdrawToFuding) = WithdrawProccessingID (in History.Credit))
		--LEFT JOIN DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit c ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
			--ON (a.DepositID = c.DepositID)
			----Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit_Session d
			----on a.DepositID = d.DepositID --> union to one table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit
			Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit d
			on a.DepositID = d.DepositID and d.PaymentStatusID = 2
			Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit dd
			on a.DepositID = dd.DepositID and dd.PaymentStatusID = 11	
	WHERE
		CreditTypeID IN (1, 2, 6, 7, 11, 12, 16,29,33,32)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All8')
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All8'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;


	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Cashier',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	/** Add historic data where WTF ID does not exist - FOR HISTORY ONLY **/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','WTF History-Fix',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	--1. Get all Withdraws where WithdrawPaymentID is null, ActionType = 8 (Pay cashout part) and rank by order
	--Drop table #OldCOs
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OldCOs') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #OldCOs

	SELECT CustomerActionID,WithdrawID,
	RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY WithdrawID ORDER BY Occurred) as Ranking
	INTO #OldCOs
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	WHERE ActionTypeID = 8
	AND (WithdrawPaymentID is null or WithdrawPaymentID = 0)

	--2. Get all successfull cashout payments (CashoutStatusID = 3) and rank by order
	--Drop table #OldWTF
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OldWTF') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #OldWTF

	SELECT WithdrawID, WithdrawPaymentID, Amount, IPAddress, FundingTypeID, 
	RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY WithdrawID ORDER BY ModificationDate) as Ranking
	INTO #OldWTF
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding
	WHERE CashoutStatusID = 3

	--3. Update all missing fields with Payment, FundingType, and IP

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.WithdrawPaymentID = #OldWTF.WithdrawPaymentID
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.Amount = #OldWTF.Amount
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.IPNumber = isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(#OldWTF.IPAddress), 0)
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.FundingTypeID = #OldWTF.FundingTypeID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	INNER JOIN #OldWTF ON 
	[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.WithdrawID = #OldWTF.WithdrawID
	INNER JOIN #OldCOs ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.CustomerActionID = #OldCOs.CustomerActionID
	WHERE #OldCOs.Ranking = #OldWTF.Ranking
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction9')
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction9'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	SELECT CID

			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 18 THEN
				   15

				   16
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 20 THEN
				   17
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 21 THEN
				   18
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 27 THEN
				   19
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 28 THEN
				   20
		   END
		 , 0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(Payment, 0) AS Amount
		 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.MirrorID, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 ,case when CreditTypeID = 20 THEN b.SessionID else null end as SessionID
	FROM

		--drop table if EXISTS #Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate

					 when FunnelID = 36 and b.PlatformID=109 then 110
					 when FunnelID = 36 then 117			 
					 when FunnelID = 42 then 111
					 when FunnelID = 43 then 105
					 when b.PlatformID = 116 then 117 --(reToro	Web	Browsers)
					 when b.PlatformID = 109 then 110 --(reToro	Mobile	iOS)
					 when b.PlatformID = 103 then 104 --(reToro	Mobile	Android)
					 when b.PlatformID is not null then b.PlatformID
					 end				  
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration a

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET

						 then convert(DECIMAL(38), cast(4 AS VARCHAR(1)) + cast(IsReal AS VARCHAR(1)) + right('00' + cast(ActionTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('00' + cast(PlatformTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('0000000000' + cast(RealCID AS VARCHAR(10)), 10))
						 else convert(DECIMAL(38), cast(4 AS VARCHAR(1)) + cast(IsReal AS VARCHAR(1)) + right('00' + cast(ActionTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('00' + cast(PlatformTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('0000000000' + cast(GCID AS VARCHAR(10)), 10))

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','UpdateHistoryID',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


	--- Update PlatformId for Session Deposit / Manual Open Position / Mirror
		TRUNCATE tABLE [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14]


		INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14]
           ([SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID]
           ,[DateID])
		SELECT
			[SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID]
           ,[DateID]
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
		where ActionTypeID = 14



	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.PlatformID = b.PlatformID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14 b
	on a.SessionID = b.SessionID
	where a.ActionTypeID in(1, 2, 7, 17)

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	Set CountryIDByIP = di.CountryID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction lg
    JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_CountryIP di WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON lg.IPNumber BETWEEN di.IPFrom AND di.IPTo
	where  lg.IPNumber is not null and lg.IPNumber !=0


	------- Update Anonymous IP 
	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	Set 
	CountryIDByIP = di.CountryID,
	IsAnonymousIP = 1,
	ProxyType = di.ProxyType
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction lg
    JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_CountryIPAnonymous di WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON lg.IPNumber BETWEEN di.IPFrom AND di.IPTo
	where  lg.IPNumber is not null and lg.IPNumber !=0

------ Session Id for 
/*
1. 17 - Register new mirror.
2. 2 - CopyPositionOpen.   
3. 1 - ManualPositionOpen.
4. 7 - Deposit.  
*/

    --drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeIDsRealCID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeIDsRealCID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeIDsRealCID;
		
    SELECT Distinct RealCID
    into #ActionTypeIDsRealCID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where (ActionTypeID in (1,2,7,17) and  (SessionID  = 0 or SessionID is null or SessionID = -1 or PlatformID is null)) 

    -- found SessionID for action type LogIN
   -- drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeID14SessionID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeID14SessionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeID14SessionID;


    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
    into #ActionTypeID14SessionID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)

    -- found relevant data for update
    insert into #ActionTypeID14SessionID
		   Select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
   from
   (
    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID, 
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCID ORDER BY Occurred desc,SessionID desc) AS RN
    from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)
    and DateID >= @dateID14daysAgo and DateID < @dateID
	)a where RN=1

    ------select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
    ------from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
    ------where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)
    ------and DateID >= @dateID14daysAgo

    -- Found rows for update
    --drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeIDsSessionID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeIDsSessionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeIDsSessionID;

    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID, DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    into #ActionTypeIDsSessionID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID in (1,2,7,17) and  (SessionID  = 0 or SessionID is null or SessionID = -1 or PlatformID is null) 
	and RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)

   -- drop table If EXISTS #UpdateSession
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#UpdateSession') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #UpdateSession;

    -- data for update
    select
    RealCID, PlatformID, SessionID,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    into #UpdateSession
    from
    (
    select *
        ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCID,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID ORDER BY Occurred) AS RN
        from
    (
        select a.RealCID, a.PlatformID, a.SessionID, a.Occurred, Datediff(SECOND, a.Occurred, b.Occurred) DiffSecond ,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    from #ActionTypeID14SessionID a
    left join #ActionTypeIDsSessionID b
    on a.RealCID = b.RealCID
    and
    a.Occurred<=b.Occurred
    --where b.ActionTypeID = 7
    ) a
    ) b
    where RN = 1

    -- run script to update MirrorID ActionTypeID in (17)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.MirrorID = b.MirrorID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (17)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)


        -- run script to update DepositID ActionTypeID in (7)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.DepositID = b.DepositID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (7)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)

            -- run script to update PositionID ActionTypeID in (1,2)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.PositionID = b.PositionID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (1,2)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)

SP_Fact_CustomerAction_bkp_2024_08_20:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_bkp_2024_08_20] @dt [DATE] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table Fact_CustomerAction
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2018-05-09     Boris Slutski  drop table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_SocialAlert_Loggin - table not in use 
 2018-09-25     Boris Slutski  add  Redeem [DWH_dbo].Ext_Position tables
 2019-01-22     Boris Slutski  Add SesiioID & PlatformID for ActionTypeID in (2,41)
 2019-04-07     Boris Slutski  Add Update IsSettled for OpenPosition
 2020-02-16     Boris Slutski  Add CountryIDByIP to ActionType = 41
 2020-11-30     Boris Slutski  Update script to ActionTypeID = 35 
 2021-11-29     Adi Ferber     Add MoveMoneyReasonID
 2022-02-03		Inbal BML	   Add SettlementTypeID 
 2022-04-03     Adi Ferber     Add Action type 42 - Cashout Rollback
 2022-05-10     Adi Ferber     Add new Action type 43-Reverse Deposit
 2023-09-27     Adi Ferber     Add IsFeeDividend=3 for sdrt
 2024-03-05		Inbal BML	   Add IsFeeDividend=4 for sdrt 
 2024-04-03     Nir H		   add ActionTypeID in(44,45) and MoveMoneyReason=5
 2024-06-02     Ofir A         add DLT columns

*********************************************************************************************/
 --   exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction] '2023-09-17'
    ---declare @dt datetime = cast(getdate()-1 as date)
	---declare @dt datetime = '2024-03-15'
	declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@dt,112))
    declare @dateID14daysAgo INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),DATEADD(DAY,-14,@dt),112))
    --SELECT @dateID, @dateID14daysAgo
	DECLARE @row_count int

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
	insert into [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
	(CID,
	Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	CreditID,
	Description,
	MoveMoneyReasonID)
	------------------------2017-02-13 update to avoid duplicate WithdrawProcessingID
	----------pull unique WithdrawProcessingID separately-------
	SELECT 
	CID,
	Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	CreditID,
	Description,
	MoveMoneyReasonID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawPaymentID IS NULL
	UNION ALL  
	SELECT 
	CID,
	MIN(Occurred) as Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	MIN(CreditID) as CreditID
	,Description
	,MoveMoneyReasonID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction WITH (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawPaymentID IS NOT NULL
	GROUP BY CID,
			Credit,
			Payment,
			TotalCashChange,
			CreditTypeID,
			CashoutID,
			CampaignID,
			PositionID,
			DepositID,
			WithdrawID,
			PaymentID,
			BonusTypeID,
			MirrorID,
			CompensationReasonID,
			WithdrawPaymentID,
			BonusCredit,
			Description,
			MoveMoneyReasonID
	OPTION(LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction1')

		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction1'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


	/*************************TRANSFOM************************/
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Ext_FCA_Real_Position',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	TRUNCATE TABLE  [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position 	(PositionID,
									CID,
									Leverage,
									NetProfit,
									CommissionOnClose,
									Commission,
									InstrumentID,
									Amount,
									CurrencyID,
									ProviderID,
									HedgeID,
									HedgeServerID,
									AmountInUnitsDecimal,
									UnitMargin,
									InitForexRate,
									SpreadedPipBid,
									SpreadedPipAsk,
									IsBuy,
									CloseOnEndOfWeek,
									EndOfWeekFee,
									OpenOccurred,
									CloseOccurred,
									ParentPositionID,
									OrigParentPositionID,
									MirrorID,
									IsOpenOpen,
									FullCommission,
									FullCommissionOnClose,
								    RedeemStatus,
									RedeemID,
									ReopenForPositionID,
									IsReOpen,
									CommissionOnCloseOrig,
									FullCommissionOnCloseOrig,
									OriginalPositionID,
									IsSettled,
								    InitialUnits,
									IsDiscounted,
									CommissionByUnits,
									FullCommissionByUnits,
									SettlementTypeID,
									DLTOpen,
                                    DLTClose,
		                            OpenMarkupByUnits
									)
SELECT PositionID
	 , CID
	 , Leverage
	 , NetProfit
	 , CommissionOnClose
	 , Commission
	 , InstrumentID
	 , Amount
	 , CurrencyID
	 , ProviderID
	 , HedgeID
	 , HedgeServerID
	 , AmountInUnitsDecimal
	 , UnitMargin
	 , InitForexRate
	 , SpreadedPipBid
	 , SpreadedPipAsk
	 , IsBuy
	 , CloseOnEndOfWeek
	 , EndOfWeekFee
	 , OpenOccurred
	 , CloseOccurred
	 , ParentPositionID
	 , OrigParentPositionID
	 , MirrorID
	 , IsOpenOpen
     , FullCommission
	 , FullCommissionOnClose
	 , RedeemStatus
	 , RedeemID
	 , ReopenForPositionID
	 , IsReOpen
	 , CommissionOnCloseOrig
	 , FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
	 , OriginalPositionID
	 , IsSettled
	 , InitialUnits
	 , IsDiscounted
	 , CommissionByUnits
	 , FullCommissionByUnits
	 , SettlementTypeID
	 , DLTOpen
     , DLTClose
	 , OpenMarkupByUnits
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position WITH (NOLOCK)




	/*START [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position*/

	update  [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position
	set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position a 
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionChangeLog b
	on a.PositionID = b.PositionID

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position	(PositionID,
										CID,
										Leverage,
										NetProfit,
										CommissionOnClose,
										Commission,
										InstrumentID,
										Amount,
										CurrencyID,
										ProviderID,
										HedgeID,
										HedgeServerID,
										AmountInUnitsDecimal,
										UnitMargin,
										InitForexRate,
										SpreadedPipBid,
										SpreadedPipAsk,
										IsBuy,
										CloseOnEndOfWeek,
										EndOfWeekFee,
										OpenOccurred,
										CloseOccurred,
										ParentPositionID,
										OrigParentPositionID,
										MirrorID,
										IsOpenOpen,
										FullCommission,
										FullCommissionOnClose,
										RedeemStatus,
									    RedeemID,
										ReopenForPositionID,
										IsReOpen,
										CommissionOnCloseOrig,
										FullCommissionOnCloseOrig,
									    IsSettled,
								        InitialUnits,
										IsDiscounted,
									    CommissionByUnits,
									    FullCommissionByUnits,
										SettlementTypeID,
										DLTOpen,
                                        DLTClose,
		                                OpenMarkupByUnits
										)
	SELECT a.PositionID
			   ,a.CID
			   ,a.Leverage
			   ,0 as NetProfit
			   ,0 AS CommissionOnClose
			   ,a.Commission AS Commission
			   ,a.InstrumentID
			   ,ISNULL(a.Amount,0) 
			   ,a.CurrencyID
			   ,a.ProviderID
			   ,a.HedgeID
			   ,a.HedgeServerID
			   ,a.AmountInUnitsDecimal
			   ,a.UnitMargin
			   ,a.InitForexRate
			   ,a.SpreadedPipBid
			   ,a.SpreadedPipAsk
			   ,a.IsBuy
			   ,a.CloseOnEndOfWeek
			   ,a.EndOfWeekFee
			   ,a.OpenOccurred
			   ,0 AS CloseOccurred
			   ,a.ParentPositionID
			   ,a.OrigParentPositionID
			   ,a.MirrorID
			   ,a.IsOpenOpen
			   ,ISNULL(a.FullCommission,0.00)
			   , 0.00 FullCommissionOnClose
			   ,a.RedeemStatus
			   ,a.RedeemID
			   , a.ReopenForPositionID
			   , a.IsReOpen
			   , a.CommissionOnCloseOrig
			   , a.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
			   , a.IsSettled
			   , a.InitialUnits
			   , a.IsDiscounted
			   , a.CommissionByUnits
			   , a.FullCommissionByUnits
			   , a.SettlementTypeID
			   , isnull(b.DLTOpen, a.DLTOpen)
               , isnull(b.DLTClose, a.DLTClose)
		       , isnull(b.OpenMarkupByUnits, a.OpenMarkupByUnits)
		  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position a WITH (NOLOCK)
		  left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_History_Position b
		  on(a.PositionID=b.PositionID) 
		  where b.PositionID is null
		  OPTION (LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position2') 


		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_Trade_Position2'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Ext_FCA_Real_Position',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


	-------------------------------
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#RegulationIDOnOpen') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #RegulationIDOnOpen;
	---Drop table if exists #RegulationIDOnOpen

	Select * 
	into #RegulationIDOnOpen
	from
	(
	Select CID, isnull(RegulationID, 0) as RegulationID,Occurred, 
	row_number() over (partition by CID order by Occurred desc) rn
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_BackOffice_Customer
	) a
	where rn=1


	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
	SET RegulationIDOnOpen = isnull(a.RegulationID, 0)
	FROM #RegulationIDOnOpen a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position c
	ON a.CID = c.CID 
	-----------------------

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
	SET 
	IsAirDrop = 1
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position AS a
	JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Position_AirDrop b
	ON a.PositionID = b.PositionID


	--------------ReOpenPosition - Commission On Close
	
--	DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #ReopenForPosition
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ReopenForPosition') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ReopenForPosition;

select PositionID, ReopenForPositionID, CommissionOnClose,FullCommissionOnClose
into #ReopenForPosition  -- postions IsReOpen =1 for update  fron Trade
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
where IsReOpen = 1


--create CLUSTERED INdex #ReopenForPosition on #ReopenForPosition(PositionID)

--	DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #PositionOrigin
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PositionOrigin') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #PositionOrigin;
-- Old position 
SELECT a.PositionID, a.CommissionOnClose,a.FullCommissionOnClose
into #PositionOrigin -- Origin Commission 
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction  a 
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position b 
on a.PositionID = b.ReopenForPositionID
where  ActionTypeID in (4,5,6,28,40)  and a.DateID < @dateID

--  position close and reopen in same day
insert into #PositionOrigin -- Origin Commission 
SELECT a.PositionID, a.CommissionOnClose,a.FullCommissionOnClose
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position  a 
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position b 
on a.PositionID = b.ReopenForPositionID

--create CLUSTERED INdex #PositionOrigin on #PositionOrigin(PositionID)


Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
SET
CommissionOnClose = b.CommissionOnClose - c.CommissionOnClose
, FullCommissionOnClose = isnull(b.FullCommissionOnClose,0) - isnull(c.FullCommissionOnClose,0)
FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position a 
JOIN #ReopenForPosition b on a.PositionID = b.PositionID -- postion for update 
			   join #PositionOrigin c on b.ReopenForPositionID  = c.PositionID -- data from origin position 
 where a.CloseOccurred <>'1900-01-01 00:00:00.000'

-------------------------------------------------------


	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	/*OpenPositions*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Open Positions_Real',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , Leverage
										   , InstrumentID
										   , PositionID
										   , Commission
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   , FullCommission
										   , FullCommissionOnClose
										   , RegulationIDOnOpen
										   , ReopenForPositionID
										   , IsReOpen
										   , SessionID
										   , MirrorID
										   , IsSettled
										   , InitialUnits
										   , IsDiscounted
										   , CommissionByUnits
										   , FullCommissionByUnits
										   , IsAirDrop
										   , SettlementTypeID
										   , DLTOpen
                                           , DLTClose
		                                   , OpenMarkupByUnits
										   )
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , CASE
			   WHEN d.PositionID is null THEN 39 /*PositionOpenTypeUnknown- need to fix at weekly maintenance*/

			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   1
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   2
			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   3
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		 ,0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(a.TotalCashChange, 0)
		 , isnull(d.Leverage, 0)
		 , isnull(d.InstrumentID, 0)
		 , isnull(d.PositionID, 0)
		 , isnull(d.Commission, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 , d.FullCommission
		 , d.FullCommissionOnClose
		 , d.RegulationIDOnOpen
		 , d.ReopenForPositionID
		 , d.IsReOpen
		 , CASE 
		   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 then b.SessionID 
		   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN e.SessionID
		   else null end as SessionID
		 , d.MirrorID
		 , IsSettled
	     , InitialUnits
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , CommissionByUnits
	     , FullCommissionByUnits
		 , IsAirDrop
		 , d.SettlementTypeID
		 , d.DLTOpen
         , d.DLTClose
		 , d.OpenMarkupByUnits
	FROM
		(SELECT *
		 FROM
			 [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
		 WHERE
			 CreditTypeID = 3) a
		JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position d
			ON (a.PositionID = d.PositionID )
			Left JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Position_Session b
			on a.PositionID = b.PositionID
			Left JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session e
			on d.MirrorID = e.MirrorID
	OPTION (LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All1')
	
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All1'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Open Positions_Real',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	UPDATE STATISTICS [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction WITH FULLSCAN

	----***************************
	---- Fund All CopyPositionOPen

		--Drop Table IF EXISTS #CopyPositionOpen
		IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#CopyPositionOpen') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #CopyPositionOpen;
		select a.PositionID, a.ParentPositionID
		into #CopyPositionOpen
		from
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position a
		left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position b
		on a.ParentPositionID = b.PositionID
		where  a.ParentPositionID <>0

		---- Fund All PositionOPen
		--Drop Table IF EXISTS #PositionOpenSessionID
		IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PositionOpenSessionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #PositionOpenSessionID;
		
		select PositionID, SessionID
		into #PositionOpenSessionID
		from
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
		where  ActionTypeID in ( 1,2)

        --- Fill SessionID for ActionTypeID = 2 


   
	    Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction  --(30709 rows affected)
		set
		SessionID = b.SessionID
		from 
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction c
		join
		#CopyPositionOpen a 
		on c.PositionID = a.PositionID and c.ActionTypeID = 2
		join #PositionOpenSessionID b
		on a.ParentPositionID = b.PositionID
	     ----***************************

	/*ClosedPositions*/
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Closed Positions_Real',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , InstrumentID
										   , NetProfit
										   , CommissionOnClose
										   , Commission
										   , PositionID
										   , Leverage
										  -- , DurationInSeconds
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   , FullCommission
										   , FullCommissionOnClose
										   , RedeemStatus
									       , RedeemID
										   , IsRedeem
										   , RegulationIDOnOpen
										   , ReopenForPositionID
										   , IsReOpen
										   , CommissionOnCloseOrig
										   , FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
										   , OriginalPositionID
										   , IsPartialCloseChild
										   , IsSettled
										   , InitialUnits
										   , IsDiscounted
										   , CommissionByUnits
										   , FullCommissionByUnits
										   , IsAirDrop
										   , SettlementTypeID
										   , DLTOpen
                                           , DLTClose
		                                   , OpenMarkupByUnits
										   )
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 ,  CASE
			   WHEN d.PositionID is null THEN 40 /*PositionCloseTypeUnknown- need to fix at weekly maintenance*/

			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   4
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   5
			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   6
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   28
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		   ,0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(a.TotalCashChange, 0)
		 , isnull(d.InstrumentID, 0) 
		 , isnull(NetProfit, 0)
		 , isnull(CommissionOnClose, 0)
		 , isnull(Commission, 0)
		 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0)
		 , Leverage
		-- , isnull(DurationInSeconds, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 , isnull(d.FullCommission, 0)
		 , isnull(d.FullCommissionOnClose, 0)
		 , isnull(d.RedeemStatus, 0)
		 , d.RedeemID
		 , case when d.RedeemID is null then 0 else 1 end as IsRedeem
		 , d.RegulationIDOnOpen
		 , d.ReopenForPositionID
		 , d.IsReOpen
		 , d.CommissionOnCloseOrig
		 , d.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		 , d.OriginalPositionID
		 , case when a.PositionID <>   d.OriginalPositionID   and  d.OriginalPositionID  is not null then 1 else  0 end IsPartialCloseChild
		 , IsSettled
	     , InitialUnits
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , CommissionByUnits
	     , FullCommissionByUnits
		 , IsAirDrop
		 , d.SettlementTypeID
		 , DLTOpen
         , DLTClose
		 , OpenMarkupByUnits
	FROM
		(SELECT CID
			  , PositionID
			  , Occurred
			  , Payment
			  , TotalCashChange
		 FROM
			 [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
		 WHERE
			 CreditTypeID = 4) a
		JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position d
			ON (a.PositionID = d.PositionID )
	OPTION (LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All4')

	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All4'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;


    EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Closed Positions_Real',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	
	/*Edit Stoploss*/
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Edit Stoploss Positions_Real',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , PositionID
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID)
	SELECT CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , 32
		 ,0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(TotalCashChange, 0)
		 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
	FROM
		(SELECT CID
			  , PositionID
			  , Occurred
			  , Payment
			  , TotalCashChange
		 FROM
			 [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
		 WHERE
			 CreditTypeID = 13) a
		OPTION (LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All5')

	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count

select
CID
, Occurred
, IsReal
, ActionTypeID
, PlatformTypeID
, Amount
, credit.PositionID
, DateID
, TimeID
,StatusID
,MirrorID
,IsFeeDividend
,DividendID
from
(
Select ---564,210
*,
row_number() over (partition by PositionID, IsFeeDividend order by Occurred, Amount) rn
from
(
	SELECT CID
		 , Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , 35 as ActionTypeID
		 , 0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(TotalCashChange, 0) as Amount---- Changed from Payment by Geri 20140619
		 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0) as PositionID
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, Occurred, 112)) as DateID
		 , datepart (HOUR, Occurred) as TimeID
		 ,1 as StatusID
		 ,isnull(MirrorID,0) as MirrorID -- added by Geri 20140619 
		 ,case when lower(Description) like '%dividend%' OR  Description  like '%divident%' then 2 
			   when Lower(Description) like '%sdrt%'  then 3
			   when Lower(Description) like '%opentotalfees%' or Lower(Description) like '%closetotalfees%' then 4
			   else 1 end as IsFeeDividend
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All a
		WHERE
		CreditTypeID = 14
		)a
		)credit
		left join
		(select * ,
		row_number() over (partition by PositionID order by ProcessTime, DividendValueInCurrency) rn--?? only dividends 
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionsProcessedForIndexDividnds
		) dividnd
		on credit.PositionID = dividnd.PositionID 
		and credit.rn = dividnd.rn
		and IsFeeDividend =2

	 --Create NonClustered Index WithdrawPaymentID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction(WithdrawPaymentID); -- 2 sec

	 --Create NonClustered Index WithdrawPaymentID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding(WithdrawPaymentID); --4 sec

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Cashier',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	print 'Cashier| TIME IS: ' + convert(varchar(30),getdate(),120)
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , PositionID
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , CampaignID
										   , BonusTypeID
										   , FundingTypeID
										   , WithdrawID
										   , DepositID
										   , WithdrawPaymentID
										   , IPNumber
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , CompensationReasonID
										   , StatusID
										   , IsRedeem
										   , SessionID
										   , IsFTD
										   ,MoveMoneyReasonID)
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , a.PositionID
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , CASE --ActionTypeID
			  -- WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 AND c.FundingID = 5 THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				--   38 /*Affiliate Deposit*/
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 and isnull(MoveMoneyReasonID,0)<>5 THEN
				   7
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 and isnull(MoveMoneyReasonID,0)<>5 THEN
				   8
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 6 THEN
				   36 
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 7 THEN
				   9
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 11 THEN
				   11
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 12 THEN
				   12
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 16 THEN
				   13
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 29 THEN
				   34
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 33 THEN
				   42
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 32 THEN
				   43
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 and MoveMoneyReasonID=5 THEN
				   44
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 and MoveMoneyReasonID=5 THEN
				   45
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		 , CASE 
			   WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN 0
				   --CASE ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
					  -- WHEN FunnelID IN (7, 8, 9) THEN
						 --  2
					  -- WHEN FunnelID IN (20, 5) THEN
						 --  1
					  -- WHEN FunnelID = 6 THEN
						 --  3
					  -- ELSE
						 --  0
				   --END
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   2
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS PlatformTypeID
		 , ISNULL(CASE
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 THEN
				   b.Amount
			   ELSE
				  a.Payment
		   END, 0) AS Amount
		 , isnull(CampaignID, 0)
		 , isnull(BonusTypeID, 0)
		 , CASE
			   WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				   isnull(d.FundingTypeID,  isnull(dd.FundingTypeID, 0))
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   isnull(b.FundingTypeID, 0)
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS FundingType
		 , isnull(a.WithdrawID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.DepositID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.WithdrawPaymentID, 0)
		 , CASE
			  WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				   isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(d.IPAddress), 0)
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(b.IPAddress), 0)
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS IPNumber
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, Occurred)
		 , isnull(CompensationReasonID, 0)
		 , 1
		 , case when CreditTypeID = 2 and b.FundingTypeID = 27 then 1 else 0 end as IsRedeem
		 , CASE WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 THEN d.SessionID else null end as SessionID
		 , d.IsFTD
		 ,MoveMoneyReasonID
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All a
		LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding b
			ON (a.WithdrawPaymentID = b.WithdrawPaymentID AND b.CashoutStatusID = 3) --WithdrawPaymentID (in [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction) = ID (in Billing.WithdrawToFuding) = WithdrawProccessingID (in History.Credit))
		--LEFT JOIN DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit c ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
			--ON (a.DepositID = c.DepositID)
			----Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit_Session d
			----on a.DepositID = d.DepositID --> union to one table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit
			Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit d
			on a.DepositID = d.DepositID and d.PaymentStatusID = 2
			Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit dd
			on a.DepositID = dd.DepositID and dd.PaymentStatusID = 11	
	WHERE
		CreditTypeID IN (1, 2, 6, 7, 11, 12, 16,29,33,32)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All8')
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All8'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;
