	/** Add historic data where WTF ID does not exist - FOR HISTORY ONLY **/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','WTF History-Fix',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	--1. Get all Withdraws where WithdrawPaymentID is null, ActionType = 8 (Pay cashout part) and rank by order
	--Drop table #OldCOs
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OldCOs') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #OldCOs

	SELECT CustomerActionID,WithdrawID,
	RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY WithdrawID ORDER BY Occurred) as Ranking
	INTO #OldCOs
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	WHERE ActionTypeID = 8
	AND (WithdrawPaymentID is null or WithdrawPaymentID = 0)

	--2. Get all successfull cashout payments (CashoutStatusID = 3) and rank by order
	--Drop table #OldWTF
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OldWTF') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #OldWTF

	SELECT WithdrawID, WithdrawPaymentID, Amount, IPAddress, FundingTypeID, 
	RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY WithdrawID ORDER BY ModificationDate) as Ranking
	INTO #OldWTF
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding
	WHERE CashoutStatusID = 3

	--3. Update all missing fields with Payment, FundingType, and IP

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.WithdrawPaymentID = #OldWTF.WithdrawPaymentID
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.Amount = #OldWTF.Amount
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.IPNumber = isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(#OldWTF.IPAddress), 0)
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.FundingTypeID = #OldWTF.FundingTypeID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	INNER JOIN #OldWTF ON 
	[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.WithdrawID = #OldWTF.WithdrawID
	INNER JOIN #OldCOs ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.CustomerActionID = #OldCOs.CustomerActionID
	WHERE #OldCOs.Ranking = #OldWTF.Ranking
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction9')
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction9'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','WTF History-Fix',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	/*Cashout request*/
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','CashoutRequest',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , WithdrawID
										   , IPNumber
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , Commission
										   , StatusID
										   , IsRedeem
										   )
	SELECT a.CID
		 , Occurred
		 , 1
		 , 10
		 , 2
		 , ISNULL(Amount,0)
		 , isnull(a.WithdrawID, 0)
		 , isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(IPAddress), 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, Occurred)
		 , Fee /*We Bring the CO fee only on Requset and processed CO in order to be able to calculate Unrealized fee*/
		 , 1
		 , case when FundingTypeID = 27 then 1 else 0 end as IsRedeem
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All  a
		join  
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Tran_Billing_Withdraw b/*we use Tran_Billing_Withdraw  table and not History.Ext_FCABilling_Withdraw becuase we need Withdraws before the time of the run*/
		on(a.WithdrawID=b.WithdrawID)
		where CreditTypeID= 9 
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All10')
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r

	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All10'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , WithdrawID
										   , IPNumber
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID

										   , Commission

	SELECT CID

		 , 2

		 , isnull(WithdrawID, 0)
		 , isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(IPAddress), 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, ModificationDate, 112))

	/*

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Processed Cashouts',@dateID,10, @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	/***********************************************************************Mirror******************************************************************************/
	------------------Validation----------------

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Mirrors_Real',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , PositionID
										   , MirrorID
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   ,SessionID)
	SELECT CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , CASE
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 18 THEN
				   15
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 19 THEN
				   16
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 20 THEN
				   17
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 21 THEN
				   18
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 27 THEN
				   19
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 28 THEN
				   20
		   END
		 , 0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(Payment, 0) AS Amount
		 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.MirrorID, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 ,case when CreditTypeID = 20 THEN b.SessionID else null end as SessionID
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All a
		left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session b
		on a.MirrorID = b.MirrorID
	WHERE
		CreditTypeID IN (18, 19, 20, 21, 27, 28)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All13')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r

		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All13'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Mirrors_Real',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	/***********************************************************************OpenBook-Only Real*********************************************************************************/
	------------------Validation----------------

	---------------------------------------------

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , PostRootID
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID)
	SELECT DC.CID  as RealCID
		 , Occurred
		 , 1
		 , Case EngagementType
			   When 'Discussion' Then 21
			   When 'Comment'	 Then 22
			   When 'Like'		 Then 23
		   End
		 , Case ApplicationName
				When 'OBdesktop' Then 1
				When 'OBMobile' Then 3
				When 'Openbook Mobile Proxy - Android' Then 5
				When 'Openbook Mobile Proxy - iOS' Then 7
				When 'WebTrader' Then 2
				Else 0
		   End
		 , -1
		 , PostRootID
		 , Convert(Int, Convert(Varchar, Occurred, 112))
		 , Datepart (Hour, Occurred)
		 , 1
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement OBE With (Nolock)
		--Join DWH.[DWH_dbo].Dim_Customer DC With (Nolock) -------------------------- check with MAX, Double Table . [DWH_dbo].Extract Customer
		Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer DC With (Nolock)
			--On Lower(Right(OBE.UserName,Len(OBE.UserName)-1)) = Lower(DC.UserName) collate database_default
			On OBE.UserNameCalc =DC.UserNameCalc --collate database_default
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement14')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement14'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Open Book User Engagement',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


	--------------*****************************

		/***********************************************************************Deposit Attempt*********************************************************************************/

	/*Deposit Attempt*/   
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Deposit Attempt',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , PaymentStatusID
										   , Amount
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID)
	SELECT CID  as RealCID
		 , ModificationDate
		 , 1
		 , 27 -- Deposit Attempt
		 , 0
		 , PaymentStatusID
		 , CASE WHEN Amount >= 1000000000 THEN 999999999 ELSE Amount END AS Amount
		 , Convert(Int, Convert(Varchar, ModificationDate, 112))
		 , Datepart (Hour, ModificationDate)
		 , 1
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Deposit_Attempt  With (Nolock)


	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Deposit_Attempt15')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Deposit_Attempt15'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Deposit Attempt',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

----------*******************

	--Customer Registration/*Max 28/12/2014*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Customer Registration',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL  -- ActionTypeID = 41


	
		--drop table if EXISTS #Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate
		IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate;
		
		select CID,PlatformID
		into #Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate
		from
		(
		select CID,SessionID, a.PlatformID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CID ORDER BY a.LoggedIn) AS RowNumber
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin a
		)b
		where RowNumber =1

		update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration
		set 
		PlatformID = case 
					 when FunnelID = 36 and b.PlatformID=103 then 104
					 when FunnelID = 36 and b.PlatformID=109 then 110
					 when FunnelID = 36 then 117			 
					 when FunnelID = 42 then 111
					 when FunnelID = 43 then 105
					 when b.PlatformID = 116 then 117 --(reToro	Web	Browsers)
					 when b.PlatformID = 109 then 110 --(reToro	Mobile	iOS)
					 when b.PlatformID = 103 then 104 --(reToro	Mobile	Android)
					 when b.PlatformID is not null then b.PlatformID
					 end				  
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration a
		left join #Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate b
		on a.CID =b.CID 


	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   , PlatformID
										   , IPNumber
										   , CountryIDByIP
										   )

	SELECT CID
		  ,Registered
		  ,IsReal
		  ,ActionTypeID
		  ,PlatformTypeID
		  ,0
		  ,DateID
		  ,TimeID
		  ,1
		  ,PlatformID
		  ,case when charindex(',',IP) = 0 then isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(IP), 0)
				else isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(left(IP, charindex(',',IP)-1)), 0)
			end
	     , CountryIDByIP
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration16')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration16'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Customer Registration',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	/************************************************************************CRM Cases*****************************************************************************************/
	--support cases,retention cases, type of case (phone,chat,mail) Account Manager-Check
	------------------Validation----------------

	---------------------------------------------

	/*UPDATE GCID TO ALL RECORDS*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCAFact_CustomerAction',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	---print 'Update GCID_Real| TIME IS: ' + convert(varchar(30),getdate(),120)

	--Create NonClustered Index RealCID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCAFact_CustomerAction(RealCID);  

	--Create NonClustered Index CID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCACustomer(CID);

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET
		GCID = b.GCID, DemoCID = 0
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
		JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer b 
			ON (a.RealCID = b.CID)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction17')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction17'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCAFact_CustomerAction',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	---print 'Update GCID_Demo| TIME IS: ' + convert(varchar(30),getdate(),120)

	/*Update Keys*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','UpdateHistoryID',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET
		HistoryID = case when GCID =-1 /**/
						 then convert(DECIMAL(38), cast(4 AS VARCHAR(1)) + cast(IsReal AS VARCHAR(1)) + right('00' + cast(ActionTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('00' + cast(PlatformTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('0000000000' + cast(RealCID AS VARCHAR(10)), 10))
						 else convert(DECIMAL(38), cast(4 AS VARCHAR(1)) + cast(IsReal AS VARCHAR(1)) + right('00' + cast(ActionTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('00' + cast(PlatformTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('0000000000' + cast(GCID AS VARCHAR(10)), 10))
					end
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction18')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction18'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','UpdateHistoryID',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


	--- Update PlatformId for Session Deposit / Manual Open Position / Mirror
		TRUNCATE tABLE [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14]


		INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14]
           ([SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID]
           ,[DateID])
		SELECT
			[SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID]
           ,[DateID]
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
		where ActionTypeID = 14



	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.PlatformID = b.PlatformID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14 b
	on a.SessionID = b.SessionID
	where a.ActionTypeID in(1, 2, 7, 17)

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	Set CountryIDByIP = di.CountryID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction lg
    JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_CountryIP di WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON lg.IPNumber BETWEEN di.IPFrom AND di.IPTo
	where  lg.IPNumber is not null and lg.IPNumber !=0


	------- Update Anonymous IP 
	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	Set 
	CountryIDByIP = di.CountryID,
	IsAnonymousIP = 1,
	ProxyType = di.ProxyType
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction lg
    JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_CountryIPAnonymous di WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON lg.IPNumber BETWEEN di.IPFrom AND di.IPTo
	where  lg.IPNumber is not null and lg.IPNumber !=0

------ Session Id for 
/*
1. 17 - Register new mirror.
2. 2 - CopyPositionOpen.   
3. 1 - ManualPositionOpen.
4. 7 - Deposit.  
*/

    --drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeIDsRealCID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeIDsRealCID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeIDsRealCID;
		
    SELECT Distinct RealCID
    into #ActionTypeIDsRealCID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where (ActionTypeID in (1,2,7,17) and  (SessionID  = 0 or SessionID is null or SessionID = -1 or PlatformID is null)) 

    -- found SessionID for action type LogIN
   -- drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeID14SessionID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeID14SessionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeID14SessionID;


    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
    into #ActionTypeID14SessionID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)

    -- found relevant data for update
    insert into #ActionTypeID14SessionID
		   Select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
   from
   (
    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID, 
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCID ORDER BY Occurred desc,SessionID desc) AS RN
    from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)
    and DateID >= @dateID14daysAgo and DateID < @dateID
	)a where RN=1

    ------select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
    ------from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
    ------where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)
    ------and DateID >= @dateID14daysAgo

    -- Found rows for update
    --drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeIDsSessionID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeIDsSessionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeIDsSessionID;

    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID, DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    into #ActionTypeIDsSessionID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID in (1,2,7,17) and  (SessionID  = 0 or SessionID is null or SessionID = -1 or PlatformID is null) 
	and RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)

   -- drop table If EXISTS #UpdateSession
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#UpdateSession') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #UpdateSession;

    -- data for update
    select
    RealCID, PlatformID, SessionID,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    into #UpdateSession
    from
    (
    select *
        ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCID,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID ORDER BY Occurred) AS RN
        from
    (
        select a.RealCID, a.PlatformID, a.SessionID, a.Occurred, Datediff(SECOND, a.Occurred, b.Occurred) DiffSecond ,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    from #ActionTypeID14SessionID a
    left join #ActionTypeIDsSessionID b
    on a.RealCID = b.RealCID
    and
    a.Occurred<=b.Occurred
    --where b.ActionTypeID = 7
    ) a
    ) b
    where RN = 1

    -- run script to update MirrorID ActionTypeID in (17)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.MirrorID = b.MirrorID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (17)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)


        -- run script to update DepositID ActionTypeID in (7)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.DepositID = b.DepositID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (7)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)

            -- run script to update PositionID ActionTypeID in (1,2)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.PositionID = b.PositionID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (1,2)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)

	-------

	----EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_IsParitalCloseParent] 

END/*PROCEDURE*/

SP_Fact_CustomerAction_bkp_2024_09_25:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_bkp_2024_09_25] @dt [DATE] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table Fact_CustomerAction
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2018-05-09     Boris Slutski  drop table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_SocialAlert_Loggin - table not in use 
 2018-09-25     Boris Slutski  add  Redeem [DWH_dbo].Ext_Position tables
 2019-01-22     Boris Slutski  Add SesiioID & PlatformID for ActionTypeID in (2,41)
 2019-04-07     Boris Slutski  Add Update IsSettled for OpenPosition
 2020-02-16     Boris Slutski  Add CountryIDByIP to ActionType = 41
 2020-11-30     Boris Slutski  Update script to ActionTypeID = 35 
 2021-11-29     Adi Ferber     Add MoveMoneyReasonID
 2022-02-03		Inbal BML	   Add SettlementTypeID 
 2022-04-03     Adi Ferber     Add Action type 42 - Cashout Rollback
 2022-05-10     Adi Ferber     Add new Action type 43-Reverse Deposit
 2023-09-27     Adi Ferber     Add IsFeeDividend=3 for sdrt
 2024-03-05		Inbal BML	   Add IsFeeDividend=4 for sdrt 
 2024-04-03     Nir H		   add ActionTypeID in(44,45) and MoveMoneyReason=5
 2024-06-02     Ofir A         add DLT columns
 2024-08-08     Ofir A         add Description to Fact_CustomerAction 

*********************************************************************************************/
 --   exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction] '2023-09-17'
    ---declare @dt datetime = cast(getdate()-1 as date)
	---declare @dt datetime = '2024-03-15'
	declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@dt,112))
    declare @dateID14daysAgo INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),DATEADD(DAY,-14,@dt),112))
    --SELECT @dateID, @dateID14daysAgo
	DECLARE @row_count int

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
	insert into [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
	(CID,
	Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	CreditID,
	Description,
	MoveMoneyReasonID)
	------------------------2017-02-13 update to avoid duplicate WithdrawProcessingID
	----------pull unique WithdrawProcessingID separately-------
	SELECT 
	CID,
	Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	CreditID,
	Description,
	MoveMoneyReasonID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawPaymentID IS NULL
	UNION ALL  
	SELECT 
	CID,
	MIN(Occurred) as Occurred,
	Credit,
	Payment,
	TotalCashChange,
	CreditTypeID,
	CashoutID,
	CampaignID,
	PositionID,
	DepositID,
	WithdrawID,
	PaymentID,
	BonusTypeID,
	MirrorID,
	CompensationReasonID,
	WithdrawPaymentID,
	BonusCredit,
	MIN(CreditID) as CreditID
	,Description
	,MoveMoneyReasonID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction WITH (NOLOCK)
	WHERE WithdrawPaymentID IS NOT NULL
	GROUP BY CID,
			Credit,
			Payment,
			TotalCashChange,
			CreditTypeID,
			CashoutID,
			CampaignID,
			PositionID,
			DepositID,
			WithdrawID,
			PaymentID,
			BonusTypeID,
			MirrorID,
			CompensationReasonID,
			WithdrawPaymentID,
			BonusCredit,
			Description,
			MoveMoneyReasonID
	OPTION(LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction1')

		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction1'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	SELECT a.PositionID
			   ,a.CID

			   ,a.CurrencyID
			   ,a.ProviderID
			   ,a.HedgeID

			   ,a.UnitMargin

			   ,a.EndOfWeekFee

			   ,0 AS CloseOccurred
			   ,a.ParentPositionID
			   ,a.OrigParentPositionID
			   ,a.MirrorID
			   ,a.IsOpenOpen
			   ,ISNULL(a.FullCommission,0.00)
			   , 0.00 FullCommissionOnClose
			   ,a.RedeemStatus
			   ,a.RedeemID
			   , a.ReopenForPositionID
			   , a.IsReOpen
			   , a.CommissionOnCloseOrig
			   , a.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig

			   , a.InitialUnits

	--------------ReOpenPosition - Commission On Close
	
--	DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #ReopenForPosition
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ReopenForPosition') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ReopenForPosition;

select PositionID, ReopenForPositionID, CommissionOnClose,FullCommissionOnClose
into #ReopenForPosition  -- postions IsReOpen =1 for update  fron Trade
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
where IsReOpen = 1


--create CLUSTERED INdex #ReopenForPosition on #ReopenForPosition(PositionID)

--	DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #PositionOrigin
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PositionOrigin') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #PositionOrigin;
-- Old position 
SELECT a.PositionID, a.CommissionOnClose,a.FullCommissionOnClose
into #PositionOrigin -- Origin Commission 
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction  a 
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position b 
on a.PositionID = b.ReopenForPositionID
where  ActionTypeID in (4,5,6,28,40)  and a.DateID < @dateID

--  position close and reopen in same day
insert into #PositionOrigin -- Origin Commission 
SELECT a.PositionID, a.CommissionOnClose,a.FullCommissionOnClose
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position  a 
JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position b 
on a.PositionID = b.ReopenForPositionID

--create CLUSTERED INdex #PositionOrigin on #PositionOrigin(PositionID)


Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position
SET
CommissionOnClose = b.CommissionOnClose - c.CommissionOnClose
, FullCommissionOnClose = isnull(b.FullCommissionOnClose,0) - isnull(c.FullCommissionOnClose,0)
FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position a 
JOIN #ReopenForPosition b on a.PositionID = b.PositionID -- postion for update 
			   join #PositionOrigin c on b.ReopenForPositionID  = c.PositionID -- data from origin position 
 where a.CloseOccurred <>'1900-01-01 00:00:00.000'

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	/*OpenPositions*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Open Positions_Real',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , Leverage
										   , InstrumentID
										   , PositionID
										   , Commission
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   , FullCommission
										   , FullCommissionOnClose
										   , RegulationIDOnOpen
										   , ReopenForPositionID
										   , IsReOpen
										   , SessionID
										   , MirrorID
										   , IsSettled
										   , InitialUnits
										   , IsDiscounted
										   , CommissionByUnits
										   , FullCommissionByUnits
										   , IsAirDrop
										   , SettlementTypeID
										   , DLTOpen
                                           , DLTClose
		                                   , OpenMarkupByUnits
										   , Description
										   )
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , CASE
			   WHEN d.PositionID is null THEN 39 /*PositionOpenTypeUnknown- need to fix at weekly maintenance*/

			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   1
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   2
			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   3
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		 ,0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(a.TotalCashChange, 0)
		 , isnull(d.Leverage, 0)
		 , isnull(d.InstrumentID, 0)
		 , isnull(d.PositionID, 0)
		 , isnull(d.Commission, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 , d.FullCommission
		 , d.FullCommissionOnClose
		 , d.RegulationIDOnOpen
		 , d.ReopenForPositionID
		 , d.IsReOpen
		 , CASE 
		   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 then b.SessionID 
		   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN e.SessionID
		   else null end as SessionID
		 , d.MirrorID
		 , IsSettled
	     , InitialUnits
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , CommissionByUnits
	     , FullCommissionByUnits
		 , IsAirDrop
		 , d.SettlementTypeID
		 , d.DLTOpen
         , d.DLTClose
		 , d.OpenMarkupByUnits
		 , a.Description
	FROM
		(SELECT *
		 FROM
			 [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
		 WHERE
			 CreditTypeID = 3) a
		JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position d
			ON (a.PositionID = d.PositionID )
			Left JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Position_Session b
			on a.PositionID = b.PositionID
			Left JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session e
			on d.MirrorID = e.MirrorID
	OPTION (LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All1')
	
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All1'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Open Positions_Real',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

        --- Fill SessionID for ActionTypeID = 2

	/*ClosedPositions*/
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Closed Positions_Real',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , InstrumentID
										   , NetProfit
										   , CommissionOnClose
										   , Commission
										   , PositionID
										   , Leverage
										  -- , DurationInSeconds
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   , FullCommission
										   , FullCommissionOnClose
										   , RedeemStatus
									       , RedeemID
										   , IsRedeem
										   , RegulationIDOnOpen
										   , ReopenForPositionID
										   , IsReOpen
										   , CommissionOnCloseOrig
										   , FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
										   , OriginalPositionID
										   , IsPartialCloseChild
										   , IsSettled
										   , InitialUnits
										   , IsDiscounted
										   , CommissionByUnits
										   , FullCommissionByUnits
										   , IsAirDrop
										   , SettlementTypeID
										   , DLTOpen
                                           , DLTClose
		                                   , OpenMarkupByUnits
										   , [Description]
										   )
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 ,  CASE
			   WHEN d.PositionID is null THEN 40 /*PositionCloseTypeUnknown- need to fix at weekly maintenance*/

			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   4
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   5
			   WHEN d.MirrorID = 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) > 0 THEN
				   6
			   WHEN d.MirrorID > 0 AND isnull(d.OrigParentPositionID,0) = 0 THEN
				   28
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		   ,0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(a.TotalCashChange, 0)
		 , isnull(d.InstrumentID, 0) 
		 , isnull(NetProfit, 0)
		 , isnull(CommissionOnClose, 0)
		 , isnull(Commission, 0)
		 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0)
		 , Leverage
		-- , isnull(DurationInSeconds, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 , isnull(d.FullCommission, 0)
		 , isnull(d.FullCommissionOnClose, 0)
		 , isnull(d.RedeemStatus, 0)
		 , d.RedeemID
		 , case when d.RedeemID is null then 0 else 1 end as IsRedeem
		 , d.RegulationIDOnOpen
		 , d.ReopenForPositionID
		 , d.IsReOpen
		 , d.CommissionOnCloseOrig
		 , d.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
		 , d.OriginalPositionID
		 , case when a.PositionID <>   d.OriginalPositionID   and  d.OriginalPositionID  is not null then 1 else  0 end IsPartialCloseChild
		 , IsSettled
	     , InitialUnits
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , CommissionByUnits
	     , FullCommissionByUnits
		 , IsAirDrop
		 , d.SettlementTypeID
		 , DLTOpen
         , DLTClose
		 , OpenMarkupByUnits
		 , a.Description
	FROM
		(SELECT CID
			  , PositionID
			  , Occurred
			  , Payment
			  , TotalCashChange
			  , Description
		 FROM
			 [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All
		 WHERE
			 CreditTypeID = 4) a
		JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Position d
			ON (a.PositionID = d.PositionID )
	OPTION (LABEL='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All4')

	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All4'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , PositionID
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   ,StatusID
										   ,MirrorID
										   ,IsFeeDividend
										   ,DividendID -- added by Geri 20140619
										   ,Description )

select
CID
, Occurred
, IsReal
, ActionTypeID
, PlatformTypeID
, Amount
, credit.PositionID
, DateID
, TimeID
,StatusID
,MirrorID
,IsFeeDividend
,DividendID
,Description
from
  ( Select ---564,210
       *,
       row_number() over (partition by PositionID, IsFeeDividend order by Occurred, Amount) rn
      from
		  (
			SELECT CID
				 , Occurred
				 , 1 AS IsReal
				 , 35 as ActionTypeID
				 , 0 AS PlatformTypeID
				 , isnull(TotalCashChange, 0) as Amount---- Changed from Payment by Geri 20140619
				 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0) as PositionID
				 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, Occurred, 112)) as DateID
				 , datepart (HOUR, Occurred) as TimeID
				 ,1 as StatusID
				 ,isnull(MirrorID,0) as MirrorID -- added by Geri 20140619 
				 ,case when lower(Description) like '%dividend%' OR  Description  like '%divident%' then 2 
					   when Lower(Description) like '%sdrt%'  then 3
					   when Lower(Description) like '%opentotalfees%' or Lower(Description) like '%closetotalfees%' then 4
					   else 1 end as IsFeeDividend
				 , Description
			  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All a
			 WHERE
				CreditTypeID = 14
			) a
  ) credit
	left join
		(  select * ,
		    row_number() over (partition by PositionID order by ProcessTime, DividendValueInCurrency) rn--?? only dividends 
		     from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionsProcessedForIndexDividnds
		) dividnd
		on credit.PositionID = dividnd.PositionID 
		and credit.rn = dividnd.rn
		and IsFeeDividend =2
		OPTION (LABEL ='Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All6')

	----SELECT CID
	----	 , Occurred
	----	 , 1 AS IsReal
	----	 , 35
	----	 , 0 AS PlatformTypeID
	----	 , isnull(TotalCashChange, 0) ---- Changed from Payment by Geri 20140619
	----	 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0)
	----	 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, Occurred, 112))
	----	 , datepart (HOUR, Occurred)
	----	 ,1
	----	 ,isnull(MirrorID,0) -- added by Geri 20140619 
	----	 ,case when Description  like '%dividend%' OR  Description  like '%divident%' then 2 else 1 end as IsFeeDividend
	----	 ,NULL as DividendID
	----	-- ,case when Description  like '%dividend%' OR  Description  like '%divident%' then DividendID end as DividendID
	----FROM
	----	Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All a
	-------	left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_PositionsProcessedForIndexDividnds b
	------	on a.PositionID = b.PositionID
	----WHERE
	----	CreditTypeID = 14

	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All6'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	 --Create NonClustered Index WithdrawPaymentID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction(WithdrawPaymentID); -- 2 sec

	 --Create NonClustered Index WithdrawPaymentID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding(WithdrawPaymentID); --4 sec

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Cashier',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	print 'Cashier| TIME IS: ' + convert(varchar(30),getdate(),120)
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , PositionID
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , CampaignID
										   , BonusTypeID
										   , FundingTypeID
										   , WithdrawID
										   , DepositID
										   , WithdrawPaymentID
										   , IPNumber
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , CompensationReasonID
										   , StatusID
										   , IsRedeem
										   , SessionID
										   , IsFTD
										   , MoveMoneyReasonID
										   , Description)
	SELECT a.CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , a.PositionID
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , CASE --ActionTypeID
			  -- WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 AND c.FundingID = 5 THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				--   38 /*Affiliate Deposit*/
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 and isnull(MoveMoneyReasonID,0)<>5 THEN
				   7
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 and isnull(MoveMoneyReasonID,0)<>5 THEN
				   8
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 6 THEN
				   36 
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 7 THEN
				   9
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 11 THEN
				   11
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 12 THEN
				   12
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 16 THEN
				   13
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 29 THEN
				   34
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 33 THEN
				   42
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 32 THEN
				   43
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 and MoveMoneyReasonID=5 THEN
				   44
			  WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 and MoveMoneyReasonID=5 THEN
				   45
		   END AS ActionTypeID
		 , CASE 
			   WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN 0
				   --CASE ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
					  -- WHEN FunnelID IN (7, 8, 9) THEN
						 --  2
					  -- WHEN FunnelID IN (20, 5) THEN
						 --  1
					  -- WHEN FunnelID = 6 THEN
						 --  3
					  -- ELSE
						 --  0
				   --END
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   2
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS PlatformTypeID
		 , ISNULL(CASE
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 2 THEN
				   b.Amount
			   ELSE
				  a.Payment
		   END, 0) AS Amount
		 , isnull(CampaignID, 0)
		 , isnull(BonusTypeID, 0)
		 , CASE
			   WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				   isnull(d.FundingTypeID,  isnull(dd.FundingTypeID, 0))
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   isnull(b.FundingTypeID, 0)
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS FundingType
		 , isnull(a.WithdrawID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.DepositID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.WithdrawPaymentID, 0)
		 , CASE
			  WHEN a.DepositID IS NOT NULL THEN ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
				   isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(d.IPAddress), 0)
			   WHEN a.WithdrawID IS NOT NULL THEN
				   isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(b.IPAddress), 0)
			   ELSE
				   0
		   END AS IPNumber
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, Occurred)
		 , isnull(CompensationReasonID, 0)
		 , 1
		 , case when CreditTypeID = 2 and b.FundingTypeID = 27 then 1 else 0 end as IsRedeem
		 , CASE WHEN CreditTypeID = 1 THEN d.SessionID else null end as SessionID
		 , d.IsFTD
		 , MoveMoneyReasonID
		 , a.Description
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All a
		LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding b
			ON (a.WithdrawPaymentID = b.WithdrawPaymentID AND b.CashoutStatusID = 3) --WithdrawPaymentID (in [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction) = ID (in Billing.WithdrawToFuding) = WithdrawProccessingID (in History.Credit))
		--LEFT JOIN DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit c ---- Changed , not user table DWH.History.Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_Deposit by Boris 20180208
			--ON (a.DepositID = c.DepositID)
			----Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit_Session d
			----on a.DepositID = d.DepositID --> union to one table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit
			Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit d
			on a.DepositID = d.DepositID and d.PaymentStatusID = 2
			Left Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Billing_Deposit dd
			on a.DepositID = dd.DepositID and dd.PaymentStatusID = 11	
	WHERE
		CreditTypeID IN (1, 2, 6, 7, 11, 12, 16,29,33,32)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All8')
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All8'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	/** Add historic data where WTF ID does not exist - FOR HISTORY ONLY **/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','WTF History-Fix',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	--1. Get all Withdraws where WithdrawPaymentID is null, ActionType = 8 (Pay cashout part) and rank by order
	--Drop table #OldCOs
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OldCOs') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #OldCOs

	SELECT CustomerActionID,WithdrawID,
	RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY WithdrawID ORDER BY Occurred) as Ranking
	INTO #OldCOs
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	WHERE ActionTypeID = 8
	AND (WithdrawPaymentID is null or WithdrawPaymentID = 0)

	--2. Get all successfull cashout payments (CashoutStatusID = 3) and rank by order
	--Drop table #OldWTF
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OldWTF') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #OldWTF

	SELECT WithdrawID, WithdrawPaymentID, Amount, IPAddress, FundingTypeID, 
	RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY WithdrawID ORDER BY ModificationDate) as Ranking
	INTO #OldWTF
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Cashier_CashoutToFunding
	WHERE CashoutStatusID = 3

	--3. Update all missing fields with Payment, FundingType, and IP

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.WithdrawPaymentID = #OldWTF.WithdrawPaymentID
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.Amount = #OldWTF.Amount
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.IPNumber = isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(#OldWTF.IPAddress), 0)
	,Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.FundingTypeID = #OldWTF.FundingTypeID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	INNER JOIN #OldWTF ON 
	[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.WithdrawID = #OldWTF.WithdrawID
	INNER JOIN #OldCOs ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.CustomerActionID = #OldCOs.CustomerActionID
	WHERE #OldCOs.Ranking = #OldWTF.Ranking
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction9')
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction9'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	SELECT a.CID

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Mirrors_Real',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , PositionID
										   , MirrorID
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   ,SessionID
										   , Description)
	SELECT CID
		 , a.Occurred
		 , 1 AS IsReal
		 , CASE
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 18 THEN
				   15
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 19 THEN
				   16
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 20 THEN
				   17
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 21 THEN
				   18
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 27 THEN
				   19
			   WHEN CreditTypeID = 28 THEN
				   20
		   END
		 , 0 AS PlatformTypeID
		 , isnull(Payment, 0) AS Amount
		 , isnull(a.PositionID, 0)
		 , isnull(a.MirrorID, 0)
		 , convert(INT, convert(VARCHAR, a.Occurred, 112))
		 , datepart (HOUR, a.Occurred)
		 , 1
		 ,case when CreditTypeID = 20 THEN b.SessionID else null end as SessionID
		 , a.Description
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction_All a
		left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Mirror_Session b
		on a.MirrorID = b.MirrorID
	WHERE
		CreditTypeID IN (18, 19, 20, 21, 27, 28)

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Open Book User Engagement',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , PostRootID
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID)
	SELECT DC.CID  as RealCID
		 , Occurred
		 , 1
		 , Case EngagementType
			   When 'Discussion' Then 21
			   When 'Comment'	 Then 22
			   When 'Like'		 Then 23
		   End
		 , Case ApplicationName
				When 'OBdesktop' Then 1
				When 'OBMobile' Then 3
				When 'Openbook Mobile Proxy - Android' Then 5
				When 'Openbook Mobile Proxy - iOS' Then 7
				When 'WebTrader' Then 2
				Else 0
		   End
		 , -1
		 , PostRootID
		 , Convert(Int, Convert(Varchar, Occurred, 112))
		 , Datepart (Hour, Occurred)
		 , 1
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement OBE With (Nolock)
		--Join DWH.[DWH_dbo].Dim_Customer DC With (Nolock) -------------------------- check with MAX, Double Table . [DWH_dbo].Extract Customer
		Join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer DC With (Nolock)
			--On Lower(Right(OBE.UserName,Len(OBE.UserName)-1)) = Lower(DC.UserName) collate database_default
			On OBE.UserNameCalc =DC.UserNameCalc --collate database_default
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement14')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_OpenBook_Engagement14'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Open Book User Engagement',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


	--------------*****************************

		/***********************************************************************Deposit Attempt*********************************************************************************/

	/*Deposit Attempt*/   
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Deposit Attempt',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , PaymentStatusID
										   , Amount
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID)
	SELECT CID  as RealCID
		 , ModificationDate
		 , 1
		 , 27 -- Deposit Attempt
		 , 0
		 , PaymentStatusID
		 , CASE WHEN Amount >= 1000000000 THEN 999999999 ELSE Amount END AS Amount
		 , Convert(Int, Convert(Varchar, ModificationDate, 112))
		 , Datepart (Hour, ModificationDate)
		 , 1
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Deposit_Attempt  With (Nolock)


	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Deposit_Attempt15')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Deposit_Attempt15'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Deposit Attempt',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

----------*******************

	--Customer Registration/*Max 28/12/2014*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Customer Registration',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL  -- ActionTypeID = 41


	
		--drop table if EXISTS #Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate
		IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate;
		
		select CID,PlatformID
		into #Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate
		from
		(
		select CID,SessionID, a.PlatformID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CID ORDER BY a.LoggedIn) AS RowNumber
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin a
		)b
		where RowNumber =1

		update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration
		set 
		PlatformID = case 
					 when FunnelID = 36 and b.PlatformID=103 then 104
					 when FunnelID = 36 and b.PlatformID=109 then 110
					 when FunnelID = 36 then 117			 
					 when FunnelID = 42 then 111
					 when FunnelID = 43 then 105
					 when b.PlatformID = 116 then 117 --(reToro	Web	Browsers)
					 when b.PlatformID = 109 then 110 --(reToro	Mobile	iOS)
					 when b.PlatformID = 103 then 104 --(reToro	Mobile	Android)
					 when b.PlatformID is not null then b.PlatformID
					 end				  
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration a
		left join #Ext_FCA_Real_Audit_Loggin_MinDate b
		on a.CID =b.CID 


	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction (RealCID
										   , Occurred
										   , IsReal
										   , ActionTypeID
										   , PlatformTypeID
										   , Amount
										   , DateID
										   , TimeID
										   , StatusID
										   , PlatformID
										   , IPNumber
										   , CountryIDByIP
										   )

	SELECT CID
		  ,Registered
		  ,IsReal
		  ,ActionTypeID
		  ,PlatformTypeID
		  ,0
		  ,DateID
		  ,TimeID
		  ,1
		  ,PlatformID
		  ,case when charindex(',',IP) = 0 then isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(IP), 0)
				else isnull([DWH_dbo].IPAddressToIPNum(left(IP, charindex(',',IP)-1)), 0)
			end
	     , CountryIDByIP
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration16')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Real_Customer_Registration16'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Customer Registration',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	/************************************************************************CRM Cases*****************************************************************************************/
	--support cases,retention cases, type of case (phone,chat,mail) Account Manager-Check
	------------------Validation----------------

	---------------------------------------------

	/*UPDATE GCID TO ALL RECORDS*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCAFact_CustomerAction',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	---print 'Update GCID_Real| TIME IS: ' + convert(varchar(30),getdate(),120)

	--Create NonClustered Index RealCID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCAFact_CustomerAction(RealCID);  

	--Create NonClustered Index CID on [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCACustomer(CID);

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET
		GCID = b.GCID, DemoCID = 0
	FROM
		[DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
		JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Customer b 
			ON (a.RealCID = b.CID)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction17')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction17'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','Update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCAFact_CustomerAction',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

	---print 'Update GCID_Demo| TIME IS: ' + convert(varchar(30),getdate(),120)

	/*Update Keys*/

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','UpdateHistoryID',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET
		HistoryID = case when GCID =-1 /**/
						 then convert(DECIMAL(38), cast(4 AS VARCHAR(1)) + cast(IsReal AS VARCHAR(1)) + right('00' + cast(ActionTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('00' + cast(PlatformTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('0000000000' + cast(RealCID AS VARCHAR(10)), 10))
						 else convert(DECIMAL(38), cast(4 AS VARCHAR(1)) + cast(IsReal AS VARCHAR(1)) + right('00' + cast(ActionTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('00' + cast(PlatformTypeID AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + right('0000000000' + cast(GCID AS VARCHAR(10)), 10))
					end
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction18')
		SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
		FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
		Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
		and row_count > -1
		and r.[label] = 'Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction18'
		ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerAction','UpdateHistoryID',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


	--- Update PlatformId for Session Deposit / Manual Open Position / Mirror
		TRUNCATE tABLE [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14]


		INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14]
           ([SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID]
           ,[DateID])
		SELECT
			[SessionID]
           ,[PlatformID]
           ,[DateID]
		from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
		where ActionTypeID = 14



	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	SET [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction.PlatformID = b.PlatformID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_ActionTypeID_14 b
	on a.SessionID = b.SessionID
	where a.ActionTypeID in(1, 2, 7, 17)

	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	Set CountryIDByIP = di.CountryID
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction lg
    JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_CountryIP di WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON lg.IPNumber BETWEEN di.IPFrom AND di.IPTo
	where  lg.IPNumber is not null and lg.IPNumber !=0


	------- Update Anonymous IP 
	UPDATE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
	Set 
	CountryIDByIP = di.CountryID,
	IsAnonymousIP = 1,
	ProxyType = di.ProxyType
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction lg
    JOIN [DWH_dbo].Dim_CountryIPAnonymous di WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON lg.IPNumber BETWEEN di.IPFrom AND di.IPTo
	where  lg.IPNumber is not null and lg.IPNumber !=0

------ Session Id for 
/*
1. 17 - Register new mirror.
2. 2 - CopyPositionOpen.   
3. 1 - ManualPositionOpen.
4. 7 - Deposit.  
*/

    --drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeIDsRealCID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeIDsRealCID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeIDsRealCID;
		
    SELECT Distinct RealCID
    into #ActionTypeIDsRealCID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where (ActionTypeID in (1,2,7,17) and  (SessionID  = 0 or SessionID is null or SessionID = -1 or PlatformID is null)) 

    -- found SessionID for action type LogIN
   -- drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeID14SessionID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeID14SessionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeID14SessionID;


    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
    into #ActionTypeID14SessionID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)

    -- found relevant data for update
    insert into #ActionTypeID14SessionID
		   Select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
   from
   (
    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID, 
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCID ORDER BY Occurred desc,SessionID desc) AS RN
    from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)
    and DateID >= @dateID14daysAgo and DateID < @dateID
	)a where RN=1

    ------select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID
    ------from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction
    ------where ActionTypeID  =14 and  RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)
    ------and DateID >= @dateID14daysAgo

    -- Found rows for update
    --drop table If EXISTS #ActionTypeIDsSessionID
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ActionTypeIDsSessionID') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ActionTypeIDsSessionID;

    select RealCID, SessionID, PlatformID, Occurred,ActionTypeID, DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    into #ActionTypeIDsSessionID
    from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    where ActionTypeID in (1,2,7,17) and  (SessionID  = 0 or SessionID is null or SessionID = -1 or PlatformID is null) 
	and RealCID in (select RealCID from #ActionTypeIDsRealCID)

   -- drop table If EXISTS #UpdateSession
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#UpdateSession') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #UpdateSession;

    -- data for update
    select
    RealCID, PlatformID, SessionID,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    into #UpdateSession
    from
    (
    select *
        ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RealCID,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID ORDER BY Occurred) AS RN
        from
    (
        select a.RealCID, a.PlatformID, a.SessionID, a.Occurred, Datediff(SECOND, a.Occurred, b.Occurred) DiffSecond ,DepositID, PositionID, MirrorID
    from #ActionTypeID14SessionID a
    left join #ActionTypeIDsSessionID b
    on a.RealCID = b.RealCID
    and
    a.Occurred<=b.Occurred
    --where b.ActionTypeID = 7
    ) a
    ) b
    where RN = 1

    -- run script to update MirrorID ActionTypeID in (17)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.MirrorID = b.MirrorID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (17)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)


        -- run script to update DepositID ActionTypeID in (7)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.DepositID = b.DepositID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (7)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)

            -- run script to update PositionID ActionTypeID in (1,2)
    update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction
    SET
    PlatformID = b.PlatformID ,
    SessionID = b.SessionID
    from
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCA_Fact_CustomerAction a
    join #UpdateSession b
    on 
    a.RealCID = b.RealCID AND a.PositionID = b.PositionID
    WHERE 
    a.ActionTypeID in (1,2)
    and (a.SessionID is null or a.SessionID = 0 or a.SessionID = -1  or a.PlatformID is null)

	-------

	----EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerAction_IsParitalCloseParent] 

END/*PROCEDURE*/
SP_Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL] @RepDate [DateTime] AS
BEGIN
SET NOCOUNT ON

-- EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL] '20250908'
/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date           Author       Description   
----------    ---------   ------------------------------------
28/08/2014     Max         hard-coded selections of source database changed to synonyms
07/04/2019     Boris       not must update History for IsSettled [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position  
03/03/2020	   Boris       change Price table to [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplit
08/03/2020     Boris       calculate net progit to AS DECIMAL(16, 2) from AS DECIMAL(16, 4)
07/06/2020     Boris       upated IsSettled to PartialClose Positions
12/07/2020     Boris       Add FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal & FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
24/01/2021     Boris       Change defenition  from InstrumentID>1000 AND InstrumentID <100000 to InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)
03/01/2021     Boris       Union all partial close position to one for calculate Unrealize Pnl
19/12/2021     Adi F       add FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD ,FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD
03/02/2022	Inbal BML	   add SettlementTypeID and TRS fileds
2022-04-11     Boris       Change logic for temp table #Equity (instead V_Liabilities  using a table Fact_SnapshotEquity), JIRA TICKET DS-3062
2022-08-07     Adi F       Add delete from dbo.[Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL] - this a bugfix found on 2022-07-27 
2024-01-03     Katy F      Add InitConversionRate & PnLVersion to implement V1 calculation. Separate EndConvertionRate calculation to temp table
2024-01-24	Inbal BML	   Add PnLInDollars and EndOfDayPnLInDollars 
2024-11-10	Daniel Kaplan  Add futures fields : MirrorRealFuturesPositionPnL,ManualRealFuturesPositionPnL,NOP_FuturesReal
									Notional_FuturesReal,PositionPnLFuturesReal,FullCommissionByUnitsFuturesReal,CommissionByUnitsFuturesReal
2025-07-29	Guy M		   Add logic remove the cross over between Real Future Crypto and Stocks and crypto and stocks metrics. they need to be correctly mutually exclusive.
2025-09-25	Daniel Kaplan  Add Stock Margin fields : NOP_StocksMargin,PositionPnLStocksMargin

*********************************************************************************************/


--DECLARE @RepDate DATETIME ='20250908'
--DECLARE @ReportDate DATETIME
--SET @ReportDate = dateadd(day,1,@RepDate)
--DECLARE @RepDate DATETIME ='20250908'
declare @dateid as int
set @dateid=convert(int,convert(varchar, @RepDate,112))
declare @StartDate as date = dateadd(day,1,@RepDate)
---declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@RepDate,112))
DECLARE @row_count int
/*delete data from Fact table*/ --in SSIS Package
--EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Delete Row DateModified',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL
--delete from Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL where DateModified=@dateid
--EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Delete Row DateModified',@dateid,10,@@rowcount



update  [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_Trade_Position
set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_Trade_Position a 
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog b
on a.PositionID = b.PositionID

/*
update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position  
set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position a 
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog b
on a.PositionID = b.PositionID or a.OriginalPositionID = b.PositionID
*/--Boris Pinsky 2022-08-10

update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position  
set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position a
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog b
on a.PositionID = b.PositionID


update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position  
set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position a
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog b
on a.OriginalPositionID = b.PositionID

------ Get prices

---Delete records [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL ---
DELETE from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL
WHERE DateModified = @dateid


--drop table If Exists #Prices
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Prices') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Prices;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get prices',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

CREATE TABLE #Prices  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
	SELECT PC60.InstrumentID
		 , BidLast AS RateBid
		 , AskLast AS RateAsk
		 , DateFrom
		 ,Split.MinDate as SplitMinDate
		 ,Split.MaxDate as SplitMaxDate
		 ,Split.PriceRatio
		 ,Split.AmountRatio
		 ,Split.PriceRatioUnAdjusted
		 ,Split.AmountRatioUnAdjusted
		 ,AskLastWithoutSpread
		 ,BidLastWithoutSpread
	FROM
		(
		 SELECT row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY InstrumentID ORDER BY [Occurred] DESC) rn -----------------******************
			  , InstrumentID
			  , cast(AskSpreaded as decimal (16,8)) AskLast
			  , cast(BidSpreaded as decimal (16,8)) BidLast
			  , cast(Ask as decimal (16,8)) AskLastWithoutSpread
			  , cast(Bid as decimal (16,8)) BidLastWithoutSpread
			  , [OccurredDate] AS DateFrom
		 FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplit----Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted WITH (NOLOCK)
		 --WHERE DateFrom <= @RepDate
		) PC60
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_SplitRatio Split WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON PC60.InstrumentID = Split.InstrumentID
	AND PC60.DateFrom < Split.MaxDate
	AND PC60.DateFrom > Split.MinDate	
	WHERE rn = 1
	--ORDER BY InstrumentID
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Prices1');

	EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'Prices1' , @row_count OUT

     CREATE CLUSTERED columnstore INDEX #InstInd ON #Prices

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get prices',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


--drop table if Exists #from_date
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#from_date') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #from_date;


CREATE TABLE #from_date  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT a.*
		,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.CID ORDER BY a.ValidFrom) AS rn
		,CASE WHEN a.CID = b.CID AND a.AccountTypeID <> b.AccountTypeID THEN 1 END AS change
FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_BackOfficeCustomer a
	LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_BackOfficeCustomer b
		ON a.CID = b.CID 
		AND  a.rank = b.rank+1 
WHERE (CASE WHEN a.CID = b.CID AND a.AccountTypeID <> b.AccountTypeID THEN 1 END =1) OR (b.rank IS NULL AND b.AccountTypeID IS NULL)

 CREATE CLUSTERED columnstore INDEX ix_from_date ON #from_date 


--drop table if Exists #to_date
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#to_date') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #to_date;

CREATE TABLE #to_date  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT a.*
		,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.CID ORDER BY a.ValidFrom) AS rn
		,CASE WHEN a.CID = b.CID AND  a.AccountTypeID <> b.AccountTypeID THEN 1 END AS change
FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_BackOfficeCustomer a
	LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_BackOfficeCustomer b
		ON a.CID=b.CID 
		AND a.rank+1 = b.rank
WHERE (CASE WHEN a.CID = b.CID AND a.AccountTypeID <> b.AccountTypeID THEN 1 END =1) OR (b.rank IS NULL AND b.AccountTypeID IS NULL)

 CREATE CLUSTERED columnstore INDEX ix_to_date ON #to_date 


--drop table if Exists #fund_dates
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#fund_dates') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #fund_dates;

CREATE TABLE #fund_dates  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT a.CID
		,a.AccountTypeID
		,a.ValidFrom
		,b.ValidTo
FROM #from_date a
	JOIN #to_date b
		ON a.CID = b.CID 
		AND a.rn=b.rn
WHERE a.AccountTypeID = 9

 CREATE CLUSTERED columnstore INDEX ix_fund_dates ON #fund_dates 

--drop table if Exists #copyfund
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#copyfund') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #copyfund;

CREATE TABLE #copyfund  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT a.CID
		,a.ParentCID
		,a.MirrorID
		,a.Occurred
		,b.ValidFrom
		,b.ValidTo
FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_History_Mirror a
	JOIN #fund_dates b
		ON a.ParentCID = b.CID
WHERE a.MirrorOperationID = 1

 CREATE CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX ix_copyfund ON #copyfund

/*******************/

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get positions open at the report time',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

--drop table if Exists #OpenPositions	
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OpenPositions') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OpenPositions;

CREATE TABLE #OpenPositions  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
	select a.PositionID
	,a.CID
	,a.MirrorID
	,a.InstrumentID
	,a.OpenOccurred
	,a.CloseOccurred
			 , CASE WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN CAST(a.AmountInUnitsDecimal / b.AmountRatio as decimal (16,6)) ELSE
		 nullif(a.AmountInUnitsDecimal,0) END as AmountInUnitsDecimal
			 , CASE WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN CAST(a.InitForexRate / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) ELSE
		 a.InitForexRate END as InitForexRate
	,a.SpreadedPipBid
	, a.SpreadedPipAsk
	,a.IsBuy
	, LastOpConversionRate
	, Commission
	, FullCommission
	,b.DateFrom as PriceDateFrom
	,CASE WHEN IsDiscounted = 1
			THEN
			(
			CASE 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN CAST(b.BidLastWithoutSpread / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate and  CloseOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN  CAST(b.BidLastWithoutSpread / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				ELSE b.BidLastWithoutSpread 
			END 
			)
			ELSE
			(
			CASE 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN CAST(b.RateBid / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate and  CloseOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN  CAST(b.RateBid / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				ELSE b.RateBid 
			END
			)
			END
			AS RateBid
	,
	----------CASE WHEN IsDiscounted = 1
	----------		THEN
	----------		(
	----------		CASE 
	----------			WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
	----------				THEN CAST(b.RateAsk / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
	----------			WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate and  CloseOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate
	----------				THEN  CAST(b.RateAsk / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
	----------			ELSE b.RateAsk 
	----------		END 
	----------		)
	----------		ELSE
	----------		(
			CASE 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN CAST(b.RateAsk / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate and  CloseOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN  CAST(b.RateAsk / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				ELSE b.RateAsk 
			END 
			--------------)
			--------------END
			AS RateAsk
	,b.SplitMinDate
	,b.SplitMaxDate
	,b.PriceRatio
	,b.AmountRatio
	,b.PriceRatioUnAdjusted
	,b.AmountRatioUnAdjusted
	,CASE WHEN copyfund.CID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS CopyFund
	, CommissionByUnits
	, FullCommissionByUnits
	, IsSettled
	, IsDiscounted
	, ParentPositionID
	, CASE WHEN ParentPositionID = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS ConnectedGuruCopies
	,OriginalPositionID
	,SettlementTypeID
	,ISNULL(PnLVersion,0) AS PnLVersion -- 2024-01-03 KatyF
	,InitConversionRate -- 2024-01-03 KatyF
    ,PnLInDollars  --2024-01-25 Inbal BML
	from 
	(
	SELECT PositionID
		 , CID
		 , MirrorID
		 , InstrumentID
		 , OpenOccurred
		 , CloseOccurred
		 , AmountInUnitsDecimal
		 , InitForexRate
		 , SpreadedPipBid
		 , SpreadedPipAsk
		 , IsBuy
		 , LastOpConversionRate
		 , Commission
		 , FullCommission
		 , IsSettled
		 , CommissionByUnits
		 , [FullCommissionByUnits]
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , ParentPositionID
		 , PositionID as OriginalPositionID
		 , SettlementTypeID
		 ,PnLVersion -- 2024-01-03 KatyF
		 ,InitConversionRate -- 2024-01-03 KatyF
		 ,PnLInDollars  --2024-01-25 Inbal BML
	FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Trade_Position WITH (NOLOCK)
	--WHERE  Occurred< @ReportDate 
	union
	SELECT PositionID
		 , CID
		 , MirrorID
		 , InstrumentID
		 , OpenOccurred
		 , CloseOccurred
		 , AmountInUnitsDecimal
		 , InitForexRate
		 , SpreadedPipBid
		 , SpreadedPipAsk
		 , IsBuy
		 , LastOpConversionRate
		 , Commission
		 , FullCommission
		 , IsSettled
		 , CommissionByUnits
		 , [FullCommissionByUnits]
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , ParentPositionID
		 , OriginalPositionID
		 , SettlementTypeID
		 ,PnLVersion -- 2024-01-03 KatyF
		 ,InitConversionRate -- 2024-01-03 KatyF
		 ,EndOfDayPnLInDollars as PnLInDollars --2024-01-25 Inbal BML
	FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position  WITH (NOLOCK) 
	--WHERE  OpenOccurred < @ReportDate
	--	AND CloseOccurred > @ReportDate
	) a
LEFT JOIN #Prices b
ON a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN #copyfund copyfund
	ON a.MirrorID = copyfund.MirrorID
	AND a.OpenOccurred >= copyfund.ValidFrom 
	AND a.OpenOccurred < copyfund.ValidTo
	OPTION (LABEL = 'OpenPositions2');

	EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'OpenPositions2' , @row_count OUT

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#EndConvertionRate') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #EndConvertionRate;

CREATE TABLE #EndConvertionRate  
WITH
(  
	CLUSTERED INDEX (PositionID),
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
	SELECT 
		 HPOS.PositionID
, cast(
			CASE
				WHEN Pair.SellCurrencyID = 1
					THEN 1.00
				WHEN Pair.BuyCurrencyID = 1
					THEN (1.00 / 
								CASE HPOS.IsBuy
								WHEN 1
	                			THEN HPOS.RateBid
								ELSE HPOS.RateAsk
								END
								)
	        WHEN (Pair.BuyCurrencyID != 1 AND Pair.SellCurrencyID != 1)
	            THEN coalesce(1.00 / 
				CASE HPOS.IsBuy WHEN 1 THEN I2Price.RateBid ELSE I2Price.RateAsk END, 
				CASE HPOS.IsBuy WHEN 1 THEN I3Price.RateBid ELSE I3Price.RateAsk END, 1.00)
	        ELSE 1.00
			END --- EndConvRate For V0/1
			AS MONEY) AS EndConvertionRate
,Pair.InstrumentTypeID
FROM #OpenPositionsFinal  HPOS WITH (NOLOCK)
LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument Pair WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON Pair.InstrumentID = HPOS.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument I2 WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON I2.InstrumentID <> Pair.InstrumentID -- This is so I won't get doubled records.
	AND I2.SellCurrencyID = Pair.SellCurrencyID AND I2.BuyCurrencyID = 1 -- USD
LEFT JOIN #Prices I2Price WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON I2Price.InstrumentID = I2.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument I3 WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON I3.InstrumentID <> Pair.InstrumentID -- This is so I won't get doubled records.
	AND I3.BuyCurrencyID = Pair.SellCurrencyID AND I3.SellCurrencyID = 1 -- USD
LEFT JOIN #Prices I3Price WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON I3Price.InstrumentID = I3.InstrumentID

CREATE TABLE #UnrealizedPnL  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
	SELECT HPOS.CID
		, HPOS.PositionID
		, HPOS.InstrumentID
		, HPOS.MirrorID
		, HPOS.Commission
		, HPOS.FullCommission
		, HPOS.InitForexRate
		, HPOS.SpreadedPipBid
		, HPOS.SpreadedPipAsk
		, HPOS.CopyFund
		--, 
		--		cast((
		--   CASE HPOS.IsBuy
		--		WHEN 1
		--			THEN isnull(HPOS.RateBid , 0) - HPOS.InitForexRate
		--			ELSE HPOS.InitForexRate - isnull(HPOS.RateAsk, 0)
		--	END
		--	* 
		--	cast(
		--	CASE
		--		WHEN Pair.SellCurrencyID = 1
		--			THEN 1.00
		--		WHEN Pair.BuyCurrencyID = 1
		--			THEN (1.00 / 
		--						CASE HPOS.IsBuy
		--						WHEN 1
	 --               			THEN HPOS.RateBid
		--						ELSE HPOS.RateAsk
		--						END
		--						)
	 --       WHEN (Pair.BuyCurrencyID != 1 AND Pair.SellCurrencyID != 1)
	 --           THEN coalesce(1.00 / 
		--		CASE HPOS.IsBuy WHEN 1 THEN I2Price.RateBid ELSE I2Price.RateAsk END, 
		--		CASE HPOS.IsBuy WHEN 1 THEN I3Price.RateBid ELSE I3Price.RateAsk END, 1.00)
	 --       ELSE 1.00
		--	END 
		--	AS MONEY) 
		--* HPOS.AmountInUnitsDecimal) AS DECIMAL(16, 2))

		

		--AS CalculatedNetProfit
,cast(
		(CASE WHEN ISNULL(PnLVersion,0) = 0 THEN -- OldVersion 
					   CASE HPOS.IsBuy
							WHEN 1
								THEN isnull(HPOS.RateBid , 0) - HPOS.InitForexRate
								ELSE HPOS.InitForexRate - isnull(HPOS.RateAsk, 0)
						END
							* EndConvertionRate  -- V0
			ELSE
				CASE HPOS.IsBuy
					WHEN 1
						THEN (isnull(HPOS.RateBid , 0) * EndConvertionRate
							- HPOS.InitForexRate * HPOS.InitConversionRate)
						ELSE (HPOS.InitForexRate * HPOS.InitConversionRate
							- isnull(HPOS.RateAsk, 0) * EndConvertionRate)
				END  -- V1
			END
				* HPOS.AmountInUnitsDecimal) 
		AS DECIMAL(16, 2)
		)
 AS CalculatedNetProfit  -- 2024-01-03 KatyF
		, IsSettled 
		--, Pair.InstrumentTypeID -- 2024-01-03 KatyF
		, EndCR.InstrumentTypeID -- 2024-01-03 KatyF
		, CommissionByUnits
		, FullCommissionByUnits
		, ConnectedGuruCopies
		, SettlementTypeID
		, PnLInDollars  --2024-01-25 Inbal BML
		--, f.IsFuture -- 2024-11-10 Daniel K
	FROM #OpenPositionsFinal  HPOS 
	INNER JOIN #EndConvertionRate EndCR 
		ON HPOS.PositionID = EndCR.PositionID


	--LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument Pair WITH (NOLOCK)
	--	ON Pair.InstrumentID = HPOS.InstrumentID
	--LEFT JOIN #Prices PairPrice WITH (NOLOCK)
	--	ON Pair.InstrumentID = PairPrice.InstrumentID
	--LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument I2 WITH (NOLOCK)
	--	ON I2.InstrumentID <> Pair.InstrumentID -- This is so I won't get doubled records.
	--	AND I2.SellCurrencyID = Pair.SellCurrencyID AND I2.BuyCurrencyID = 1 -- USD
	--LEFT JOIN #Prices I2Price WITH (NOLOCK)
	--	ON I2Price.InstrumentID = I2.InstrumentID
	--LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument I3 WITH (NOLOCK)
	--	ON I3.InstrumentID <> Pair.InstrumentID -- This is so I won't get doubled records.
	--	AND I3.BuyCurrencyID = Pair.SellCurrencyID AND I3.SellCurrencyID = 1 -- USD
	--LEFT JOIN #Prices I3Price WITH (NOLOCK)
	--	ON I3Price.InstrumentID = I3.InstrumentID
	OPTION (LABEL = 'UnrealizedPnL4');

	EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'UnrealizedPnL4' , @row_count OUT

--drop table if exists #price0
