CREATE TABLE #price0  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select b.InstrumentID, b.Name, AskLast as Ask, BidLast as Bid, BuyCurrencyID, SellCurrencyID, InstrumentTypeID
--into #price0
from (select InstrumentID, BidLast, AskLast 
       from (
	   --select ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by InstrumentID order by DateFrom desc) rank, InstrumentID, AskLast, BidLast 
	   --      from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplit ---Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted 
			 --where DateFrom <= @StartDate
			 SELECT row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY InstrumentID ORDER BY Occurred DESC) rank -----------------******************
			  , InstrumentID
			  , cast(AskSpreaded as decimal (16,8)) AskLast
			  , cast(BidSpreaded as decimal (16,8)) BidLast
			  , cast(Ask as decimal (16,8)) AskLastWithoutSpread
			  , cast(Bid as decimal (16,8)) BidLastWithoutSpread
			  ,OccurredDate as DateFrom
		 FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplit
			 ) prices where prices.rank = 1 ) a
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument b
on a.InstrumentID=b.InstrumentID

--drop table if exists #final_NOP_Notional
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#final_NOP_Notional') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #final_NOP_Notional;

CREATE TABLE #final_NOP_Notional  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select a.CID
,sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
       when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
	     when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
       when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
	   end
  ))
as NOP
, sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
       when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
	     when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
       when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
	   end
  )))
as Notional
, sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when (b.InstrumentTypeID <> 10 or f.InstrumentID IS not null) then 0 -- guy 2025-07-16
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
  ))
as NOP_Crypto
, sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when (b.InstrumentTypeID <> 10 or f.InstrumentID IS not null) then 0 -- guy 2025-07-16
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
  )))
as Notional_Crypto

-----
,  
sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
       when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
	     when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
       when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
	   end
  )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  )
as NOP_CFD

sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00

as Notional_CFD

sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end)

 sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when b.InstrumentTypeID <> 10 then 0 
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00

		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end)

		end

*(case	when (b.InstrumentTypeID not in (5,6) OR f.InstrumentID IS not null) then 0 -- guy 2025-07-16
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00

		end

		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00

sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when b.InstrumentTypeID not in (5,6) then 0
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
  )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  )
as NOP_Stock_CFD
, 
 sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when b.InstrumentTypeID not in (5,6) then 0 
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
    )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  ))
as Notional_Stock_CFD
,
sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case        when b.InstrumentTypeID <> 10 then 0
                when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
                when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
                when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
                when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
                end
  )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  *(case when  SettlementTypeID=2 then 1 else 0 end )
  )
  as NOP_Crypto_TRS
 ,
 sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case        when b.InstrumentTypeID <> 10 then 0 
                when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
                when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
                when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
                when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
                end
    )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  *(case when  SettlementTypeID=2 then 1 else 0 end )
  ))
as Notional_Crypto_TRS
------------------Futures------------------
	,sum(case when f.IsFuture = 1  and MirrorID > 0 then isnull(PnLInDollars,0) else 0 end) as MirrorRealFuturesPositionPnL
	,sum(case when f.IsFuture = 1 and MirrorID = 0 then isnull(PnLInDollars,0) else 0 end)  as ManualRealFuturesPositionPnL
	,sum(case 
		when f.IsFuture = 1 
			then AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
				*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
	    when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
	   end)
		else 0 end) as NOP_FuturesReal
	,sum(case 
		when f.IsFuture = 1 and IsBuy= 1 
				then (AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
				*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
	    when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
	   end))						  
		 when f.IsFuture = 1 and IsBuy= 0 
			  then -1 * (AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
				*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
	    when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
	   end))				  
		else 0 end) as Notional_FuturesReal
	,sum(case when f.IsFuture = 1 then isnull(PnLInDollars,0) else 0 end) as PositionPnLFuturesReal
	,sum(case when f.IsFuture = 1 then isnull(FullCommissionByUnits,0) else 0 end) as FullCommissionByUnitsFuturesReal
	,sum(case when f.IsFuture = 1 then isnull(CommissionByUnits,0) else 0 end) as CommissionByUnitsFuturesReal

	--------------------- Stock Margin ---------------------  
	,sum(case when SettlementTypeID = 5 then (AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
		*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
			   when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
			   when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
			   when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
			end)) ELSE 0 END) AS NOP_StocksMargin
from  (select  CID, MirrorID, InstrumentID, AmountInUnitsDecimal, LastOpConversionRate, InitForexRate, 
				IsBuy, Commission, IsSettled, SettlementTypeID,PnLInDollars,FullCommissionByUnits,CommissionByUnits from DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Trade_Position
         where @StartDate > OpenOccurred
       union all
	   select CID, MirrorID, InstrumentID, AmountInUnitsDecimal,  LastOpConversionRate, InitForexRate, 
				IsBuy, Commission, IsSettled, SettlementTypeID,NULL,FullCommissionByUnits,CommissionByUnits from DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position
	     where  @StartDate > OpenOccurred and @StartDate < CloseOccurred
		) a
join #price0 b
on a.InstrumentID=b.InstrumentID
left join #price0 c
on b.SellCurrencyID = c.SellCurrencyID and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1
left join #price0 d
on b.SellCurrencyID = d.BuyCurrencyID and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 and b.SellCurrencyID <> 1
left join #futures f
	ON a.InstrumentID = f.InstrumentID
group by a.CID
OPTION (LABEL = 'final_NOP_Notional5');
	
EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'final_NOP_Notional5' , @row_count OUT

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Calculate NOP and Notional',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

/**********************************************************************************************calculating Risk per customer********************************************************************/


if @RepDate>='20121231'
begin
--drop table if exists #covarience
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#covarience') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #covarience;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get Instrument Covariance matrix',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

CREATE TABLE #covarience  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT InstrumentID_a,InstrumentID_b,cast(Covariance as decimal(38,33)) as Covariance
from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Correlation
where DateID=convert(int,convert(varchar, dateadd(day,-1,dateadd(week,datediff(week,0,@RepDate),0)),112)) and SampleSize>100
OPTION (LABEL = 'covarience6');

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'covarience6' , @row_count OUT

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get Instrument Covariance matrix',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

 create clustered columnstore index inx_con on #covarience

--drop table if exists #Equity
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Equity') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Equity;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get Relevant day equity ',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

CREATE TABLE #Equity  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select CID,TotalPositionsAmount+TotalCash+TotalStockOrders+InProcessCashouts as Equity
FROM  DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity a 
JOIN DWH_dbo.V_M2M_Date_DateRange b
ON(a.DateRangeID=b.DateRangeID) 
where b.DateKey=@dateid 
and TotalPositionsAmount+TotalCash+TotalStockOrders+InProcessCashouts>0
OPTION (LABEL = 'Equity7');

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'Equity7' , @row_count OUT

 create clustered columnstore index IX_TotalPositionsAmount on #Equity

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get Relevant day equity',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

--drop table if Exists #WieghtedProtfolio
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#WieghtedProtfolio') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #WieghtedProtfolio;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Calculate wieghted protfolio for every CID',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

CREATE TABLE #WieghtedProtfolio  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select a.CID,a.InstrumentID,max(Equity) as Equity,
sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal*InitForexRate*(case when IsBuy='true' then 1 else -1 end)*(case when SellCurrencyID=1 then 1 
	                                                                                   when BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1/InitForexRate
																				   else LastOpConversionRate end)) /max(Equity) as Wieght
from #OpenPositions a join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument b
on (a.InstrumentID=b.InstrumentID)
join #Equity c
on(a.CID=c.CID)
group by a.CID,a.InstrumentID
OPTION (LABEL = 'WieghtedProtfolio8');

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'WieghtedProtfolio8' , @row_count OUT

 create clustered columnstore index IX_CID on #WieghtedProtfolio

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Calculate wieghted protfolio for every CID',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','calculated standard deviation for every CID',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

--drop table if Exists #CIDsRisk
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#CIDsRisk') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #CIDsRisk;

CREATE TABLE #CIDsRisk  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select a.CID,
count(distinct a.InstrumentID) as NumOfInstrumnts,
sqrt(case when sum(cast(a.Wieght as float)*cast(b.Wieght as float)*cast(c.Covariance as float))<0 then 0 else sum(cast(a.Wieght as float)*cast(b.Wieght as float)*cast(c.Covariance as float)) end ) as std
from #WieghtedProtfolio a join #WieghtedProtfolio b
on(a.CID=b.CID)
left join #covarience c
on(c.InstrumentID_a=a.InstrumentID and c.InstrumentID_b=b.InstrumentID)
group by a.CID
OPTION (LABEL = 'CIDsRisk9');

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'CIDsRisk9' , @row_count OUT

 create clustered columnstore index IX_CID on #CIDsRisk 

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','calculated standard deviation for every CID',@dateid,10, @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


/***********************************************************************************************insert all to Fact table************************************************************************/
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Insert into Fact table ',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL (CID
										, DateModified
										, PositionPnL_old
										, PositionPnLStocksReal
										, PositionPnLCryptoReal
										, CopyPositionPnL
										, MenualPositionPnL
										, StocksPositionPnL
										, StandardDeviation
										, CommissionOnOpen
										, FullCommissionOnOpen
										, MirrorStocksPositionPnL
										, CryptoPositionPnL
										, ManualCryptoPositionPnL
										, CopyCryptoPositionPnL
										, CopyFundPnL
										, UpdateDate
										, NOP
										, Notional
										, NOP_Crypto
										, Notional_Crypto
										, NOP_CFD
										, Notional_CFD
										, NOP_Crypto_CFD
										, Notional_Crypto_CFD
										, NOP_Stock
										, Notional_Stock
										, NOP_Stock_CFD
										, Notional_Stock_CFD
										, CommissionByUnits
		                                , FullCommissionByUnits
										, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal
										, FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
										, GuruCopiesPNL
										, GuruCopiesPNL_Dit
										, CommissionByUnitsStocksReal
                                        , CommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
										, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD
										, FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD
										, CommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
										, CopyCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
										, CryptoPositionPnL_TRS
										, FullCommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
										, ManualCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
										, NOP_Crypto_TRS
										, Notional_Crypto_TRS
										, PositionPnL
										------------------Futures
										, MirrorRealFuturesPositionPnL
										, ManualRealFuturesPositionPnL
										, NOP_FuturesReal
										, Notional_FuturesReal
										, PositionPnLFuturesReal
										, FullCommissionByUnitsFuturesReal
										, CommissionByUnitsFuturesReal
										--------------------- Stock Margin ---------------------  
										, NOP_StocksMargin		
										, PositionPnLStocksMargin
										)
	select a.CID
	, DateID
	, PositionPnL_old
	, PositionPnLStocksReal
	, PositionPnLCryptoReal
	, CopyPositionPnL
	, MenualPositionPnL
	, StocksPositionPnL
	, Isnull(b.std,0) as StandardDeviation
	, Commission
	, FullCommission
	, MirrorStocksPositionPnL
	, CryptoPositionPnL
	, ManualCryptoPositionPnL
	, CopyCryptoPositionPnL
	, CopyFundPnL
	, getdate() as  UpdateDate
	, NOP
	, Notional
	, NOP_Crypto
	, Notional_Crypto
	, NOP_CFD
	, Notional_CFD
	, NOP_Crypto_CFD
	, Notional_Crypto_CFD
	, NOP_Stock
	, Notional_Stock
	, NOP_Stock_CFD
	, Notional_Stock_CFD
	, CommissionByUnits
	, FullCommissionByUnits
	, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal
	, FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
	, GuruCopiesPNL
	, GuruCopiesPNL_Dit
	, CommissionByUnitsStocksReal
    , CommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
	, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD
	, FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD
	, CommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	, CopyCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	, CryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	, FullCommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	, ManualCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	, NOP_Crypto_TRS
	, Notional_Crypto_TRS
    , PositionPnL
------------------Futures
	, n.MirrorRealFuturesPositionPnL
	, n.ManualRealFuturesPositionPnL
	, n.NOP_FuturesReal
	, n.Notional_FuturesReal
	, n.PositionPnLFuturesReal
	, n.FullCommissionByUnitsFuturesReal
	, n.CommissionByUnitsFuturesReal
	--------------------- Stock Margin ---------------------  
	, NOP_StocksMargin		
	, PositionPnLStocksMargin
	from 
	(select CID,CAST(CONVERT(char(8), @RepDate,112) as int) as DateID
	,sum(CalculatedNetProfit) as PositionPnL_old
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) AND f.InstrumentID IS null THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END ) as PositionPnLStocksReal -- guy 2025-07-16
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.InstrumentID IS null THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END ) as PositionPnLCryptoReal -- guy 2025-07-16
	,sum(case WHEN MirrorID>0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) as CopyPositionPnL
	,sum(CASE when MirrorID=0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end) as MenualPositionPnL
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) AND f.InstrumentID IS null then PnLInDollars else 0 end) as StocksPositionPnL -- guy 2025-07-16
    ,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  AND f.InstrumentID IS null AND MirrorID>0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) AS MirrorStocksPositionPnL -- guy 2025-07-16
	,sum(Commission) as Commission
	,sum(FullCommission) as FullCommission
	,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.InstrumentID IS null THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end) AS CryptoPositionPnL -- guy 2025-07-16
	,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.InstrumentID IS null AND MirrorID=0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end) AS ManualCryptoPositionPnL -- guy 2025-07-16
	,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.InstrumentID IS null AND MirrorID>0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) AS CopyCryptoPositionPnL -- guy 2025-07-16
	,SUM(CASE WHEN CopyFund = 1 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) AS CopyFundPnL
	,SUM(CommissionByUnits) as CommissionByUnits
	,SUM(FullCommissionByUnits) as FullCommissionByUnits
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) AND f.InstrumentID IS null  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal -- guy 2025-07-16
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  AND f.InstrumentID IS null THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal -- guy 2025-07-16

	,sum(case when ConnectedGuruCopies = 1 and MirrorID>0  THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END ) as GuruCopiesPNL
	,sum(case when ConnectedGuruCopies = 0 and MirrorID>0  THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END ) as GuruCopiesPNL_Dit
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) AND f.InstrumentID IS null  THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsStocksReal -- guy 2025-07-16
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  AND f.InstrumentID IS null THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsCryptoReal -- guy 2025-07-16
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD

	,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID>0 and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) as CopyCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) and  SettlementTypeID=2   THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end)  as CryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID=0 and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end) as ManualCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
    ,sum(PnLInDollars) as PositionPnL
	--------------------- Stock Margin --------------------- 	
	,SUM(CASE WHEN SettlementTypeID = 5 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) AS PositionPnLStocksMargin

	from #UnrealizedPnL upl
		LEFT JOIN #futures f
			ON upl.InstrumentID = f.InstrumentID -- -- guy 2025-07-16
	where PnLInDollars is NOT null and CalculatedNetProfit is NOT null
	group by CID)a
	left join #CIDsRisk b
	on a.CID=b.CID
	left join #final_NOP_Notional n
	on a.CID=n.CID


	

OPTION (LABEL = 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL10');

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL10' , @row_count OUT

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Insert into Fact table',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL_UserAPI11' , @row_count OUT
		   
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Insert into Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL_UserAPI',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

/***********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************/
end /*if*/
else 
begin

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Insert into Fact table Else',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL (CID
										, DateModified
										, PositionPnL_old
										, PositionPnLStocksReal
										, PositionPnLCryptoReal
										, CopyPositionPnL
										, MenualPositionPnL
										, StocksPositionPnL
										, CommissionOnOpen
										, FullCommissionOnOpen
										, MirrorStocksPositionPnL
										, CryptoPositionPnL
										, ManualCryptoPositionPnL
										, CopyCryptoPositionPnL
										, CopyFundPnL
										, UpdateDate
										, NOP
										, Notional
										, NOP_Crypto
										, Notional_Crypto
										, NOP_CFD
										, Notional_CFD
										, NOP_Crypto_CFD
										, Notional_Crypto_CFD
										, NOP_Stock
										, Notional_Stock
										, NOP_Stock_CFD
										, Notional_Stock_CFD
										, CommissionByUnits
										, FullCommissionByUnits
										, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal
										, FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
										, GuruCopiesPNL
										, GuruCopiesPNL_Dit
										, CommissionByUnitsStocksReal
										, CommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
										, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD
	                                    , FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD
										,CommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
										,CopyCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
										,CryptoPositionPnL_TRS
										,FullCommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
										,ManualCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
										,NOP_Crypto_TRS
										,Notional_Crypto_TRS
										,PositionPnL
										------------------Futures
										, MirrorRealFuturesPositionPnL
										, ManualRealFuturesPositionPnL
										, NOP_FuturesReal
										, Notional_FuturesReal
										, PositionPnLFuturesReal
										, FullCommissionByUnitsFuturesReal
										, CommissionByUnitsFuturesReal
										--------------------- Stock Margin ---------------------  
										, NOP_StocksMargin		
										, PositionPnLStocksMargin

										)
	select a.CID
	,DateID
	,PositionPnL_old
    ,PositionPnLStocksReal
	,PositionPnLCryptoReal
	,CopyPositionPnL
	,MenualPositionPnL
	,StocksPositionPnL
	,Commission
	,FullCommission
	,MirrorStocksPositionPnL
	,CryptoPositionPnL
	,ManualCryptoPositionPnL
	,CopyCryptoPositionPnL
	,CopyFundPnL
	,getdate() as  UpdateDate
	,NOP
	,Notional
	,NOP_Crypto
	,Notional_Crypto
	,NOP_CFD
	,Notional_CFD
	,NOP_Crypto_CFD
	,Notional_Crypto_CFD
	, NOP_Stock
	, Notional_Stock
	, NOP_Stock_CFD
	, Notional_Stock_CFD
	, CommissionByUnits
	, [FullCommissionByUnits]
	, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal
	, FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
	, GuruCopiesPNL
    , GuruCopiesPNL_Dit
    , CommissionByUnitsStocksReal
    , CommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
	, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD
	, FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD
	,CommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,CopyCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,CryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,FullCommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,ManualCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,NOP_Crypto_TRS
	,Notional_Crypto_TRS
	,PositionPnL
------------------Futures
	, n.MirrorRealFuturesPositionPnL
	, n.ManualRealFuturesPositionPnL
	, n.NOP_FuturesReal
	, n.Notional_FuturesReal
	, n.PositionPnLFuturesReal
	, n.FullCommissionByUnitsFuturesReal
	, n.CommissionByUnitsFuturesReal
	--------------------- Stock Margin ---------------------  
	, NOP_StocksMargin		
	, PositionPnLStocksMargin
	from 
	(select CID,CAST(CONVERT(char(8), @RepDate,112) as int) as DateID
	,sum(CalculatedNetProfit) as PositionPnL_old
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) AND f.IsFuture = 0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END ) as PositionPnLStocksReal -- guy 2025-07-16
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.IsFuture = 0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END ) as PositionPnLCryptoReal -- guy 2025-07-16
	,sum(case WHEN MirrorID>0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) as CopyPositionPnL
	,sum(CASE when MirrorID=0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end) as MenualPositionPnL
	--,sum(case when InstrumentID>1000 AND InstrumentID <100000 then PnLInDollars else 0 end) as StocksPositionPnL
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) AND f.IsFuture = 0 then PnLInDollars else 0 end) as StocksPositionPnL -- guy 2025-07-16
	--,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentID>1000 AND InstrumentID <100000 AND MirrorID>0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) AS MirrorStocksPositionPnL
	,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) AND f.IsFuture = 0 AND MirrorID>0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) AS MirrorStocksPositionPnL -- guy 2025-07-16
	,sum(Commission) as Commission
	,sum(FullCommission) as FullCommission
	--,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentID>=100000 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end) AS CryptoPositionPnL
	 ,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.IsFuture = 0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end) AS CryptoPositionPnL -- guy 2025-07-16
	--,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentID>=100000 AND MirrorID=0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end) AS ManualCryptoPositionPnL
	,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.IsFuture = 0 AND MirrorID=0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end) AS ManualCryptoPositionPnL -- guy 2025-07-16
	--,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentID>=100000 AND MirrorID>0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) AS CopyCryptoPositionPnL
	 ,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.IsFuture = 0 AND MirrorID>0 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) AS CopyCryptoPositionPnL -- guy 2025-07-16
	,SUM(CASE WHEN CopyFund = 1 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) AS CopyFundPnL
	,SUM(CommissionByUnits) as CommissionByUnits
	,SUM(FullCommissionByUnits) as FullCommissionByUnits
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) AND f.IsFuture = 0  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal -- guy 2025-07-16
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.IsFuture = 0  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal -- guy 2025-07-16

	,sum(case when ConnectedGuruCopies = 1 and MirrorID>0  THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END ) as GuruCopiesPNL
	,sum(case when ConnectedGuruCopies = 0 and MirrorID>0  THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END ) as GuruCopiesPNL_Dit
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  AND f.IsFuture = 0 THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsStocksReal -- guy 2025-07-16	
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  AND f.IsFuture = 0 THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsCryptoReal -- guy 2025-07-16

	,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID>0 and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) as CopyCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) and  SettlementTypeID=2   THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end)  as CryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 /*1*/ and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS -- guy 2025-07-16 - not important, but the definition here is wrong
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID=0 and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 end) as ManualCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,sum(PnLInDollars) as PositionPnL

	--------------------- Stock Margin --------------------- 	
	,SUM(CASE WHEN SettlementTypeID = 5 THEN PnLInDollars ELSE 0 END) AS PositionPnLStocksMargin

from #UnrealizedPnL upl
	LEFT JOIN #futures f
		ON upl.InstrumentID = f.InstrumentID
where PnLInDollars is NOT null
group by CID)a
	left join #final_NOP_Notional n
	on(a.CID=n.CID)
OPTION (LABEL = 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL12');

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL12' , @row_count OUT

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Insert into Fact table Else',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

SP_Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL_DL_To_Syn:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN

    -- =============================================
    -- Author:      <Anton Rosen>
    -- Create Date: 2021-11-23
    -- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
    -- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL_DL_To_Synapse] @dt='2024-01-23'
    -- =============================================
/***************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
03/02/2022      Inbal BML     add SettlementTypeID
2023-12-17      Katy F        Remove null from "NULL as InitConversionRate" for HistoryPosition
2024-01-01		Merav H		  Replace PositionChangeLog_Active 
2024-01-14		Katy F		  Add PnLVersion to Position Extracts
2024-01-24	    Inbal BML	  change [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] and [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay]
							 & Add PnLInDollars and EndOfDayPnLInDollars 
2026-01-04		Eitan Lipo	  Remove For New Engine Instrument Corralation 
**********************************************************************************************************************/
    --DECLARE @dt AS DATE = '2024-01-23';
    DECLARE @Yesterday AS DATETIME;
    DECLARE @CurrentDate AS DATETIME;

    SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt AS DATETIME);
    SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1, @Yesterday);

    --------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- Ext_FCUPNL_History_SplitRatio -----------------------------------
    TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_History_SplitRatio];

    INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_History_SplitRatio]
    (
        [ID],
        [InstrumentID],
        [MinDate],
        [MaxDate],
        [PriceRatio],
        [AmountRatio],
        [IsCompletedOpenPositions],
        [IsCompletedClosePositions],
        [IsCompletedOpenOrders],
        [IsCompletedCloseOrders],
        [PriceRatioUnAdjusted],
        [AmountRatioUnAdjusted],
        [IsNotificationSent],
        [IsCurrencyPriceChanged],
        [IsRedisUpdated],
        [IsNotificationStartSent],
        [IsCompletedPricAndAmount],
        [IsCompletedModifyPrice],
        [IsCompleteHoldingFees]
    )
    SELECT [ID],
           [InstrumentID],
           [MinDate],
           [MaxDate],
           [PriceRatio],
           [AmountRatio],
           [IsCompletedOpenPositions],
           [IsCompletedClosePositions],
           [IsCompletedOpenOrders],
           [IsCompletedCloseOrders],
           [PriceRatioUnAdjusted],
           [AmountRatioUnAdjusted],
           [IsNotificationSent],
           [IsCurrencyPriceChanged],
           [IsRedisUpdated],
           [IsNotificationStartSent],
           [IsCompletedPricAndAmount],
           [IsCompletedModifyPrice],
           [IsCompleteHoldingFees]
    FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_SplitRatio];

    --------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- Ext_FCUPNL_BackOfficeCustomer -----------------------------------
    TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_BackOfficeCustomer];

    INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_BackOfficeCustomer]
    (
        [rank],
        [CID],
        [AccountTypeID],
        [ValidFrom],
        [ValidTo]
    )
    SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.CID ORDER BY ValidFrom, ValidTo) rank,
           a.CID,
           a.AccountTypeID,
           a.ValidFrom,
           a.ValidTo
    FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] a
        JOIN
        (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                   CID
            FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer]
            WHERE AccountTypeID = 9
        ) b
            ON a.CID = b.CID;

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted ------------------
/* Eitan lipovetsky - 04-01-2026 - Remove for New Engine Instrument corralition 
truncate table [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted]
insert into [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted] ([rn]
      ,[InstrumentID]
      ,[AskLast]
      ,[BidLast]
      ,[AskFirst]
      ,[DateFrom])
SELECT row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY InstrumentID ORDER BY DateFrom DESC) rn
	, InstrumentID
	, cast(AskLast as decimal (16,8)) AskLast
	, cast(BidLast as decimal (16,8)) BidLast
	, cast(AskFirst as decimal (16,8)) AskFirst
	, DateFrom 
FROM [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_Candles_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted] WITH (NOLOCK)
where DateFrom < @Yesterday
*/
----------------------------------------------------------------------
---- Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument --------------------------------

      ,[BuyCurrencyID]
      ,[SellCurrencyID]
      ,[InstrumentTypeID]
      ,[Name]
      ,[TradeRange]
      ,[DollarRatio]
      --,[Passport]
      ,[PipDifferenceThreshold]
      ,[IsMajor]
      --,[Industry]
      --,[ExchangeID]
	  )
SELECT  [InstrumentID]
      ,[BuyCurrencyID]
      ,[SellCurrencyID]
      ,[InstrumentTypeID]
      ,[Name]
      ,[TradeRange]
      ,[DollarRatio]
      --,[Passport]

      --,[Industry]

  FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument]
----------------------------------------------------------------------
---- Ext_FCUPNL_History_Mirror ---------------------------------------
truncate table [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_History_Mirror]
insert into [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_History_Mirror] ([ID]
      ,[MirrorID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[ParentCID]
      ,[ParentUserName]
      ,[Amount]
      ,[Occurred]
      ,[IsActive]
      ,[ModificationDate]
      ,[MirrorOperationID]
      ,[MirrorTypeID]
      ,[IsOpenOpen]
      ,[GuruTPV]
      ,[MirrorSL]
      ,[CloseMirrorActionType]
      ,[RealizedEquity]
      ,[PauseCopy]
      ,[MirrorSLPercentage]
      ,[InitialInvestment]
      ,[DepositSummary]
      ,[WithdrawalSummary]
      ,[SessionID]
      ,[NetProfit]
      ,[UseCopyDividend]
      ,[MIMOOperationTypeID]
      ,[MirrorDividendID])

select [ID]
      ,[MirrorID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[ParentCID]
      ,[ParentUserName]
      ,[Amount]
      ,[Occurred]
      ,[IsActive]
      ,[ModificationDate]
      ,[MirrorOperationID]
      ,[MirrorTypeID]
      ,[IsOpenOpen]
      ,[GuruTPV]
      ,[MirrorSL]
      ,[CloseMirrorActionType]
      ,[RealizedEquity]
      ,[PauseCopy]
      ,[MirrorSLPercentage]
      ,[InitialInvestment]
      ,[DepositSummary]
      ,[WithdrawalSummary]
      ,[SessionID]
      ,[NetProfit]

      ,[MirrorDividendID]
from  [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Mirror] with (NOLOCK)
where MirrorOperationID = 1
---------------------------------------------------------------------
---- Ext_FSE_History_Position ---------------------------------------
TRUNCATE table [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position] 
insert into [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position] ( PositionID
, CID
, MirrorID
,InstrumentID
, OpenOccurred
, CloseOccurred
, AmountInUnitsDecimal
, InitForexRate
, SpreadedPipBid
, SpreadedPipAsk
, IsBuy
, LastOpConversionRate
, Commission
, FullCommission
,IsSettled
,CommissionByUnits
,FullCommissionByUnits
,IsDiscounted
,OriginalPositionID
, InitConversionRate
, InitConversionRateID
, ParentPositionID
, SettlementTypeID
,PnLVersion
,EndOfDayPnLInDollars )
SELECT 
  PositionID
, CID
, MirrorID
,a.InstrumentID
, OpenOccurred
, CloseOccurred
, nullif(AmountInUnitsDecimal,0) as AmountInUnitsDecimal
, InitForexRate
, SpreadedPipBid
, SpreadedPipAsk
, IsBuy
, LastOpConversionRate
, Commission
, FullCommission
,case 
when IsSettled in (1,0) then cast(IsSettled as int)  
when IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 and b.InstrumentTypeID in (10,5,6) then 1 
else 0 
end as IsSettled
,CommissionByUnits
,FullCommissionByUnits
,cast(IsDiscounted as int) as IsDiscounted
,OriginalPositionID
,InitConversionRate -- KF 20231217
,InitConversionRateID -- KF 20231217
, ParentPositionID
, SettlementTypeID
, PnLVersion
, EndOfDayPnLInDollars
FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay] a with (NOLOCK) 
left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
Where
OpenOccurred < @CurrentDate
		AND CloseOccurred >=  @CurrentDate 

UPDATE STATISTICS [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position WITH FULLSCAN

----------------------------------------------------------------------
---- Ext_FCUPNL_Trade_Position ---------------------------------------


TRUNCATE table [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_Trade_Position]
insert into [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_Trade_Position]
([PositionID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[MirrorID]
      ,[InstrumentID]
      ,[OpenOccurred]
      ,[CloseOccurred]
      ,[AmountInUnitsDecimal]
      ,[InitForexRate]
      ,[SpreadedPipBid]
      ,[SpreadedPipAsk]
      ,[IsBuy]
      ,[LastOpConversionRate]
      ,[Commission]
      ,[FullCommission]
      ,[IsSettled]
      ,[CommissionByUnits]
      ,[FullCommissionByUnits]
      ,[IsDiscounted]
      ,[InitConversionRate]
      ,[InitConversionRateID]
      ,[ParentPositionID]
	  ,[SettlementTypeID]
	  ,PnLVersion
	  ,PnLInDollars  
	   )

SELECT 
  PositionID
, CID
, MirrorID
, a.InstrumentID
, Occurred as OpenOccurred
, NULL as CloseOccurred
, nullif(AmountInUnitsDecimal,0) as AmountInUnitsDecimal
, InitForexRate
, SpreadedPipBid
, SpreadedPipAsk
, IsBuy
, LastOpConversionRate
, Commission
, FullCommission
,case 
when IsSettled in (1,0) then cast(IsSettled as int)  
when IsBuy = 1 And Leverage = 1 and b.InstrumentTypeID in (10,5,6) then 1 
else 0 
end as IsSettled
      ,[CommissionByUnits]
      ,[FullCommissionByUnits]
,cast(IsDiscounted as int) as IsDiscounted
,InitConversionRate
,InitConversionRateID
, ParentPositionID
, SettlementTypeID
,PnLVersion
,PnLInDollars  
FROM   [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] a with (NOLOCK) 
left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
	WHERE  Occurred< @CurrentDate

----------------------------------------------------------------------
---- Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog ---------------------------------------
truncate table  [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog]
insert into [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog] ([PositionID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[Occurred]
      ,[IsSettled]
      ,[PreviousIsSettled])
select 
PositionID,
CID,
Occurred,
isnull(Cast(IsSettled as int),0) IsSettled,
isnull(cast(PreviousIsSettled as int ) ,0) PreviousIsSettled
from
(
select
pl.PositionID
,pl.CID
,Occurred
,pl.IsSettled
,pl.PreviousIsSettled
, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by pl.PositionID order by  pl.Occurred ) rn
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] pl with (NOLOCK)
where Occurred > @CurrentDate
---and isnull(pl.IsSettled,-1) <> isnull(pl.PreviousIsSettled,-1)
and isnull(Cast(pl.IsSettled  as int), 0)<> isnull(cast( pl.PreviousIsSettled as int),0)
) a
where rn =1
UPDATE STATISTICS [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog WITH FULLSCAN

----------------------------------------------------------------------

SP_Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL_V0:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL_V0] @RepDate [DateTime] AS
BEGIN
SET NOCOUNT ON

--EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL] '2021-05-09'
/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
28/08/2014        Max         hard-coded selections of source database changed to synonyms
07/04/2019        Boris       not must update History for IsSettled [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position  
03/03/2020	      Boris       change Price table to [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplit
08/03/2020        Boris       calculate net progit to AS DECIMAL(16, 2) from AS DECIMAL(16, 4)
07/06/2020        Boris       upated IsSettled to PartialClose Positions
12/07/2020        Boris       Add FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal & FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
24/01/2021        Boris        Change defenition  from InstrumentID>1000 AND InstrumentID <100000 to InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)
03/01/2021        Boris       Union all partial close position to one for calculate Unrealize Pnl
19/12/2021        Adi F       add FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD ,FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD
03/02/2022		  Inbal BML	  add SettlementTypeID and TRS fileds
2022-04-11        Boris       Change logic for temp table #Equity (instead V_Liabilities  using a table Fact_SnapshotEquity), JIRA TICKET DS-3062
2022-08-07        Adi F       Add delete from dbo.[Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL] - this a bugfix found on 2022-07-27 
*********************************************************************************************/



--DECLARE @RepDate DATETIME ='2019-02-02'
--DECLARE @ReportDate DATETIME
--SET @ReportDate = dateadd(day,1,@RepDate)
--DECLARE @RepDate DATETIME ='20200101'
declare @dateid as int
set @dateid=convert(int,convert(varchar, @RepDate,112))
declare @StartDate as date = dateadd(day,1,@RepDate)
---declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@RepDate,112))
DECLARE @row_count int
/*delete data from Fact table*/ --in SSIS Package
--EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Delete Row DateModified',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL
--delete from Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL where DateModified=@dateid
--EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Delete Row DateModified',@dateid,10,@@rowcount


update  [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_Trade_Position
set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_Trade_Position a 
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog b
on a.PositionID = b.PositionID

/*
update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position  
set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position a 
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog b
on a.PositionID = b.PositionID or a.OriginalPositionID = b.PositionID
*/--Boris Pinsky 2022-08-10

update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position  
set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position a
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog b
on a.PositionID = b.PositionID


update [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position  
set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position a
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_PositionChangeLog b
on a.OriginalPositionID = b.PositionID







------ Get prices


---Delete records [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL ---
DELETE from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL
WHERE DateModified = @dateid




--drop table If Exists #Prices
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Prices') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Prices;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get prices',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

CREATE TABLE #Prices  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
	SELECT PC60.InstrumentID
		 , BidLast AS RateBid
		 , AskLast AS RateAsk
		 , DateFrom
		 ,Split.MinDate as SplitMinDate
		 ,Split.MaxDate as SplitMaxDate
		 ,Split.PriceRatio
		 ,Split.AmountRatio
		 ,Split.PriceRatioUnAdjusted
		 ,Split.AmountRatioUnAdjusted
		 ,AskLastWithoutSpread
		 ,BidLastWithoutSpread
	--INTO #Prices
	FROM
		(
		 SELECT row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY InstrumentID ORDER BY [Occurred] DESC) rn -----------------******************
			  , InstrumentID
			  , cast(AskSpreaded as decimal (16,8)) AskLast
			  , cast(BidSpreaded as decimal (16,8)) BidLast
			  , cast(Ask as decimal (16,8)) AskLastWithoutSpread
			  , cast(Bid as decimal (16,8)) BidLastWithoutSpread
			  , [OccurredDate] AS DateFrom
		 FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplit----Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted WITH (NOLOCK)
		 --WHERE DateFrom <= @RepDate
		) PC60
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_History_SplitRatio Split WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON PC60.InstrumentID = Split.InstrumentID
	AND PC60.DateFrom < Split.MaxDate
	AND PC60.DateFrom > Split.MinDate	
	WHERE rn = 1
	--ORDER BY InstrumentID
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Prices1');

	EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'Prices1' , @row_count OUT

	--SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	--FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	--Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	--and row_count > -1
	--and r.[label] = 'Prices1'
	--ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;


     CREATE CLUSTERED columnstore INDEX #InstInd ON #Prices

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get prices',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


--drop table if Exists #from_date
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#from_date') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #from_date;


CREATE TABLE #from_date  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT a.*
		,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.CID ORDER BY a.ValidFrom) AS rn
		,CASE WHEN a.CID = b.CID AND a.AccountTypeID <> b.AccountTypeID THEN 1 END AS change
--INTO #from_date 
FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_BackOfficeCustomer a
	LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_BackOfficeCustomer b
		ON a.CID = b.CID 
		AND  a.rank = b.rank+1 
WHERE (CASE WHEN a.CID = b.CID AND a.AccountTypeID <> b.AccountTypeID THEN 1 END =1) OR (b.rank IS NULL AND b.AccountTypeID IS NULL)

 CREATE CLUSTERED columnstore INDEX ix_from_date ON #from_date 


--drop table if Exists #to_date
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#to_date') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #to_date;


CREATE TABLE #to_date  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT a.*
		,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.CID ORDER BY a.ValidFrom) AS rn
		,CASE WHEN a.CID = b.CID AND  a.AccountTypeID <> b.AccountTypeID THEN 1 END AS change
--INTO #to_date
FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_BackOfficeCustomer a
	LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_BackOfficeCustomer b
		ON a.CID=b.CID 
		AND a.rank+1 = b.rank
WHERE (CASE WHEN a.CID = b.CID AND a.AccountTypeID <> b.AccountTypeID THEN 1 END =1) OR (b.rank IS NULL AND b.AccountTypeID IS NULL)

 CREATE CLUSTERED columnstore INDEX ix_to_date ON #to_date 


--drop table if Exists #fund_dates
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#fund_dates') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #fund_dates;

CREATE TABLE #fund_dates  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT a.CID
		,a.AccountTypeID
		,a.ValidFrom
		,b.ValidTo
--INTO #fund_dates
FROM #from_date a
	JOIN #to_date b
		ON a.CID = b.CID 
		AND a.rn=b.rn
WHERE a.AccountTypeID = 9

 CREATE CLUSTERED columnstore INDEX ix_fund_dates ON #fund_dates 

--drop table if Exists #copyfund
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#copyfund') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #copyfund;

CREATE TABLE #copyfund  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT a.CID
		,a.ParentCID
		,a.MirrorID
		,a.Occurred
		,b.ValidFrom
		,b.ValidTo
--INTO #copyfund
FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_History_Mirror a
	JOIN #fund_dates b
		ON a.ParentCID = b.CID
WHERE a.MirrorOperationID = 1

 CREATE CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX ix_copyfund ON #copyfund

/*******************/

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get positions open at the report time',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

--drop table if Exists #OpenPositions	
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OpenPositions') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OpenPositions;

CREATE TABLE #OpenPositions  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
	select a.PositionID
	,a.CID
	,a.MirrorID
	,a.InstrumentID
	,a.OpenOccurred
	,a.CloseOccurred
			 , CASE WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN CAST(a.AmountInUnitsDecimal / b.AmountRatio as decimal (16,6)) ELSE
		 nullif(a.AmountInUnitsDecimal,0) END as AmountInUnitsDecimal
			 , CASE WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN CAST(a.InitForexRate / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) ELSE
		 a.InitForexRate END as InitForexRate
	,a.SpreadedPipBid
	, a.SpreadedPipAsk
	,a.IsBuy
	, LastOpConversionRate
	, Commission
	, FullCommission
	,b.DateFrom as PriceDateFrom
	,CASE WHEN IsDiscounted = 1
			THEN
			(
			CASE 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN CAST(b.BidLastWithoutSpread / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate and  CloseOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN  CAST(b.BidLastWithoutSpread / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				ELSE b.BidLastWithoutSpread 
			END 
			)
			ELSE
			(
			CASE 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN CAST(b.RateBid / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate and  CloseOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN  CAST(b.RateBid / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				ELSE b.RateBid 
			END
			)
			END
			AS RateBid
	,
	----------CASE WHEN IsDiscounted = 1
	----------		THEN
	----------		(
	----------		CASE 
	----------			WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
	----------				THEN CAST(b.RateAsk / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
	----------			WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate and  CloseOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate
	----------				THEN  CAST(b.RateAsk / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
	----------			ELSE b.RateAsk 
	----------		END 
	----------		)
	----------		ELSE
	----------		(
			CASE 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate AND ISNULL(CloseOccurred, '21000101') >= b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN CAST(b.RateAsk / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				WHEN OpenOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate and  CloseOccurred < b.SplitMaxDate
					THEN  CAST(b.RateAsk / b.PriceRatio as decimal (16,8)) 
				ELSE b.RateAsk 
			END 
			--------------)
			--------------END
			AS RateAsk
	,b.SplitMinDate
	,b.SplitMaxDate
	,b.PriceRatio
	,b.AmountRatio
	,b.PriceRatioUnAdjusted
	,b.AmountRatioUnAdjusted
	,CASE WHEN copyfund.CID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS CopyFund
	, CommissionByUnits
	, FullCommissionByUnits
	, IsSettled
	, IsDiscounted
	, ParentPositionID
	, CASE WHEN ParentPositionID = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS ConnectedGuruCopies
	,OriginalPositionID
	,SettlementTypeID
	--into #OpenPositions
	from 
	(
	SELECT PositionID
		 , CID
		 , MirrorID
		 , InstrumentID
		 , OpenOccurred
		 , CloseOccurred
		 , AmountInUnitsDecimal
		 , InitForexRate
		 , SpreadedPipBid
		 , SpreadedPipAsk
		 , IsBuy
		 , LastOpConversionRate
		 , Commission
		 , FullCommission
		 , IsSettled
		 , CommissionByUnits
		 , [FullCommissionByUnits]
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , ParentPositionID
		 , PositionID as OriginalPositionID
		 , SettlementTypeID
	FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Trade_Position WITH (NOLOCK)
	--WHERE  Occurred< @ReportDate 
	union
	SELECT PositionID
		 , CID
		 , MirrorID
		 , InstrumentID
		 , OpenOccurred
		 , CloseOccurred
		 , AmountInUnitsDecimal
		 , InitForexRate
		 , SpreadedPipBid
		 , SpreadedPipAsk
		 , IsBuy
		 , LastOpConversionRate
		 , Commission
		 , FullCommission
		 , IsSettled
		 , CommissionByUnits
		 , [FullCommissionByUnits]
		 , IsDiscounted
		 , ParentPositionID
		 , OriginalPositionID
		 , SettlementTypeID
	FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position  WITH (NOLOCK) 
	--WHERE  OpenOccurred < @ReportDate
	--	AND CloseOccurred > @ReportDate
	) a
LEFT JOIN #Prices b
ON a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
LEFT JOIN #copyfund copyfund
	ON a.MirrorID = copyfund.MirrorID
	AND a.OpenOccurred >= copyfund.ValidFrom 
	AND a.OpenOccurred < copyfund.ValidTo
	OPTION (LABEL = 'OpenPositions2');

	EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'OpenPositions2' , @row_count OUT

	--SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	--FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	--Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	--and row_count > -1
	--and r.[label] = 'OpenPositions2'
	--ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;



 CREATE CLUSTERED columnstore INDEX #PosInd on #OpenPositions 
 
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get positions open at the report time',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OpenPositionsFinal') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OpenPositionsFinal;

CREATE TABLE #OpenPositionsFinal  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS

 SELECT 
  CID
, OriginalPositionID  as PositionID
, InstrumentID
, MirrorID
, Sum(Commission) as Commission
, Sum(FullCommission) FullCommission
, InitForexRate
, SpreadedPipBid
, SpreadedPipAsk
, CopyFund
, IsBuy
, RateBid
, RateAsk
, Sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal) as AmountInUnitsDecimal
, IsSettled 
, sum(CommissionByUnits) as CommissionByUnits
, sum(FullCommissionByUnits) as FullCommissionByUnits
, ConnectedGuruCopies
, SettlementTypeID
from #OpenPositions
--where PositionID  in (1011440333, 1287373251)
group by
CID
, OriginalPositionID 
, InstrumentID
, MirrorID
, SpreadedPipBid
, SpreadedPipAsk
, CopyFund
, IsBuy
, RateBid
, InitForexRate
, RateAsk
, IsSettled 
, ConnectedGuruCopies
, SettlementTypeID



--drop table if Exists #UnrealizedPnL
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#UnrealizedPnL') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #UnrealizedPnL;

-- Calculate unrealized NetProfit
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Calculate unrealized NetProfit',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

CREATE TABLE #UnrealizedPnL  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
	SELECT HPOS.CID
		, HPOS.PositionID
		, HPOS.InstrumentID
		, HPOS.MirrorID
		, HPOS.Commission
		, HPOS.FullCommission
		, HPOS.InitForexRate
		, HPOS.SpreadedPipBid
		, HPOS.SpreadedPipAsk
		, HPOS.CopyFund
		, 
				cast((
		   CASE HPOS.IsBuy
				WHEN 1
					THEN isnull(HPOS.RateBid , 0) - HPOS.InitForexRate
					ELSE HPOS.InitForexRate - isnull(HPOS.RateAsk, 0)
			END
			* 
			cast(
			CASE
				WHEN Pair.SellCurrencyID = 1
					THEN 1.00
				WHEN Pair.BuyCurrencyID = 1
					THEN (1.00 / 
								CASE HPOS.IsBuy
								WHEN 1
	                			THEN HPOS.RateBid
								ELSE HPOS.RateAsk
								END
								)
	        WHEN (Pair.BuyCurrencyID != 1 AND Pair.SellCurrencyID != 1)
	            THEN coalesce(1.00 / 
				CASE HPOS.IsBuy WHEN 1 THEN I2Price.RateBid ELSE I2Price.RateAsk END, 
				CASE HPOS.IsBuy WHEN 1 THEN I3Price.RateBid ELSE I3Price.RateAsk END, 1.00)
	        ELSE 1.00
			END 
			AS MONEY) 
		* HPOS.AmountInUnitsDecimal) AS DECIMAL(16, 2))

		

		AS CalculatedNetProfit
		, IsSettled 
		, Pair.InstrumentTypeID
		, CommissionByUnits
		, FullCommissionByUnits
		, ConnectedGuruCopies
		, SettlementTypeID
--INTO #UnrealizedPnL
	FROM #OpenPositionsFinal  HPOS WITH (NOLOCK)
	LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument Pair WITH (NOLOCK)
		ON Pair.InstrumentID = HPOS.InstrumentID
	LEFT JOIN #Prices PairPrice WITH (NOLOCK)
		ON Pair.InstrumentID = PairPrice.InstrumentID
	LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument I2 WITH (NOLOCK)
		ON I2.InstrumentID <> Pair.InstrumentID -- This is so I won't get doubled records.
		AND I2.SellCurrencyID = Pair.SellCurrencyID AND I2.BuyCurrencyID = 1 -- USD
	LEFT JOIN #Prices I2Price WITH (NOLOCK)
		ON I2Price.InstrumentID = I2.InstrumentID
	LEFT JOIN DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument I3 WITH (NOLOCK)
		ON I3.InstrumentID <> Pair.InstrumentID -- This is so I won't get doubled records.
		AND I3.BuyCurrencyID = Pair.SellCurrencyID AND I3.SellCurrencyID = 1 -- USD
	LEFT JOIN #Prices I3Price WITH (NOLOCK)
		ON I3Price.InstrumentID = I3.InstrumentID
	OPTION (LABEL = 'UnrealizedPnL4');

	EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'UnrealizedPnL4' , @row_count OUT

	--SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
	--FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	--Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	--and row_count > -1
	--and r.[label] = 'UnrealizedPnL4'
	--ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

 CREATE CLUSTERED columnstore INDEX [IX_tmp_UnrealizedPnL] ON #UnrealizedPnL

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Calculate unrealized NetProfit',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Calculate NOP and Notional',@dateid,1,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

--drop table if exists #price0
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#price0') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #price0;


CREATE TABLE #price0  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select b.InstrumentID, b.Name, AskLast as Ask, BidLast as Bid, BuyCurrencyID, SellCurrencyID, InstrumentTypeID
--into #price0
from (select InstrumentID, BidLast, AskLast 
       from (
	   --select ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by InstrumentID order by DateFrom desc) rank, InstrumentID, AskLast, BidLast 
	   --      from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplit ---Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted 
			 --where DateFrom <= @StartDate
			 SELECT row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY InstrumentID ORDER BY Occurred DESC) rank -----------------******************
			  , InstrumentID
			  , cast(AskSpreaded as decimal (16,8)) AskLast
			  , cast(BidSpreaded as decimal (16,8)) BidLast
			  , cast(Ask as decimal (16,8)) AskLastWithoutSpread
			  , cast(Bid as decimal (16,8)) BidLastWithoutSpread
			  ,OccurredDate as DateFrom
		 FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_CurrencyPriceMaxDateWithSplit
			 ) prices where prices.rank = 1 ) a
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument b
on a.InstrumentID=b.InstrumentID

--drop table if exists #final_NOP_Notional
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#final_NOP_Notional') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #final_NOP_Notional;

CREATE TABLE #final_NOP_Notional  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select a.CID
,sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
       when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
	     when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
       when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
	   end
  ))
as NOP
, sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
       when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
	     when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
       when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
	   end
  )))
as Notional
, sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when b.InstrumentTypeID <> 10 then 0
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
  ))
as NOP_Crypto
, sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when b.InstrumentTypeID <> 10 then 0 
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
  )))
as Notional_Crypto

-----
,  
sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
       when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
	     when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
       when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
	   end
  )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  )
as NOP_CFD
, 
sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
       when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
	     when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
       when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
	   end
    )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  ))
as Notional_CFD
,
sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when b.InstrumentTypeID <> 10 then 0
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
  )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  )
as NOP_Crypto_CFD
, 
 sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when b.InstrumentTypeID <> 10 then 0 
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
    )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  ))
as Notional_Crypto_CFD
------ Stocks
, sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when b.InstrumentTypeID not in (5,6) then 0
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
  ))
as NOP_Stock
, sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when b.InstrumentTypeID  not in (5,6) then 0 
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
  )))
as Notional_Stock
-------------
,
sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when b.InstrumentTypeID not in (5,6) then 0
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
  )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  )
as NOP_Stock_CFD
, 
 sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case	when b.InstrumentTypeID not in (5,6) then 0 
		when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
		when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
		when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
		end
    )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  ))
as Notional_Stock_CFD
,
sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case        when b.InstrumentTypeID <> 10 then 0
                when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
                when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
                when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
                when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
                end
  )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  *(case when  SettlementTypeID=2 then 1 else 0 end )
  )
  as NOP_Crypto_TRS
 ,
 sum(abs(AmountInUnitsDecimal * (case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) * (case when IsBuy = 1 then 1 else -1 end) 
*(case        when b.InstrumentTypeID <> 10 then 0 
                when b.SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00 
                when b.BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then b.Bid else b.Ask end) 
                when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 then 1.00/(case when IsBuy = 1 then c.Bid else c.Ask end) 
                when b.SellCurrencyID <> 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1 and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 then (case when IsBuy = 1 then d.Bid else d.Ask end)
                end
    )
  *(case when IsSettled= 0 then 1 else 0 end )
  *(case when  SettlementTypeID=2 then 1 else 0 end )
  ))
as Notional_Crypto_TRS

-----
--into #final_NOP_Notional 
from  (select  CID, MirrorID, InstrumentID, AmountInUnitsDecimal, LastOpConversionRate, InitForexRate, IsBuy, Commission, IsSettled, SettlementTypeID from DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_Trade_Position
         where @StartDate > OpenOccurred
       union all
	   select CID, MirrorID, InstrumentID, AmountInUnitsDecimal,  LastOpConversionRate, InitForexRate, IsBuy, Commission, IsSettled, SettlementTypeID from DWH_dbo.Ext_FCUPNL_History_Position
	     where  @StartDate > OpenOccurred and @StartDate < CloseOccurred
		) a
join #price0 b
on a.InstrumentID=b.InstrumentID
left join #price0 c
on b.SellCurrencyID = c.SellCurrencyID and c.BuyCurrencyID = 1 and b.BuyCurrencyID <> 1
left join #price0 d
on b.SellCurrencyID = d.BuyCurrencyID and d.SellCurrencyID = 1 and b.SellCurrencyID <> 1
--join Customer.Customer e on a.CID = e.CID 
--join BackOffice.Customer f on a.CID = f.CID 
group by a.CID
OPTION (LABEL = 'final_NOP_Notional5');
	
EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'final_NOP_Notional5' , @row_count OUT
