/**********************************************************************************************calculating Risk per customer********************************************************************/


if @RepDate>='20121231'
begin
--drop table if exists #covarience
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#covarience') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #covarience;



EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get Instrument Covariance matrix',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

CREATE TABLE #covarience  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT InstrumentID_a,InstrumentID_b,cast(Covariance as decimal(38,35)) as Covariance
--into #covarience
from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Correlation
where DateID=convert(int,convert(varchar, dateadd(day,-1,dateadd(week,datediff(week,0,@RepDate),0)),112)) and SampleSize>100
OPTION (LABEL = 'covarience6');

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'covarience6' , @row_count OUT

--SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
--FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
--Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
--and row_count > -1
--and r.[label] = 'covarience6'
--ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get Instrument Covariance matrix',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

 create clustered columnstore index inx_con on #covarience

--drop table if exists #Equity
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Equity') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Equity;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get Relevant day equity ',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

--CREATE TABLE #Equity  
--WITH
--(  
--	HEAP,
--	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
--) AS
--select CID,TotalPositionsAmount+TotalCash+TotalStockOrders+InProcessCashouts as Equity
----into #Equity 
--from [DWH_dbo].V_Liabilities 
--where DateID=@dateid and TotalPositionsAmount+TotalCash+TotalStockOrders+InProcessCashouts>0
--OPTION (LABEL = 'Equity7');

CREATE TABLE #Equity  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select CID,TotalPositionsAmount+TotalCash+TotalStockOrders+InProcessCashouts as Equity
---into #Equity 
FROM  DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity a WITH(NOLOCK)
JOIN DWH_dbo.V_M2M_Date_DateRange b
ON(a.DateRangeID=b.DateRangeID) 
where b.DateKey=@dateid 
and TotalPositionsAmount+TotalCash+TotalStockOrders+InProcessCashouts>0
OPTION (LABEL = 'Equity7');

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'Equity7' , @row_count OUT

--SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
--FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
--Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
--and row_count > -1
--and r.[label] = 'Equity7'
--ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;


 create clustered columnstore index IX_TotalPositionsAmount on #Equity

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Get Relevant day equity',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

--drop table if Exists #WieghtedProtfolio
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#WieghtedProtfolio') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #WieghtedProtfolio;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Calculate wieghted protfolio for every CID',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

CREATE TABLE #WieghtedProtfolio  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select a.CID,a.InstrumentID,max(Equity) as Equity,
sum(AmountInUnitsDecimal*InitForexRate*(case when IsBuy='true' then 1 else -1 end)*(case when SellCurrencyID=1 then 1 
	                                                                                   when BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1/InitForexRate
																				   else LastOpConversionRate end)) /max(Equity) as Wieght
--into #WieghtedProtfolio
from #OpenPositions a join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FCUPNL_Dictionary_Instrument b
on (a.InstrumentID=b.InstrumentID)
join #Equity c
on(a.CID=c.CID)
group by a.CID,a.InstrumentID
OPTION (LABEL = 'WieghtedProtfolio8');

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'WieghtedProtfolio8' , @row_count OUT

--SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
--FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
--Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
--and row_count > -1
--and r.[label] = 'WieghtedProtfolio8'
--ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;


 create clustered columnstore index IX_CID on #WieghtedProtfolio

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Calculate wieghted protfolio for every CID',@dateid,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','calculated standard deviation for every CID',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

--drop table if Exists #CIDsRisk
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#CIDsRisk') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #CIDsRisk;

CREATE TABLE #CIDsRisk  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select a.CID,
count(distinct a.InstrumentID) as NumOfInstrumnts,
sqrt(case when sum(cast(a.Wieght as float)*cast(b.Wieght as float)*cast(c.Covariance as float))<0 then 0 else sum(cast(a.Wieght as float)*cast(b.Wieght as float)*cast(c.Covariance as float)) end ) as std
--into #CIDsRisk
from #WieghtedProtfolio a join #WieghtedProtfolio b
on(a.CID=b.CID)
left join #covarience c
on(c.InstrumentID_a=a.InstrumentID and c.InstrumentID_b=b.InstrumentID)
group by a.CID
OPTION (LABEL = 'CIDsRisk9');

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'CIDsRisk9' , @row_count OUT

--SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
--FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
--Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
--and row_count > -1
--and r.[label] = 'CIDsRisk9'
--ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;


 create clustered columnstore index IX_CID on #CIDsRisk 

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','calculated standard deviation for every CID',@dateid,10, @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


/***********************************************************************************************insert all to Fact table************************************************************************/
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL','Insert into Fact table ',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL (CID
										, DateModified
										, PositionPnL
										, PositionPnLStocksReal
										, PositionPnLCryptoReal
										, CopyPositionPnL
										, MenualPositionPnL
										, StocksPositionPnL
										, StandardDeviation
										, CommissionOnOpen
										, FullCommissionOnOpen
										, MirrorStocksPositionPnL
										, CryptoPositionPnL
										, ManualCryptoPositionPnL
										, CopyCryptoPositionPnL
										, CopyFundPnL
										, UpdateDate
										, NOP
										, Notional
										, NOP_Crypto
										, Notional_Crypto
										, NOP_CFD
										, Notional_CFD
										, NOP_Crypto_CFD
										, Notional_Crypto_CFD
										, NOP_Stock
										, Notional_Stock
										, NOP_Stock_CFD
										, Notional_Stock_CFD
										, CommissionByUnits
		                                , FullCommissionByUnits
										, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal
										, FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
										, GuruCopiesPNL
										, GuruCopiesPNL_Dit
										, CommissionByUnitsStocksReal
                                        , CommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
										, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD
										, FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD
										,CommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
										,CopyCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
										,CryptoPositionPnL_TRS
										,FullCommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
										,ManualCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
										,NOP_Crypto_TRS
										,Notional_Crypto_TRS

										)
	select a.CID
	,DateID
	,PositionPnL
	,PositionPnLStocksReal
	,PositionPnLCryptoReal
	,CopyPositionPnL
	,MenualPositionPnL
	,StocksPositionPnL
	,Isnull(b.std,0) as StandardDeviation
	,Commission
	,FullCommission
	,MirrorStocksPositionPnL
	,CryptoPositionPnL
	,ManualCryptoPositionPnL
	,CopyCryptoPositionPnL
	,CopyFundPnL
	,getdate() as  UpdateDate
	,NOP
	,Notional
	,NOP_Crypto
	,Notional_Crypto
	,NOP_CFD
	,Notional_CFD
	,NOP_Crypto_CFD
	,Notional_Crypto_CFD
	, NOP_Stock
	, Notional_Stock
	, NOP_Stock_CFD
	, Notional_Stock_CFD
	, CommissionByUnits
	, FullCommissionByUnits
	, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal
	, FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal

	, GuruCopiesPNL
	, GuruCopiesPNL_Dit
	, CommissionByUnitsStocksReal
    , CommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
	, FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD
	, FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD
	,CommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,CopyCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,CryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,FullCommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,ManualCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,NOP_Crypto_TRS
	,Notional_Crypto_TRS
	from 
	(select CID,CAST(CONVERT(char(8), @RepDate,112) as int) as DateID
	,sum(CalculatedNetProfit) as PositionPnL
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END ) as PositionPnLStocksReal
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END ) as PositionPnLCryptoReal
	,sum(case WHEN MirrorID>0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) as CopyPositionPnL
	,sum(CASE when MirrorID=0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end) as MenualPositionPnL
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) then CalculatedNetProfit else 0 end) as StocksPositionPnL
    ,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) AND MirrorID>0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) AS MirrorStocksPositionPnL



	,sum(Commission) as Commission
	,sum(FullCommission) as FullCommission
	,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end) AS CryptoPositionPnL
	,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID=0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end) AS ManualCryptoPositionPnL
	,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID>0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) AS CopyCryptoPositionPnL
	,SUM(CASE WHEN CopyFund = 1 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) AS CopyFundPnL
	,SUM(CommissionByUnits) as CommissionByUnits
	,SUM(FullCommissionByUnits) as FullCommissionByUnits
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal

	,sum(case when ConnectedGuruCopies = 1 and MirrorID>0  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END ) as GuruCopiesPNL
	,sum(case when ConnectedGuruCopies = 0 and MirrorID>0  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END ) as GuruCopiesPNL_Dit
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsStocksReal
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsCryptoReal
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD

	,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID>0 and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) as CopyCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) and  SettlementTypeID=2   THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end)  as CryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID=0 and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end) as ManualCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	from #UnrealizedPnL 
	where CalculatedNetProfit is NOT null
	group by CID)a
	left join #CIDsRisk b
	on(a.CID=b.CID)
	left join #final_NOP_Notional n
	on(a.CID=n.CID)

	,FullCommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,ManualCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,NOP_Crypto_TRS
	,Notional_Crypto_TRS
	from 
	(select CID,CAST(CONVERT(char(8), @RepDate,112) as int) as DateID
	,sum(CalculatedNetProfit) as PositionPnL
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END ) as PositionPnLStocksReal
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END ) as PositionPnLCryptoReal
	,sum(case WHEN MirrorID>0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) as CopyPositionPnL
	,sum(CASE when MirrorID=0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end) as MenualPositionPnL
	--,sum(case when InstrumentID>1000 AND InstrumentID <100000 then CalculatedNetProfit else 0 end) as StocksPositionPnL
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) then CalculatedNetProfit else 0 end) as StocksPositionPnL
	--,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentID>1000 AND InstrumentID <100000 AND MirrorID>0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) AS MirrorStocksPositionPnL
	,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) AND MirrorID>0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) AS MirrorStocksPositionPnL
	,sum(Commission) as Commission
	,sum(FullCommission) as FullCommission
	--,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentID>=100000 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end) AS CryptoPositionPnL
	 ,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end) AS CryptoPositionPnL
	--,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentID>=100000 AND MirrorID=0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end) AS ManualCryptoPositionPnL
	,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID=0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end) AS ManualCryptoPositionPnL
	--,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentID>=100000 AND MirrorID>0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) AS CopyCryptoPositionPnL
	 ,SUM(CASE WHEN InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID>0 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) AS CopyCryptoPositionPnL
	,SUM(CASE WHEN CopyFund = 1 THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) AS CopyFundPnL
	,SUM(CommissionByUnits) as CommissionByUnits
	,SUM(FullCommissionByUnits) as FullCommissionByUnits
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsStocksReal
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoReal

	,sum(case when ConnectedGuruCopies = 1 and MirrorID>0  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END ) as GuruCopiesPNL
	,sum(case when ConnectedGuruCopies = 0 and MirrorID>0  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END ) as GuruCopiesPNL_Dit
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsStocksReal	
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsCryptoReal

	,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsStocksCFD
    ,sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCryptoCFD
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN CommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as CommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID>0 and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 END) as CopyCryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) and  SettlementTypeID=2   THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end)  as CryptoPositionPnL_TRS
	,sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN FullCommissionByUnits ELSE 0 END ) as FullCommissionByUnitsCrypto_TRS
	,sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND MirrorID=0 and  SettlementTypeID=2  THEN CalculatedNetProfit ELSE 0 end) as ManualCryptoPositionPnL_TRS

from #UnrealizedPnL 
where CalculatedNetProfit is NOT null
group by CID)a
	left join #final_NOP_Notional n
	on(a.CID=n.CID)

SP_Fact_FirstCustomerAction:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_FirstCustomerAction] @date [datetime] AS
BEGIN

declare @dateid as int 
set @dateid=convert(int,convert(varchar,@date,112))
print @dateid

/*bring daily action data*/
--drop table #FirstActions
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#FirstActions') IS NOT NULL 
	DROP TABLE #FirstActions;

CREATE TABLE #FirstActions  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
select a.*,row_number() over(partition by HistoryID order by Occurred, PositionID,SessionID) as rn,row_number() over(partition by ActionTypeID,GCID order by Occurred, PositionID,SessionID) as rn2
--into #FirstActions
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_CustomerAction a
where DateID=@dateid

--CREATE CLUSTERED columnstore INDEX #FirstActions ON #FirstActions
CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX #FirstActions ON #FirstActions(ActionTypeID,GCID)

/*leave only relevant data-fisrt transaction per action */
delete from #FirstActions where rn>1

/*mearging with FirstAction table*/

MERGE INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_FirstCustomerAction AS a
USING #FirstActions AS b
  ON a.ActionTypeID=b.ActionTypeID and a.GCID=b.GCID

WHEN NOT MATCHED and b.rn2=1 THEN
INSERT ( GCID
		,RealCID
		,DemoCID
		,FirstOccurred
		,IPNumber
		,IsReal
		,ActionTypeID
		,PlatformTypeID
		,InstrumentID
		,Amount
		,PositionID
		,CampaignID
		,BonusTypeID
		,FundingTypeID
		,LoginID
		,MirrorID
		,WithdrawID
		,PostID
		,CaseID
		,DateID
		,TimeID
		,CompensationReasonID
		,WithdrawPaymentID
		,DepositID
		,HistoryID
		,FirstEver
		,UpdateDate)

VALUES(  b.GCID
		,b.RealCID
		,b.DemoCID
		,b.Occurred
		,b.IPNumber
		,b.IsReal
		,b.ActionTypeID
		,b.PlatformTypeID
		,b.InstrumentID
		,b.Amount
		,b.PositionID
		,b.CampaignID
		,b.BonusTypeID
		,b.FundingTypeID
		,b.LoginID
		,b.MirrorID
		,b.WithdrawID
		,b.PostID
		,b.CaseID
		,b.DateID
		,b.TimeID
		,b.CompensationReasonID
		,b.WithdrawPaymentID
		,b.DepositID
		,b.HistoryID
		,1
		,getdate())
	;

/*mergin again on HistoryID*/
	MERGE INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_FirstCustomerAction AS a
USING #FirstActions AS b
  ON a.HistoryID=b.HistoryID 

WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT ( GCID
		,RealCID
		,DemoCID
		,FirstOccurred
		,IPNumber
		,IsReal
		,ActionTypeID
		,PlatformTypeID
		,InstrumentID
		,Amount
		,PositionID
		,CampaignID
		,BonusTypeID
		,FundingTypeID
		,LoginID
		,MirrorID
		,WithdrawID
		,PostID
		,CaseID
		,DateID
		,TimeID
		,CompensationReasonID
		,WithdrawPaymentID
		,DepositID
		,HistoryID
		,FirstEver
		,UpdateDate)

VALUES(  b.GCID
		,b.RealCID
		,b.DemoCID
		,b.Occurred
		,b.IPNumber
		,b.IsReal
		,b.ActionTypeID
		,b.PlatformTypeID
		,b.InstrumentID
		,b.Amount
		,b.PositionID
		,b.CampaignID
		,b.BonusTypeID
		,b.FundingTypeID
		,b.LoginID
		,b.MirrorID
		,b.WithdrawID
		,b.PostID
		,b.CaseID
		,b.DateID
		,b.TimeID
		,b.CompensationReasonID
		,b.WithdrawPaymentID
		,b.DepositID
		,b.HistoryID
		,0
		,getdate())
	;



end

SP_Fact_Guru_Copiers:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_Guru_Copiers] @dt [DATE] AS
BEGIN

--EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_Guru_Copiers] '2021-05-05'
/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-05-15
Description: Insert in Fact_Guru_Copiers
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------

*********************************************************************************************/

	declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@dt,112))
	DECLARE @row_count INT 

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_Guru_Copiers','Insert Fact_Guru_Copiers',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Fact_Guru_Copiers]
           ([CID]
           ,[DateID]
           ,[Cash]
           ,[Investment]
           ,[PnL]
           ,[DetachedPosInvestment]
           ,[Dit_PnL]
           ,[CopyFundAUM]
		   ,[UpdateDate])

	select g.CID
	, DateID
	,sum(isnull(Cash,0)) as Cash
	,sum(isnull(Investment,0)) as Investment
	,sum(isnull(PnL,0)) as PnL
	,sum(isnull(DetachedPosInvestment,0)) as DetachedPosInvestment
	,sum(isnull(Dit_PnL,0)) as Dit_PnL
	,sum(isnull(Cash,0))+sum(isnull(Investment,0))+sum(isnull(PnL,0))+sum(isnull(DetachedPosInvestment,0))+sum(isnull(Dit_PnL,0)) as CopyFundAUM
	,getdate()
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FGC_Guru_Copiers g with(NOLOCK)
	Join [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer fsc with(NOLOCK)
	on g.ParentCID = fsc.RealCID and fsc.AccountTypeID = 9
	join [DWH_dbo].V_M2M_Date_DateRange bb
	on(fsc.DateRangeID=bb.DateRangeID  and DateID = bb.DateKey)
	Group By g.CID,DateID

	SELECT @row_count = COUNT(*) FROM [DWH_dbo].[Fact_Guru_Copiers] NOLOCK WHERE DateID = @dateID

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_Guru_Copiers','Insert Fact_Guru_Copiers',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


	

END/*PROCEDURE*/

CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_Guru_Copiers_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN
-- =============================================
-- Author:      <Re'em Cohen>
-- Create Date: <2021-09-13>
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_Guru_Copiers_DL_To_Synapse]
-- =============================================
	DECLARE  @Yesterday as DATETIME
	DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
	
	set @Yesterday= cast(@dt as DATETIME) ;
	set @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);

-- Select Parameter Run Ind - Fact_Guru_Copiers ----
	-- SELECT
	--[IndRun],
	--[IndRunRollToToday]
	--  FROM [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd](nolock)
	--  where [TableName] = 'Fact_Guru_Copiers'
----------------------------------------------------
-- Delete Rows - Fact_Guru_Copiers -----------------
	Delete
	from [DWH_dbo].Fact_Guru_Copiers 
	where
	DateID >= cast(CONVERT(varchar(10),cast(@Yesterday as date),112) as INT)
	and
	DateID < cast(CONVERT(varchar(10),cast(@CurrentDate as date),112) as INT)
----------------------------------------------------
-- Extract Fact_Guru_Copiers -----------------------
	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FGC_Guru_Copiers

	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FGC_Guru_Copiers
	SELECT   
	     [CID]
		,[ParentCID]
		,[ParentUserName]
		,[Occurred]
		,convert(int, convert(varchar(10), [Timestamp], 112)) DateID
		,[StartCopy]
		,cast([Cash] as decimal(18,4))
		,cast([Investment] as decimal(18,4))
		,cast([PnL] as decimal(18,4))
		,cast([DetachedPosInvestment] as decimal(18,4))
		,cast([Dit_PnL] as decimal(18,4))
	FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_GuruCopiers]
	WHERE [Timestamp] = @Yesterday
----------------------------------------------------
-- Execute SP_Fact_Guru_Copiers --------------------
	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_Guru_Copiers @Yesterday
----------------------------------------------------
-- Update The Process Finish to Ind 2 Fact_Guru_Copiers
	--UPDATE [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd]
	--SET
	--[IndRun] = 2 ,
	--[UpdateDate] = GETDATE()
	--  where [TableName] = 'Fact_Guru_Copiers'
	--AND [IndRun] <> 2 
----------------------------------------------------
END

SP_Fact_Position_Futures_Snapshot:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_Position_Futures_Snapshot] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN
-- =============================================
-- Author:      <Guy Manova>
-- Create Date: 2024-11-11
-- Description: SP intended to insert data to Fact_Position_Futures_Snapshot
-- exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_Position_Futures_Snapshot] '20250105'
-- =============================================
/***************************
** Change History
**************************
Date			Author			Ticket #		Description   
----------		----------		----------		------------------------------------
2024-12-31		Inbal BML						Add #Fact_Settlement_Prices_LastPrices
2025-01-08		Inbal BML						Alter #Fact_Settlement_Prices_LastPrices
2025-01-20		Guy M			#SR-293809		added some changes after QA of actual data and better knowledge of what the finance report will look like
2025-08-12		Guy M			#SR-327197		switched a couple of joins to left joins, as there are contant market data failures to bring some settlement prices causing lost rows. 

--**********************************************************************************************************************/

  SET NOCOUNT ON

-- DECLARE @dt DATE = '20250812'
DECLARE @dtID int =CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), @dt, 112) AS INT)
DECLARE @dtPrev DATE = dateadd(DAY,-1,@dt)
DECLARE @dtPrevID int = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), @dt, 112) AS INT)


/*
#Fact_Settlement_Prices_LastPrices
Because not every day there are prices so we need first to select the latest price for each InstrumentID
*/

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Fact_Settlement_Prices_LastPrices') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Fact_Settlement_Prices_LastPrices
CREATE TABLE #Fact_Settlement_Prices_LastPrices
    WITH (CLUSTERED INDEX (InstrumentID),DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN)
AS 
SELECT InstrumentID
       ,SettlementDateID	
	   ,SettlementDate	
	   ,SettlementPrice	
	   ,UpdateDate
from (
		SELECT  * , ROW_NUMBER () over(partition by InstrumentID order by SettlementDate desc) RN
		FROM [DWH_dbo].[Fact_Settlement_Prices]
		where SettlementDate <= @dt and SettlementDate > dateadd( day,-14, @dt)
		      ) fsp
where RN=1

 --select * from  #Fact_Settlement_Prices_LastPrices order by InstrumentID

 PRINT ' #Fact_Settlement_Prices_LastPrices Done ' + (CONVERT( VARCHAR(24), GETDATE(), 121))

/*****************************************************************************************************
full population of positions for the daily snapshot: still open at settlement time every day or closed between 
pervios settlement and current settlement
*****************************************************************************************************/

/*
for open positions, just like in PositionPnL, we will need to reconstruct the position data 
at the time of the settlement
*/

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#openAtSettlement') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #openAtSettlement
CREATE TABLE #openAtSettlement
    WITH (CLUSTERED INDEX (DateID),DISTRIBUTION = HASH(PositionID))
AS
SELECT  @dt AS Date
	  , @dtID AS DateID
	  , 'OpenAtSettlement' AS SettlementCategory
	  , dp.CID
	  , dp.PositionID
	  , dp.OriginalPositionID
	  , dp.InstrumentID
	  , dp.LotCountDecimal
	  , dis.SettlementTime
	  , fsp.SettlementPrice 
	  , dp.Amount AS InvestedAmount
	  , dp.OpenOccurred
	  , '1900-01-01 00:00:00.000' AS CloseOccurred
	  , dp.InitForexRate
	  , NULL AS EndForexRate
	  , NULL AS IsPartialCloseParent 
	  , 0 AS IsPartialCloseChild
	  , dp.IsBuy
	  , dis.ProviderID
	  , dis.Multiplier
	  , NULL AS ProviderMargin -- usually will not change but to be on the safe side we'll also use changelogs
	  , NULL AS eToroMargin -- usually will not change but to be on the safe side we'll also use changelogs
	  , cast(NULL as money) AS PnL -- we need to compute based on steelement price and position status at settlement time
FROM DWH_dbo.Dim_Position dp
JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument_Snapshot] dis 
	ON dp.InstrumentID = dis.InstrumentID AND dis.DateID  = @dtID AND dis.IsFuture = 1
LEFT JOIN  #Fact_Settlement_Prices_LastPrices fsp  -- guym 2025-08-12
	ON dp.InstrumentID = fsp.InstrumentID --AND fsp.SettlementDateID = @dtID
WHERE (dp.CloseOccurred > dis.SettlementTime OR dp.CloseOccurred = 0) AND dp.OpenOccurred <= dis.SettlementTime and dis.IsFuture=1 
	AND ISNULL(dp.IsPartialCloseChild,0) = 0 -- guym 2025-01-19 - closed child positions which closed


/*  select * from [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument_Snapshot]
for closed positions its easier, we just need to know end state of metrics which are not in DimPosition, the rest from there
*/

-- closed between  yesterday's settlement and todays settlement timestamps

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ClosedInSettlement') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ClosedInSettlement
CREATE TABLE #ClosedInSettlement
    WITH (CLUSTERED INDEX (DateID),DISTRIBUTION = HASH(PositionID))
AS
SELECT @dt AS Date
	  , @dtID AS DateID
	  , 'ClosedBeforeSettlement' AS SettlementCategory
	  , dp.CID
	  , dp.PositionID
	  , dp.OriginalPositionID
	  , dp.InstrumentID
	  , dp.LotCountDecimal
	  , dis.SettlementTime
	  , fsp.SettlementPrice
	  , dp.Amount AS InvestedAmount
	  , dp.OpenOccurred
	  , dp.CloseOccurred 
	  , dp.InitForexRate
	  , dp.EndForexRate
	  , dp.IsPartialCloseParent
	  , dp.IsPartialCloseChild
	  , dp.IsBuy
	  , dis.ProviderID
	  , dis.Multiplier
	  , NULL AS ProviderMargin
	  , NULL AS eToroMargin
	  , dp.NetProfit AS PnL
FROM DWH_dbo.Dim_Position dp
JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument_Snapshot] dis 
	ON dp.InstrumentID = dis.InstrumentID AND dis.DateID  = @dtID AND dis.IsFuture = 1
LEFT JOIN  #Fact_Settlement_Prices_LastPrices fsp -- guym 2025-08-12
	ON dp.InstrumentID = fsp.InstrumentID -- AND fsp.SettlementDateID = @dtID
WHERE dp.CloseOccurred > dateadd(DAY,-1,dis.SettlementTime) AND dp.CloseOccurred <= dis.SettlementTime and dis.IsFuture=1 

--WHERE dp.CloseOccurred > @settlementTimePrev AND dp.CloseOccurred <= @settlementTime


/*****************************************************************************************************
find the original state of some position metrics (lot count, margins, invested amounts, partial status)
*****************************************************************************************************/

-- all positions (to fetch changloegs for)

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#allPos') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #allPos -- select * from #allPos where PositionID = 2316424660
CREATE TABLE #allPos
    WITH (HEAP,DISTRIBUTION = HASH(PositionID))
AS
SELECT PositionID, DateID
FROM #openAtSettlement 
UNION 
SELECT PositionID , DateID
FROM #ClosedInSettlement cis


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#changelog') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #changelog -- 
CREATE TABLE #changelog
    WITH (HEAP,DISTRIBUTION = HASH(PositionID))
AS
SELECT
	dpcl.PositionID
  , dpcl.Occurred
  , dpcl.OccurredDateID
  , dpcl.ChangeTypeID
  , dpcl.PreviousAmount
  , dpcl.AmountChanged
  , dpcl.NewAmount
  , dpcl.PreviousAmountInUnits 
  , dpcl.AmountInUnits
  , dpcl.PreviousLotCountDecimal AS PreviousLotCountDecimal -- guym 2024-11-20
  , dpcl.LotCountDecimal AS NewLotCountDecimal -- guym 2024-11-20
  , ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY dpcl.PositionID, dpcl.ChangeTypeID ORDER BY dpcl.Occurred) AS RN
FROM DWH_dbo.Dim_PositionChangeLog dpcl
WHERE dpcl.OccurredDateID <= @dtID
AND dpcl.ChangeTypeID IN (1,12,0,11) -- guym 2025-01-19 added opens (0) and partial close children (11)
AND dpcl.PositionID IN (SELECT PositionID FROM #allPos)


 PRINT ' #changelog Done ' + (CONVERT( VARCHAR(24), GETDATE(), 121))

-- step 1: find the original metrics at open

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#originMetrics') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #originMetrics 
CREATE TABLE #originMetrics
    WITH (HEAP,DISTRIBUTION = HASH(PositionID))
AS
SELECT distinct
	cl.PositionID
  , cl.NewLotCountDecimal AS InitialLotCountDecimal -- guym 2025-01-19
  , cl.NewAmount AS InitialInvestedAmount
  , dis.ProviderMarginPerLot AS InitialProviderMarginPerLot
  , dis.eToroMarginPerLot AS InitialeToroMarginPerLot
  , cl.NewLotCountDecimal * dis.ProviderMarginPerLot AS InitialProviderMargin
  , cl.NewLotCountDecimal * dis.eToroMarginPerLot AS InitialeToroMargin
FROM #allPos p 
JOIN #changelog  cl
	ON p.PositionID = cl.PositionID AND cl.ChangeTypeID = 0
JOIN DWH_dbo.Dim_Position dp
	ON cl.PositionID = dp.PositionID
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument_Snapshot] dis 
	ON dp.InstrumentID = dis.InstrumentID AND cast(dp.OpenOccurred AS DATE) = cast(dis.SettlementTime AS DATE) AND dis.IsFuture = 1

 PRINT ' #originalmetrics Done ' + (CONVERT( VARCHAR(24), GETDATE(), 121))

-- step 2: find out when was the first occurrance a partial close on the position occurred


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#firstPartial') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #firstPartial
CREATE TABLE #firstPartial
    WITH (HEAP,DISTRIBUTION = HASH(PositionID))
AS
SELECT c.PositionID, c.Occurred, c.OccurredDateID, c.PreviousLotCountDecimal AS InitialLotCountDecimal -- guym 2024-11-19
FROM #changelog c
WHERE c.ChangeTypeID = 12 
AND c.RN = 1

-- step 3: update the true initial lot count at open

 UPDATE t1  -- guym 2024-11-19
 SET 
 t1.InitialLotCountDecimal = t2.InitialLotCountDecimal
 FROM #originMetrics t1
  JOIN #firstPartial t2
 ON t1.PositionID = t2.PositionID


/*************************************
update the positions with correct data 
*************************************/


-- open positions need to update the previous LotCount, InvestedAmount, and whether its really a Parent or not

-- step 4: update a bunch of metrics accoriding to the changelog at the time of settlement

 UPDATE  t1
 SET  LotCountDecimal = COALESCE(t1.LotCountDecimal, t2.NewLotCountDecimal, t5.NewLotCountDecimal)
	, InvestedAmount = COALESCE(t1.InvestedAmount, t4.NewAmount, t5.NewAmount) 
	, IsPartialCloseParent =  CASE WHEN t3.PositionID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
 FROM #openAtSettlement t1
       OUTER APPLY
      	(  --last action of position before SettlementTime -- SELECT TOP 1 *  FROM #changelog b WHERE PositionID = 2908037488  ORDER BY b.Occurred desc
      	 SELECT TOP 1 *
      	 FROM #changelog b
      	 WHERE
      		 t1.PositionID = b.PositionID
      		 AND b.Occurred <= t1.SettlementTime 
			 AND b.ChangeTypeID = 12
      		 ORDER BY b.Occurred desc
      	) t2
       OUTER APPLY ---why need top 1???
      	(
      	 SELECT TOP 1 *
      	 FROM #firstPartial b
      	 WHERE
      		 t1.PositionID = b.PositionID
      		 AND b.Occurred <= t1.SettlementTime
      		 ORDER BY b.Occurred desc
      	) t3
     OUTER APPLY
      	(  --last action of position before SettlementTime -- SELECT TOP 1 *  FROM #changelog b WHERE PositionID = 2908037488  ORDER BY b.Occurred desc
      	 SELECT TOP 1 *
      	 FROM #changelog b
      	 WHERE
      		 t1.PositionID = b.PositionID
      		 AND b.Occurred <= t1.SettlementTime 
			 AND b.ChangeTypeID = 1
      		 ORDER BY b.Occurred desc
      	) t4
	 LEFT JOIN #changelog t5
		ON t1.PositionID = t5.PositionID AND t5.ChangeTypeID = 0



 UPDATE  t1 -- only the lot count is not correct on the closing positions, compare logs to close time
 SET LotCountDecimal = CASE WHEN t2.PositionID IS NULL THEN t1.LotCountDecimal else t2.NewLotCountDecimal END 
 FROM #ClosedInSettlement t1
       OUTER APPLY
      	(
      	 SELECT TOP 1 *
      	 FROM #changelog b
      	 WHERE
      		 t1.PositionID = b.PositionID
      		 AND b.Occurred <= t1.CloseOccurred
			 AND b.ChangeTypeID = 11
      		 ORDER BY b.Occurred desc
      	) t2
 

-- step 5: mark to market the PnL based on settlement price and actual lot count 

UPDATE #openAtSettlement SET PnL = (LotCountDecimal * Multiplier * SettlementPrice) - (LotCountDecimal * Multiplier * InitForexRate)

-- step 6: update the correct state of the partial parent/child as of the settlement time

UPDATE #openAtSettlement
SET IsPartialCloseParent = 0 WHERE IsPartialCloseParent IS NULL

UPDATE #openAtSettlement
SET IsPartialCloseChild = 0 WHERE IsPartialCloseChild IS NULL

UPDATE #openAtSettlement
SET OriginalPositionID = PositionID WHERE IsPartialCloseChild = 0

UPDATE #ClosedInSettlement
SET IsPartialCloseParent = 0 WHERE IsPartialCloseParent IS NULL

UPDATE #ClosedInSettlement
SET IsPartialCloseChild = 0 WHERE IsPartialCloseChild IS NULL

UPDATE #ClosedInSettlement
SET OriginalPositionID = PositionID WHERE IsPartialCloseChild = 0

 PRINT ' #updates Done ' + (CONVERT( VARCHAR(24), GETDATE(), 121))


 --- final preps: add the initial full and initial residual (metrics per lot can change - we will need to original metrics as well)

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#prepOpens') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #prepOpens
CREATE TABLE #prepOpens
    WITH (HEAP,DISTRIBUTION = HASH(PositionID))
AS
SELECT oas.Date
	 , oas.DateID
	 , oas.SettlementCategory
	 , oas.CID
	 , oas.PositionID
	 , oas.OriginalPositionID
	 , oas.InstrumentID
	 , oas.LotCountDecimal
	 , oas.SettlementTime
	 , oas.SettlementPrice
	 , oas.InvestedAmount
	 , oas.OpenOccurred
	 , oas.CloseOccurred
	 , oas.InitForexRate
	 , oas.EndForexRate
	 , ISNULL(oas.IsPartialCloseParent,0) AS IsPartialCloseParent
	 , ISNULL(oas.IsPartialCloseChild,0) AS IsPartialCloseChild
	 , oas.IsBuy
	 , oas.ProviderID
	 , oas.Multiplier
	 , oas.LotCountDecimal * dis.ProviderMarginPerLot AS ProviderMargin
	 , oas.LotCountDecimal * dis.eToroMarginPerLot AS eToroMargin
	 , oas.PnL
	 , m.InitialLotCountDecimal AS InitialLotCountDecimalFull
	 , m.InitialInvestedAmount AS InitialInvestedAmountFull
	 , m.InitialProviderMarginPerLot * m.InitialLotCountDecimal AS InitialProviderMarginFull
	 , m.InitialeToroMarginPerLot * m.InitialLotCountDecimal AS InitialeToroMarginFull
	 , oas.LotCountDecimal AS InitialLotCountDecimalResidual
	 , m.InitialInvestedAmount * oas.LotCountDecimal / m.InitialLotCountDecimal AS InitialInvestedAmountResidual
	 , m.InitialProviderMarginPerLot * oas.LotCountDecimal AS InitialProviderMarginResidual
	 , m.InitialeToroMarginPerLot * oas.LotCountDecimal AS InitialeToroMarginResidual
	 , getdate() as UpdateDate
FROM #openAtSettlement oas 
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument_Snapshot] dis 
	ON oas.InstrumentID = dis.InstrumentID
		AND oas.SettlementTime = dis.SettlementTime 
LEFT JOIN #originMetrics m			
	ON oas.PositionID = m.PositionID 


 PRINT ' #prepopens Done ' + (CONVERT( VARCHAR(24), GETDATE(), 121))

UPDATE #prepOpens
SET OriginalPositionID = PositionID 
WHERE OriginalPositionID IS NULL 
	AND IsPartialCloseChild = 0


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#prepClosed') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #prepClosed
CREATE TABLE #prepClosed
    WITH (HEAP,DISTRIBUTION = HASH(PositionID))
AS
SELECT oas.Date
	 , oas.DateID
	 , oas.SettlementCategory
	 , oas.CID
	 , oas.PositionID
	 , oas.OriginalPositionID
	 , oas.InstrumentID
	 , oas.LotCountDecimal
	 , oas.SettlementTime
	 , oas.SettlementPrice
	 , oas.InvestedAmount
	 , oas.OpenOccurred
	 , oas.CloseOccurred
	 , oas.InitForexRate
	 , oas.EndForexRate
	 , ISNULL(oas.IsPartialCloseParent,0) AS IsPartialCloseParent
	 , ISNULL(oas.IsPartialCloseChild,0) AS IsPartialCloseChild
	 , oas.IsBuy
	 , oas.ProviderID
	 , oas.Multiplier
	 , oas.LotCountDecimal * dis.ProviderMarginPerLot AS ProviderMargin
	 , oas.LotCountDecimal * dis.eToroMarginPerLot AS eToroMargin
	 , oas.PnL
	 , m.InitialLotCountDecimal AS InitialLotCountDecimalFull 
	 , m.InitialInvestedAmount AS InitialInvestedAmountFull
	 , m.InitialProviderMarginPerLot * m.InitialLotCountDecimal  AS InitialProviderMarginFull
	 , m.InitialeToroMarginPerLot * m.InitialLotCountDecimal   AS InitialeToroMarginFull
	 , oas.LotCountDecimal AS InitialLotCountDecimalResidual -- m.InitialLotCountDecimal 
	 , m.InitialInvestedAmount * oas.LotCountDecimal / m.InitialLotCountDecimal AS InitialInvestedAmountResidual
	 , m.InitialProviderMarginPerLot * oas.LotCountDecimal  AS InitialProviderMarginResidual
	 , m.InitialeToroMarginPerLot * oas.LotCountDecimal   AS InitialeToroMarginResidual
	 , getdate() as UpdateDate
FROM #ClosedInSettlement oas 
LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Dim_Instrument_Snapshot] dis 
	ON oas.InstrumentID = dis.InstrumentID
		AND oas.DateID = dis.DateID 
LEFT JOIN #originMetrics m			
	ON oas.OriginalPositionID = m.PositionID 


UPDATE #prepClosed
SET OriginalPositionID = PositionID 
WHERE OriginalPositionID IS NULL 
	AND IsPartialCloseChild = 0


PRINT ' #prepClosed Done ' + (CONVERT( VARCHAR(24), GETDATE(), 121))



DELETE FROM [DWH_dbo].[Fact_Position_Futures_Snapshot] WHERE DateID = @dtID

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Fact_Position_Futures_Snapshot]
SELECT * FROM #prepOpens o
UNION ALL SELECT * FROM #prepClosed c

END
SP_Fact_RegulationTransfer:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_RegulationTransfer] @date [datetime] AS
	BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table [DWH_dbo].Fact_RegulationTransfer
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
2020-05-20      Boris Slutski  Add column InvestedRealStocks
2024-11-24		Daniel Kaplan  Add futures fields : InvestedRealFutures , PositionPnLFuturesReal
2025-10-08      Daniel Kaplan  Add Stock Margin : InvestedStocksMargin,PositionPnLStocksMargin,TotalStockMarginLoanValue

EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_RegulationTransfer]  '20250908'
*********************************************************************************************/

	--declare @date datetime = '20211217'
	declare @auxdate as datetime
	declare @datebefore as datetime
	declare @dateid as int
	declare @beforedateid as int
	declare @regcount as int
	declare @maxloopdate as datetime

	--set @date='2014-04-06'
	set @auxdate=(select dateadd(day,1,@date))
	set @datebefore=(select dateadd(day,-1,@date))
	set @dateid=convert(int,convert(varchar,@date,112))
	set @beforedateid =convert(int,convert(varchar,@datebefore,112))
	set @maxloopdate=dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,getdate()),0)

	--drop table if EXISTS #Reg
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Reg') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Reg;
	select *,convert(int,convert(varchar,cast(Occurred as Date),112)) as EquityDateID
	into #Reg
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FRT_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog_All
	where Occurred>=@date and Occurred<@auxdate

	/*if there wasn't any transfer between regualation , skip this day*/
	select @regcount=count(*)
	from #Reg

	 -- CREATE CLUSTERED index IX_tmp on #Reg(EquityDateID,CID)
	if @regcount<>0
	begin
		--print 'We have transfers writing into table '++convert(varchar,@date,120)
		/*delete historical data befire inserting new data*/
		delete from [DWH_dbo].Fact_RegulationTransfer
		where DateID=@dateid

	
	--	drop table #Equity
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Equity') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Equity;

		select *
		into #Equity
		from [DWH_dbo].V_Liabilities
		where DateID= @beforedateid
		 -- CREATE CLUSTERED index IX_Equity on #Equity(DateID,CID)

	insert into [DWH_dbo].Fact_RegulationTransfer(FromRegulationID
		  ,ToRegulationID
		  ,Occurred
		  ,DateID
		  ,ActualNWA
		  ,RealizedEquity
		  ,CID
		  ,TotalPositionsAmount
		  ,TotalCash
		  ,InProcessCashouts
		  ,TotalMirrorPositionsAmount
		  ,TotalMirrorCash
		  ,TotalStockOrders
		  ,TotalMirrorStockOrders
		  ,Credit
		  ,AUM
		  ,BonusCredit
		  ,TotalLiability
		  ,WithdrawableLiability
		  ,LiabilityInUsedMargin
		  ,UnrealizedPnL
		  ,UpdateDate
		  ,InvestedRealStocks
		  ,InvestedRealCrypto
		  ,PositionPnLStocksReal
		  ,PositionPnLCryptoReal
		  ,InvestedRealFutures
		  ,PositionPnLFuturesReal
		  --2025-10-08 Stock Margin
		  ,InvestedStocksMargin
		  ,PositionPnLStocksMargin
		  ,TotalStockMarginLoanValue
		  )

	SELECT FromRegulationID
		  ,ToRegulationID
		  ,Occurred
		  ,a.DateID
		  ,isnull(ActualNWA,0) as ActualNWA
		  ,isnull(RealizedEquity,0) as RealizedEquity
		  ,a.CID
		  ,isnull(TotalPositionsAmount,0)
		  ,isnull(TotalCash,0)
		  ,isnull(InProcessCashouts,0)
		  ,isnull(TotalMirrorPositionsAmount,0)
		  ,isnull(TotalMirrorCash,0)
		  ,isnull(TotalStockOrders,0)
		  ,isnull(TotalMirrorStockOrders,0)
		  ,isnull(Credit,0)
		  ,isnull(AUM,0)
		  ,isnull(BonusCredit,0)
		  ,isnull(Liabilities,0) as  TotalLiability
		  ,isnull(WA_Liabilities ,0)as WithdrawableLiability
		  ,isnull(Liabilities_InUsedMargin,0) as LiabilityInUsedMargin
		  ,isnull(PositionPnL,0)
		 ,GETDATE()
		 ,isnull([PositionPnLStocksReal],0) + isnull([TotalRealStocks],0) as InvestedRealStocks
		 ,isnull([PositionPnLCryptoReal],0) + isnull([TotalRealCrypto],0) as InvestedRealCrypto
		 ,isnull([PositionPnLStocksReal],0) as PositionPnLStocksReal
		 ,isnull([PositionPnLCryptoReal],0) as PositionPnLCryptoReal
		 ,isnull([PositionPnLFuturesReal],0) + isnull([TotalRealFutures],0) as InvestedRealFutures
 		 ,isnull([PositionPnLFuturesReal],0) as PositionPnLFuturesReal
		 
		  --2025-10-08 Stock Margin
		 ,isnull([PositionPnLStocksMargin],0) + isnull([TotalStocksMargin],0) as InvestedStocksMargin
		 ,isnull([PositionPnLStocksMargin],0) as PositionPnLStocksMargin
		 ,isnull([TotalStockMarginLoanValue],0) as TotalStockMarginLoanValue
	  FROM 
	  #Reg a
	  left join 
	  #Equity b
	  on(a.CID=b.CID)
	end/*if*/

-- end/*while loop*/
 end /*Procedure*/
SP_Fact_RegulationTransfer_DL_To_Synapse:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_RegulationTransfer_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS

BEGIN
--feature/Fact_RegulationTransfer -adf
-- =============================================
-- Author:     Daniel Kaplan
-- Create Date: 2021-09-24
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- =============================================
--EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_RegulationTransfer_DL_To_Synapse] '2022-01-20'

    -- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
    -- interfering with SELECT statements.
    SET NOCOUNT ON

	--DECLARE @dt as [Date] = '2021-10-01'
	
	
	DECLARE @Date DATETIME
	DECLARE @Date_int int = cast(convert(varchar(8),@dt,112) as int)
	--DECLARE @MinDate as DATETIME
	--DECLARE @MaxDate as DATETIME
	DECLARE @CurrentDate DATETIME

	SET @CurrentDate = cast(dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,@dt),0) as date)

--SELECT
--       [FromDate] AS @MinDate
--      ,[TillDate] AS @MaxDate
--      ,DATEADD(year, DATEDIFF(year, -1,  [FromDate]), 0) as FirstDayNextYear
--  FROM [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesDate](nolock)


--Sequence Container - Fact_RegulationTransfer

Delete
from [DWH_dbo].[Fact_RegulationTransfer] 
WHERE DateID >= @Date_int
--DateID >= convert(int, replace(cast(@MinDate as date), '-', ''))
--AND DateID < convert(int, replace(cast(@MaxDate as date), '-', ''))



-- Truncate Ext_FRT_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog --------------------------------------->
truncate table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FRT_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog
----------------------
If Object_ID('tempdb..#etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer

Select  *
into #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer  -- Move duplicates rows, because two parquet files with another dates
from
(
select
CID,
RegulationID,
ValidFrom,
ValidTo,
CustomerHistoryID,
ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by a.CID, CustomerHistoryID  order by a.ValidTo ) as rn
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] a with (nolock)
) a
where  rn =1

-------------
	
-- Extract Ext_FRT_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FRT_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog
SELECT
RegulationChangeID,
CID,
Occurred,
FromRegulationID,
ToRegulationID,
DateID
from
(
select
100000 as RegulationChangeID,
a.CID,
MAX(b.Max_ValidFrom) as Occurred,
isnull(c.RegulationID,0)  as FromRegulationID,
isnull(a.RegulationID,0) as ToRegulationID,
convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,0,b.Max_ValidFrom),112)) as DateID,
ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by a.CID order by a.ValidTo desc) as rn,a.ValidTo
from #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer a with (nolock)
--[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] a with (nolock)
--from [History].[BackOfficeCustomer] a with (nolock)
join
(
SELECT CID, MAX(ValidFrom) AS Max_ValidFrom, MAX(ValidTo) AS Max_ValidTo
from #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer  with (nolock)
--[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] with (nolock)
--FROM [History].[BackOfficeCustomer] with (nolock)
where 
ValidFrom  >= @dt
and ValidFrom < @CurrentDate
GROUP BY CID
) b
on a.CID=b.CID  and a.ValidFrom = b.Max_ValidFrom and a.ValidTo = b.Max_ValidTo
join
(
SELECT a.CID , b.Max_ValidFrom, b.Max_ValidTo, RegulationID
from #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer a with (nolock)
--[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] a (nolock)
--FROM [History].[BackOfficeCustomer] a with (nolock)
join
(
SELECT CID, max(ValidFrom) AS Max_ValidFrom, max(ValidTo) AS Max_ValidTo
from #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer  with (nolock)
--[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] (nolock)
--FROM [History].[BackOfficeCustomer] with (nolock)
where ValidFrom  < @dt
group by CID
) b
on a.CID= b.CID and  ValidFrom = b.Max_ValidFrom and ValidTo = b.Max_ValidTo																																												
) c
on a.CID = c.CID
WHERE
a.RegulationID <> c.RegulationID
AND a.ValidFrom >= @dt
AND ValidFrom < @CurrentDate
group by
a.CID,
isnull(c.RegulationID,0),
isnull(a.RegulationID,0),
convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,0,b.Max_ValidFrom),112)),
 a.ValidTo
 ) g
where rn = 1


	----------------------------------------------------------------->
--Truncate Ext_FRT_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog_All

truncate table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FRT_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog_All

insert into [DWH_dbo].Ext_FRT_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog_All([RegulationChangeID]
              ,[CID]
              ,[Occurred]
              ,[FromRegulationID]
              ,[ToRegulationID]
              ,[DateID]
              )
select   a.[RegulationChangeID]
   ,a.[CID]
   ,a.[Occurred]
   ,b.[FromRegulationID]
   ,a.[ToRegulationID]
   ,a.[DateID]
from 
(
SELECT [RegulationChangeID]
  ,[CID]
  ,[Occurred]
  ,[FromRegulationID]
  ,[ToRegulationID]
  ,DateID
from 
(SELECT [RegulationChangeID]
  ,[CID]
  ,[Occurred]
  ,[FromRegulationID]
  ,[ToRegulationID]
  ,DateID
  ,row_number() over(partition by CID,DateID order by Occurred desc ) as rn
  FROM (SELECT  [RegulationChangeID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[Occurred]
      ,isnull([FromRegulationID],0) as FromRegulationID
      ,isnull([ToRegulationID],0) as  ToRegulationID
     ,convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,0,[Occurred]),112)) as DateID
     FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FRT_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog
    ) a
 ) b
where rn=1
) a
join 
(
SELECT [RegulationChangeID]
  ,[CID]
  ,[Occurred]
  ,[FromRegulationID]
  ,DateID
from 
(SELECT [RegulationChangeID]
  ,[CID]
  ,[Occurred]
  ,isnull([FromRegulationID],0) as FromRegulationID
  ,isnull([ToRegulationID],0) as  ToRegulationID
  ,DateID
  ,row_number() over(partition by CID,DateID order by Occurred ) as rn
  FROM (SELECT [RegulationChangeID]
     ,[CID]
     ,[Occurred]
     ,[FromRegulationID]
     ,[ToRegulationID]
     ,convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,0,[Occurred]),112)) as DateID
     FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FRT_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog
     
    ) a
 ) b
where rn=1
) b
on(a.CID=b.CID and a.DateID=b.DateID)
where b.FromRegulationID<> a.ToRegulationID


EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_RegulationTransfer  @dt

--UPDATE [DWH_dbo].[DataSolutionsTablesRunInd]
--SET
--[IndRun] = 2 ,
--[UpdateDate] = GETDATE()
--WHERE TableName = 'Fact_RegulationTransfer'
--AND [IndRun] <> 2 

END
SP_Fact_Reverse_Deposits_DL_To_Synapse:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_Reverse_Deposits_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN
-- EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_Reverse_Deposits_DL_To_Synapse] '2023-07-22'
--declare @dt as date = '2020-01-01'
  DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
  DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME

  SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
  SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday);
  

----------------------------- delete rows --------------------------
	DELETE FROM [DWH_dbo].[Fact_Reverse_Deposits] 
	WHERE ModificationDateID >= convert(INT,convert(varchar, @Yesterday ,112))
	and ModificationDateID < convert(INT,convert(varchar, @CurrentDate ,112))

--------------------------------------------------------------------
	
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Fact_Reverse_Deposits]
           ([CID], 
			[WhiteLabelID], 
			[DepositID], 
			[DepositTime], 
			[DepositAmount], 
			[Currency], 
			[DepositUSDAmount], 
			[DepositStatus], 
			[PreviousDepositStatus], 
			[DepositStatusModificationTime], 
			[RollbackDate], 
			[RollbackAmount], 
			[ExchangeRate], 
			[ConversionFee], 
			[RollbackUSDAmount], 
			[ReferenceNumber], 
			[RollbackReason], 
			[RollbackCanceled], 
			[FundingMethod], 
			[Brand], 
			[PaymentDetails], 
			[FundingID], 
			[Depot], 
			[CustomerStatus], 
			[RiskStatus], 
			[VerificationLevel], 
			[CustomerLevel], 
			[CountryByRegIP], 
			[Regulation], 
			[WhiteLabel],
			[AccountManager], 
			[Balance], 
			[TotalDeposits], 
			[TotalProcessedCashouts], 
			[TotalCommissions], 
			[PIPsInUSD], 
			[TotalPnL], 
			[TotalCompensations], 
			[TotalCredits], 
			[MIDName], 
			[MID], 
			[ThreedsParameters],
			[ThreedsResponse], 
			[OldPaymentID],
            [ModificationDateID],

		   )
     SELECT 
			[CID],

			[DepositID],

			[Currency], 
			[DepositUSDAmount],

			[PreviousDepositStatus], 
			[DepositStatusModificationTime], 
			[RollbackDate], 
			[RollbackAmount], 
			[ExchangeRate], 
			[ConversionFee], 
			[RollbackUSDAmount], 
			[ReferenceNumber], 
			[RollbackReason], 
			[RollbackCanceled], 
			[FundingMethod], 
			[Brand], 
			[PaymentDetails], 
			[FundingID], 
			[Depot], 
			[CustomerStatus], 
			[RiskStatus], 
			[VerificationLevel], 
			[CustomerLevel], 
			[CountryByRegIP], 
			[Regulation], 
			[WhiteLabel],
			[AccountManager], 
			[Balance], 
			[TotalDeposits], 
			[TotalProcessedCashouts], 
			[TotalCommissions], 
			[PIPsInUSD], 
			[TotalPnL], 
			[TotalCompensations], 
			[TotalCredits], 
			[MIDName], 
			[MID], 
			[ThreedsParameters],
			[ThreedsResponse], 
			[OldPaymentID],
			convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,[DepositStatusModificationTime]),0),112)) as ModificationDateID,
			getdate() as UpdateDate
FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_BackOffice_GetRiskExposureReportPCIVersion]
WHERE [DepositStatusModificationTime] >= @Yesterday AND [DepositStatusModificationTime] < dateadd(day,1, @CurrentDate)

SP_Fact_Settlement_Prices:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_Settlement_Prices] @dt [Date] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author: Inbal BML   
Date: 2024-10-31       
Description: 
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------

  
*********************************************************************************************/
-- EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_Settlement_Prices] '2024-12-10'
--declare @dt as date = '2024-11-02'
  DECLARE @Yesterday as DATETIME
  DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
  SET @Yesterday = CAST(@dt as DATETIME);
  SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, 1 ,@Yesterday); 
----------------------------- delete rows --------------------------
  DELETE FROM [DWH_dbo].[Fact_Settlement_Prices]
  WHERE SettlementDate >= @Yesterday
  and SettlementDate < @CurrentDate
--------------------------------------------------------------------

 INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Fact_Settlement_Prices]
           ([InstrumentID]
		   ,[SettlementDateID]
           ,[SettlementDate]
           ,[SettlementPrice]
		   ,[UpdateDate])
 SELECT 
      InstrumentID
	 ,convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,Date),0),112)) as SettlementDateID
     ,Date as SettlementDate
     ,Price as SettlementPrice
	 , getdate() as UpdateDate
 from [DWH_staging].[EndOfDay_EOD_SettlementPrices]
 WHERE Date >= @Yesterday and Date < @CurrentDate

END
SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer] @date [DATE] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-03-11
Description: Update table Fact_SnapshotCustomer - Process one to update table Fact_SnapshotCustomer
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2020-02-23     Boris         Add column  IsCreditReportValidCB
 2020-02-15     Boris		  Change case for IsCreditReportValidCB + IsValidCustomer  from 2020.03.16
 2022-04-03     Boris         Add filter to #outputdata left(DateRangeID),4) = YEAR(@date)
 2022-11-28	    Inbal         Add Columns: PhoneNumber, IsPhoneVerified and PhoneVerificationDateID to Fact_SnapshotCustomer
 2022-12-28		Inbal		  Add PlayerStatusSubReasonID to Fact_SnapshotCustomer
 2023-02-01		Inbal		  Add PhoneNumber to GDPR
 2024-04-01		Inbal		  Add WeekendFeePrecentage to Fact_SnapshotCustomer
 2024-08-13		Nir.H		  Add DltStatusID,DltID to Fact_SnapshotCustomer
 2024-09-08		Nir.H		  DltID add default  null
 2024-10-06     Eyal.B        FIX DltID update logic
 2024-10-13     Eyal.B	      FFIX DltID update logic to get the data to Fact_SnapshotCustomer
 2024-10-15     Eyal.B		  DltID final fix including additional tmp table
 2024-10-21     Eyal.B		  Fix DltID - prevent the deletion of DLT when having new snapshot
 2024-10-29     Eyal.B		  Fix DltID - Again, New user support
 2025-03-18     Adi Ferber    Replace Ext_FSC_PhoneVerificationDetails with Ext_FSC_PhoneCustomer - new DB and new table with all the phone details  
 2025-05-11     Eyal Boas     Add EquiLendID + StocksLendingStatusID
 2025-06-03     Daniel Kaplan Replace Ext_FSC_Real_History_Credit with Ext_FSC_Customer_FirstTimeDeposits - new DB and new table with all FTD details 
*********************************************************************************************/

/*** Important note:
This is the script that runs every day and fills up Fact_SnapshotCustomer_DEV using ETL tables.
If you're looking to load history use SP_History_Fact_SnapshotCustomer_DEV

**Create temp tables:
This script works using two lead tables - CC and BO.
The process:
-Make a list of all CIDs from CC stage table with Operation = 2 (NewCIDs) and another with Operation = 4 (Exist CIDs - update to CC) from stage tables (will be used later). When we insert, we will only insert the most updated row regardless of operation.
-Take most recent entry for each CID from CC for our day
-Take most recent entry for each CID from BC and RegulationTransfer for our day
-Combine BC and Regulations using Full JOIN between them, another left join to CustomerSnapshot and also use isnull in SELECT.
-Combine BC and CC using Full JOIN between them, another left join to CustomerSnapshot and use isnull in SELECT.

**Insert data
-Insert all rows that CIDs match #NewCIDs with ToDate=End of year
-Update all rows that CIDs in #ExistCIDs ToDate=Yesterday
-Insert new rows for all entries in #ExistCIDs with FromDate=Today, and ToDate=EndOfYear

**Insert new DateIDs to dim

**Close of year - Close of all last year's open entries and reopen them for this year.

--Explanation for RegulationChangeLog:
We take the RegulationID from RegulationChangeLog and not from BC because the change date from RegulationChangeLog is the end of day,
and from BC the change is effective immdediately. For business reasons regulation change on END OF DAY, so we need to take this field from Fact_RegulationChangeLog.
***/

--DECLARE @date AS DATE = '2025-06-05'

DECLARE @auxdate AS DATETIME
DECLARE @daybefore  AS DATETIME
DECLARE @largedate  AS DATETIME
DECLARE @maxentrydate  AS DATETIME
DECLARE @ProcessName  AS VARCHAR(50)
DECLARE @minCreditID as Int
DECLARE @maxCreditID AS INT
DECLARE @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@date,112))
DECLARE @row_count INT 


SET @daybefore = dateadd(DAY, -1, @date)
SET @auxdate = dateadd(DAY, 1, @date)
SET @largedate = (
				  SELECT cast(cast(year(@date) AS VARCHAR(4)) + '12' + '31' AS DATETIME)
				 )
SET @maxentrydate = (
					 SELECT CASE
								WHEN month(@date) = 01 AND day(@date) = 01
									THEN dateadd(yy, -1, @largedate)
								ELSE @largedate
							END
					) --Set max entry date as last year's if we're on the 01/01
SET @ProcessName = 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer'

--print @largedate
--print @maxentrydate
--print @date
--select DateRangeID , convert(bigint,left(convert (Varchar(20),DateRangeID),8)+right(convert (Varchar,@daybefore,112),4)) from [DWH_dbo].[Fact_SnapshotCustomer]
/****************************************************************Fill Ext_FSC tables*********************************************************************************/

/**Fill temp tables with most updated rows only per CID **/

/**** IMPORTANT ****/
--Note: #NewCIDs and #ExistCIDs will be used in the insert/update process, but only the most updated row (regardless of operation number) will be inserted.
--Since there could be a an operation 2 (insert) and a 4 (update) for the same CID in a certain day, we will only want the #4 in this case.

--Get a list of all new inserted CIDs
--DROP TABLE #NewCIDs


If Object_ID('tempdb..#NewCIDs','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #NewCIDs

SELECT distinct t.CID
INTO #NewCIDs
FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer t With (Nolock)
	left join
	[DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer f
	on 
	t.CID = f.RealCID
where f.RealCID is null --First day that they were inserted

--Get a list of all Existing CIDs in Ext_FSC table
--DROP TABLE #ExistCIDs

If Object_ID('tempdb..#ExistCIDs','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #ExistCIDs

SELECT DISTINCT (t.CID)
INTO #ExistCIDs
FROM (
	  SELECT CID
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer a With (Nolock)
	  UNION
	  SELECT CID
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_Customer b With (Nolock)
	  UNION
	  SELECT CID
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog c With (Nolock)
	  	 ) t
WHERE t.CID NOT IN (
					SELECT CID
					FROM #NewCIDs
				   ) --All CIDs that didn't have an operation = 2 (insert) today


--Get most recent entry for each CID from CC in our day
--DROP TABLE #CCTemp

If Object_ID('tempdb..#CCTemp','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #CCTemp

SELECT *
INTO #CCTemp
FROM (
	  SELECT
		   t.GCID
		   , t.CID
		   , t.UserName
		   , t.Gender
		   , t.BirthDate
		   , t.CountryID
		   , t.AffiliateID
		   , t.CampaignID
		   , t.LabelID
		   , t.LanguageID
		   , t.Email
		   , t.PlayerStatusID
		   , t.PlayerLevelID
		   , t.CommunicationLanguageID
		   , t.AccountStatusID
		   , t.Occurred AS ValidFrom
		   , t.PendingClosureStatusID
		   , t.IsEmailVerified
		   , t.RegionID
           , t.PlayerStatusReasonID
		   , t.City
		   , t.Address
		   , t.Zip
		   , t.PlayerStatusSubReasonID
		   , t.WeekendFeePrecentage
		   , row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY t.CID ORDER BY t.Occurred DESC) AS RowNum --Latest Insert or update per CID
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer t With (Nolock)
	 ) AS tt
WHERE tt.RowNum = 1


--Get most updated row from BC
--DROP TABLE #BCTemp

If Object_ID('tempdb..#BCTempNoReg','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #BCTempNoReg

SELECT *
INTO #BCTempNoReg
FROM (
	  SELECT-- t.LSN
		   --, t.Operation
		   --, 
		   t.CID
		   , t.VerificationLevelID
		   , t.RiskStatusID
		   , t.RiskClassificationID
		   , t.EmployeeAccount
		   , t.GuruStatusID
		   , t.AccountTypeID
		   , isnull(t.RegulationID,0) AS RegulationID
		   , t.AccountManagerID AS ManagerID
		   , t.DocumentStatusID
		   , t.SuitabilityTestStatusID
		   , t.MifidCategorizationID
		   , t.DesignatedRegulationID
		   , t.EvMatchStatus
		   , row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY t.CID ORDER BY t.Occurred DESC) AS RowNum
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_Customer t With (Nolock)

	 ) AS tt
WHERE tt.RowNum = 1
--Note - A user is always created in CC before BC so the user will already exist in snapshot once we insert its BC data
--Note - We select the RegulationID in BC for new users

--Get most recent regulation changes from today

If Object_ID('tempdb..#RegulationChanges','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #RegulationChanges

SELECT *
INTO #RegulationChanges
FROM (
	  SELECT t.CID
		   , isnull(t.ToRegulationID,0) AS ToRegulationID
		   , row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY t.CID ORDER BY t.Occurred DESC) AS RowNum --The occurred may be of the day before, but that okay because we change regulation only at the end of day and the DateKey reflects the end of day
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog t With (Nolock)

	 ) AS tt
WHERE tt.RowNum = 1

--Combine BO Customer with RegulationChanges with FULL JOIN and get missing data from SnapshotCustomer

If Object_ID('tempdb..#BCTemp','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #BCTemp

SELECT isnull(#BCTempNoReg.CID, #RegulationChanges.CID) AS CID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.VerificationLevelID AS VerificationLevelID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.RiskStatusID AS RiskStatusID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.RiskClassificationID AS RiskClassificationID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.GuruStatusID AS GuruStatusID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.AccountTypeID AS AccountTypeID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.ManagerID AS ManagerID
	 , #RegulationChanges.ToRegulationID AS RegulationID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.RegulationID AS RegulationIDBackup --If FromRegulationID exists in RegulationChangeLog take it, else take it from Snapshot, else take it from History.BackOffice customer (that means that it's a new customer). We shouldn't take it from BOCustomer right away b/c the regulation might have changed during the day but will be in effect only on end of day.
	 , #BCTempNoReg.DocumentStatusID AS DocumentStatusID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.SuitabilityTestStatusID AS SuitabilityTestStatusID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.MifidCategorizationID AS MifidCategorizationID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.DesignatedRegulationID AS DesignatedRegulationID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.EvMatchStatus AS EvMatchStatus
INTO #BCTemp
FROM #BCTempNoReg
	FULL JOIN #RegulationChanges --Full Join them = even if one of the tables is null b/c there wasn't a change
		ON #RegulationChanges.CID = #BCTempNoReg.CID


-- Get all users who made a deposit today

--If Object_ID('tempdb..#TodayDepositors','U') Is Not Null 
--   drop table #TodayDepositors

--Select Distinct CID
--Into #TodayDepositors
--FROM DWH_dbo.Ext_FSC_Customer_FirstTimeDeposits

If Object_ID('tempdb..#DepositorChanges','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #DepositorChanges

-- Join with SnapshotCustomer to find only the users who should be updated

Select TD.CID , 1 as IsDepositor
Into #DepositorChanges
From DWH_dbo.Ext_FSC_Customer_FirstTimeDeposits TD
	--#TodayDepositors TD
	Left Join [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer FSC 
		ON FSC.RealCID = TD.CID AND convert(DATETIME, left(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4) + right(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4)) = 
		(
		case when  DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0) =  @date then @date 
		else 
		@maxentrydate --Take most updated row from Customer Snapshot
		end
		)
Where	Isnull(FSC.IsDepositor,0) = 0

/*
Select Distinct CID
Into #TodayDepositors
From [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_History_Credit With (Nolock)
-- Where CreditTypeID = 1  in Extract

-- Join with SnapshotCustomer to find only the users who should be updated

If Object_ID('tempdb..#DepositorChanges','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #DepositorChanges

Select TD.CID, 1 IsDepositor
Into #DepositorChanges
From 
	#TodayDepositors TD
	Left Join [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer FSC With (Nolock)
		ON FSC.RealCID = TD.CID AND convert(DATETIME, left(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4) + right(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4)) = 
		(
		case when  DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0) =  @date then @date 
		else 
		@maxentrydate --Take most updated row from Customer Snapshot
		end
		)
Where
	Isnull(FSC.IsDepositor,0) = 0
*/

---------------------------------------------------#PhoneVerificationDetails


If Object_ID('tempdb..#PhoneVerificationDetails ','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #PhoneVerificationDetails

CREATE TABLE #PhoneVerificationDetails 
    WITH (HEAP,DISTRIBUTION=ROUND_ROBIN)
AS
	SELECT	 CID
			,PhoneNumber
			,CASE WHEN PhoneVerifiedID IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsPhoneVerified
			,PhoneVerificationDate 
			,PhoneVerificationDateID
			 FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_PhoneCustomer
			 WHERE PhoneVerificationDateID <> 19000101

			 			 			
----------------------------------------------------------

TRUNCATE TABLE DWH_dbo.Ext_Dim_Customer_CustomerIdentification_DLT
	
INSERT INTO DWH_dbo.Ext_Dim_Customer_CustomerIdentification_DLT
(GCID, CID, DemoCID, TanganyID,	UpdateDate,	TanganyStatusID,DltID , DltStatusID)
SELECT GCID, CID, DemoCID, TanganyID,	UpdateDate,	TanganyStatusID, DltID , DltStatusID from 
(

	SELECT GCID, CID, DemoCID, TanganyID,	UpdateDate,	TanganyStatusID, DltID , DltStatusID
	, ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY CID ORDER BY UpdateDate DESC ) as RN 
	FROM   [DWH_staging].[UserApiDB_Customer_CustomerIdentification]
	
)c where RN=1 and DltID is not null

--IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DLT') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #DLT
--CREATE TABLE #DLT
--    WITH (HEAP,DISTRIBUTION = HASH(RealCID))
--as 
--select * from 
--(
--select fsc.GCID
--	 , fsc.RealCID
--	 , fsc.DemoCID
--	 , fsc.CustomerChangeTypeID
--	 , fsc.CurentValue
--	 , fsc.PreviousValue
--	 , fsc.CountryID
--	 , fsc.LabelID
--	 , fsc.LanguageID
--	 , fsc.VerificationLevelID
--	 , fsc.DocsOK
--	 , fsc.PlayerStatusID
--	 , fsc.Bankruptcy
--	 , fsc.RiskStatusID
--	 , fsc.RiskClassificationID
--	 , fsc.CommunicationLanguageID
--	 , fsc.PremiumAccount
--	 , fsc.Evangelist
--	 , fsc.GuruStatusID
--	 , fsc.UpdateDate
--	 , fsc.RegulationID
--	 , fsc.AccountStatusID
--	 , fsc.AccountManagerID
--	 , fsc.PlayerLevelID
--	 , fsc.AccountTypeID
--	 , fsc.DateRangeID
--	 , fsc.IsDepositor
--	 , fsc.PendingClosureStatusID
--	 , fsc.DocumentStatusID
--	 , fsc.SuitabilityTestStatusID
--	 , fsc.MifidCategorizationID
--	 , fsc.IsEmailVerified
--	 , fsc.IsValidCustomer
--	 , fsc.DesignatedRegulationID
--	 , fsc.EvMatchStatus
--	 , fsc.RegionID
--	 , fsc.PlayerStatusReasonID
--	 , fsc.IsCreditReportValidCB
--	 , fsc.AffiliateID
--	 , fsc.Email
--	 , fsc.City
--	 , fsc.Address
--	 , fsc.Zip
--	 , fsc.PhoneNumber
--	 , fsc.IsPhoneVerified
--	 , fsc.PhoneVerificationDateID
--	 , fsc.PlayerStatusSubReasonID
--	 , fsc.WeekendFeePrecentage
--	 , dlt.DltStatusID
--	 , dlt.DltID
--, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by CID order BY DateRangeID DESC) as RN
--from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer fsc 
--join DWH_dbo.Ext_Dim_Customer_CustomerIdentification_DLT dlt
--on fsc.RealCID = dlt.CID
--) a
--where RN=1 


/**Merge two tables together where updates occurred on both tables**/
--Insert into #DailyCustomerSnapshot where there are updates on both tables, therefore we have all of the required fields.

----DROP TABLE #DailyCustomerSnapshot
--DECLARE @dateID INT = 20241009
If Object_ID('tempdb..#DailyCustomerSnapshot','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #DailyCustomerSnapshot

Create Table #DailyCustomerSnapshot
(CID int null
, GCID int null
, CountryID int null
, LabelID int null
, LanguageID int null
, PlayerStatusID int null
, CommunicationLanguageID int null
, AccountStatusID int null
, PlayerLevelID int null
, VerificationLevelID int null
, RiskStatusID int null
, RiskClassificationID int null
, RegulationID tinyint null
, ManagerID int null
, AccountTypeID int  null
, GuruStatusID smallint null
, IsDepositor bit null
, PendingClosureStatusID tinyint null
, DocumentStatusID int null 
, SuitabilityTestStatusID int null
, MifidCategorizationID int null
, IsEmailVerified int null
, DesignatedRegulationID int null
, EvMatchStatus int null
, RegionID int NULL
, PlayerStatusReasonID INT null
, IsValidCustomer INT null
, IsCreditReportValidCB INT NULL
, Email  nvarchar(50)
, City  nvarchar(50)
, Address nvarchar(100)
, Zip nvarchar(50)
, AffiliateID int
, PhoneNumber varchar (30)
, IsPhoneVerified bit
, PhoneVerificationDateID varchar (8)
, PlayerStatusSubReasonID int
, WeekendFeePrecentage int
, DltStatusID int
, DltID varchar(50)
, EquiLendID nvarchar(4000)
, StocksLendingStatusID int
)


EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','#DailyCustomerSnapshot',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

INSERT INTO #DailyCustomerSnapshot
SELECT DISTINCT 
	   coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, #DepositorChanges.CID, PVD.CID,FSC.RealCID) AS CID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.GCID, FSC.GCID,iden.GCID,0) AS GCID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.CountryID, FSC.CountryID, 0) AS CountryID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.LabelID, FSC.LabelID, 0) AS LabelID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.LanguageID, FSC.LanguageID,0) AS LanguageID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerStatusID, FSC.PlayerStatusID,0) AS PlayerStatusID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.CommunicationLanguageID, FSC.CommunicationLanguageID,0) AS CommunicationLanguageID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.AccountStatusID, FSC.AccountStatusID,0) AS AccountStatusID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID, FSC.PlayerLevelID,0) AS PlayerLevelID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.VerificationLevelID, FSC.VerificationLevelID,0) AS VerificationLevelID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.RiskStatusID, FSC.RiskStatusID,0) AS RiskStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.RiskClassificationID, FSC.RiskClassificationID,0) AS RiskClassificationID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.RegulationID, FSC.RegulationID, #BCTemp.RegulationIDBackup,0) AS RegulationID --If FromRegulationID exists in RegulationChangeLog take it, else take it from Snapshot, else take it from History.BackOffice customer (that means that it's a new customer). We shouldn't take it from BOCustomer right away b/c the regulation might have changed during the day but will be in effect only on end of day.
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.ManagerID, FSC.AccountManagerID,0) AS AccountManagerID --AccountManagerID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.AccountTypeID, FSC.AccountTypeID,0) AS AccountTypeID --Employee = 7
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.GuruStatusID, FSC.GuruStatusID,0) AS GuruStatusID
	 , coalesce(#DepositorChanges.IsDepositor, FSC.IsDepositor,0) AS IsDepositor
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.PendingClosureStatusID, FSC.PendingClosureStatusID,0) AS PendingClosureStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.DocumentStatusID, FSC.DocumentStatusID,0) AS DocumentStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.SuitabilityTestStatusID, FSC.SuitabilityTestStatusID,0) AS SuitabilityTestStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.MifidCategorizationID, FSC.MifidCategorizationID,0) AS MifidCategorizationID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.IsEmailVerified, FSC.IsEmailVerified,0) AS IsEmailVerified
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.DesignatedRegulationID, FSC.DesignatedRegulationID,0) AS DesignatedRegulationID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.EvMatchStatus, FSC.EvMatchStatus,0) AS EvMatchStatus
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.RegionID, FSC.RegionID,0) AS RegionID
     , coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerStatusReasonID, FSC.PlayerStatusReasonID,0) AS PlayerStatusReasonID
	  , case when @date<='20200314'
			then
			case when 
			coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID, FSC.PlayerLevelID,0) <> 4 And 
			coalesce(#CCTemp.LabelID, FSC.LabelID,0) <> 30 And 
			coalesce(#CCTemp.CountryID, FSC.CountryID,0) <> 250 and 
			coalesce(#BCTemp.AccountTypeID, FSC.AccountTypeID,0) <> 9 then 1 else 0 end
			ELSE
			case when 
			coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID, FSC.PlayerLevelID,0) <> 4 
			And coalesce(#CCTemp.LabelID, FSC.LabelID,0) NOT IN (30, 26) 
			And coalesce(#CCTemp.CountryID, FSC.CountryID,0) <> 250 
			then 1 else 0 end  
		end as IsValidCustomer
	  , case when @date<='20200314'
			then
			case when (NOT (coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID, FSC.PlayerLevelID,0) = 4 
			AND coalesce(#BCTemp.AccountTypeID, FSC.AccountTypeID,0) <> 2) 
					AND coalesce(#CCTemp.LabelID, FSC.LabelID,0) NOT IN ( 26,30) ) then 1 else 0 
					end
			ELSE
			case when (NOT (coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID, FSC.PlayerLevelID,0) = 4 
			AND coalesce(#BCTemp.AccountTypeID, FSC.AccountTypeID,0) <> 2) 
							AND coalesce(#CCTemp.LabelID, FSC.LabelID,0) NOT IN ( 26,30) 
							AND NOT (coalesce(#CCTemp.CountryID, FSC.CountryID,0) = 250 
							and coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, #DepositorChanges.CID,iden.CID) NOT IN (3400616,10526243))) -- ask Guy
							
							then 1 else 0 end  

		end as IsCreditReportValidCB
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.Email, FSC.Email, '') AS Email
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.City, FSC.City,'') AS City
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.Address, FSC.Address,'') AS Address
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.Zip, FSC.Zip,'') AS Zip
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.AffiliateID, FSC.AffiliateID,0) AS AffiliateID
		, coalesce(PVD.PhoneNumber, FSC.PhoneNumber,'') AS PhoneNumber
		, coalesce(PVD.IsPhoneVerified, FSC.IsPhoneVerified,0) AS IsPhoneVerified
		, coalesce(PVD.PhoneVerificationDateID, FSC.PhoneVerificationDateID,'') AS PhoneVerificationDateID
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerStatusSubReasonID, FSC.PlayerStatusSubReasonID,0) AS PlayerStatusSubReasonID
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.WeekendFeePrecentage, FSC.WeekendFeePrecentage) AS WeekendFeePrecentage
		, coalesce(iden.DltStatusID,FSC.DltStatusID,0) as DltStatusID
		, coalesce(iden.DltID,FSC.DltID,null) as DltID
		, coalesce(STL.EquiLendID,FSC.EquiLendID,null) as EquiLendID
		, coalesce(STL.StocksLendingStatusID,FSC.StocksLendingStatusID,null) as StocksLendingStatusID
		FROM #CCTemp
	FULL JOIN #BCTemp
		ON #CCTemp.CID = #BCTemp.CID
	FULL JOIN #DepositorChanges
		ON isnull(#CCTemp.CID,#BCTemp.CID) = #DepositorChanges.CID
	FULL JOIN #PhoneVerificationDetails PVD
		ON coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, #DepositorChanges.CID) = PVD.CID
	FULL join DWH_dbo.Ext_Dim_Customer_CustomerIdentification_DLT iden
		ON iden.CID=coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, #DepositorChanges.CID, PVD.CID)
    FULL JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_StocksLending STL
		ON STL.CID=coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, #DepositorChanges.CID, PVD.CID, iden.CID, STL.CID)
	LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer FSC With (Nolock) -- Regular left join to get missing data from SnapshotCustomer
		ON (FSC.RealCID = coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, #DepositorChanges.CID, PVD.CID, iden.CID, STL.CID)) AND convert(DATETIME, left(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4) + right(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4)) = @maxentrydate
		OPTION (LABEL = '#CCTemp');


SELECT top 1 @row_count = ISNULL(row_count,0)
FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
and row_count > -1
and r.[label] = '#CCTemp'
ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','#DailyCustomerSnapshot',@dateID, 10, @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL
/****************************************************************Insert -or- (Update date + Insert)*********************************************************************************/

If Object_ID('tempdb..#UpdatedRanges','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #UpdatedRanges

(DateRangeID bigint not null)

If Object_ID('tempdb..#outputdata','U') Is Not Null

(Action varchar(20) not null,
 CID int not null,

 --DECLARE @date AS DATE = '2025-05-05'

IF  DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0) =  @date
BEGIN

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','Insert New Customer OpenYear' ,@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

/**Insert all CIDs from #NewCIDs**/
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer (RealCID

SELECT b.CID

	 , b.ManagerID

	 , b.AccountTypeID

	 , b.IsDepositor
	 , b.PendingClosureStatusID
