	 , b.SuitabilityTestStatusID
	 , b.MifidCategorizationID
	 , b.IsEmailVerified
	 , b.IsValidCustomer
	 , b.IsCreditReportValidCB

	 --, case when PlayerLevelID <> 4 
		--					And LabelID NOT IN (30, 26) 
		--					And CountryID <> 250 
		--					then 1 else 0 end  as IsValidCustomer
	 --, case when 
		--	b.PlayerLevelID <> 4 And 
		--	b.LabelID <> 30 And 
		--	b.CountryID <> 250 and 
		--	b.AccountTypeID <> 9 then 1 else 0 end as IsValidCustomer
	 --, case when (NOT (PlayerLevelID = 4 AND AccountTypeID <> 2) 
		--			AND LabelID NOT IN ( 26,30) ) then 1 else 0 
		--			end as IsCreditReportValidCB
	 --, case when (NOT (PlayerLevelID = 4 AND AccountTypeID <> 2) 
		--					AND LabelID NOT IN ( 26,30) 
		--					AND NOT (CountryID = 250 and b.CID NOT IN (3400616,10526243))) 
		--					then 1 else 0 end as IsCreditReportValidCB 
	 , DesignatedRegulationID

FROM #DailyCustomerSnapshot AS b
WHERE CID IN (

			 )


--OUTPUT inserted.DateRangeID into #UpdatedRanges;

--OUTPUT

--inserted.DateRangeID
--INTO #UpdatedRanges;

--declare @rowcount_insert as int
--set @rowcount_insert = (SELECT count(*) FROM #outputdata a WHERE Action = 'INSERT')


	--

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','Insert New Customer OpenYear',@dateID, 10, @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

/**Update date + Insert, for existing CIDs**/


IF  DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0) <>  @date
BEGIN



--EXEC SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','Update Old Customer',@dateID,1,0

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','Insert New Customer' ,@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL


/**************************************************************Transform Data*********************************************************************************************************/
/**Run Merge to update and create new rows in snapshot**/
MERGE INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer AS a
USING #DailyCustomerSnapshot AS b   
  ON a.RealCID=b.CID
--Close the date for rows which have an update (later we open a new one with an "open" date):
WHEN MATCHED AND 
(
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.CountryID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.CountryID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.LabelID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.LabelID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.LanguageID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.LanguageID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.PlayerStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.PlayerStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.CommunicationLanguageID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.CommunicationLanguageID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.PlayerLevelID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.PlayerLevelID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.VerificationLevelID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.VerificationLevelID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.RiskStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.RiskStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.RiskClassificationID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.RiskClassificationID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.RegulationID),0) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.RegulationID),0)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.AccountManagerID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.ManagerID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.AccountTypeID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.AccountTypeID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.GuruStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.GuruStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.IsDepositor),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.IsDepositor),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.PendingClosureStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.PendingClosureStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.DocumentStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.DocumentStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.SuitabilityTestStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.SuitabilityTestStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.MifidCategorizationID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.MifidCategorizationID),-1)) or 
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.IsEmailVerified),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.IsEmailVerified),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.DesignatedRegulationID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.DesignatedRegulationID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.EvMatchStatus),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.EvMatchStatus),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.RegionID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.RegionID),-1)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.PlayerStatusReasonID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.PlayerStatusReasonID),-1)) OR 
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.IsValidCustomer),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.IsValidCustomer),-1)) OR 
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.IsCreditReportValidCB),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.IsCreditReportValidCB),-1)) OR

(ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),a.Email),'') <> ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),b.Email),'')) OR
(ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),a.City),'') <> ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),b.City),'')) OR
(ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(100),a.Address),'') <> ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(100),b.Address),'')) OR
(ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),a.Zip),'') <> ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),b.Zip),'')) OR 
	
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.AffiliateID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.AffiliateID),-1)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(varchar(30),a.PhoneNumber),'') <> ISNULL(convert(varchar(30),b.PhoneNumber),'')) OR
(ISNULL(convert(bit,a.IsPhoneVerified),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(bit,b.IsPhoneVerified),-1)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(varchar(8),a.PhoneVerificationDateID),'') <> ISNULL(convert(varchar(8),b.PhoneVerificationDateID),'')) OR
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.PlayerStatusSubReasonID),0) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.PlayerStatusSubReasonID),0)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.WeekendFeePrecentage),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.WeekendFeePrecentage),-1)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.DltStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.DltStatusID),-1)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(varchar(100),a.EquiLendID),'') <> ISNULL(convert(varchar(100),b.EquiLendID),'')) OR
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.StocksLendingStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.StocksLendingStatusID),-1))

)
AND convert(datetime,left(convert(varchar(16),DateRangeID),4)+right(convert(varchar(16),DateRangeID),4))=@maxentrydate THEN

UPDATE SET DateRangeID=convert(bigint,left(convert (Varchar(20),DateRangeID),8)+right(convert (Varchar,@daybefore,112),4)) , UpdateDate = getdate()

WHEN NOT MATCHED 

THEN 

INSERT (RealCID
		,GCID

		,LanguageID

		,PlayerStatusID
		,RiskStatusID

		,CommunicationLanguageID
		,RegulationID

		,IsDepositor
		,PendingClosureStatusID
		,DocumentStatusID 
		,SuitabilityTestStatusID
		,MifidCategorizationID
		,IsEmailVerified
		,IsValidCustomer
		,IsCreditReportValidCB
		,DesignatedRegulationID
		,EvMatchStatus
		,RegionID
        ,PlayerStatusReasonID
		,UpdateDate

	    ,City

	    ,Zip

		,IsPhoneVerified

		,PlayerStatusSubReasonID
		,WeekendFeePrecentage
		,DltStatusID

		,EquiLendID
		,StocksLendingStatusID

		)
VALUES (
		b.CID
		,b.GCID
		,convert(bigint,convert (Varchar,@date,112)+right(convert (Varchar,@largedate,112),4))
		,b.CountryID
		,b.LabelID
		,b.LanguageID
		,b.VerificationLevelID
		,b.PlayerStatusID
		,b.RiskStatusID
		,b.RiskClassificationID
		,b.CommunicationLanguageID
		,b.RegulationID
		,b.AccountStatusID
		,b.ManagerID
		,b.PlayerLevelID
		,b.AccountTypeID
		,b.GuruStatusID
		,b.IsDepositor
		,b.PendingClosureStatusID
		,b.DocumentStatusID 
		,b.SuitabilityTestStatusID
		,b.MifidCategorizationID
		,b.IsEmailVerified
		,b.IsValidCustomer
	    ,b.IsCreditReportValidCB
		,b.DesignatedRegulationID
		,b.EvMatchStatus
		,b.RegionID
        ,b.PlayerStatusReasonID
		,getdate()
		,b.Email
		,b.City 
		,b.Address 
		,b.Zip 
		,b.AffiliateID
		,b.PhoneNumber
		,b.IsPhoneVerified
		,b.PhoneVerificationDateID
		,b.PlayerStatusSubReasonID
		,b.WeekendFeePrecentage
		,b.DltStatusID
		,b.DltID
		,b.EquiLendID
		,b.StocksLendingStatusID
)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer');

	SELECT top 1 @row_count = ISNULL(row_count,0)
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

--OUTPUT

--inserted.RealCID,
--inserted.DateRangeID
--INTO #outputdata;



INSERT INTO #outputdata

RealCID,
DateRangeID 
FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer 
WHERE DateRangeID=convert(bigint,left(convert (Varchar(20),DateRangeID),8)+right(convert (Varchar,@daybefore,112),4))
AND left(DateRangeID,4) = YEAR(@date) --- Update from 2022.04.03
;

--UPDATE SET DateRangeID=convert(bigint,left(convert (Varchar(20),DateRangeID),8)+right(convert (Varchar,@daybefore,112),4))


--declare @rowcount_insert as int
--set @rowcount_insert = (SELECT count(*) FROM #outputdata a WHERE Action = 'INSERT')

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','Insert New Customer',@dateID, 10,@row_count ,NULL,NULL,NULL --@rowcount_insert,NULL,NULL,NULL

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','Update Old Customer' ,@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer
	(RealCID
   , GCID
   , DateRangeID
   , CountryID
   , LabelID
   , LanguageID
   , VerificationLevelID
   , PlayerStatusID
   , RiskStatusID
   , RiskClassificationID

   , SuitabilityTestStatusID

   , IsCreditReportValidCB
   , DesignatedRegulationID
   , EvMatchStatus
   , RegionID
   , PlayerStatusReasonID
   , UpdateDate
   , Email
   , City 
   , Address 
   , Zip    
   , AffiliateID
   , PhoneNumber
   , IsPhoneVerified
   , PhoneVerificationDateID
   , PlayerStatusSubReasonID
   , WeekendFeePrecentage
   , DltStatusID
   , DltID
   , EquiLendID
   , StocksLendingStatusID
   )
SELECT b.CID
	 , b.GCID
	 , convert(BIGINT, convert(VARCHAR, @date, 112) + right(convert(VARCHAR, @largedate, 112), 4))
	 , b.CountryID
	 , b.LabelID
	 , b.LanguageID
	 , b.VerificationLevelID
	 , b.PlayerStatusID
	 , b.RiskStatusID
	 , b.RiskClassificationID
	 , b.CommunicationLanguageID
	 , b.RegulationID
	 , b.AccountStatusID
	 , b.ManagerID
	 , b.PlayerLevelID
	 , b.AccountTypeID
	 , b.GuruStatusID
	 , b.IsDepositor
	 , b.PendingClosureStatusID
	 , b.DocumentStatusID 
	 , b.SuitabilityTestStatusID
	 , b.MifidCategorizationID
	 , b.IsEmailVerified
	 , b.IsValidCustomer
	 , b.IsCreditReportValidCB
	 , b.DesignatedRegulationID
	 , b.EvMatchStatus
	 , RegionID
     , PlayerStatusReasonID
	 , getdate()
	 , Email
	 , City 
	 , Address 
	 , Zip 
	 , AffiliateID
	 , PhoneNumber
	 , IsPhoneVerified
	 , PhoneVerificationDateID
	 , PlayerStatusSubReasonID
	 , WeekendFeePrecentage
	 ,b.DltStatusID
	 ,b.DltID
	 ,b.EquiLendID
     ,b.StocksLendingStatusID
FROM #DailyCustomerSnapshot b
WHERE EXISTS (
			  SELECT 1
			  FROM #outputdata a
			  WHERE Action = 'UPDATE'
				  AND a.CID = b.CID
			 )
		OPTION (LABEL = '#DailyCustomerSnapshot');


	SELECT top 1 @row_count = ISNULL(row_count,0)
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = '#DailyCustomerSnapshot'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','Update Old Customer',@dateID, 10, @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

END

/****************************************************************Insert new DateRange Keys*********************************************************************************/

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','Add New DateRangeIDs',@dateID, 1, 0 ,NULL,NULL,NULL


INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range (DateRangeID
					 , FromDateID
					 , ToDateID
					 , UpdateDate)
SELECT DISTINCT DateRangeID
			  , convert(BIGINT, left(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 8))
			  , convert(BIGINT, left(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 4) + right(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 4))
			  , getdate()
FROM #outputdata
WHERE Action = 'UPDATE'
AND DateRangeID NOT IN (select DateRangeID FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range)

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range (DateRangeID
					 , FromDateID
					 , ToDateID
					 , UpdateDate)
SELECT convert(BIGINT, convert(VARCHAR, @date, 112) + right(convert(VARCHAR, @largedate, 112), 4))
	 , convert(INT, (convert(VARCHAR, @date, 112)))
	 , convert(INT, (convert(VARCHAR, @largedate, 112)))
	 , getdate()
	 WHERE convert(BIGINT, convert(VARCHAR, @date, 112) + right(convert(VARCHAR, @largedate, 112), 4)) NOT IN (select DateRangeID FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range)



--Note: Here we insert the new DateRange keys that were created today.
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range (DateRangeID
					 , FromDateID
					 , ToDateID
					 , UpdateDate)
SELECT DISTINCT DateRangeID
			  , convert(BIGINT, left(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 8))
			  , convert(BIGINT, left(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 4) + right(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 4))
			  , getdate()
FROM #UpdatedRanges --Date ranges that were closed and inserted today
WHERE  DateRangeID NOT IN (
							SELECT DateRangeID
							FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range
						   ) --where they don't already exist
		OPTION (LABEL = 'DateRangeID');
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = ISNULL(row_count,0)
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'DateRangeID'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','Add New DateRangeIDs',@dateID, 10, @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

----- GDPR PII DATA
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DelUserName') IS NOT NULL
DROP TABLE #DelUserName
select  UserName, CID, Email, City, Address,  Zip
into #DelUserName
from  [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer
where  UserName like '%DelUserName%'

Update a
SET
Email = b.Email,
City = b.City,
Address = b.Address,
Zip = b.Zip,
PhoneNumber = 'DelPhoneNumber_' +SUBSTRING( b.UserName ,13, len(b.UserName))
from [DWH_dbo].[Fact_SnapshotCustomer] a 
join #DelUserName b
on a.RealCID = b.CID

END/*Procedure*/
SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomerCloseYear:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomerCloseYear] @date [DATETIME] AS
BEGIN
----Declare @date as DATETIME

--SET @date = '2021-01-01 00:00:00'
--EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomerCloseYear] @date
/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-03-11
Description: [SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomerCloseYear]
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2020-02-23     Boris        Add column  IsCreditReportValidCB
 2020-02-15     Boris		 Change case for IsCreditReportValidCB + IsValidCustomer  from 2020.03.15
 2022-12-28		Inbal		 Add columns: PhoneNumber, IsPhoneVerified, PhoneVerificationDateID and PlayerStatusSubReasonID
 2022-02-19		Inbal		 Add GDPR in order to update PhoneNumber
 2024-04-01		Inbal		 Add WeekendFeePrecentage to [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_CustomerCloseYear
 2025-03-18     Adi Ferber   Replace Ext_FSC_PhoneVerificationDetailsCloseYear with Ext_FSC_PhoneCustomerCloseYear - new DB and new table with all the phone details 
 2025-10-29     Daniel Kaplan Add new DLT, FTD fields 
*********************************************************************************************/
-- DECLARE @date as [Date] = '2025-01-01'

DECLARE @auxdate AS DATETIME
DECLARE @daybefore  AS DATETIME
DECLARE @largedate  AS DATETIME
DECLARE @maxentrydate  AS DATETIME
DECLARE @ProcessName  AS VARCHAR(50)
DECLARE @minCreditID as Int
DECLARE @maxCreditID AS INT
DECLARE @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@date,112))
DECLARE @row_count INT 
SET @daybefore = dateadd(DAY, -1, @date)
SET @auxdate = dateadd(DAY, 1, @date)
SET @largedate = (
				  SELECT cast(cast(year(@date) AS VARCHAR(4)) + '12' + '31' AS DATETIME)
				 )
SET @maxentrydate = (
					 SELECT CASE
								WHEN month(@date) = 01 AND day(@date) = 01
									THEN dateadd(yy, -1, @largedate)
								ELSE @largedate
							END
					)
					print  @date

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','Close Year For CIDs',@dateID, 1, 0,NULL,NULL,NULL


--IF  DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0) =  @date --Check if it's the first day of the year
--BEGIN

	------------------------


--Note: On the first day of new year, we gather all entries that their ToDate is the end of last year and reopen them for this year.
--All entries that had changes on 01/01, will be already have new rows by the queries above.

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer (RealCID
								 , GCID
								 , DateRangeID
								 , CountryID
								 , LabelID
								 , LanguageID
								 , VerificationLevelID
								 , PlayerStatusID
								 , RiskStatusID
								 , RiskClassificationID
								 , CommunicationLanguageID
								 , RegulationID
								 , AccountStatusID
								 , AccountManagerID
								 , PlayerLevelID
								 , AccountTypeID
								 , GuruStatusID
								 , IsDepositor
								 , PendingClosureStatusID
								 , DocumentStatusID 
								 , SuitabilityTestStatusID
								 , MifidCategorizationID
								 , IsEmailVerified
								 , IsValidCustomer
								 , IsCreditReportValidCB
								 , DesignatedRegulationID
								 , EvMatchStatus
								 , RegionID
                                 , PlayerStatusReasonID
								 , UpdateDate
								 , Email
								 , City 
								 , Address 
								 , Zip 
								 , AffiliateID
								 , PhoneNumber
								 , IsPhoneVerified
								 , PhoneVerificationDateID
								 , PlayerStatusSubReasonID
								 , WeekendFeePrecentage
								 , DltStatusID
								 , DltID
								 , EquiLendID
								 , StocksLendingStatusID
								 )

SELECT coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, PVD.CID ) AS CID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.GCID,0) AS GCID
	 , convert(BIGINT, convert(VARCHAR(4), year(@date)) + '01011231') AS DateRangeID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.CountryID,0) AS CountryID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.LabelID,0) AS LabelID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.LanguageID, 0) AS LanguageID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.VerificationLevelID,0) AS VerificationLevelID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerStatusID,0) AS PlayerStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.RiskStatusID, 0) AS RiskStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.RiskClassificationID, 0) AS RiskClassificationID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.CommunicationLanguageID, 0) AS CommunicationLanguageID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.RegulationID,0) AS RegulationID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.AccountStatusID, 0) AS AccountStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.AccountManagerID, 0) AS AccountManagerID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID, 0) AS PlayerLevelID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.AccountTypeID, 0) AS AccountTypeID --Employee = 7
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.GuruStatusID, 0) AS GuruStatusID
	 , coalesce(#CUS.IsDepositor, 0) AS IsDepositor
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.PendingClosureStatusID, 0) AS PendingClosureStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.DocumentStatusID, 0) AS DocumentStatusID
     , coalesce(#BCTemp.SuitabilityTestStatusID, 0) AS SuitabilityTestStatusID
     , coalesce(#BCTemp.MifidCategorizationID, 0) AS MifidCategorizationID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.IsEmailVerified, 0) AS IsEmailVerified
	 , case when @date<='20200314'--'20200315'
			then
			case when 
			#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID <> 4 And 
			#CCTemp.LabelID <> 30 And 
			#CCTemp.CountryID <> 250 and 
			#BCTemp.AccountTypeID <> 9 then 1 else 0 end
			ELSE
			case when 
			#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID <> 4 
			And #CCTemp.LabelID NOT IN (30, 26) 
			And #CCTemp.CountryID <> 250 
			then 1 else 0 end  
		end as IsValidCustomer
	  , case when @date<='20200314'
			then
			case when (NOT (#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID = 4 AND #BCTemp.AccountTypeID <> 2) 
					AND #CCTemp.LabelID NOT IN ( 26,30) ) then 1 else 0 
					end
			ELSE
			case when (NOT (#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID = 4 AND #BCTemp.AccountTypeID <> 2) 
							AND #CCTemp.LabelID NOT IN ( 26,30) 
							AND NOT (#CCTemp.CountryID = 250 and #CCTemp.CID NOT IN (3400616,10526243))) 
							then 1 else 0 end  
		end as IsCreditReportValidCB

	 --, case when 
		--	#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID <> 4 And 
		--	#CCTemp.LabelID <> 30 And 
		--	#CCTemp.CountryID <> 250 and 
		--	#BCTemp.AccountTypeID <> 9 then 1 else 0 end as IsValidCustomer
	--, case when #CCTemp.PlayerLevelID <> 4 
	--		    And #CCTemp.LabelID NOT IN (30, 26) 
	--			And #CCTemp.CountryID <> 250 
	--			then 1 else 0 end as IsValidCustomer
	-- , case when (NOT (#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID = 4 AND #BCTemp.AccountTypeID <> 2) 
	--						AND #CCTemp.LabelID NOT IN ( 26,30) 
	--						AND NOT (#CCTemp.CountryID = 250 and #CCTemp.CID NOT IN (3400616,10526243))) 
	--						then 1 else 0 end as IsCreditReportValidCB 
 --    --, case when (NOT (#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID = 4 AND #BCTemp.AccountTypeID <> 2) 
	--				--AND #CCTemp.LabelID NOT IN ( 26,30) ) then 1 else 0 
	--				--end as IsCreditReportValidCB
     , coalesce(#BCTemp.DesignatedRegulationID, 0) AS DesignatedRegulationID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.EvMatchStatus, 0) AS EvMatchStatus
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.RegionID, 0) AS RegionID
     , coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerStatusReasonID, 0) AS PlayerStatusReasonID
	 , getdate()
	 , coalesce(Email, '') as Email
	 , coalesce(City, '') as City
	 , coalesce(Address, '')  as Address
	 , coalesce(Zip , '') as Zip
	 , coalesce(AffiliateID , 0) as AffiliateID
	 , coalesce(PVD.PhoneNumber,'') AS PhoneNumber
	 , CASE WHEN PVD.PhoneVerifiedID IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsPhoneVerified
	 , coalesce(PVD.PhoneVerificationDateID, '') AS PhoneVerificationDateID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerStatusSubReasonID, '') AS PlayerStatusSubReasonID
	 , #CCTemp.WeekendFeePrecentage  AS WeekendFeePrecentage
	 , coalesce(#CUS.DltStatusID, 0) AS DltStatusID
	 , coalesce(#CUS.DltID, '') AS DltID
	 , coalesce(#CUS.EquiLendID, '') AS EquiLendID
	 , coalesce(#CUS.StocksLendingStatusID, 0) AS StocksLendingStatusID
FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_CustomerCloseYear #CCTemp
	FULL JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_CustomerCloseYear #BCTemp
		ON #CCTemp.CID = #BCTemp.CID
	--FULL JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_IsDepositorCloseYear  #DCTemp
	--	ON isnull(#CCTemp.CID,#BCTemp.CID) = #DCTemp.CID
	FULL JOIN [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_PhoneCustomerCloseYear PVD
		ON coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID) = PVD.CID
	FULL JOIN [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FSC_DimCustomerCloseYear] #CUS
		ON coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID) = #CUS.RealCID
	--    LEFT JOIN Fact_SnapshotCustomer FSC With (Nolock) -- Regular left join to get missing data from SnapshotCustomer
	--	ON (FSC.RealCID = coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID)) AND convert(DATETIME, left(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4) + right(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4)) = @maxentrydate
	WHERE coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, PVD.CID,#CUS.RealCID )  IN (
						SELECT Distinct RealCID
						FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer
						) 
	--					where DateRangeID = convert(BIGINT, convert(VARCHAR(4), year(@date)) + '01011231')
	--				   ) --Do not open new rows for CIDs that have been updated today, will create double inserted rows
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer1');
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = ISNULL(row_count,0)
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer1'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;


--------------------------GDPR
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DelUserName') IS NOT NULL
DROP TABLE #DelUserName
select  #CCTemp.UserName, #CCTemp.CID
into #DelUserName
FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_CustomerCloseYear #CCTemp
	WHERE #CCTemp.CID  IN (
						SELECT Distinct RealCID
						FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer) 
and #CCTemp.UserName like '%DelUserName%'

--select * from  #DelUserName

Update a
SET
PhoneNumber = 'DelPhoneNumber_' +SUBSTRING( b.UserName ,13, len(b.UserName))
from [DWH_dbo].[Fact_SnapshotCustomer] a 
join #DelUserName b
on a.RealCID = b.CID

--END
SET  @row_count = ISNULL(@row_count,0)
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer','Close Year For CIDs',@dateID, 10, @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL


END/*Procedure*/

CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS
--exec [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer_DL_To_Synapse] '20250226'
BEGIN
--feature/Fact_SnapshotCustomer-adf
-- =============================================
-- Author:     Daniel Kaplan

-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- exec [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer '20210718'

--EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer_DL_To_Synapse] '2025-07-22'

/********************************************************************************************
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2022-11-28     Inbal         Create Ext_FSC_PhoneVerificationDetails
 2022-12-28		Inbal		  Add PlayerStatusSubReasonID to Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer 
 2022-02-09	    Inbal		  Remove Delete statment for rerun
 2024-04-01		Inbal		  Add WeekendFeePrecentage to [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer
 2024-04-16		Inbal		  Remove Update statment for rerun
 2025-03-18     Adi Ferber    Replace Ext_FSC_PhoneVerificationDetails with Ext_FSC_PhoneCustomer - new DB and new table with all the phone details 
 2025-06-03     Daniel Kaplan Replace Ext_FSC_Real_History_Credit with Ext_FSC_Customer_FirstTimeDeposits - new DB and new table with all FTD details 
*********************************************************************************************/

    -- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
    -- interfering with SELECT statements.
    SET NOCOUNT ON

	--DECLARE @dt as [Date] = cast(getdate()-1 as date)

	-- DECLARE @dt as [Date] = '2024-04-02'
	
	DECLARE @Date as DATETIME
	DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
	DECLARE @DateTime as DATETIME2(7)
	DECLARE @CurrentDateTime as DATETIME2(7)
	Declare @MaxSnapshot as date
	DECLARE @Year VARCHAR(4) 
	DECLARE @St_Year VARCHAR(30) 

	--SET @Date = cast(@dt as date)
	SET @DateTime = CAST(@dt as DATETIME2);
	--SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Date), 0);
	SET @CurrentDate = cast(dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,@dt),0) as date)
	--SET @CurrentDateTime = cast(dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,@dt),0) as DATETIME2)
	-- Sequence Container - Fact_SnapshotCustomer

SET @Year = year(@dt)
SET @St_Year = convert(datetime,DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, @dt), 0),8)

----Delete and update for rerun
-- Delete from [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer  --------------------------------------->

--select @MaxSnapshot = MAX(convert(datetime,left(convert(varchar(16),DateRangeID),8)))

-- Truncate Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog --------------------------------------->
truncate table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog
	
-- Extract Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog

If Object_ID('tempdb..#etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer

Select  *
into #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer  -- Move duplicates rows, because two parquet files with another dates
from
(
select
CID,
RegulationID,
ValidFrom,
ValidTo,
CustomerHistoryID,
ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by a.CID, CustomerHistoryID  order by a.ValidTo ) as rn
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] a with (nolock)
) a
where  rn =1


INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog
SELECT
RegulationChangeID,
CID,
Occurred,
FromRegulationID,
ToRegulationID,
DateID
from
(
select
100000 as RegulationChangeID,
a.CID,
MAX(b.Max_ValidFrom) as Occurred,
isnull(c.RegulationID,0)  as FromRegulationID,
isnull(a.RegulationID,0) as ToRegulationID,
convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,0,b.Max_ValidFrom),112)) as DateID,
ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by a.CID order by a.ValidTo desc) as rn,a.ValidTo
from  #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer a WITH (nolock)
--[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] a WITH (nolock)
--[History].[BackOfficeCustomer] a with (nolock)
join
(
SELECT CID, MAX(ValidFrom) AS Max_ValidFrom, MAX(ValidTo) AS Max_ValidTo
FROM   #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer with (nolock)
---[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] with (nolock)
--[History].[BackOfficeCustomer] with (nolock)
where 
ValidFrom  >= @dt 
and ValidFrom < @CurrentDate  --cast(dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,@dt),0) as date)
GROUP BY CID
) b
on a.CID=b.CID  and a.ValidFrom = b.Max_ValidFrom and a.ValidTo = b.Max_ValidTo
join
(
SELECT a.CID , b.Max_ValidFrom, b.Max_ValidTo, RegulationID
from #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer a with (nolock)
---[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] a WITH (nolock)
--[History].[BackOfficeCustomer] a with (nolock)
join
(
SELECT CID, max(ValidFrom) AS Max_ValidFrom, max(ValidTo) AS Max_ValidTo
FROM #etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer with (nolock)
---[DWH_staging].[etoro_History_BackOfficeCustomer] with (nolock)
--[History].[BackOfficeCustomer] with (nolock)
where ValidFrom  < @dt
group by CID
) b
on a.CID= b.CID and  ValidFrom = b.Max_ValidFrom and ValidTo = b.Max_ValidTo																																												
) c
on a.CID = c.CID
WHERE
a.RegulationID <> c.RegulationID
AND a.ValidFrom >= @dt 
AND ValidFrom < @CurrentDate  --cast(dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,@dt),0) as date)
group by
a.CID,
isnull(c.RegulationID,0),
isnull(a.RegulationID,0),
convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,0,b.Max_ValidFrom),112)),
 a.ValidTo
 ) g
where rn = 1

-- truncate table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog_All

truncate table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog_All

--insert into [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog_All([RegulationChangeID]
insert into [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog_All([RegulationChangeID]
              ,[CID]
              ,[Occurred]
              ,[FromRegulationID]
              ,[ToRegulationID]
              ,[DateID]
              )
select   a.[RegulationChangeID]
   ,a.[CID]
   ,a.[Occurred]
   ,b.[FromRegulationID]
   ,a.[ToRegulationID]
   ,a.[DateID]
from 
(
SELECT [RegulationChangeID]
  ,[CID]
  ,[Occurred]
  ,[FromRegulationID]
  ,[ToRegulationID]
  ,DateID
from 
(SELECT [RegulationChangeID]
  ,[CID]
  ,[Occurred]
  ,[FromRegulationID]
  ,[ToRegulationID]
  ,DateID
  ,row_number() over(partition by CID,DateID order by Occurred desc ) as rn
  FROM (SELECT  [RegulationChangeID]
      ,[CID]
      ,[Occurred]
      ,isnull([FromRegulationID],0) as FromRegulationID
      ,isnull([ToRegulationID],0) as  ToRegulationID
     ,convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,0,[Occurred]),112)) as DateID
     FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog
    ) a
 ) b
where rn=1
) a
join 
(
SELECT [RegulationChangeID]
  ,[CID]
  ,[Occurred]
  ,[FromRegulationID]
  ,DateID
from 
(SELECT [RegulationChangeID]
  ,[CID]
  ,[Occurred]
  ,isnull([FromRegulationID],0) as FromRegulationID
  ,isnull([ToRegulationID],0) as  ToRegulationID
  ,DateID
  ,row_number() over(partition by CID,DateID order by Occurred ) as rn
  FROM (SELECT [RegulationChangeID]
     ,[CID]
     ,[Occurred]
     ,[FromRegulationID]
     ,[ToRegulationID]
     ,convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,0,[Occurred]),112)) as DateID
     FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog     
    ) a
 ) b
where rn=1
) b
on(a.CID=b.CID and a.DateID=b.DateID)
where b.FromRegulationID<> a.ToRegulationID

SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal] @date [DATE] AS
BEGIN

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-03-11
Description: Update table Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal - Process one to update table Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
 2020-02-23     Boris        Add column  IsCreditReportValidCB
 2020-02-15     Boris		 Change case for IsCreditReportValidCB + IsValidCustomer  from 2020.03.16
 2022-04-03     Boris        Add filter to #outputdata left(DateRangeID),4) = YEAR(@date)
 2022-11-28	    Inbal        Add Columns: PhoneNumber, IsPhoneVerified and PhoneVerificationDateID to Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal
 2022-12-28		Inbal		 Add PlayerStatusSubReasonID to Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal
 2023-02-01		Inbal		 Add PhoneNumber to GDPR
 2024-04-01		Inbal		 Add WeekendFeePrecentage to Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal
 2024-08-13		Nir.H		 Add DltStatusID,DltID to Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal
 2024-09-08		Nir.H		 DltID add default  null
 2024-10-06     Eyal.B       FIX DltID update logic
 2024-10-13     Eyal.B	     FFIX DltID update logic to get the data to Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal
 2024-10-15     Eyal.B		 DltID final fix including additional tmp table
*********************************************************************************************/

/*** Important note:
This is the script that runs every day and fills up Fact_SnapshotCustomer_DEV using ETL tables.
If you're looking to load history use SP_History_Fact_SnapshotCustomer_DEV

**Create temp tables:
This script works using two lead tables - CC and BO.
The process:
-Make a list of all CIDs from CC stage table with Operation = 2 (NewCIDs) and another with Operation = 4 (Exist CIDs - update to CC) from stage tables (will be used later). When we insert, we will only insert the most updated row regardless of operation.
-Take most recent entry for each CID from CC for our day
-Take most recent entry for each CID from BC and RegulationTransfer for our day
-Combine BC and Regulations using Full JOIN between them, another left join to CustomerSnapshot and also use isnull in SELECT.
-Combine BC and CC using Full JOIN between them, another left join to CustomerSnapshot and use isnull in SELECT.

**Insert data
-Insert all rows that CIDs match #NewCIDs with ToDate=End of year
-Update all rows that CIDs in #ExistCIDs ToDate=Yesterday
-Insert new rows for all entries in #ExistCIDs with FromDate=Today, and ToDate=EndOfYear

**Insert new DateIDs to dim

**Close of year - Close of all last year's open entries and reopen them for this year.

--Explanation for RegulationChangeLog:
We take the RegulationID from RegulationChangeLog and not from BC because the change date from RegulationChangeLog is the end of day,
and from BC the change is effective immdediately. For business reasons regulation change on END OF DAY, so we need to take this field from Fact_RegulationChangeLog.
***/

--DECLARE @date [DATE] = '2024-10-19'

DECLARE @auxdate AS DATETIME
DECLARE @daybefore  AS DATETIME
DECLARE @largedate  AS DATETIME
DECLARE @maxentrydate  AS DATETIME
DECLARE @ProcessName  AS VARCHAR(50)
DECLARE @minCreditID as Int
DECLARE @maxCreditID AS INT
DECLARE @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@date,112))
DECLARE @row_count INT 


SET @daybefore = dateadd(DAY, -1, @date)
SET @auxdate = dateadd(DAY, 1, @date)
SET @largedate = (
				  SELECT cast(cast(year(@date) AS VARCHAR(4)) + '12' + '31' AS DATETIME)
				 )
SET @maxentrydate = (
					 SELECT CASE
								WHEN month(@date) = 01 AND day(@date) = 01
									THEN dateadd(yy, -1, @largedate)
								ELSE @largedate
							END
					) --Set max entry date as last year's if we're on the 01/01
SET @ProcessName = 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal'

--print @largedate
--print @maxentrydate
--print @date
--select DateRangeID , convert(bigint,left(convert (Varchar(20),DateRangeID),8)+right(convert (Varchar,@daybefore,112),4)) from [DWH_dbo].[Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal]
/****************************************************************Fill Ext_FSC tables*********************************************************************************/

/**Fill temp tables with most updated rows only per CID **/

/**** IMPORTANT ****/
--Note: #NewCIDs and #ExistCIDs will be used in the insert/update process, but only the most updated row (regardless of operation number) will be inserted.
--Since there could be a an operation 2 (insert) and a 4 (update) for the same CID in a certain day, we will only want the #4 in this case.

--Get a list of all new inserted CIDs
--DROP TABLE #NewCIDs


If Object_ID('tempdb..#NewCIDs','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #NewCIDs

SELECT distinct t.CID
INTO #NewCIDs
FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer t With (Nolock)
	left join
	[DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal f
	on 
	t.CID = f.RealCID
where f.RealCID is null --First day that they were inserted

--Get a list of all Existing CIDs in Ext_FSC table
--DROP TABLE #ExistCIDs

If Object_ID('tempdb..#ExistCIDs','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #ExistCIDs

SELECT DISTINCT (t.CID)
INTO #ExistCIDs
FROM (
	  SELECT CID
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer a With (Nolock)
	  UNION
	  SELECT CID
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_Customer b With (Nolock)
	  UNION
	  SELECT CID
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog c With (Nolock)
	  	 ) t
WHERE t.CID NOT IN (
					SELECT CID
					FROM #NewCIDs
				   ) --All CIDs that didn't have an operation = 2 (insert) today


--Get most recent entry for each CID from CC in our day
--DROP TABLE #CCTemp

If Object_ID('tempdb..#CCTemp','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #CCTemp

SELECT *
INTO #CCTemp
FROM (
	  SELECT
		   t.GCID
		   , t.CID
		   , t.UserName
		   , t.Gender
		   , t.BirthDate
		   , t.CountryID
		   , t.AffiliateID
		   , t.CampaignID
		   , t.LabelID
		   , t.LanguageID
		   , t.Email
		   , t.PlayerStatusID
		   , t.PlayerLevelID
		   , t.CommunicationLanguageID
		   , t.AccountStatusID
		   , t.Occurred AS ValidFrom
		   , t.PendingClosureStatusID
		   , t.IsEmailVerified
		   , t.RegionID
           , t.PlayerStatusReasonID
		   , t.City
		   , t.Address
		   , t.Zip
		   , t.PlayerStatusSubReasonID
		   , t.WeekendFeePrecentage
		   , row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY t.CID ORDER BY t.Occurred DESC) AS RowNum --Latest Insert or update per CID
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer t With (Nolock)
	 ) AS tt
WHERE tt.RowNum = 1


--Get most updated row from BC
--DROP TABLE #BCTemp

If Object_ID('tempdb..#BCTempNoReg','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #BCTempNoReg

SELECT *
INTO #BCTempNoReg
FROM (
	  SELECT-- t.LSN
		   --, t.Operation
		   --, 
		   t.CID
		   , t.VerificationLevelID
		   , t.RiskStatusID
		   , t.RiskClassificationID
		   , t.EmployeeAccount
		   , t.GuruStatusID
		   , t.AccountTypeID
		   , isnull(t.RegulationID,0) AS RegulationID
		   , t.AccountManagerID AS ManagerID
		   , t.DocumentStatusID
		   , t.SuitabilityTestStatusID
		   , t.MifidCategorizationID
		   , t.DesignatedRegulationID
		   , t.EvMatchStatus
		   , row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY t.CID ORDER BY t.Occurred DESC) AS RowNum
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_Customer t With (Nolock)

	 ) AS tt
WHERE tt.RowNum = 1
--Note - A user is always created in CC before BC so the user will already exist in snapshot once we insert its BC data
--Note - We select the RegulationID in BC for new users

--Get most recent regulation changes from today

If Object_ID('tempdb..#RegulationChanges','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #RegulationChanges

SELECT *
INTO #RegulationChanges
FROM (
	  SELECT t.CID
		   , isnull(t.ToRegulationID,0) AS ToRegulationID
		   , row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY t.CID ORDER BY t.Occurred DESC) AS RowNum --The occurred may be of the day before, but that okay because we change regulation only at the end of day and the DateKey reflects the end of day
	  FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog t With (Nolock)

	 ) AS tt
WHERE tt.RowNum = 1

--Combine BO Customer with RegulationChanges with FULL JOIN and get missing data from SnapshotCustomer

If Object_ID('tempdb..#BCTemp','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #BCTemp

SELECT isnull(#BCTempNoReg.CID, #RegulationChanges.CID) AS CID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.VerificationLevelID AS VerificationLevelID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.RiskStatusID AS RiskStatusID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.RiskClassificationID AS RiskClassificationID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.GuruStatusID AS GuruStatusID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.AccountTypeID AS AccountTypeID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.ManagerID AS ManagerID
	 , #RegulationChanges.ToRegulationID AS RegulationID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.RegulationID AS RegulationIDBackup --If FromRegulationID exists in RegulationChangeLog take it, else take it from Snapshot, else take it from History.BackOffice customer (that means that it's a new customer). We shouldn't take it from BOCustomer right away b/c the regulation might have changed during the day but will be in effect only on end of day.
	 , #BCTempNoReg.DocumentStatusID AS DocumentStatusID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.SuitabilityTestStatusID AS SuitabilityTestStatusID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.MifidCategorizationID AS MifidCategorizationID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.DesignatedRegulationID AS DesignatedRegulationID
	 , #BCTempNoReg.EvMatchStatus AS EvMatchStatus
INTO #BCTemp
FROM #BCTempNoReg
	FULL JOIN #RegulationChanges --Full Join them = even if one of the tables is null b/c there wasn't a change
		ON #RegulationChanges.CID = #BCTempNoReg.CID


-- Get all users who made a deposit today

If Object_ID('tempdb..#TodayDepositors','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #TodayDepositors

Select Distinct CID
Into #TodayDepositors
From [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_History_Credit With (Nolock)
-- Where CreditTypeID = 1  in Extract



-- Join with SnapshotCustomer to find only the users who should be updated

If Object_ID('tempdb..#DepositorChanges','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #DepositorChanges

Select TD.CID, 1 IsDepositor
Into #DepositorChanges
From 
	#TodayDepositors TD
	Left Join [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal FSC With (Nolock)
		ON FSC.RealCID = TD.CID AND convert(DATETIME, left(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4) + right(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4)) = 
		(
		case when  DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0) =  @date then @date 
		else 
		@maxentrydate --Take most updated row from Customer Snapshot
		end
		)
Where
	Isnull(FSC.IsDepositor,0) = 0

If Object_ID('tempdb..#PhoneVerificationDetails ','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #PhoneVerificationDetails

CREATE TABLE #PhoneVerificationDetails 
    WITH (HEAP,DISTRIBUTION=ROUND_ROBIN)
AS

	SELECT CID,	PhoneNumber,	IsPhoneVerified,	PhoneVerificationDate,	PhoneVerificationDateID
	FROM (
		  SELECT
			   CID
			  ,PhoneNumber
			  ,CASE WHEN PhoneVerifiedID IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsPhoneVerified
			  ,PhoneVerificationDate 
			  ,PhoneVerificationDateID
			  ,ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY CID, PhoneVerificationDateID ORDER BY PhoneVerificationDate desc , EndTime DESC ) AS RN
			   FROM [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FSC_PhoneVerificationDetails]
			   WHERE PhoneVerificationDateID <> 19000101
			) AS PVD
	WHERE RN=1

	 , fsc.CommunicationLanguageID
	 , fsc.PremiumAccount
	 , fsc.Evangelist
	 , fsc.GuruStatusID
	 , fsc.UpdateDate
	 , fsc.RegulationID
	 , fsc.AccountStatusID
	 , fsc.AccountManagerID
	 , fsc.PlayerLevelID
	 , fsc.AccountTypeID
	 , fsc.DateRangeID
	 , fsc.IsDepositor
	 , fsc.PendingClosureStatusID
	 , fsc.DocumentStatusID

/**Merge two tables together where updates occurred on both tables**/
--Insert into #DailyCustomerSnapshot where there are updates on both tables, therefore we have all of the required fields.

----DROP TABLE #DailyCustomerSnapshot
--DECLARE @dateID INT = 20241009
If Object_ID('tempdb..#DailyCustomerSnapshot','U') Is Not Null 
   drop table #DailyCustomerSnapshot

Create Table #DailyCustomerSnapshot
(CID int null
, GCID int null
, CountryID int null
, LabelID int null
, LanguageID int null
, PlayerStatusID int null
, CommunicationLanguageID int null
, AccountStatusID int null
, PlayerLevelID int null
, VerificationLevelID int null
, RiskStatusID int null
, RiskClassificationID int null
, RegulationID tinyint null
, ManagerID int null
, AccountTypeID int  null
, GuruStatusID smallint null
, IsDepositor bit null
, PendingClosureStatusID tinyint null
, DocumentStatusID int null 
, SuitabilityTestStatusID int null
, MifidCategorizationID int null
, IsEmailVerified int null
, DesignatedRegulationID int null
, EvMatchStatus int null
, RegionID int NULL
, PlayerStatusReasonID INT null
, IsValidCustomer INT null
, IsCreditReportValidCB INT NULL
, Email  nvarchar(50)
, City  nvarchar(50)
, Address nvarchar(100)
, Zip nvarchar(50)
, AffiliateID int
, PhoneNumber varchar (30)
, IsPhoneVerified bit
, PhoneVerificationDateID varchar (8)
, PlayerStatusSubReasonID int
, WeekendFeePrecentage int
, DltStatusID int
, DltID varchar(50)
)

select * from #DailyCustomerSnapshot
where CID = 26400844

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal','#DailyCustomerSnapshot',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

INSERT INTO #DailyCustomerSnapshot
SELECT DISTINCT coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, #DepositorChanges.CID, PVD.CID, iden.RealCID) AS CID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.GCID, FSC.GCID,iden.GCID,0) AS GCID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.CountryID, FSC.CountryID, iden.CountryID, 0) AS CountryID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.LabelID, FSC.LabelID, iden.LabelID, 0) AS LabelID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.LanguageID, FSC.LanguageID, iden.LanguageID,0) AS LanguageID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerStatusID, FSC.PlayerStatusID, iden.PlayerStatusID,0) AS PlayerStatusID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.CommunicationLanguageID, FSC.CommunicationLanguageID, iden.CommunicationLanguageID,0) AS CommunicationLanguageID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.AccountStatusID, FSC.AccountStatusID, iden.AccountStatusID,0) AS AccountStatusID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID, FSC.PlayerLevelID, iden.PlayerLevelID,0) AS PlayerLevelID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.VerificationLevelID, FSC.VerificationLevelID, iden.VerificationLevelID,0) AS VerificationLevelID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.RiskStatusID, FSC.RiskStatusID, iden.RiskStatusID,0) AS RiskStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.RiskClassificationID, FSC.RiskClassificationID, iden.RiskClassificationID,0) AS RiskClassificationID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.RegulationID, FSC.RegulationID, #BCTemp.RegulationIDBackup, iden.RegulationID, 0) AS RegulationID --If FromRegulationID exists in RegulationChangeLog take it, else take it from Snapshot, else take it from History.BackOffice customer (that means that it's a new customer). We shouldn't take it from BOCustomer right away b/c the regulation might have changed during the day but will be in effect only on end of day.
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.ManagerID, FSC.AccountManagerID, iden.AccountManagerID,0) AS AccountManagerID --AccountManagerID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.AccountTypeID, FSC.AccountTypeID, iden.AccountTypeID,0) AS AccountTypeID --Employee = 7
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.GuruStatusID, FSC.GuruStatusID, iden.GuruStatusID,0) AS GuruStatusID
	 , coalesce(#DepositorChanges.IsDepositor, FSC.IsDepositor, iden.IsDepositor, 0) AS IsDepositor
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.PendingClosureStatusID, FSC.PendingClosureStatusID, iden.PendingClosureStatusID, 0) AS PendingClosureStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.DocumentStatusID, FSC.DocumentStatusID, iden.DocumentStatusID, 0) AS DocumentStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.SuitabilityTestStatusID, FSC.SuitabilityTestStatusID, iden.SuitabilityTestStatusID, 0) AS SuitabilityTestStatusID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.MifidCategorizationID, FSC.MifidCategorizationID, iden.MifidCategorizationID, 0) AS MifidCategorizationID
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.IsEmailVerified, FSC.IsEmailVerified, iden.IsEmailVerified, 0) AS IsEmailVerified
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.DesignatedRegulationID, FSC.DesignatedRegulationID, iden.DesignatedRegulationID, 0) AS DesignatedRegulationID
	 , coalesce(#BCTemp.EvMatchStatus, FSC.EvMatchStatus, iden.EvMatchStatus, 0) AS EvMatchStatus
	 , coalesce(#CCTemp.RegionID, FSC.RegionID, iden.RegionID, 0) AS RegionID
     , coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerStatusReasonID, FSC.PlayerStatusReasonID, iden.PlayerStatusReasonID, 0) AS PlayerStatusReasonID
	  , case when @date<='20200314'
			then
			case when 
			coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID, FSC.PlayerLevelID, iden.PlayerLevelID,0) <> 4 And 
			coalesce(#CCTemp.LabelID, FSC.LabelID, iden.LabelID,0) <> 30 And 
			coalesce(#CCTemp.CountryID, FSC.CountryID, iden.CountryID,0) <> 250 and 
			coalesce(#BCTemp.AccountTypeID, FSC.AccountTypeID, iden.AccountTypeID,0) <> 9 then 1 else 0 end
			ELSE
			case when 
			coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID, FSC.PlayerLevelID, iden.PlayerLevelID,0) <> 4 
			And coalesce(#CCTemp.LabelID, FSC.LabelID, iden.LabelID,0) NOT IN (30, 26) 
			And coalesce(#CCTemp.CountryID, FSC.CountryID, iden.CountryID,0) <> 250 
			then 1 else 0 end  
		end as IsValidCustomer
	  , case when @date<='20200314'
			then
			case when (NOT (coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID, FSC.PlayerLevelID, iden.PlayerLevelID, iden.PlayerLevelID,0) = 4 
			AND coalesce(#BCTemp.AccountTypeID, FSC.AccountTypeID, iden.AccountTypeID, iden.AccountTypeID,0) <> 2) 
					AND coalesce(#CCTemp.LabelID, FSC.LabelID, iden.LabelID, iden.LabelID,0) NOT IN ( 26,30) ) then 1 else 0 
					end
			ELSE
			case when (NOT (coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerLevelID, FSC.PlayerLevelID, iden.PlayerLevelID,0) = 4 
			AND coalesce(#BCTemp.AccountTypeID, FSC.AccountTypeID, iden.AccountTypeID,0) <> 2) 
							AND coalesce(#CCTemp.LabelID, FSC.LabelID, iden.LabelID,0) NOT IN ( 26,30) 
							AND NOT (coalesce(#CCTemp.CountryID, FSC.CountryID, iden.CountryID,0) = 250 
							and coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, #DepositorChanges.CID,iden.RealCID) NOT IN (3400616,10526243))) -- ask Guy
							then 1 else 0 end  
		end as IsCreditReportValidCB
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.Email, FSC.Email, iden.Email, '') AS Email
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.City, FSC.City, iden.City, '') AS City
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.Address, FSC.Address, iden.Address, '') AS Address
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.Zip, FSC.Zip, iden.Zip, '') AS Zip
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.AffiliateID, FSC.AffiliateID, iden.AffiliateID, 0) AS AffiliateID
		, coalesce(PVD.PhoneNumber, FSC.PhoneNumber, iden.PhoneNumber, '') AS PhoneNumber
		, coalesce(PVD.IsPhoneVerified, FSC.IsPhoneVerified, iden.IsPhoneVerified, 0) AS IsPhoneVerified
		, coalesce(PVD.PhoneVerificationDateID, FSC.PhoneVerificationDateID, iden.PhoneVerificationDateID, '') AS PhoneVerificationDateID
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.PlayerStatusSubReasonID, FSC.PlayerStatusSubReasonID, iden.PlayerStatusSubReasonID, 0) AS PlayerStatusSubReasonID
		, coalesce(#CCTemp.WeekendFeePrecentage, FSC.WeekendFeePrecentage, iden.WeekendFeePrecentage) AS WeekendFeePrecentage
		, coalesce(iden.DltStatusID,0) as DltStatusID
		, coalesce(iden.DltID,null) as DltID
		FROM #CCTemp
	FULL JOIN #BCTemp
		ON #CCTemp.CID = #BCTemp.CID
	FULL JOIN #DepositorChanges
		ON isnull(#CCTemp.CID,#BCTemp.CID) = #DepositorChanges.CID
	FULL JOIN #PhoneVerificationDetails PVD
		ON coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, #DepositorChanges.CID) = PVD.CID
	LEFT JOIN [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal FSC With (Nolock) -- Regular left join to get missing data from SnapshotCustomer
		ON (FSC.RealCID = coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, #DepositorChanges.CID, PVD.CID)) AND convert(DATETIME, left(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4) + right(convert(VARCHAR(16), FSC.DateRangeID), 4)) = @maxentrydate
	FULL join #DLT iden
		ON iden.RealCID=coalesce(#CCTemp.CID, #BCTemp.CID, #DepositorChanges.CID, PVD.CID)
		OPTION (LABEL = '#CCTemp');

	--

/**Update date + Insert, for existing CIDs**/


IF  DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0) <>  @date
BEGIN



--EXEC SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal','Update Old Customer',@dateID,1,0

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal','Insert New Customer' ,@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL


/**************************************************************Transform Data*********************************************************************************************************/
/**Run Merge to update and create new rows in snapshot**/
MERGE INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal AS a
USING #DailyCustomerSnapshot AS b   
  ON a.RealCID=b.CID
--Close the date for rows which have an update (later we open a new one with an "open" date):
WHEN MATCHED AND 
(
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.CountryID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.CountryID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.LabelID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.LabelID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.LanguageID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.LanguageID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.PlayerStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.PlayerStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.CommunicationLanguageID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.CommunicationLanguageID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.PlayerLevelID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.PlayerLevelID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.VerificationLevelID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.VerificationLevelID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.RiskStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.RiskStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.RiskClassificationID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.RiskClassificationID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.RegulationID),0) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.RegulationID),0)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.AccountManagerID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.ManagerID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.AccountTypeID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.AccountTypeID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.GuruStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.GuruStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.IsDepositor),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.IsDepositor),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.PendingClosureStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.PendingClosureStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.DocumentStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.DocumentStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.SuitabilityTestStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.SuitabilityTestStatusID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.MifidCategorizationID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.MifidCategorizationID),-1)) or 
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.IsEmailVerified),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.IsEmailVerified),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.DesignatedRegulationID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.DesignatedRegulationID),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.EvMatchStatus),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.EvMatchStatus),-1)) or
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.RegionID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.RegionID),-1)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.PlayerStatusReasonID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.PlayerStatusReasonID),-1)) OR 
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.IsValidCustomer),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.IsValidCustomer),-1)) OR 
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.IsCreditReportValidCB),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.IsCreditReportValidCB),-1)) OR

(ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),a.Email),'') <> ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),b.Email),'')) OR
(ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),a.City),'') <> ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),b.City),'')) OR
(ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(100),a.Address),'') <> ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(100),b.Address),'')) OR
(ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),a.Zip),'') <> ISNULL(convert(nvarchar(50),b.Zip),'')) OR 
	
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.AffiliateID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.AffiliateID),-1)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(varchar(30),a.PhoneNumber),'') <> ISNULL(convert(varchar(30),b.PhoneNumber),'')) OR
(ISNULL(convert(bit,a.IsPhoneVerified),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(bit,b.IsPhoneVerified),-1)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(varchar(8),a.PhoneVerificationDateID),'') <> ISNULL(convert(varchar(8),b.PhoneVerificationDateID),'')) OR
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.PlayerStatusSubReasonID),0) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.PlayerStatusSubReasonID),0)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.WeekendFeePrecentage),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.WeekendFeePrecentage),-1)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(int,a.DltStatusID),-1) <> ISNULL(convert(int,b.DltStatusID),-1)) OR
(ISNULL(convert(varchar(50),a.DltID),null) <> ISNULL(convert(varchar(50),b.DltID),null))

)
AND convert(datetime,left(convert(varchar(16),DateRangeID),4)+right(convert(varchar(16),DateRangeID),4))=@maxentrydate THEN

UPDATE SET DateRangeID=convert(bigint,left(convert (Varchar(20),DateRangeID),8)+right(convert (Varchar,@daybefore,112),4)) , UpdateDate = getdate()

WHEN NOT MATCHED 

THEN 

INSERT (RealCID
		,GCID
		,DateRangeID
		,CountryID
		,LabelID
		,LanguageID
		,VerificationLevelID
		,PlayerStatusID
		,RiskStatusID
		,RiskClassificationID
		,CommunicationLanguageID
		,RegulationID
		,AccountStatusID
		,AccountManagerID
		,PlayerLevelID
		,AccountTypeID
		,GuruStatusID
		,IsDepositor
		,PendingClosureStatusID
		,DocumentStatusID 
		,SuitabilityTestStatusID
		,MifidCategorizationID
		,IsEmailVerified
		,IsValidCustomer
		,IsCreditReportValidCB
		,DesignatedRegulationID
		,EvMatchStatus
		,RegionID
        ,PlayerStatusReasonID
		,UpdateDate
		,Email
	    ,City 
	    ,Address 
	    ,Zip 
		,AffiliateID
		,PhoneNumber
		,IsPhoneVerified
		,PhoneVerificationDateID
		,PlayerStatusSubReasonID
		,WeekendFeePrecentage
		,DltStatusID
		,DltID

		)
VALUES (
		b.CID
		,b.GCID
		,convert(bigint,convert (Varchar,@date,112)+right(convert (Varchar,@largedate,112),4))
		,b.CountryID
		,b.LabelID
		,b.LanguageID
		,b.VerificationLevelID
		,b.PlayerStatusID
		,b.RiskStatusID
		,b.RiskClassificationID
		,b.CommunicationLanguageID
		,b.RegulationID
		,b.AccountStatusID
		,b.ManagerID
		,b.PlayerLevelID
		,b.AccountTypeID
		,b.GuruStatusID
		,b.IsDepositor
		,b.PendingClosureStatusID
		,b.DocumentStatusID 
		,b.SuitabilityTestStatusID
		,b.MifidCategorizationID
		,b.IsEmailVerified
		,b.IsValidCustomer
	    ,b.IsCreditReportValidCB
		,b.DesignatedRegulationID
		,b.EvMatchStatus
		,b.RegionID
        ,b.PlayerStatusReasonID
		,getdate()
		,b.Email
		,b.City 
		,b.Address 
		,b.Zip 
		,b.AffiliateID
		,b.PhoneNumber
		,b.IsPhoneVerified
		,b.PhoneVerificationDateID
		,b.PlayerStatusSubReasonID
		,b.WeekendFeePrecentage
		,b.DltStatusID
		,b.DltID
)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal');

	SELECT top 1 @row_count = ISNULL(row_count,0)
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

--OUTPUT
--$action,
--inserted.RealCID,
--inserted.DateRangeID
--INTO #outputdata;



INSERT INTO #outputdata
SELECT 'UPDATE' AS action,
RealCID,
DateRangeID 
FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal 
WHERE DateRangeID=convert(bigint,left(convert (Varchar(20),DateRangeID),8)+right(convert (Varchar,@daybefore,112),4))
AND left(DateRangeID,4) = YEAR(@date) --- Update from 2022.04.03
;

--UPDATE SET DateRangeID=convert(bigint,left(convert (Varchar(20),DateRangeID),8)+right(convert (Varchar,@daybefore,112),4))


--declare @rowcount_insert as int
--set @rowcount_insert = (SELECT count(*) FROM #outputdata a WHERE Action = 'INSERT')

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal','Insert New Customer',@dateID, 10,@row_count ,NULL,NULL,NULL --@rowcount_insert,NULL,NULL,NULL

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal','Update Old Customer' ,@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal
	(RealCID
   , GCID
   , DateRangeID
   , CountryID
   , LabelID
   , LanguageID
   , VerificationLevelID
   , PlayerStatusID
   , RiskStatusID
   , RiskClassificationID
   , CommunicationLanguageID
   , RegulationID
   , AccountStatusID
   , AccountManagerID
   , PlayerLevelID
   , AccountTypeID
   , GuruStatusID
   , IsDepositor
   , PendingClosureStatusID
   , DocumentStatusID 
   , SuitabilityTestStatusID
   , MifidCategorizationID
   , IsEmailVerified
   , IsValidCustomer
   , IsCreditReportValidCB
   , DesignatedRegulationID
   , EvMatchStatus
   , RegionID
   , PlayerStatusReasonID
   , UpdateDate
   , Email
   , City 
   , Address 
   , Zip    
   , AffiliateID
   , PhoneNumber
   , IsPhoneVerified
   , PhoneVerificationDateID
   , PlayerStatusSubReasonID
   , WeekendFeePrecentage
   ,DltStatusID
	,DltID
   )
SELECT b.CID
	 , b.GCID
	 , convert(BIGINT, convert(VARCHAR, @date, 112) + right(convert(VARCHAR, @largedate, 112), 4))
	 , b.CountryID
	 , b.LabelID
	 , b.LanguageID
	 , b.VerificationLevelID
	 , b.PlayerStatusID
	 , b.RiskStatusID
	 , b.RiskClassificationID
	 , b.CommunicationLanguageID
	 , b.RegulationID
	 , b.AccountStatusID
	 , b.ManagerID
	 , b.PlayerLevelID
	 , b.AccountTypeID
	 , b.GuruStatusID
	 , b.IsDepositor
	 , b.PendingClosureStatusID
	 , b.DocumentStatusID 
	 , b.SuitabilityTestStatusID
	 , b.MifidCategorizationID
	 , b.IsEmailVerified
	 , b.IsValidCustomer
	 , b.IsCreditReportValidCB
	 , b.DesignatedRegulationID
	 , b.EvMatchStatus
	 , RegionID
     , PlayerStatusReasonID
	 , getdate()
	 , Email
	 , City 
	 , Address 
	 , Zip 
	 , AffiliateID
	 , PhoneNumber
	 , IsPhoneVerified
	 , PhoneVerificationDateID
	 , PlayerStatusSubReasonID
	 , WeekendFeePrecentage
	 ,b.DltStatusID
	 ,b.DltID
FROM #DailyCustomerSnapshot b
WHERE EXISTS (
			  SELECT 1
			  FROM #outputdata a
			  WHERE Action = 'UPDATE'
				  AND a.CID = b.CID
			 )
		OPTION (LABEL = '#DailyCustomerSnapshot');


	SELECT top 1 @row_count = ISNULL(row_count,0)
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = '#DailyCustomerSnapshot'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal','Update Old Customer',@dateID, 10, @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

END

/****************************************************************Insert new DateRange Keys*********************************************************************************/

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal','Add New DateRangeIDs',@dateID, 1, 0 ,NULL,NULL,NULL


INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range (DateRangeID
					 , FromDateID
					 , ToDateID
					 , UpdateDate)
SELECT DISTINCT DateRangeID
			  , convert(BIGINT, left(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 8))
			  , convert(BIGINT, left(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 4) + right(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 4))
			  , getdate()
FROM #outputdata
WHERE Action = 'UPDATE'
AND DateRangeID NOT IN (select DateRangeID FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range)

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range (DateRangeID
					 , FromDateID
					 , ToDateID
					 , UpdateDate)
SELECT convert(BIGINT, convert(VARCHAR, @date, 112) + right(convert(VARCHAR, @largedate, 112), 4))
	 , convert(INT, (convert(VARCHAR, @date, 112)))
	 , convert(INT, (convert(VARCHAR, @largedate, 112)))
	 , getdate()
	 WHERE convert(BIGINT, convert(VARCHAR, @date, 112) + right(convert(VARCHAR, @largedate, 112), 4)) NOT IN (select DateRangeID FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range)



--Note: Here we insert the new DateRange keys that were created today.
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range (DateRangeID
					 , FromDateID
					 , ToDateID
					 , UpdateDate)
SELECT DISTINCT DateRangeID
			  , convert(BIGINT, left(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 8))
			  , convert(BIGINT, left(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 4) + right(convert(VARCHAR(12), DateRangeID), 4))
			  , getdate()
FROM #UpdatedRanges --Date ranges that were closed and inserted today
WHERE  DateRangeID NOT IN (
							SELECT DateRangeID
							FROM [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range
						   ) --where they don't already exist
		OPTION (LABEL = 'DateRangeID');
	SELECT top 1 @row_count = ISNULL(row_count,0)
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'DateRangeID'
	ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal','Add New DateRangeIDs',@dateID, 10, @row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

----- GDPR PII DATA
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DelUserName') IS NOT NULL
DROP TABLE #DelUserName
select  UserName, CID, Email, City, Address,  Zip
into #DelUserName
from  [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer
where  UserName like '%DelUserName%'

Update a
SET
Email = b.Email,
City = b.City,
Address = b.Address,
Zip = b.Zip,
PhoneNumber = 'DelPhoneNumber_' +SUBSTRING( b.UserName ,13, len(b.UserName))
from [DWH_dbo].[Fact_SnapshotCustomer_Eyal] a 
join #DelUserName b
on a.RealCID = b.CID

END/*Procedure*/
