SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity] @date [DATETIME] AS
BEGIN

--EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity] '20250908'
/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-03-11
Description: Update table Fact_SnapshotEquity
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
2019-03-03    Boris Slutski  Remove table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_TotalStockOrders - withou data in PROD from 2015
2020-06-07    Boris Slutski  Change formula for Calcutaion TotalCash
2020-01-02    Boris Slutski  Cahnge Calculation of table #TotalCashPreviousDate
2022-01-27    Inbal BML      Add TRS fields
2024-10-30	  Daniel Kaplan	 Add futures fields :TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount,TotalRealFutures,TotalFuturesProviderMargin,TotalFuturesLockedCash	
2025-09-30    Daniel Kaplan  Add Stock Margin :TotalStocksMargin,TotalStockMarginLoanValue
*********************************************************************************************/


	--DECLARE @date AS DATETIME SET @date='20241209'
	DECLARE @daybefore  AS DATETIME;
	DECLARE @auxdate  AS DATETIME;
	DECLARE @largedate  AS DATETIME;
	DECLARE @minCreditID as INT;
	DECLARE @maxCreditID AS INT;
	DECLARE @maxentrydate  AS DATETIME;
	DECLARE @dateid AS INT;
	Declare @StartOfMonth Datetime;
	DECLARE @ProcessName  AS VARCHAR(50);
	DECLARE @rowcount AS INT = 0;
	DECLARE @maxupdatedate  AS DATETIME;	


	SET @daybefore = dateadd(DAY,-1,@date);
	SET @auxdate = dateadd(DAY,1,@date);
	SET @largedate = (select cast(cast(year(@date) as varchar(4))+'12'+'31' as Datetime));
	SET @maxentrydate = (SELECT CASE WHEN month(@date)=01 and day(@date)=01 THEN dateadd(yy,-1,@largedate) ELSE @largedate END);
	set @dateid=convert(int,convert(varchar,dateadd(day,datediff(day,0,@date),0),112)); 
	Select @StartOfMonth = dateadd(day, 1-Datepart(day,@auxdate), @auxdate);
    --SET @ProcessName='Equity'

	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#outputdata') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #outputdata;

	CREATE table #outputdata
	(Action varchar(20) not null,
	 CID int not null,
	 DateRangeID bigint not null);

/**************************************************************PREPERE STG TABLE*********************************************************************/

	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TotalCashPreviousDate') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #TotalCashPreviousDate;


--select a.DateRangeID, a.CID, a.TotalCash as TotalCashPreviousDate 
--into #TotalCashPreviousDate
--from Fact_SnapshotEquity a
--where left(a.DateRangeID, 4) = year(@date)
--and right(a.DateRangeID, 4) = 1231;


select a.DateRangeID, a.CID, a.TotalCash as TotalCashPreviousDate 
into #TotalCashPreviousDate
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity a
where left(a.DateRangeID, 4) = 
(
case 
when 
DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0,@date), 0) = @date -- if first day of year
then year(@date)-1
else year(@date)
end
)
and right(a.DateRangeID, 4) = 1231;


--create CLUSTERED index #TotalCashPreviousDate on #TotalCashPreviousDate(CID);



	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','CreateFinalEquityStgTable',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL;

	TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Fact_SnapshotEquity;
	INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Fact_SnapshotEquity(CID
										,CreditID						
										,TotalPositionsAmount
										,TotalMirrorPositionsAmount	
										,TotalStockPositionAmount
										,TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount	
										
										,TotalCryptoPositionAmount           -- added
										,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount     -- added

										,TotalRealStocks           -- added
										,TotalRealCrypto     -- added
										,TotalRealCryptoLoan

										,TotalCash	
										,TotalCashCalculation
										,BonusCredit	
										,RealizedEquity	
										,Credit	
										,AUM		
										,TotalMirrorCash			
										,TotalStockOrders			
										,TotalMirrorStockOrders		
										,InProcessCashouts
										,TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
										,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
										,Total_TRSCrypto
										------------------Futures------------------
									   ,TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount
									   ,TotalRealFutures
									   ,TotalFuturesProviderMargin
									   ,TotalFuturesLockedCash	
									   	--2025-09-29 Stock Margin
									   ,[TotalStocksMargin]
									   ,[TotalStockMarginLoanValue]
										)/*min(SpecialEquity,BonusCredit)*/
										
	SELECT hc.CID 
		 , hc.CreditID
		 , isnull(pa.TotalPositionAmount, 0) AS TotalPositionsAmount
		 , isnull(pa.TotalMirrorPositionAmount, 0) AS TotalMirrorPositionsAmount
		 , isnull(pa.TotalStockPositionAmount, 0) AS TotalStockPositionAmount
		 , isnull(pa.TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount, 0) AS TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount
		 
		 , isnull(pa.TotalCryptoPositionAmount, 0) AS TotalCryptoPositionAmount               --  added
		 , isnull(pa.TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount, 0) AS TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount   --  added

		 , isnull(pa.TotalRealStocks, 0) AS TotalRealStocks               --  added
		 , isnull(pa.TotalRealCrypto, 0) AS TotalRealCrypto   --  added
		 , isnull(pa.TotalRealCryptoLoan, 0) AS TotalRealCryptoLoan   --  added

		 -----, isnull(hc.TotalCash, 0) AS TotalCash    -- from 2020.06.07
		 , isnull(tcap.TotalCashPreviousDate,0) + isnull(tca.TotalCashChangeAll,0) as TotalCash
		 , isnull(tcap.TotalCashPreviousDate,0) + isnull(tca.TotalCashChangeAll,0) as TotalCashCalculation
		 , isnull(hc.BonusCredit,0) as BonusCredit
		 , case when isnull(hc.RealizedEquity,0)=0 then 
		  ---isnull(hc.TotalCash, 0)+isnull(pa.TotalPositionAmount, 0)+--isnull(so.TotalStockOrders, 0)+ -- from 2020.06.07
		  isnull(tcap.TotalCashPreviousDate,0) + isnull(tca.TotalCashChangeAll,0)+isnull(pa.TotalPositionAmount, 0)+--isnull(so.TotalStockOrders, 0)+
		  isnull(ic.InProcessCashouts,0) 
		  else isnull(hc.RealizedEquity,0) end  as RealizedEquity
		 , isnull(hc.Credit,0) as Credit
		---- , isnull(pa.TotalMirrorPositionAmount,0)+isnull(hc.TotalCash,0)-isnull(hc.Credit, 0)--+isnull(so.TotalMirrorStockOrders, 0) -- from 2020.06.07
		 , isnull(pa.TotalMirrorPositionAmount,0)+isnull(tcap.TotalCashPreviousDate,0) + isnull(tca.TotalCashChangeAll,0)-isnull(hc.Credit, 0)  AS AUM --+isnull(so.TotalMirrorStockOrders, 0)
		---, isnull(hc.TotalCash,0)-isnull(hc.Credit, 0) AS TotalMirrorCash -- from 2020.06.07
		 , isnull(tcap.TotalCashPreviousDate,0) + isnull(tca.TotalCashChangeAll,0)-isnull(hc.Credit, 0) AS TotalMirrorCash
		 , 0 AS TotalStockOrders
		 , 0 AS TotalMirrorStockOrders
		 , isnull(ic.InProcessCashouts,0) AS InProcessCashouts
		 , isnull(pa.TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS,0) AS TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
		 , isnull(pa.TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS,0) AS TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
		 , isnull(pa.Total_TRSCrypto ,0) AS Total_TRSCrypto
		 ------------------Futures------------------
		 , isnull(pa.TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount,0) as TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount
		 , isnull(pa.TotalRealFutures,0) as TotalRealFutures
		 , isnull(pa.TotalFuturesProviderMargin,0) as TotalFuturesProviderMargin
		 , isnull(pa.TotalFuturesLockedCash ,0) as TotalFuturesLockedCash
		 --2025-09-29 Stock Margin
		 , isnull(pa.[TotalStocksMargin],0) as [TotalStocksMargin]
		 , isnull(pa.[TotalStockMarginLoanValue],0) as [TotalStockMarginLoanValue]
	FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Real_History_Credit hc
		--left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_TotalStockOrders so
		--on(hc.CID=so.CID)
		left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_InProcessCashouts ic
		on(hc.CID=ic.CID)
		left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_TotalPositionAmount pa
		on(hc.CID=pa.CID)

		left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_TotalCashChangeAll tca
		on(hc.CID=tca.CID)
		left join #TotalCashPreviousDate tcap
		on(hc.CID=tcap.CID);
  ---****  Treatmant for Position than change IsSettled for column TotalRealStocks & TotalRealCrypto

	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog_CID') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog_CID; 

select distinct CID 
into #Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog_CID
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog;
--------------------
-- Update in CFD to Real 
insert into  #Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog_CID
select distinct CID 
from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_TotalPositionAmount where CID not in ( select CID from #Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog_CID);


----------------------
--create clustered index #Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog_CID on #Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog_CID (CID);




INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Fact_SnapshotEquity(CID
										,CreditID						
										,TotalPositionsAmount
										,TotalMirrorPositionsAmount	
										,TotalStockPositionAmount
										,TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount							
										,TotalCryptoPositionAmount           -- added
										,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount     -- added
										,TotalRealStocks           -- added
										,TotalRealCrypto     -- added
										,TotalRealCryptoLoan
										,TotalCash					
										,BonusCredit	
										,RealizedEquity	
										,Credit	
										,AUM		
										,TotalMirrorCash			
										,TotalStockOrders			
										,TotalMirrorStockOrders		
										,InProcessCashouts
										,TotalCashCalculation
										,TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
										,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
										,Total_TRSCrypto
										------------------Futures------------------
									   ,TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount
									   ,TotalRealFutures
									   ,TotalFuturesProviderMargin
									   ,TotalFuturesLockedCash	
									   --2025-09-29 Stock Margin
									   ,TotalStocksMargin	
									   ,TotalStockMarginLoanValue							   
										)
select 
a.CID
,a.CreditID						
,isnull(a.TotalPositionsAmount,0)
,isnull(a.TotalMirrorPositionsAmount,0)
,isnull(a.TotalStockPositionAmount,0)
,isnull(a.TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount,0)										
,isnull(a.TotalCryptoPositionAmount,0)           
,isnull(a.TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount,0)     
,isnull(pa.TotalRealStocks,0)           
,isnull(pa.TotalRealCrypto,0)    
,isnull(pa.TotalRealCryptoLoan,0)      
,isnull(a.TotalCash,0)					
,isnull(a.BonusCredit,0)	
,isnull(a.RealizedEquity,0)	
,isnull(a.Credit,0)	
,isnull(a.AUM,0)		
,isnull(a.TotalMirrorCash,0)			
,isnull(a.TotalStockOrders,0)			
,isnull(a.TotalMirrorStockOrders,0)		
,isnull(a.InProcessCashouts,0)
,isnull(a.TotalCashCalculation,0)
,isnull(pa.TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS,0)
,isnull(pa.TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS,0)
,isnull(pa.Total_TRSCrypto ,0)
------------------Futures------------------
,isnull(pa.TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount,0)
,isnull(pa.TotalRealFutures,0)
,isnull(pa.TotalFuturesProviderMargin,0)
,isnull(pa.TotalFuturesLockedCash ,0)
--2025-09-29 Stock Margin
,isnull(pa.TotalStocksMargin,0)
,isnull(pa.TotalStockMarginLoanValue,0)
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity a
left join #Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog_CID b
on a.CID = b.CID
join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_TotalPositionAmount pa
on b.CID=pa.CID
where 
right(convert(VARCHAR(12),DateRangeID),4)='1231' and left(convert(VARCHAR(12),DateRangeID),4)=year(@date)
and 
a.CID NOT IN (SELECT CID FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Fact_SnapshotEquity);


SELECT @maxupdatedate = MAX(UpdateDate)
FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity
    ---**** Finish   Treatmant for Position than change IsSettled for column TotalRealStocks & TotalRealCrypto

	EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','CreateFinalEquityStgTable',@dateid,10,@rowcount,NULL,NULL,NULL;  -- original value @@rowcount,NULL,NULL,NULL;

	MERGE INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity AS a
USING [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Fact_SnapshotEquity AS b
  ON a.CID=b.CID
WHEN MATCHED AND 
	(a.TotalPositionsAmount<>b.TotalPositionsAmount
	or a.TotalCash<>b.TotalCash
	or a.InProcessCashouts<>b.InProcessCashouts
	or a.TotalMirrorPositionsAmount<>b.TotalMirrorPositionsAmount
	or a.TotalStockPositionAmount<>b.TotalStockPositionAmount
	or a.TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount	<>b.TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount
	or a.TotalCryptoPositionAmount<>b.TotalCryptoPositionAmount               -- added
	or a.TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount<>b.TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount   -- added
    or a.TotalRealStocks<>b.TotalRealStocks               -- added
	or a.TotalRealCrypto<>b.TotalRealCrypto   -- added
	or a.TotalRealCryptoLoan<>b.TotalRealCryptoLoan   -- added
	or a.TotalMirrorCash<>b.TotalMirrorCash
	or a.TotalStockOrders<>b.TotalStockOrders
	or a.TotalMirrorStockOrders<>b.TotalMirrorStockOrders
	or a.BonusCredit<>b.BonusCredit
	or a.TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS<>b.TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
	or a.TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS<>b.TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
	or a.Total_TRSCrypto<>b.Total_TRSCrypto
	------------------Futures------------------
	or a.TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount<>b.TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount
	or a.TotalRealFutures<>b.TotalRealFutures
	or a.TotalFuturesProviderMargin<>b.TotalFuturesProviderMargin
	or a.TotalFuturesLockedCash<>b.TotalFuturesLockedCash
	------------------StockMargin------------------
	or a.TotalStocksMargin<>b.TotalStocksMargin	
	or a.TotalStockMarginLoanValue<>b.TotalStockMarginLoanValue
	--OR a.RegulationID<>b.RegulationID
	) AND convert(datetime,left(convert(varchar(16),DateRangeID),4)+right(convert(varchar(16),DateRangeID),4))>=@maxentrydate THEN
  UPDATE SET 
	DateRangeID=convert(bigint,left(convert (Varchar(20),DateRangeID),8)+right(convert (Varchar,@daybefore,112),4))
	,UpdateDate=getdate()

WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT ( CreditID
		,CID
		,DateRangeID
		,TotalPositionsAmount
		,TotalCash
		,TotalCashCalculation
		,InProcessCashouts
		,TotalMirrorPositionsAmount
		,TotalStockPositionAmount
		,TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount		
		,TotalCryptoPositionAmount           -- added
		,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount     -- added
		,TotalRealStocks           -- added
		,TotalRealCrypto     -- added
		,TotalRealCryptoLoan
		,TotalMirrorCash
		,TotalStockOrders
		,TotalMirrorStockOrders
		,BonusCredit
		,RealizedEquity
		,Credit
		,AUM
		,UpdateDate
		,TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
		,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
		,Total_TRSCrypto
		------------------Futures------------------
		 ,TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount
		 ,TotalRealFutures
		 ,TotalFuturesProviderMargin
		 ,TotalFuturesLockedCash
		 ------------------StockMargin------------------
		 ,TotalStocksMargin		 
		 ,TotalStockMarginLoanValue
		 )
VALUES(  b.CreditID
		,b.CID
		,convert(bigint,convert (Varchar,@date,112)+right(convert (Varchar,@largedate,112),4))
		,b.TotalPositionsAmount
		,b.TotalCash
		,b.TotalCashCalculation
		,b.InProcessCashouts
		,b.TotalMirrorPositionsAmount
		,b.TotalStockPositionAmount
		,b.TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount		
		,b.TotalCryptoPositionAmount     ---- added
		,b.TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount -- added
		,b.TotalRealStocks           -- added
		,b.TotalRealCrypto     -- added
		,b.TotalRealCryptoLoan
		,b.TotalMirrorCash
		,b.TotalStockOrders
		,b.TotalMirrorStockOrders
		,b.BonusCredit
		,b.RealizedEquity
		,b.Credit
		,b.TotalMirrorPositionsAmount+b.TotalMirrorCash
		,getdate()
		,b.TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
		,b.TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
		,b.Total_TRSCrypto
		------------------Futures------------------
		,b.TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount
		,b.TotalRealFutures
		,b.TotalFuturesProviderMargin
		,b.TotalFuturesLockedCash
		------------------StockMargin------------------
		,b.TotalStocksMargin	
		,b.TotalStockMarginLoanValue
		)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Fact_SnapshotEquity');

	SELECT @rowcount = SUM(row_count)
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	--INTO #outputdata
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Fact_SnapshotEquity'
	--ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

--OUTPUT
--$action,
--inserted.CID,
--inserted.DateRangeID
--INTO #outputdata;
INSERT INTO #outputdata
SELECT 'UPDATE' AS action,
CID,
DateRangeID --, *
FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity 
WHERE DateRangeID <> convert(bigint,convert (Varchar,@date,112)+right(convert (Varchar,@largedate,112),4))
--DateRangeID=convert(bigint,left(convert (Varchar(20),DateRangeID),8)+right(convert (Varchar,@daybefore,112),4))
AND UpdateDate > @maxupdatedate;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','Merge The Data',@dateid,10,@rowcount,NULL,NULL,NULL;  -- original value @@rowcount,NULL,NULL,NULL;


/*INSERT UPDATED RECORDS*/

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','insert updated record',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL;

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity 
			(CreditID
			,CID
			,DateRangeID
			,TotalPositionsAmount
			,TotalCash
			,TotalCashCalculation
			,InProcessCashouts
			,TotalMirrorPositionsAmount
			,TotalStockPositionAmount
			,TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount			
			,TotalCryptoPositionAmount           -- added
			,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount     -- added
			,TotalRealStocks           -- added
		    ,TotalRealCrypto     -- added
			,TotalRealCryptoLoan
			,TotalMirrorCash
			,TotalStockOrders
			,TotalMirrorStockOrders
			,BonusCredit
			,RealizedEquity
			,Credit
			,AUM
			,UpdateDate
			,TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
			,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
			,Total_TRSCrypto
			----------------Futures------------------
			,TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount
			,TotalRealFutures
			,TotalFuturesProviderMargin
			,TotalFuturesLockedCash		
			------------------StockMargin------------------
			,TotalStocksMargin	
			,TotalStockMarginLoanValue		
			)

SELECT   CreditID 
		,CID
		,convert(bigint,convert (Varchar,@date,112)+right(convert (Varchar,@largedate,112),4))
		,TotalPositionsAmount
		,TotalCash
		,TotalCashCalculation
		,InProcessCashouts
		,TotalMirrorPositionsAmount
		,TotalStockPositionAmount
		,TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount		
		,TotalCryptoPositionAmount           -- added
		,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount     -- added
		,TotalRealStocks           -- added
		,TotalRealCrypto     -- added
		,TotalRealCryptoLoan
		,TotalMirrorCash
		,TotalStockOrders
		,TotalMirrorStockOrders
		,BonusCredit
		,RealizedEquity
	    ,Credit
		,TotalMirrorPositionsAmount+TotalMirrorCash
		,getdate()
		,TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
		,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
		,Total_TRSCrypto
		----------------Futures------------------
		,TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount
		,TotalRealFutures
		,TotalFuturesProviderMargin
		,TotalFuturesLockedCash	
		------------------StockMargin------------------		
		,TotalStocksMargin
		,TotalStockMarginLoanValue
FROM [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Fact_SnapshotEquity a
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 from #outputdata b where Action='UPDATE' AND a.CID=b.CID);
--(SELECT CID from #outputdata b where Action='UPDATE' AND a.CID=b.CID);
	SELECT @rowcount = count(*)
	from #outputdata 
	where Action='UPDATE' 
    
EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','insert updated record',@dateid,10,@rowcount,NULL,NULL,NULL;  -- original value @@rowcount,NULL,NULL,NULL;
 
/************************************************************ADD NEW DateRangeID INTO THE TABLE *******************************************************************************************/
--all dates create on a specific date are uniqe


EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','ADD NEW DateRangeIDs',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL;

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range(DateRangeID,FromDateID,ToDateID,UpdateDate)
SELECT 
distinct DateRangeID,
convert(bigint,left(convert(VARCHAR (12),DateRangeID),8)),
convert(bigint,left(convert(VARCHAR (12),DateRangeID),4)+right(convert(VARCHAR (12),DateRangeID),4))
,getdate()
from #outputdata  a
where Action='UPDATE' and NOT EXISTS (SELECT DateRangeID from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range b WHERE a.DateRangeID=b.DateRangeID);


INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range(DateRangeID,FromDateID,ToDateID,UpdateDate)
SELECT 
convert(bigint,convert (Varchar,@date,112)+right(convert (Varchar,@largedate,112),4)),
convert(INT,(convert (Varchar,@date,112))),
convert(INT,(convert (Varchar,@largedate,112)))
,getdate()
where convert(bigint,convert (Varchar,@date,112)+right(convert (Varchar,@largedate,112),4)) not in (SELECT DateRangeID from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Range);


EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','ADD NEW DateRangeIDs',@dateid,10,@rowcount,NULL,NULL,NULL;  -- original value @@rowcount,NULL,NULL,NULL;

/**************************************************************CLOSE YEAR FOR CIDs*********************************************************************************************************/
IF MONTH(@date)=01 AND DAY(@date)=01
BEGIN

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','Close Year For CIDs',@dateid,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL;

INSERT INTO  [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity(CreditID
			,CID
			,DateRangeID
			,TotalPositionsAmount
			,TotalCash
			,TotalCashCalculation
			,InProcessCashouts
			,TotalMirrorPositionsAmount
			,TotalStockPositionAmount
			,TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount	
			,TotalCryptoPositionAmount           -- added
			,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount     -- added
		    ,TotalRealStocks           -- added
		    ,TotalRealCrypto     -- added
			,TotalRealCryptoLoan
			,TotalMirrorCash
			,TotalStockOrders
			,TotalMirrorStockOrders
			,BonusCredit
			,RealizedEquity
			,Credit
			,AUM
			,UpdateDate
			,TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
			,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
			,Total_TRSCrypto
			----------------Futures------------------
			,TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount
			,TotalRealFutures
			,TotalFuturesProviderMargin
			,TotalFuturesLockedCash		
			------------------StockMargin------------------
			,TotalStocksMargin			
			,TotalStockMarginLoanValue
			)

SELECT		-99/*Fake CreditID for End Of the Year*/
			, CID
			,CONVERT(BIGINT,CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),YEAR(@date))+'01011231') AS DateRangeID
			,TotalPositionsAmount
			,TotalCash
			,TotalCashCalculation
			,InProcessCashouts
			,TotalMirrorPositionsAmount
			,TotalStockPositionAmount
			,TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount	
			,TotalCryptoPositionAmount           -- added
			,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount     -- added
		    ,TotalRealStocks           -- added
		    ,TotalRealCrypto     -- added 
			,TotalRealCryptoLoan
			,TotalMirrorCash
			,TotalStockOrders
			,TotalMirrorStockOrders
			,BonusCredit
			,RealizedEquity
			,Credit
			,AUM
			,GETDATE()
			,TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
			,TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS
			,Total_TRSCrypto
			----------------Futures------------------
			,TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount
			,TotalRealFutures
			,TotalFuturesProviderMargin
			,TotalFuturesLockedCash	
			------------------StockMargin------------------
			,TotalStocksMargin
			,TotalStockMarginLoanValue
FROM [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity
WHERE  RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(12),DateRangeID),4)='1231' AND LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(12),DateRangeID),4)=YEAR(DATEADD(YEAR,-1,@date))
AND  CID NOT IN (SELECT CID FROM #outputdata 
WHERE DateRangeID <> CONVERT(BIGINT,CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),YEAR(@date))+'01011231')
)
	OPTION (LABEL = 'Fact_SnapshotEquity-Close Year For CIDs');

	SELECT @rowcount = SUM(row_count)
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
	Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
	and row_count > -1
	and r.[label] = 'Fact_SnapshotEquity-Close Year For CIDs'

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','Close Year For CIDs',@dateid,10,@rowcount ,NULL,NULL,NULL; -- original value @@rowcount,NULL,NULL,NULL;
END;

END;/*Procedure*/
SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_DL_To_Synapse:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_DL_To_Synapse] @dt [Date] AS

BEGIN
--feature/Fact_SnapshotEquity-adf
-- =============================================
-- Author:     Daniel Kaplan
-- Create Date: 2021-08-24
-- Description: SP intended to transfer data from DataLake to synapse
-- =============================================
/***************************
** Change History
**************************
Date             Author       Description   
----------     ----------   ------------------------------------
27/01/2022     Inbal BML     add SettlementTypeID
09/01/2024     Inbal BML	 change [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] and [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Position] to [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay]
11/11/2024     Daniel K      add LotCountDecimal to DWH_dbo.Ext_FSE_Trade_Position and DWH_dbo.Ext_FSE_History_Position for futures
29/09/2025     Daniel K      add Stock Margin to DWH_dbo.Ext_FSE_Trade_Position and DWH_dbo.Ext_FSE_History_Position:InitForexRate, AmountInUnitsDecimal
10/12/2025     Daniel K      add Stock Margin to DWH_dbo.Ext_FSE_Trade_Position and DWH_dbo.Ext_FSE_History_Position:InitConversionRate
**********************************************************************************************************************/
--EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_DL_To_Synapse] '2025-09-08'

    -- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
    -- interfering with SELECT statements.
    SET NOCOUNT ON

	--DECLARE @dt as [Date] = '2021-12-18'
	
	DECLARE @Date as DATETIME
	DECLARE @CurrentDate as DATETIME
	DECLARE @DateTime as DATETIME2(7)
	DECLARE @CurrentDateTime as DATETIME2(7)

	--SET @Date = cast(@dt as date)
	SET @DateTime = CAST(@dt as DATETIME2);
	--SET @CurrentDate = DATEADD(DAY, DATEDIFF(DAY,-1,@Date), 0);
	SET @CurrentDate = cast(dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,@dt),0) as date)
	--SET @CurrentDateTime = cast(dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,@dt),0) as DATETIME2)-- Sequence Container - Fact_SnapshotEquity
-- Check Date Equity Snapshot --------------------------------------->

Declare @MaxSnapshot as date
DECLARE @Year VARCHAR(4) = year(@dt)
DECLARE @St_Year VARCHAR(30) = convert(datetime,DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, @dt), 0),8)

--SELECT ISNULL(MAX(convert(datetime,left(convert(varchar(16),DateRangeID),8))), @St_Year) as max
--from [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity
--where
--left(DateRangeID,4) = @Year

-- Delete from [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity  --------------------------------------->

select @MaxSnapshot = MAX(convert(datetime,left(convert(varchar(16),DateRangeID),8)))
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity
WHERE LEFT(DateRangeID,4) = @Year

if @MaxSnapshot >= @dt
BEGIN

Delete from [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity 
where
left(DateRangeID,4) = year(@dt)
and CONVERT(datetime, convert(varchar(8), left(DateRangeID,8)))>=@dt


-- Update DateRangeID  --------------------------------------->	

Update a
set DateRangeID = convert(varchar(8),left(DateRangeID,8)) + '1231'
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity as a
inner join (
select CID, max(DateRangeID) maxDateRangeID
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_SnapshotEquity 
where
left(DateRangeID,4) = year(@dt)
group by CID
) b on a.CID = b.CID and a.DateRangeID = b.maxDateRangeID
where right(a.DateRangeID,4) <> '1231'

END

-- Truncate Ext_FSE_InProcessCashouts  --------------------------------------->	
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_InProcessCashouts

-- Truncate Ext_FSE_InProcessCashouts  --------------------------------------->	
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_WithdrawToFundingAction


-- Extract Ext_FSE_History_WithdrawToFundingAction  --------------------------------------->	
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_WithdrawToFundingAction
SELECT WithdrawID, BW2F_ID, ModificationDate,CashoutStatusID, WithdrawToFundingActionID
from [DWH_staging].etoro_History_WithdrawToFundingAction
--History.WithdrawToFundingAction with (NOLOCK)

-- Truncate Ext_FSE_History_WithdrawAction  --------------------------------------->	
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_WithdrawAction

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_WithdrawAction
SELECT WithdrawID, WithdrawActionID, ModificationDate, CashoutStatusID
FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_WithdrawAction] 
--from History.WithdrawAction

-- Truncate Ext_FSE_Billing_WithdrawToFunding  --------------------------------------->	
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Billing_WithdrawToFunding

-- Extract Ext_FSE_History_WithdrawAction  --------------------------------------->	

INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Billing_WithdrawToFunding
SELECT WithdrawID, ID, Amount
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_WithdrawToFunding] 
--Billing.WithdrawToFunding

-- Truncate Ext_FSE_Billing_Withdraw  --------------------------------------->	
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Billing_Withdraw

-- Extract Ext_FSE_Billing_Withdraw  --------------------------------------->	
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Billing_Withdraw
SELECT CID, Amount, Fee, CashoutStatusID, ModificationDate, RequestDate, WithdrawID
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_Billing_Withdraw] 

--Billing.Withdraw with (NOLOCK)

-- Truncate Ext_FSE_TotalCashChangeAll  --------------------------------------->	
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_TotalCashChangeAll

-- Extract Ext_FSE_TotalCashChangeAll  --------------------------------------->	
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_TotalCashChangeAll
select CID, sum(TotalCashChange) as TotalCashChangeAll 
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ActiveCredit] 
--History.ActiveCredit WITH (NOLOCK)
where Occurred >= @dt and  Occurred < @CurrentDate
group by CID

-- Truncate Ext_FSE_Real_History_Credit  --------------------------------------->	
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Real_History_Credit

-- Extract Ext_FSE_Real_History_Credit  --------------------------------------->	
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Real_History_Credit
(	   CID
	 , Occurred
	 , Credit
	 , Payment
	 , TotalCashChange
	 , CreditTypeID
	 , CashoutID
	 , CampaignID
	 , PositionID
	 , DepositID
	 , WithdrawID
	 , PaymentID
	 , BonusTypeID
	 , MirrorID
	 , [WithdrawPaymentID]
	 , BonusCredit
	 , CreditID
     , CompensationReasonID
     , RealizedEquity
     , TotalCash)
SELECT 
CID
	 , Occurred
	 , Credit
	 , Payment
	 , TotalCashChange
	 , CreditTypeID
	 , CashoutID
	 , CampaignID
	 , PositionID
	 , DepositID
	 , WithdrawID
	 , PaymentID
	 , BonusTypeID
	 , MirrorID
	 , WithdrawProcessingID
	 , isnull(BonusCredit,0) as BonusCredit
	 , CreditID
     , CompensationReasonID
     , RealizedEquity
     ,0 as  TotalCash
FROM
(
SELECT CID
	 , Occurred
	 , Credit
	 , Payment
	 , TotalCashChange
	 , CreditTypeID
	 , CashoutID
	 , CampaignID
	 , PositionID
	 , DepositID
	 , WithdrawID
	 , PaymentID
	 , BonusTypeID
	 , MirrorID
	 , WithdrawProcessingID
	 , isnull(BonusCredit,0) as BonusCredit
	 , CreditID
     , CompensationReasonID
     , cast(RealizedEquity as decimal(16,2)) as RealizedEquity
     ,0 as  TotalCash
	 , row_number() over(partition by CID, convert(int,convert(varchar,Occurred,112)) order by Occurred desc, CreditID desc) as rn
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ActiveCredit] 
--History.ActiveCredit WITH (NOLOCK)
where Occurred >= @dt and  Occurred < @CurrentDate
) a
where rn = 1

-- exec [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_InProcessCashouts  --------------------------------------->	
exec [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_InProcessCashouts @dt



-- Sequence Container - Fact_SnapshotEquity Part2  --------------------------------------->	

-- Truncate Ext_FSE_History_Position  --------------------------------------->	
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_Position

-- Extract Ext_FSE_History_Position  --------------------------------------->	
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_Position
(PositionID,MirrorID,CID,InstrumentID,TotalPositions, IsSettled, InstrumentTypeID,Leverage,ParentPositionID,InitialAmount,SettlementTypeID,LotCountDecimal,
InitForexRate, AmountInUnitsDecimal,InitConversionRate)
Select	PositionID,MirrorID,CID,HP.InstrumentID,Amount as TotalPositions, cast(IsSettled as int)   as IsSettled,  b.[InstrumentTypeID],Leverage,ParentPositionID
,[InitialAmountCents]/100 as InitialAmount,SettlementTypeID
,HP.LotCountDecimal --2024-11-11 for futures 
--2025-09-29 for Stock Margin
,HP.InitForexRate
,HP.AmountInUnitsDecimal
,HP.InitConversionRate
	from  [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_ClosePositionEndOfDay] HP
	--[History].[Position] HP with(nolock)
		left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
		--[Trade].[GetInstrument] b 
	on HP.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
	Where
 HP.CloseOccurred >= dateadd(day,1, @dt) AND HP.OpenOccurred <dateadd(day,1, @dt)
 ---and PositionID  = OriginalPositionID 


-- DROP INDEX Ext_FSE_Trade_Position  --------------------------------------->	
IF EXISTS (SELECT Name FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = object_id('[DWH_dbo].[Ext_FSE_Trade_Position]') AND Name = 'CL_IX_Ext_FSE_Trade_Position') 
DROP INDEX CL_IX_Ext_FSE_Trade_Position ON [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Trade_Position;


-- Truncate Ext_FSE_Trade_Position  --------------------------------------->	
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Trade_Position

-- Extract Ext_FSE_Trade_Position  --------------------------------------->	
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Trade_Position
(PositionID,MirrorID,CID,InstrumentID,TotalPositions, IsSettled, InstrumentTypeID,Leverage,ParentPositionID,InitialAmount,SettlementTypeID,LotCountDecimal,
InitForexRate, AmountInUnitsDecimal,InitConversionRate)
Select PositionID,MirrorID,CID,a.InstrumentID,Amount as TotalPositions, cast(IsSettled as int)   as IsSettled,  b.[InstrumentTypeID],Leverage,ParentPositionID
,[InitialAmountCents]/100 as InitialAmount,SettlementTypeID
,a.LotCountDecimal --2024-11-11 for futures 
--2025-09-29 for Stock Margin
,a.InitForexRate
,a.AmountInUnitsDecimal
,a.InitConversionRate
	From [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_OpenPositionEndOfDay] a 
	--[Trade].[Position] a with(nolock)
	left join [DWH_staging].[etoro_Trade_GetInstrument] b
	--[Trade].[GetInstrument] b 
	on a.InstrumentID = b.InstrumentID
	where Occurred<dateadd(day,1,@dt)


-- CREATE INDEX Ext_FSE_Trade_Position  --------------------------------------->	
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT Name FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = object_id('[DWH_dbo].[Ext_FSE_Trade_Position]') AND Name = 'CL_IX_Ext_FSE_Trade_Position') 
CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX [CL_IX_Ext_FSE_Trade_Position] ON [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FSE_Trade_Position]([PositionID])


-- Remove Duplicate Positions  --------------------------------------->
 DELETE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Trade_Position 
  FROM  [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Trade_Position 
  INNER JOIN  [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_Position
  ON  Ext_FSE_Trade_Position.PositionID = Ext_FSE_History_Position.PositionID

-- Truncate Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog  --------------------------------------->	
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog

-- Extract Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog  --------------------------------------->	
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog
(PositionID,CID,Occurred,IsSettled,PreviousIsSettled)
select 
PositionID,
CID,
Occurred,
Cast(IsSettled as int) IsSettled,
cast(PreviousIsSettled as int ) PreviousIsSettled
from
(
select
pl.PositionID
,pl.CID
,Occurred
,pl.IsSettled
,pl.PreviousIsSettled
, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by pl.PositionID order by  pl.Occurred ) rn
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_PositionChangeLog] pl with (NOLOCK)
--[History].[PositionChangeLog_Active] pl with (NOLOCK)
where Occurred > dateadd(day,datediff(day,-1,@dt),0)
---and isnull(pl.IsSettled,-1) <> isnull(pl.PreviousIsSettled,-1)
and isnull(Cast(pl.IsSettled as int),0)<> isnull(Cast(pl.PreviousIsSettled as int),0)
 and  ChangeTypeID  =13 ---Edit Is Settled
) a
where rn =1

-- Truncate Ext_FSE_History_Credit  --------------------------------------->	
TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_Credit

-- Extract Ext_FSE_History_Credit  --------------------------------------->	
INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_Credit
select PositionID,sum(-TotalCashChange) as Amount
from [DWH_staging].[etoro_History_Credit] with(nolock)
--[History].[Credit] with(nolock)
where CreditTypeID=13 and Occurred >= @CurrentDate
group by PositionID

-- Exec [DWH_dbo].SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_TotalPositionAmount  --------------------------------------->

SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_InProcessCashouts:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_InProcessCashouts] @TargetDate [datetime] AS 
BEGIN
--this procedure is for DWH
---Declare @TargetDate Datetime = '20180130'
declare @auxdate as datetime
set @auxdate=dateadd(day,1,@TargetDate)

--DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #ProcessingDates
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ProcessingDates') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ProcessingDates;
Select  
    WithdrawID
into #ProcessingDates
From    
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_WithdrawAction With (Nolock)
Where    
    CashoutStatusID in (3,4,5,6)
    AND ModificationDate < @auxdate
Group By 
    WithdrawID

---Create Clustered index #ProcessingDates on #ProcessingDates(WithdrawID)  -- Boris Disable Clustered index #ProcessingDates

--DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #a
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#a') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #a;

Select 
    CID
    , sum(Amount) InProcessCashouts
    , sum(Fee) Fee
    into #a 
    From    
    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Billing_Withdraw as Withdraw With (Nolock)
    LEFT JOIN 
            #ProcessingDates ProcessingDates
        On ProcessingDates.WithdrawID = Withdraw.WithdrawID
    WHERE    
        RequestDate < @auxdate
        and (ProcessingDates.WithdrawID Is Null)
        and (not (CashoutStatusID in (3,4,5,6) And ModificationDate < @auxdate))
    Group By CID

-------- Partially

--DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #b
 IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#b') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #b;


SELECT CID
     , SUM(PartiallyProcessedAmount) PartiallyProcessedAmount
     , SUM(PartiallyInProcessAmount) PartiallyInProcessAmount
     , SUM(Fee) Fee
into #b
FROM (
    SELECT
            CID,
            SUM(PaymentAmount) PartiallyProcessedAmount,
			WithdrawID,--added BY Nir sh. 27.01.15
            RequestAmount - SUM(PaymentAmount) PartiallyInProcessAmount,
            AVG(Fee) Fee
    FROM
    (
    SELECT BWDR.CID
            , PaymentsStatusFromHistory.StatusFromHistory
            , BWDR.Amount RequestAmount
			,BWDR.WithdrawID
            , BWTF.Amount PaymentAmount
            , BWDR.Fee
    FROM
        (
            SELECT HWTFA.BW2F_ID
                , HWTFA.CashoutStatusID StatusFromHistory
                , row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY HWTFA.BW2F_ID ORDER BY HWTFA.ModificationDate DESC, HWTFA.WithdrawToFundingActionID DESC) AS Rank
                , HWTFA.WithdrawID
            FROM
                (
                SELECT BWDR.WithdrawID
                    , HWDA.CashoutStatusID StatusFromHistory
					,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY HWDA.WithdrawID ORDER BY HWDA.WithdrawActionID DESC) AS Rank
                   -- , row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY HWDA.WithdrawID ORDER BY HWDA.ModificationDate DESC, HWDA.WithdrawActionID DESC) AS Rank -- use from 2018.04.23 by Boris 
					--, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY HWDA.WithdrawID ORDER BY HWDA.WithdrawActionID DESC) AS Rank -- 2018-02-13 -- not in use from 2018.04.23 by Boris
                FROM
                    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Billing_Withdraw BWDR WITH (NOLOCK)
                    JOIN
                        [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_WithdrawAction HWDA WITH (NOLOCK)
                        ON BWDR.WithdrawID = HWDA.WithdrawID
                WHERE
                    HWDA.ModificationDate < @auxdate
                ) RequestsStatusFromHistory
                JOIN
                    [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_WithdrawToFundingAction HWTFA WITH (NOLOCK)
                    ON RequestsStatusFromHistory.WithdrawID = HWTFA.WithdrawID
                    AND RequestsStatusFromHistory.StatusFromHistory in (5,2) -- 2018-01-31 workaround add Status 2 Katy F
                    AND RequestsStatusFromHistory.Rank = 1
            WHERE
                HWTFA.ModificationDate < @auxdate
        ) PaymentsStatusFromHistory
        JOIN
            [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Billing_Withdraw BWDR WITH (NOLOCK)
            ON BWDR.WithdrawID = PaymentsStatusFromHistory.WithdrawID
            AND PaymentsStatusFromHistory.Rank = 1
            AND PaymentsStatusFromHistory.StatusFromHistory = 3
        JOIN
            [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Billing_WithdrawToFunding BWTF WITH (NOLOCK)
            ON BWTF.ID = PaymentsStatusFromHistory.BW2F_ID
            ) PartiallyProcessedWithdrawIDs
      GROUP BY
            PartiallyProcessedWithdrawIDs.CID,
            PartiallyProcessedWithdrawIDs.RequestAmount,WithdrawID--,--added BY Nir sh. 27.01.15
) a
Group By CID


INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_InProcessCashouts
           (CID
           ,InProcessCashouts
           ,DateModified)
Select  a.CID
		, isnull(InProcessCashouts,0) + isnull(PartiallyInProcessAmount,0)+isnull(Fee1,0) + isnull(Fee2,0) as  InProcessCashouts
		,@TargetDate as TargetDate

From (
    Select isnull(#a.CID,#b.CID) CID
            , InProcessCashouts
            , PartiallyInProcessAmount         
            , #a.Fee Fee1
            , #b.Fee Fee2
    From #a full join #b on #a.CID = #b.CID
        ) a
WHERE isnull(InProcessCashouts,0) + isnull(PartiallyInProcessAmount,0)+isnull(Fee1,0) + isnull(Fee2,0) <> 0.00  -- 2018-01-31 workaround to pull only <> 0
--Order By 1

END
SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_TotalPositionAmou:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_TotalPositionAmount] @TargetDate [datetime] AS 
begin

/********************************************************************************************
Author:      Boris Slutski
Date:        2018-02-08
Description: Update table Fact_CustomerAction
 
**************************
** Change History
**************************
Date            Description Author                             Author   
----------     ---------------------------------------------   -----------
--20140417    |   add "with (nolock)" to HistoryActive Credit| Lior Baber | 27 
--20140915    |   change to work on DWH                      | Max
--20170814    | Add Crypto & update Stokcs                   | Katy F
20200325       use column  InitialAmount for TotalRealCryptoLoan  Boris
############20200707      chanhe calculation on Amount 
27/01/2022    |   add SettlementTypeID and TRS fileds							 | Inbal BML 
30/10/2024    |   change TotalStockPositionAmount and TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount fileds| Daniel Kaplan
			  Add futures fields :TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount,TotalRealFutures,TotalFuturesProviderMargin,TotalFuturesLockedCash  | Daniel Kaplan
2025-07-29	  | Add logic remove the cross over between Real Future Crypto and Stocks and crypto and stocks metrics. they need to be correctly mutually exclusive | Guy M
29/09/2025     Daniel K      add Stock Margin :TotalStocksMargin,TotalStockMarginLoanValue
10/12/2025     Daniel K      change a TotalStockMarginLoanValue calculating - using a InitConversionRate 

*********************************************************************************************/
-- EXEC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_TotalPositionAmount] '2025-07-16'

  --Declare @TargetDate datetime = '2024-12-05'
  SET NOCOUNT ON;
  declare @dateID INT = convert(int,convert(varchar(8),@TargetDate,112))
  DECLARE @row_count INT 
  DECLARE @rowcount INT  

    update  a
	set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Trade_Position a 
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog b
	on a.PositionID = b.PositionID

	update  a
	set IsSettled = b.PreviousIsSettled
	from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_Position a 
	join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog b
	on a.PositionID = b.PositionID

	
	-----*********************

------------	    update  Ext_FSE_Trade_Position
------------	set TotalPositions = b.PreviousAmount
------------	from Ext_FSE_Trade_Position a 
------------	join Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog_Amount b
------------	on a.PositionID = b.PositionID

------------	update  Ext_FSE_History_Position
------------	set TotalPositions = b.PreviousAmount
------------	from Ext_FSE_History_Position a 
------------	join Ext_FSE_PositionChangeLog_Amount b
------------	on a.PositionID = b.PositionID


------------  drop table if EXISTS #PositionAmount
--------------if @trialnum=1 begin
------------select a.*
------------      ,isnull(convert(decimal(16,2),a.TotalPositions),0)
------------	  as NewAmount
------------      ,getdate() as updatedate
------------	  into #PositionAmount
------------from 
------------(
------------select * from Ext_FSE_Trade_Position
------------union all
------------select * from Ext_FSE_History_Position
------------) a




 -- drop table if EXISTS #PositionAmount
  	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PositionAmount') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #PositionAmount;
--if @trialnum=1 begin
select a.*
      ,isnull(convert(decimal(16,2),a.TotalPositions),0)-isnull(b.Amount,0) as NewAmount
      ,getdate() as updatedate
	  into #PositionAmount
from 
(
select * from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_Trade_Position
union all
select * from [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_Position
) a
left join [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_History_Credit b
on(a.PositionID=b.PositionID)
--end



--------------------------#futures--------------------------

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#futures') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #futures;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','Future',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

CREATE TABLE #futures  
WITH
(  
	HEAP,
	DISTRIBUTION =  ROUND_ROBIN
) AS
SELECT InstrumentID,IsFuture,ProviderMarginPerLot
from [DWH_dbo].Dim_Instrument_Snapshot
where IsFuture = 1
AND DateID = @dateID
OPTION (LABEL = 'futures');

EXEC [dbo].[LastRowCount] 'futures' , @row_count OUT

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','Futures',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

create clustered columnstore index inx_SnapshotEquity_futures on #futures
--------------------------#futures--------------------------

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','TotalPositionAmount',@dateID,1,0,NULL,NULL,NULL

--drop table if EXISTS #a
	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#a') IS NOT NULL
		DROP TABLE #a;


select PositionID,NewAmount,InstrumentID,MirrorID,CID,IsSettled, InstrumentTypeID,Leverage,ParentPositionID, InitialAmount, SettlementTypeID,LotCountDecimal,
	   InitForexRate,AmountInUnitsDecimal,InitConversionRate,count(*) as ntimes
into #a
from #PositionAmount
group by PositionID,NewAmount,InstrumentID,MirrorID,CID,IsSettled, InstrumentTypeID,Leverage,ParentPositionID,InitialAmount, SettlementTypeID,LotCountDecimal,InitForexRate,AmountInUnitsDecimal,InitConversionRate


truncate table [DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_TotalPositionAmount


INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FSE_TotalPositionAmount]
           ([CID]
           ,[TotalPositionAmount]
           ,[TotalMirrorPositionAmount]
           ,[TotalStockPositionAmount]
           ,[TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount]
           ,[TotalCryptoPositionAmount]
           ,[TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount]
           ,[TotalRealStocks]
           ,[TotalRealCrypto]
		   ,[TotalRealCryptoLoan]
		   ,[UpdateDate]
		   ,[TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS]
		   ,[TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS]
		   ,[Total_TRSCrypto]
------------------Futures------------------
		   ,[TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount]
		   ,[TotalRealFutures]
		   ,[TotalFuturesProviderMargin]
		   ,[TotalFuturesLockedCash]
			--2025-09-29 Stock Margin
		   ,[TotalStocksMargin]
		   ,[TotalStockMarginLoanValue]
)
select CID
     ,cast(sum(NewAmount) as decimal(16,2)) as TotalPositionAmount
	 ,cast(sum(case when MirrorID>0 AND ISNULL(ParentPositionID,0) != 0  then NewAmount else 0 end) as decimal(16,2)) as TotalMirrorPositionAmount
	 ,cast(sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in (5,6) AND f.InstrumentID IS null then NewAmount else 0 end) as decimal(16,2)) as TotalStockPositionAmount -- guy 2025-07-16
	 ,cast(sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in (5,6) AND f.InstrumentID IS NULL and MirrorID>0 AND ISNULL(ParentPositionID,0) != 0 then NewAmount else 0 end) as decimal(16,2)) as TotalMirrorStockPositionAmount -- guy 2025-07-16
	 ,cast(sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.InstrumentID IS null  then NewAmount else 0 end) as decimal(16,2)) as TotalCryptoPositionAmount -- guy 2025-07-16
	 ,cast(sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.InstrumentID IS null and MirrorID>0 AND ISNULL(ParentPositionID,0) != 0 then NewAmount else 0 end)  as decimal(16,2)) as TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount -- guy 2025-07-16
	-- ,@TargetDate as DateModified
	,cast(sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(5,6) AND f.InstrumentID IS null then NewAmount else 0 end) as decimal(16,2)) as TotalRealStocks -- guy 2025-07-16
	,cast(sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.InstrumentID IS null then NewAmount else 0 end) as decimal(16,2)) as TotalRealCrypto -- guy 2025-07-16
	,cast(sum(case when IsSettled = 1 and InstrumentTypeID in(10) AND f.InstrumentID IS null And Leverage =2 then InitialAmount else 0 end) as decimal(16,2)) as TotalRealCryptoLoan -- guy 2025-07-16
	,getdate() as UpdateDate
	,cast(sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) and SettlementTypeID=2  AND f.InstrumentID IS null  then NewAmount else 0 end) as decimal(16,2)) as TotalCryptoPositionAmount_TRS -- guy 2025-07-16
	,cast(sum(case when InstrumentTypeID in(10) and MirrorID>0 AND f.InstrumentID IS null AND ISNULL(ParentPositionID,0) != 0 and  SettlementTypeID=2 then NewAmount else 0 end)  as decimal(16,2)) as TotalMirrorCryptoPositionAmount_TRS -- guy 2025-07-16
	,cast(sum(case when IsSettled = 0 and InstrumentTypeID in(10)  and  SettlementTypeID=2 then NewAmount else 0 end) as decimal(16,2)) as Total_TRSCrypto
------------------Futures------------------
	,sum(case when f.IsFuture = 1 and MirrorID > 0 then NewAmount else 0 end) as TotalMirrorRealFuturesPositionAmount
	,sum(case when f.IsFuture = 1 then NewAmount else 0 end) as TotalRealFutures
	,sum(case when f.IsFuture = 1 then LotCountDecimal * f.ProviderMarginPerLot else 0 end) as TotalFuturesProviderMargin
	,sum(case when f.IsFuture = 1 then NewAmount - (LotCountDecimal * f.ProviderMarginPerLot) else 0 end) as TotalFuturesLockedCash
------------------Futures------------------
------------------2025-09-29 Stock Margin------------------
	,sum(case when SettlementTypeID = 5 then NewAmount else 0 end) as TotalStocksMargin
	,sum(case when SettlementTypeID = 5 and Leverage <> 1 then InitForexRate*AmountInUnitsDecimal*InitConversionRate-NewAmount else 0 END) as TotalStockMarginLoanValue
	--,sum(case when SettlementTypeID = 5 and Leverage <> 1 then Leverage * InitForexRate * AmountInUnitsDecimal / (Leverage-1) else 0 END) as TotalStockMarginLoanValue
from (
select *,row_number() over(Partition By PositionID order by ntimes desc) as rn--, getdate() as UpdateDate
 from #a
) a 
left join #futures f
	ON a.InstrumentID = f.InstrumentID
where rn =1
group by CID--,UpdateDate
OPTION (LABEL = '[DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_TotalPositionAmount');


SELECT top 1 @row_count = row_count
FROM sys.dm_pdw_request_steps s, sys.dm_pdw_exec_requests r
Where r.request_id = s.request_id 
and row_count > -1
and r.[label] = '[DWH_dbo].Ext_FSE_TotalPositionAmount'
ORDER by r.[end_time] desc;

EXEC [DWH_dbo].SP_Log_Full 'Fact_SnapshotEquity','TotalPositionAmount',@dateID,10,@row_count,NULL,NULL,NULL

end

			[VerificationCode], 
			[VendorCode], 
			[DepositID], 
			[CashoutType], 
			[BackOfficeWithdrawReason], 
			[WhiteLabel],

		   )
     SELECT

			[ProcessTime],

			[CustomerLevel], 
			[PreparationType], 
			[Executedby], 
			[ExecutionType], 
			[ExchangeRate], 
			[FeeInPIPs], 
			[PIPsinUSD], 
			[NetAmountinOrigCurrency], 
			[Currency], 
			[Brand], 
			[Depot], 
			[ProcessorValueDate], 
			[VerificationCode], 
			[VendorCode], 
			[DepositID], 
			[CashoutType], 
			[BackOfficeWithdrawReason], 
			[WhiteLabel], 
			[Regulation], 
			[MIDName], 
			[MID],
			getdate() as UpdateDate
FROM [DWH_staging].[etoro_BackOffice_GetProcessedWithdrawPCIVersion]
WHERE StatusModificationTime >= @Yesterday AND StatusModificationTime < dateadd(day,1, @CurrentDate)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
/*

select *
from [DWH_dbo].Fact_Withdraw_Fees 
WHERE ModificationDateID = 20230721

*/

END
SP_KillTableauSessions:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_KillTableauSessions] AS
BEGIN

    DECLARE @StartJob DATETIME
	 
	SET @StartJob=GETUTCDATE() 
 
 	-- Log the start of the procedure in [DE_dbo].[Job_LogTable]
 	INSERT INTO [DE_dbo].[Job_LogTable] ( ActionDescription, Occurred)
 	VALUES ( 'Start Procedure:SP_KillTableauSessions', @StartJob );


		------------------------------------
	DECLARE @killTableau [varchar](4000)
	SELECT @killTableau = STRING_AGG(concat('kill ''', session_id,''''),';')
	FROM 
	(SELECT TOP 200 session_id
	 FROM dbo.ActiveQueriesMonitor
	 WHERE app_name LIKE '%Tableau%' AND 
	       login_name LIKE '%@etoro.com%' AND 
		   total_elapsed_time>=600000 AND
		   login_name NOT IN ('%alexsh@etoro.com%' )

	)a

	 INSERT INTO DE_dbo.TimeoutTerminator (WhenIKilled,login_name,SessionID,RequestID,Command,Start_Time,Duration_min)
	 SELECT GETDATE(),login_name,session_id,request_id,command,start_time,duration_min   FROM dbo.ActiveQueriesMonitor 
	 WHERE app_name LIKE '%Tableau%' AND login_name LIKE '%@etoro.com%' AND total_elapsed_time>=600000

	--AND app_name = 'dbForge SQL Complete'
	--- The app list was changed By Boris P (Pini's request)
	PRINT @killTableau
	EXEC (@killTableau)

	SELECT ISNULL( @killTableau, 'No killed Tableau sessions') killed_sessions




	---------------------------------------



	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#lck') IS NOT NULL
		 DROP TABLE #lck;

	-- Create temporary table #lck with ROUND_ROBIN distribution
	CREATE TABLE #lck
		WITH (HEAP, DISTRIBUTION=ROUND_ROBIN) 
		AS
		SELECT TOP 200  getdate() collection_date,* FROM [dbo].[BlockedSessionsNew]
		WHERE ( 
		[blocking_app_name] LIKE '%Tableau%'
		OR 
		[blocking_app_name] LIKE '%Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio%'
		--OR 
		--[blocking_app_name] is null 
		)
		OR
		(
		 (
		    (
		     blocking_login LIKE '%@etoro.com%'   
		  OR
		     blocking_client_id LIKE '%172.28.130.%' 
			) 
		  --  AND  DATEDIFF(MINUTE,[blocking_start_time],getdate())>10
		 ) --if blocking is more 10 minutes
         
		)

	DECLARE @kill NVARCHAR(max)
	SELECT @kill = STRING_AGG(
				   CONCAT('kill ''', blocking_session_id,'''')
				   ,';') FROM #lck
	EXEC(@kill)

	INSERT INTO [dbo].[KilledTableauSessions]
	([collection_date], [blocked_session_id], [blocked_request_id], [blocked_command], [blocked_login], [blocked_app_name], [blocked_client_id], [blocked_start_time], 
	[blocked_end_time], 
	[blocking_session_id], [blocking_request_id], [blocking_command], [blocking_login], [blocking_app_name], [blocking_client_id], [blocking_start_time], [blocking_end_time])
	SELECT 
	[collection_date], [blocked_session_id], [blocked_request_id], [blocked_command], [blocked_login], [blocked_app_name], [blocked_client_id], [blocked_start_time], 
	[blocked_end_time], [blocking_session_id], [blocking_request_id], [blocking_command], [blocking_login], [blocking_app_name], [blocking_client_id], 
	[blocking_start_time], [blocking_end_time]
	FROM #lck

	IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Killed_Tableau_Sessions') IS NOT NULL
	DROP TABLE #Killed_Tableau_Sessions;

	-- Create temporary table #Killed_Tableau_Sessions with ROUND_ROBIN distribution
	CREATE TABLE #Killed_Tableau_Sessions
	WITH (HEAP, DISTRIBUTION=ROUND_ROBIN) AS
	SELECT *,getdate() collection_time 
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_exec_sessions
	WHERE is_transactional=1
	AND app_name like 'Tableau%'
	AND status = 'Idle'

	DECLARE @kill2 NVARCHAR(max)
	SELECT @kill2 = STRING_AGG(
				   CONCAT('kill ''', session_id,'''')
				   ,';') FROM #Killed_Tableau_Sessions
	EXEC(@kill2)

	INSERT INTO [dbo].KilledTableauSessions_transactional
	([session_id], [status], [request_id], [security_id], [login_name], [login_time], [query_count], 
	[is_transactional], [client_id], [app_name], [sql_spid], [collection_time])
	SELECT
	[session_id], [status], [request_id], [security_id], [login_name], [login_time], [query_count], 
	[is_transactional], [client_id], [app_name], [sql_spid], [collection_time] 
	FROM #Killed_Tableau_Sessions

	SELECT ISNULL( CONCAT(@kill,@kill2), 'No blocking sessions') killed_sessions

	DECLARE @killdbForge [varchar](4000)
	SELECT @killdbForge = STRING_AGG(concat('kill ''', session_id,''''),';')
	FROM 
	(SELECT TOP 200 session_id 
	FROM sys.dm_pdw_exec_sessions
	WHERE status ='Idle' AND 
	 login_time<DATEADD(HOUR,-6,GETDATE()) AND
	(app_name in( 'dbForge SQL Complete' ,'Tableau 2023.3','Tableau 2024.2','Tableau 2021.4'
	,'Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio','Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio - Query',
	'Microsoft SQL Server' )
	OR
    login_name LIKE '%@etoro.com%'
	))a
	--AND app_name = 'dbForge SQL Complete'
	--- The app list was changed By Boris P (Pini's request)

 	 EXEC (@killdbForge)

	SELECT ISNULL( @killdbForge, 'No killed dbForge sessions') killed_sessions

	-- Log the end of the procedure in [DE_dbo].[Job_LogTable]
	SET @StartJob=GETUTCDATE() 
	INSERT INTO [DE_dbo].[Job_LogTable] ( ActionDescription, Occurred)
	VALUES ( 'End Procedure:SP_KillTableauSessions', @StartJob );

END
SP_Load_Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandl:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Load_Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted] @Yesterday [DATETIME] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted];

    INSERT INTO [DWH_dbo].[Ext_FCUPNL_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted] 
    (
          [rn]
        , [InstrumentID]
        , [AskLast]
        , [BidLast]
        , [AskFirst]
        , [DateFrom]
    )
    SELECT 
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY InstrumentID ORDER BY DateFrom DESC) AS rn
        , InstrumentID
        , CAST(AskLast  AS DECIMAL(16,8)) AS AskLast
        , CAST(BidLast  AS DECIMAL(16,8)) AS BidLast
        , CAST(AskFirst AS DECIMAL(16,8)) AS AskFirst
        , DateFrom
    FROM [DWH_staging].[PriceLog_Candles_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted]
    WHERE DateFrom < @Yesterday;
END
SP_Log_Full:
CREATE PROC [DWH_dbo].[SP_Log_Full] @process [varchar](50),@subrocess [varchar](50),@dateID [int],@type [tinyint],@rowcount [int],@error [INT],@errormsg [varchar](8000),@partitionid [INT] AS
BEGIN
 
  
	/****************************************************/
	/* @type is a tinyint which holds if the procedure  */
	/* is activeated in the begining of the sub process */
	/* or in the end of it                              */
	/* 1- begin of process                              */
	/* 10- end of process                                */
	/****************************************************/

	----if @process = 'Fact_CustomerAction' and @subrocess = 'STG_Real_History_Credit_ForFactAction' and @type = 1
	----	delete from [DWH_dbo].Log_Main_Full where DateID = @dateID and Process = @process
	IF @error IS NULL 
		SET @error=0
	IF @errormsg IS NULL 
		SET @errormsg=''
	IF @partitionid IS NULL 
		SET @partitionid=0

	IF @type = 1
		insert INTO [DWH_dbo].Log_Main_Full ( DateID, Process, SubProcess, StartOccurred, [Type], Row_Count, PartitionID )
		select @dateID
		,      @process
		,      @subrocess
		,      getdate()
		,      @type
		,      @rowcount
		,      @partitionid
	else
		update [DWH_dbo].Log_Main_Full
		set FinishOccurred = getdate()
		,   [Type] =         @type
		,   Row_Count =      @rowcount
		,   Error =          @error
		,   ErrorMsg =       @errormsg
		where Process = @process
			and SubProcess = @subrocess
			and DateID = @dateID
			and PartitionID = @partitionid

	IF @error>0
	begin
		insert INTO [DWH_dbo].Log_Main_Full ( Process, SubProcess, DateID, [Type], Row_Count, Error, ErrorMsg )
		select @process
		,      @subrocess
		,      @dateID
		,      @type
		,      @rowcount
		,      @error
		,      @errormsg
	end/*internal if */
	PRINT 'etl.FollowUp - @process :' + @process + ' @subrocess : ' + @subrocess + ' @type : ' + convert(varchar, @type) + ' Time : ' + convert(varchar, getdate(), 113)+'Row Count: '+convert(varchar, @rowcount)
	 
END/*Porcedure*/
